body:
| | | This is it, my friend. We have until midnight tonight to hit our $25,000 mid-month fundraising goal — and we’re counting on grassroots supporters like you to push us over the finish line. **This money goes directly to the work that wins elections — hosting town halls, traveling the district, and meeting voters face-to-face in communities too often ignored by Washington politicians.** This is how we beat Lauren Boebert — not with flashy headlines, but with real conversations and real solutions. **[I’ve spent my career solving tough problems. I’m ready to do the same in Congress — but first, we need to finish strong tonight. Can you chip in before the clock runs (www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

subject: I’m personally reaching out

body:

Hi Peter, it's Pramila Jayapal.

subject: Blunt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Team,

I’ve been going everywhere, even on Fox News , to shed light on the immense damage Donald Trump has caused to our country in his first 100+ days.

To put it bluntly, Trump is recklessly endangering the economy, people’s livelihoods, their retirement savings, and much more. We’re just a few months in, and the effects have been disastrous for so many hardworking families.

The President has started a global trade war with many of our allies like Canada, raising the cost of everyday goods and housing. He’s introduced a budget to gut Medicaid and take away health care from millions of Americans. And now they are trying to pass another massive tax cut for the wealthy and special interests.

Listen, I’m a proud Democrat, and I’m proud to say that we represent ALL of America — not just the wealthy few.

This is how it should be.

I’m doing everything I can to make sure voters know what’s at stake, because when you’ve got unelected billionaires like Elon Musk meddling in our government, it’s never been more important to remember that the power lies with the people.

People like you, friend.

A brighter future for Colorado and our country is possible, but we need everyone off the sidelines to create real progress. Will you pitch in today to support my work to reach voters and hold this administration accountable? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-may25?amount=]

Jason

_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Border Corruption Update
body:
Biden Dementia COVER-UP

[INSIDE JW]

JUSTICE DEPARTMENT RECORDS DETAIL BIDEN PRESSURE ON SPECIAL COUNSEL
HUR

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74026&L=35186&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1LbXRBMlpMaDNqSSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=3f5ddf6bad93c6ef9fa645118fd5ffaba53c883ac61acec023099eea4bbfb181]

We received 49 pages
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74026&L=35177&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWh1ci1uZGFzLTAyMTc5Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=5632c47588563a8fc6247448f2d76c31c6da8ce5d7c55ab5730c6b269f576313]
of
records from the Department of Justice detailing pressure by the Biden
White House and Joe Biden’s personal lawyers on Special Counsel
Robert Hur regarding the October 2023 interviews
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74026&L=31466&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3Yvc3RvcmFnZS9yZXBvcnQtZnJvbS1zcGVjaWFsLWNvdW5zZWwtcm9iZXJ0LWstaHVyLWZlYnJ1YXJ5LTIwMjQucGRmP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=06a6d548e618f1e7fc59649f0b7384a7c832a2ab167880afc3f21250cdc0d0d0]
of then-President Biden in the criminal investigation into his theft,
retention, and disclosure of classified records.

These records show how desperate the Biden gang was to hide the full
truth about Biden’s failing memory and criminality.

We filed a July 2024 FOIA lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74026&L=33091&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdHJhbnNjcmlwdHMtb2Ytc3BlY2lhbC1jb3Vuc2VsLWludGVydmlld3MvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=f8be6f8239d0ed6c32c2a0ca7354e026f46ca2c0dbadb6a3bd249e13102b9c96]
against the Department of Justice for all communications about the Hur
report with the Office of the White House Counsel and Biden’s
personal lawyers (_Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Justice_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74026&L=33070&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWh1ci1iaWRlbi1jb21tcy1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDIxNzkvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=c00322fcd4f326b1a37c051500805063c875aed1a5f85a19572efea14b2da012]
(No. 1:24-cv-02179)).

We have several ongoing FOIA lawsuits about Biden’s document
scandals and the related unprecedented partisan prosecutorial and
judicial abuses of former President Donald J. Trump.

In April 2025, we uncovered Justice Department records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74026&L=35021&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdHJhbnNjcmlwdC1vZi1iaWRlbi1pbnRlcnZpZXcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=f38e41393e0bab4fbb58f30d0927435e4e7526f6e45ac3c6ca2e07a0d65edbe8]
showing
White House staffers suggesting edits to transcripts of President
Biden’s interview with Hur.

In February 2025, a federal court ordered
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74026&L=34558&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcmVsZWFzaW5nLWJpZGVuLWF1ZGlvLXRhcGVzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=23cc6bf77ece98bfb6ae851d3a890f9ed102966debfc827d0d9f2388878724a9]
the
Department of Justice to declare whether it intends to continue
denying our request for the full audio of the Hur interview. The Trump
Justice Department has until May 20, 2025, to report its position on
the release of the videotape.

In June 2024, the Biden administration was forced to admit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74026&L=32576&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY291bnNlbC10cmFuc2NyaXB0LWluYWNjdXJhdGUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=7f63dd32df079828f99b4c52dd105cde3e7bbee5d4c80730fc637c6075c738ee]
that
the transcripts of audio recordings of Biden’s interviews had been
altered and are not accurate.

The new records include an October 18, 2023, letter
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74026&L=35178&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWh1ci1uZGFzLTAyMTc5LXBncy00LTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=bc650668459e220d4fc3d5a56ea69267d51a1e353e17c2bc0e46801862b61939],
just a few days after Hur’s interviews of Biden, from the Special
Counsel to the President Richard Sauber and Biden’s personal
attorney Bob Bauer to Hur, in which they express concerns about the
release of the report:

> At our meeting last Friday, we requested that you provide an
> overview of where matters stand in this case, particularly any
> remaining questions or concerns we should address. We also asked for
> the opportunity to discuss your expected report to the Attorney
> General at the conclusion of the investigation, including time to
> review it prior to its submission to the Attorney General. You
> advised us that you were not prepared to engage with these requests
> at that time but would take them under consideration.
>
> ***
>
> Moreover, to the extent that your report touches in any way upon
> procedures in this or prior administrations for the handling of
> sensitive national security information, your report will also be
> read with intense interest in every foreign capital. It could affect
> the national security interests of the United States in ways that
> none of us can anticipate.

An October 31, 2023, email
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74026&L=35179&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWh1ci1uZGFzLTAyMTc5LXBncy03LTE1Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=89a42d9e4c39f3a8adea071a886e225fc8469d523888987cdc34f685ac76973d]
from Sauber to the Special Counsel’s Office documents the repeated
efforts by the Biden legal team to review the report before its
release. The letter states:

> In our October 18 letter to you, we asked to have the opportunity to
> review and comment on a draft of the “confidential” report that
> you are required to write under the Special Counsel regulations. We
> also noted that we would follow up on the subject of the Special
> Counsel’s “final report” requirement more broadly.
>
> ***
>
> At a minimum, the report should adhere to the kind of product
> contemplated by the Special Counsel regulations. As discussed, in
> contrast to the detailed independent counsel reports setting forth a
> “full and complete” description of their work, the Special
> Counsel regulations contemplate only that the Special Counsel will
> “explain[] the prosecution or declination decisions.” ... We
> support your faithful fulfillment of this requirement. But,
> consistent with the Department’s description of a “limited”
> and “summary” product, ... , the report should be economical. It
> should include the factual information necessary to the charging
> decision, but facts or events that are not essential to the decision
> have no place....

In a December 15, 2023, letter
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74026&L=35180&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWh1ci1uZGFzLTAyMTc5LXBncy0xOC0yMC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=df742c69944a18b26696a0000164991c0d5cdee41ba1b250d672525b0f6b90b9]
Sauber and Bauer reiterate the request and also ask for access to the
classification review of the materials found and the return of the
records of a personal nature to Biden.

In a January 3, 2024, letter
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74026&L=35181&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWh1ci1uZGFzLTAyMTc5LXBncy0yMi0yMy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=f203392c0203011a3e54eb30aa2000354dcfc26e1c32e889877dd6c13b8e8627]
Sauber and Bauer again reiterate the request for a pre-release review
and express concern that the final report provide an “appropriate
public presentation” of the facts of the case.

Non-disclosure agreements signed by the president’s lawyers are
included in the records.

On January 5, 2024, “RKHSC,” (Robert K. Hur, special counsel)
sends an email
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74026&L=35182&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWh1ci1uZGFzLTAyMTc5LXBncy0yNC0zMi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=c1de797126a5de33b9b7f14b25ae827fd7651f0f4e551e79fb43d390f6536590]
to Bauer and others discussing “nondisclosure agreement and
certification.” The non-disclosure agreement and certification
state:

> NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

> * This agreement applies to the review by members of the White
> House Counsel’s Office and personal counsel of the report of the
> Special Counsel’s Office.
> * Review will be limited to the following people: Ed Siskel (White
> House Counsel), Richard Sauber (Special Counsel to the President),
> Rachel Cotton (Senior Counsel to the President), Robert Bauer
> (personal counsel), and Jennifer Miller (personal counsel). This
> agreement refers to this group collectively as “counsel.”

> CERTIFICATION

> By this certification, I affirm to the Department of Justice that I
> have and will continue to adhere to the terms of the attached
> non-disclosure agreement ...
>
> I understand that Title 18, United States Code, Section 1001, makes
> it a felony to knowingly and willfully make a materially false
> statement in any matter within the jurisdiction of the executive
> branch of the Government of the United States.

On January 9, Bauer emails his and Jennifer Miller’s
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74026&L=35183&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVtYmFyLmNvbS9wZW9wbGUvbWlsbGVyLWplbm5pZmVyLWdyYWNlP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=4ebae8676bd132e48cf896bc0ce3e75044aa1b2dd2fd0b25d69ef1ce5bdf102d]
non-disclosure
agreements and certifications to Hur and others.

In a February 5, 2024, letter
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74026&L=35184&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWh1ci1uZGFzLTAyMTc5LXBncy0zOC00Mi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=b135905addc0810775de30d17e233bc10e89bcdacab58c528da2cb2f16cb93af]
to Hur, Sauber and Bauer outline their complaints about the draft
report. The first concern they raise is the report’s
characterization of Biden’s failing memory:

> We do not believe that the report’s treatment of President
> Biden’s memory is accurate or appropriate. The report uses highly
> prejudicial language to describe a commonplace occurrence among
> witnesses: a lack of recall of years-old events. Such comments have
> no place in a Department of Justice report, particularly one that in
> the first paragraph announces that no criminal charges are
> “warranted” and that “the evidence does not establish Mr.
> Biden’s guilt.” If the evidence does not establish guilt, then
> discussing the jury impact of President Biden’s hypothetical
> testimony at a trial that will never occur is entirely superfluous.

In the February 5, 2024, “Report of the Special Counsel on the
Investigation Into Unauthorized Removal, Retention, and Disclosure of
Classified Documents Discovered at Locations Including the Penn Biden
Center and the Delaware Private Residence of President Joseph R.
Biden, Jr.” Hur called Biden a “well-meaning, elderly man with a
poor memory” and declined to charge
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74026&L=31466&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3Yvc3RvcmFnZS9yZXBvcnQtZnJvbS1zcGVjaWFsLWNvdW5zZWwtcm9iZXJ0LWstaHVyLWZlYnJ1YXJ5LTIwMjQucGRmP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=06a6d548e618f1e7fc59649f0b7384a7c832a2ab167880afc3f21250cdc0d0d0]
Biden with a “serious felony:”

> We have also considered that, at trial, Mr. Biden would likely
> present himself to a jury, as he did during our interview of him, as
> a sympathetic, well-meaning, elderly man with a poor memory. Based
> on our direct interactions with and observations of him, he is
> someone for whom many jurors will want to identify reasonable doubt.
> It would be difficult to convince a jury that they should convict
> him-by then a former president well into his eighties-of a serious
> felony that requires a mental state of willfulness.

Prior to the finalization of the report, the White House issued a
letter
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74026&L=31466&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3Yvc3RvcmFnZS9yZXBvcnQtZnJvbS1zcGVjaWFsLWNvdW5zZWwtcm9iZXJ0LWstaHVyLWZlYnJ1YXJ5LTIwMjQucGRmP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=06a6d548e618f1e7fc59649f0b7384a7c832a2ab167880afc3f21250cdc0d0d0]
to the Special Counsel’s office attacking the report’s
“treatment of President Biden’s memory,” and added “there is
ample evidence from your interview that the President did well in
answering your questions ...”

We expect the Hur tapes will finally be released to Judicial Watch at
any time now, so come back here for more details.

FIVE MILLION NAMES CLEANED FROM VOTER ROLLS THANKS TO JUDICIAL WATCH

Judicial Watch is the leader in restoring integrity to our election
system. In _Investigative Bulletin_, Micah Morrison, our chief
investigative reporter, provides an overview
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74026&L=35168&F=T&&hash=54a98dc0af766e1e8cc838fce97a5fdf7566055cdbed1702d666a75e847d5956]
of our historic work.

> Judicial Watch made history last month when new developments in
> landmark legal actions led to the inactivation, processing, or
> removal of more than five million ineligible names from voter rolls
> nationwide. “Judicial Watch’s clean-up of over five million
> dirty names from voter rolls is a historic achievement for clean
> elections,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “I have no
> doubt that Judicial Watch’s election integrity heavy lifting
> helped stop the steal in 2024. But there are millions of more names
> to be removed from voter rolls.”
>
> Clean elections matter. Dirty voter rolls—the presence of voters
> who have been disqualified from voting due to death or a change of
> address—create opportunities for fraud, opening the door to
> illegal votes swinging close elections. A key weapon in the battle
> for clean elections is the National Voter Registration Act. The NVRA
> directs the states to make “a reasonable effort” to remove from
> voting rolls “the names of ineligible voters” who have been
> disqualified from voting due to death or change of residence.
>
> Judicial Watch has been deploying the NVRA for years in courts
> across the land, pressuring state governments to clean up their
> voter rolls. Recent developments in cases in Kentucky and New York
> put Judicial Watch past the five million milestone.
>
> In Kentucky, state election board officials reported
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74026&L=35187&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvd3AtY29udGVudC91cGxvYWRzLzIwMjUvMDMvSlctdi4tQWRhbXMtS1ktTlZSQS1ub3RpY2UtMDAwOTQucGRmP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=6e32229a54a5fb6ef66be8507675b4f4a59fb1f225ccb5c34d588a4992c844a6]
> that “roughly 735,000 ineligible voter registrations” have been
> removed from voter rolls, as part of a 2018 consent decree settling
> a Judicial Watch lawsuit. “Since the consent decree was
> entered,” election officials notes, “a lot has changed. The
> State Board of Elections has worked overtime to comply with the
> consent decree and to clean up Kentucky’s voter rolls.”
>

> President Trump recognized the importance of election integrity
> efforts with a March 25 Executive Order, “Preserving and
> Protecting the Integrity of American Elections.”
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74026&L=34850&F=T&&hash=e0e21667f86909f63d0f97c6641918710b3685eea55bb9d06dfc7ffd946dc921]
> The sweeping order notes two key areas where Judicial Watch has long
> been a national leader.
>
> One is voter roll clean-up under the National Voter Registration
> Act. “Maintaining accurate voter registration lists” through the
> NVRA and other federal laws “is a fundamental requirement in
> protecting voters from having their ballots voided or diluted by
> fraudulent votes,” the presidential order notes. It directs “the
> Attorney General [to] take appropriate action with respect to states
> that fail to comply with the list maintenance requirements” of the
> NVRA.
>
> The presidential order notes a second area where Judicial Watch has
> long been active: fighting to ensure that Election Day remains just
> that—a single day. “Federal law establishes a uniform Election
> Day across the Nation for Federal elections,” the order says. But
> “numerous States fail to comply with those laws by counting
> ballots received after Election Day. This is like allowing persons
> who arrive three days after Election Day, perhaps after a winner has
> been declared, to vote in person at a former voting precinct, which
> would be absurd.”
>
> Judicial Watch has mounted numerous legal challenges to states
> seeking to stretch Election Day into Election Week or Election
> Month.
>
> In Mississippi, the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit
> sided with Judicial Watch. The full Fifth Circuit court declined to
> revisit the appellate panel ruling that ballots arriving after
> Election Day cannot be counted.
>
> The appellate panel ruled
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74026&L=34781&F=T&&hash=9a03da0f39a326b1583d9b03b2fba14021abdf4ced5af55fc691c141b692340d]
> that “Congress statutorily designated a singular ‘day for the
> election’ of members of Congress and the appointment of
> presidential electors. Text, precedent, and historical practice
> confirm that this ‘day for the election’ is the day by which
> ballots must be both cast by voters and received by state
> officials.”
>
> In an Illinois case, Judicial Watch has asked the U.S. Supreme Court
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74026&L=35190&F=T&&hash=a9551cdaa8ae22f08200dffb2ff6f4dfa1529294001a0456ed0ef62f01c5fdf9]
> to review lower court rulings that allow the state to count mail-in
> ballots as late as fourteen days after election day.
>
> And in California, Judicial Watch filed a federal lawsuit to prevent
> state officials from transforming Election Day into Election Week.
> The Judicial Watch lawsuit
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74026&L=34746&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2lzc2Etdi13ZWJlci1lbGVjdGlvbi1kYXktY29tcGxhaW50Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=90a17399bd119174a4f593e03a3e6ce941aa400fbaa6367e91434eb3106cd322]
> was filed on behalf of U.S. Representative Darrell Issa to prevent
> state election officials from extending Election Day for seven days
> beyond the date established by federal law.
>
> “Despite Congress’ unambiguous and longstanding statement
> regarding a single and uniform national Election Day,” says the
> Judicial Watch lawsuit, “California modified and extended Election
> Day by allowing seven additional days after Election Day for receipt
> of vote-by-mail ballots.”
>
> The lawsuit notes that late-arriving ballots can “change electoral
> outcomes in California.” Two of Rep. Issa’s Republican
> colleagues were leading on Election Night 2024 “but ultimately
> lost reelection due to late-arriving [vote-by-mail] ballots.
>
> Issa called on California to fix its “broken systems of
> elections.” In California, he told Breitbart
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74026&L=34851&F=T&&hash=6f535b275927146770025cf04615873c1722a16d5d84a28e9f368c99076db7d3],
> “Election Day has become Election Month and ballots are counted
> until Democrats are declared the winner.”

CORRUPTION AT BORDER AGENCY STILL A PROBLEM A DECADE AFTER EXPOSE

An agency we created to protect our borders is still hamstrung by
corruption, as our _Corruption Chronicles_ blog reports
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74026&L=35170&F=T&&hash=aef31bc23f07f06287caca3bce9d8ebb7507f9599ddd54c13aaaaef3b2f3f38a].

> A decade after a Homeland Security Advisory Council determined that
> “true levels of corruption within CBP [Customs and Border
> Protection] are not known
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74026&L=35191&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZGhzLmdvdi9zaXRlcy9kZWZhdWx0L2ZpbGVzL3B1YmxpY2F0aW9ucy9ESFMtSFNBQy1DQlAtSUFQLUludGVyaW0tUmVwb3J0LnBkZl0s4oCdP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=6798889f6d95283e4b5ed110531b3b0bfa1f0bcc3afbb0b050386c39df0e652b
> a myriad of cases, including several in the last few weeks alone,
> indicates the problem is as serious as it was ten years ago at the
> nation’s biggest law enforcement agency. With more than 60,000
> employees, CBP is the country’s frontline border conglomerate
> charged with keeping terrorists and their weapons out of the U.S.
> The agency, which includes Air and Marine Operations and the U.S.
> Border Patrol, was created after the 2001 terrorist attacks to
> protect the American people and safeguard our borders. In its 20th
> anniversary celebration, CBP proclaimed that it continues to grow
> stronger, more dynamic and capable of taking on our nation’s most
> important challenges.
>
> But corruption among its agents is persistent, inevitably
> compromising its critical mission of protecting the nation from
> potential terrorist threats. The problem is so serious that the
> agency conducted a widespread, multi-year study
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74026&L=35192&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY2JwLmdvdi9zaXRlcy9kZWZhdWx0L2ZpbGVzL2Fzc2V0cy9kb2N1bWVudHMvMjAyMy1BdWcvMjNfMDgzMF9jb3JydXB0aW9uLWluLWNicC1jYXNlLXN0dWR5LnBkZj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=8d66ac0d25d7fa45c3b1ca5fc3d17189621a74ead21604b1e3c85e119b93c7b3]
> of corruption in CBP that includes “detailed information on its
> nature and prevalence in the workforce.” The probe found that only
> one quarter of one percent of the CBP workforce is corrupt—defined
> as engagement in criminal activity that involves the misuse of an
> agent’s official position for personal gain—but the impact has
> had “significant and damaging implications for CBP’s reputation,
> ability to execute its mission, and on employee morale,” according
> to investigators. Corrupt agents use knowledge, access, or authority
> granted by virtue of their official position to personally engage in
> criminal activity or to facilitate the criminal activity of others.
> In exchange, they receive material and non-material benefits or
> advantages such as money, goods, services, power, influence, or
> relationships.
>
> In many of the cases officers either infiltrate CBP with the express
> intent of engaging in criminal activity or are recruited by drug
> cartels, officially known as Transnational Criminal Organizations
> (TCOs), to do so. “They facilitate drug and human smuggling
> exclusively at the Southwest Border by failing to perform a function
> of their inspection or enforcement responsibilities,” the
> extensive probe found. Investigators documented that 173 employees
> were convicted or entered guilty pleas for corruption related
> activities. That includes drug smuggling, money laundering, illegal
> alien smuggling, fraud, theft, and misuse of government technology.
> The overwhelming majority of cases involved illegal activity in
> direct opposition to the CBP mission with national security
> implications and crimes occurred at dozens of duty posts in 19
> states with Texas leading the pack, followed by Arizona. More than
> half of the crimes involved the illegal smuggling of drugs,
> migrants, and other contraband into the United State.
>
> In recent cases that had not yet occurred when the study was
> published, a Border Patrol agent in El Paso, Texas was sentenced to
> 18 months in prison
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74026&L=35193&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3YvdXNhby13ZHR4L3ByL2Zvcm1lci1ib3JkZXItcGF0cm9sLWFnZW50LXNlbnRlbmNlZC1icmliZXJ5LWNoYXJnZXM/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=70ba8429894c42f529e8280de8706edd6b0aae747190c814818a15f124612eb2]
> for soliciting bribes from illegal immigrants from El Salvador and
> Mexico in exchange for paperwork that would permit them to remain in
> the U.S. The disgraced federal agent, Fernando Castillo, made false
> entries in the migrants’ immigration file and printed the

> convicted
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74026&L=35194&F=T&&hash=e5a4b9f72706a5739f8ac701c3b8e33c07bbb96b4f2c663c14d68b4595f97607

clean_body: Biden Dementia COVER-UP [INSIDE JW] JUSTICE DEPARTMENT RECORDS DETAIL BIDEN PRESSURE ON SPECIAL COUNSEL HUR [] We received 49 pages [] of records from the Department of Justice detailing pressure by the Biden White House and Joe Biden’s personal lawyers on Special Counsel Robert Hur regarding the October 2023 interviews [] of then-President Biden in the criminal investigation into his theft, retention, and disclosure of classified records. These records show how desperate the Biden gang was to hide the full truth about Biden’s failing memory and criminality. We filed a July 2024 FOIA lawsuit [] against the Department of Justice for all communications about the Hur report with the Office of the White House Counsel and Biden’s personal lawyers (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Justice [] (No. 1:24-cv-02179)). We have several ongoing FOIA lawsuits about Biden’s document scandals and the related unprecedented partisan prosecutorial and judicial abuses of former President Donald J. Trump. In April 2025, we uncovered Justice Department records [] showing White House staffers suggesting edits to transcripts of President Biden’s interview with Hur. In February 2025, a federal court ordered [] the Department of Justice to declare whether it intends to continue denying our request for the full audio of the Hur interview. The Trump Justice Department has until May 20, 2025, to report its position on the release of the videotape. In June 2024, the Biden administration was forced to admit [] that the transcripts of audio recordings of Biden’s interviews had been altered and are not accurate. The new records include an October 18, 2023, letter [], just a few days after Hur’s interviews of Biden, from the Special Counsel to the President Richard Sauber and Biden’s personal attorney Bob Bauer to Hur, in which they express concerns about the release of the report: At our meeting last Friday, we requested that you provide an overview of where matters stand in this case, particularly any remaining questions or concerns we should address. We also asked for the opportunity to discuss your expected report to the Attorney General at the conclusion of the investigation, including time to review it prior to its submission to the Attorney General. You advised us that you were not prepared to engage with these requests at that time but would take them under consideration. * Moreover, to the extent that your report touches in any way upon procedures in this or prior administrations for the handling of sensitive national security information, your report will also be read with intense interest in every foreign capital. It could affect the national security interests of the United States in ways that none of us can anticipate. An October 31, 2023, email [] from Sauber to the Special Counsel’s Office documents the repeated efforts by the Biden legal team to review the report before its release. The letter states: In our October 18 letter to you, we asked to have the opportunity to review and comment on a draft of the “confidential” report that you are required to write under the Special Counsel regulations. We also noted that we would follow up on the subject of the Special Counsel’s “final report” requirement more broadly. At a minimum, the report should adhere to the kind of product contemplated by the Special Counsel regulations. As discussed, in contrast to the detailed independent counsel reports setting forth a “full and complete” description of their work, the Special Counsel regulations contemplate only that the Special Counsel will “explain[] the prosecution or declination decisions.” ... We support your faithful fulfillment of this requirement. But, consistent with the Department’s description of a “limited” and “summary” product, ... , the report should be economical. It should include the factual information necessary to the charging decision, but facts or events that are not essential to the decision have no place.... In a December 15, 2023, letter [] Sauber and Bauer reiterate the request and also ask for access to the classification review of the materials found and the return of the records of a personal nature to Biden. In a January 3, 2024, letter [] Sauber and Bauer again reiterate the request for a pre-release review and express concern that the final report provide an “appropriate public presentation” of the facts of the case. Non-disclosure agreements signed by the president’s lawyers are included in the records. On January 5, 2024, “RKHSC,” (Robert K. Hur, special counsel) sends an email [] to Bauer and others discussing “nondisclosure agreement and certification.” The non-disclosure agreement and certification state: NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT This agreement applies to the review by members of the White House Counsel’s Office and personal counsel of the report of the Special Counsel’s Office. * Review will be limited to the following people: Ed Siskel (White House Counsel), Richard Sauber (Special Counsel to the President), Rachel Cotton (Senior Counsel to the President), Robert Bauer (personal counsel), and Jennifer Miller (personal counsel). This agreement refers to this group collectively as “counsel.” CERTIFICATION By this certification, I affirm to the Department of Justice that I have and will continue to adhere to the terms of the attached non-disclosure agreement ... I understand that Title 18, United States Code, Section 1001, makes it a felony to knowingly and willfully make a materially false statement in any matter within the jurisdiction of the executive branch of the Government of the United States. On January 9, Bauer emails his and Jennifer Miller’s [] non-disclosure agreements and certifications to Hur and others. In a February 5, 2024, letter [] to Hur, Sauber and Bauer outline their complaints about the draft report. The first concern they raise is the report’s characterization of Biden’s failing memory: We do not believe that the report’s treatment of President Biden’s memory is accurate or appropriate. The report uses highly prejudicial language to describe a commonplace occurrence among witnesses: a lack of recall of years-old events. Such comments have no place in a Department of Justice report, particularly one that in the first paragraph announces that no criminal charges are “warranted” and that “the evidence does not establish Mr. Biden’s guilt.” If the evidence does not establish guilt, then discussing the jury impact of President Biden’s hypothetical testimony at a trial that will never occur is entirely superfluous. In the February 5, 2024, “Report of the Special Counsel on the Investigation Into Unauthorized Removal, Retention, and Disclosure of Classified Documents Discovered at Locations Including the Penn Biden Center and the Delaware Private Residence of President Joseph R. Biden, Jr.” Hur called Biden a “well-meaning, elderly man with a poor memory” and declined to charge [] Biden with a “serious felony:” We have also considered that, at trial, Mr. Biden would likely present himself to a jury, as he did during our interview of him, as a sympathetic, well-meaning, elderly man with a poor memory. Based on our direct interactions with and observations of him, he is someone for whom many jurors will want to identify reasonable doubt. It would be difficult to convince a jury that they should convict him-by then a former president well into his eighties-of a serious felony that requires a mental state of willfulness. Prior to the finalization of the report, the White House issued a letter [] to the Special Counsel’s office attacking the report’s “treatment of President Biden’s memory,” and added “there is ample evidence from your interview that the President did well in answering your questions ...” We expect the Hur tapes will finally be released to Judicial Watch at any time now, so come back here for more details. FIVE MILLION NAMES CLEANED FROM VOTER ROLLS THANKS TO JUDICIAL WATCH Judicial Watch is the leader in restoring integrity to our election system. In Investigative Bulletin, Micah Morrison, our chief investigative reporter, provides an overview [] of our historic work. Judicial Watch made history last month when new developments in landmark legal actions led to the inactivation, processing, or removal of more than five million ineligible names from voter rolls nationwide. “Judicial Watch’s clean-up of over five million dirty names from voter rolls is a historic achievement for clean elections,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “I have no doubt that Judicial Watch’s election integrity heavy lifting helped stop the steal in 2024. But there are millions of more names to be removed from voter rolls.” Clean elections matter. Dirty voter rolls—the presence of voters who have been disqualified from voting due to death or a change of address—create opportunities for fraud, opening the door to illegal votes swinging close elections. A key weapon in the battle for clean elections is the National Voter Registration Act. The NVRA directs the states to make “a reasonable effort” to remove from voting rolls “the names of ineligible voters” who have been disqualified from voting due to death or change of residence. Judicial Watch has been deploying the NVRA for years in courts across the land, pressuring state governments to clean up their voter rolls. Recent developments in cases in Kentucky and New York put Judicial Watch past the five million milestone. In Kentucky, state election board officials reported [] that “roughly 735,000 ineligible voter registrations” have been removed from voter rolls, as part of a 2018 consent decree settling a Judicial Watch lawsuit. “Since the consent decree was entered,” election officials notes, “a lot has changed. The State Board of Elections has worked overtime to comply with the consent decree and to clean up Kentucky’s voter rolls.” A lot has changed in New York City too. As part of 2022 [] settlement [] with Judicial Watch, New York City began removing the names of ineligible voters from its voting rolls. Following the settlement, New York removed 440,000 ineligible names. New data [] for March 2023 to February 2025 show the removal of another 477,000 names—a total of more than 900,000 names. Judicial Watch has notched victories in election integrity cases across America. In Los Angeles, county officials confirmed the removal of more than 1.2 million names from voter rolls as part of a settlement of a 2017 Judicial Watch lawsuit []. Judicial Watch legal pressure also resulted in election roll clean-ups in Pennsylvania [], Colorado [], North Carolina [], Kentucky, [] and Ohio []. Judicial Watch continues to pursue cases in Illinois [], Oregon [], and California []. President Trump recognized the importance of election integrity efforts with a March 25 Executive Order, “Preserving and Protecting the Integrity of American Elections.” [] The sweeping order notes two key areas where Judicial Watch has long been a national leader. One is voter roll clean-up under the National Voter Registration Act. “Maintaining accurate voter registration lists” through the NVRA and other federal laws “is a fundamental requirement in protecting voters from having their ballots voided or diluted by fraudulent votes,” the presidential order notes. It directs “the Attorney General [to] take appropriate action with respect to states that fail to comply with the list maintenance requirements” of the NVRA. The presidential order notes a second area where Judicial Watch has long been active: fighting to ensure that Election Day remains just that—a single day. “Federal law establishes a uniform Election Day across the Nation for Federal elections,” the order says. But “numerous States fail to comply with those laws by counting ballots received after Election Day. This is like allowing persons who arrive three days after Election Day, perhaps after a winner has been declared, to vote in person at a former voting precinct, which would be absurd.” Judicial Watch has mounted numerous legal challenges to states seeking to stretch Election Day into Election Week or Election Month. In Mississippi, the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit sided with Judicial Watch. The full Fifth Circuit court declined to revisit the appellate panel ruling that ballots arriving after Election Day cannot be counted. The appellate panel ruled [] that “Congress statutorily designated a singular ‘day for the election’ of members of Congress and the appointment of presidential electors. Text, precedent, and historical practice confirm that this ‘day for the election’ is the day by which ballots must be both cast by voters and received by state officials.” In an Illinois case, Judicial Watch has asked the U.S. Supreme Court [] to review lower court rulings that allow the state to count mail-in ballots as late as fourteen days after election day. And in California, Judicial Watch filed a federal lawsuit to prevent state officials from transforming Election Day into Election Week. The Judicial Watch lawsuit [] was filed on behalf of U.S. Representative Darrell Issa to prevent state election officials from extending Election Day for seven days beyond the date established by federal law. “Despite Congress’ unambiguous and longstanding statement regarding a single and uniform national Election Day,” says the Judicial Watch lawsuit, “California modified and extended Election Day by allowing seven additional days after Election Day for receipt of vote-by-mail ballots.” The lawsuit notes that late-arriving ballots can “change electoral outcomes in California.” Two of Rep. Issa’s Republican colleagues were leading on Election Night 2024 “but ultimately lost reelection due to late-arriving [vote-by-mail] ballots. Issa called on California to fix its “broken systems of elections.” In California, he told Breitbart [], “Election Day has become Election Month and ballots are counted until Democrats are declared the winner.” CORRUPTION AT BORDER AGENCY STILL A PROBLEM A DECADE AFTER EXPOSE An agency we created to protect our borders is still hamstrung by corruption, as our Corruption Chronicles blog reports []. A decade after a Homeland Security Advisory Council determined that “true levels of corruption within CBP [Customs and Border Protection] are not known [ a myriad of cases, including several in the last few weeks alone, indicates the problem is as serious as it was ten years ago at the nation’s biggest law enforcement agency. With more than 60,000 employees, CBP is the country’s frontline border conglomerate charged with keeping terrorists and their weapons out of the U.S. The agency, which includes Air and Marine Operations and the U.S. Border Patrol, was created after the 2001 terrorist attacks to protect the American people and safeguard our borders. In its 20th anniversary celebration, CBP proclaimed that it continues to grow stronger, more dynamic and capable of taking on our nation’s most important challenges. But corruption among its agents is persistent, inevitably compromising its critical mission of protecting the nation from potential terrorist threats. The problem is so serious that the agency conducted a widespread, multi-year study [] of corruption in CBP that includes “detailed information on its nature and prevalence in the workforce.” The probe found that only one quarter of one percent of the CBP workforce is corrupt—defined as engagement in criminal activity that involves the misuse of an agent’s official position for personal gain—but the impact has had “significant and damaging implications for CBP’s reputation, ability to execute its mission, and on employee morale,” according to investigators. Corrupt agents use knowledge, access, or authority granted by virtue of their official position to personally engage in criminal activity or to facilitate the criminal activity of others. In exchange, they receive material and non-material benefits or advantages such as money, goods, services, power, influence, or relationships. In many of the cases officers either infiltrate CBP with the express intent of engaging in criminal activity or are recruited by drug cartels, officially known as Transnational Criminal Organizations (TCOs), to do so. “They facilitate drug and human smuggling exclusively at the Southwest Border by failing to perform a function of their inspection or enforcement responsibilities,” the extensive probe found. Investigators documented that 173 employees were convicted or entered guilty pleas for corruption related activities. That includes drug smuggling, money laundering, illegal alien smuggling, fraud, theft, and misuse of government technology. The overwhelming majority of cases involved illegal activity in direct opposition to the CBP mission with national security implications and crimes occurred at dozens of duty posts in 19 states with Texas leading the pack, followed by Arizona. More than half of the crimes involved the illegal smuggling of drugs, migrants, and other contraband into the United State. In recent cases that had not yet occurred when the study was published, a Border Patrol agent in El Paso, Texas was sentenced to 18 months in prison [] for soliciting bribes from illegal immigrants from El Salvador and Mexico in exchange for paperwork that would permit them to remain in the U.S. The disgraced federal agent, Fernando Castillo, made false entries in the migrants’ immigration file and printed the fraudulent documents. In another recent case a Border Patrol agent was sentenced to over seven years in prison after getting convicted [ taking bribes to smuggle narcotics and migrants across the U.S.-Mexico border while on duty. The corrupt agent, Hector Hernandez, pleaded guilty to receiving bribes and attempted distribution of methamphetamine and admitted to using his official position to open restricted border fences to allow people to illegally enter the U.S. in exchange for cash payments. A CBP officer in San Diego, California was recently sentenced to 23 years in prison [ accepting bribes to allow unauthorized migrants and vehicles containing methamphetamine and other illicit drugs to pass through the border into the U.S. Less than halfway into 2025, at least six CBP agents have been criminally charged, four of them in the last few weeks. In February the FBI El Paso West Texas Border Corruption Task Force arrested a veteran CBP officer named Manuel Perez for human and cocaine smuggling over many years on the El Paso border. In March a CBP officer was sentenced to over four years in prison for accepting bribes to smuggle illegal immigrants [ the U.S. In late April a jury convicted a Border Patrol agent of conspiring with Mexican nationals to allow “load” vehicles to pass through border crossings without inspection. Earlier this month three CBP officers in San Diego were indicted [] for allowing illegal immigrants to enter the U.S. through their inspection lanes at the San Ysidro Point of Entry. DC GOVERNMENT MAKES LGBTQIA+ QUEER TRAINING MANDATORY Your nation’s capital has taken a headfirst dive down the rabbit hole of leftist mania, as our Corruption Chronicles blog explains []. In the latest move to advance leftist policies in local government adjacent to the nation’s capital, the District of Columbia is forcing every department manager—and highly encouraging all employees—to undergo a special training on Lesbian, Gay, Bisexual, Transgender, Queer (or Questioning), Intersex, Asexual, and more (LGBTQIA+). The course is titled “LGBTQIA+ Cultural Humility: A Space for Queer Life Training,” according to a memorandum [] distributed to “all District Government Personnel” by Charles Hall Jr., the director of the DC Department of Human Resources. “We’re excited to introduce a vital new training initiative from the Mayor’s Office of LGBTQ Affairs, designed to foster a more inclusive and understanding workplace,” the memo, which was obtained by Judicial Watch this week, states. “This training is MANDAORY for all managers and highly encouraged for all DC Employees to complete by July 30th. 2025.” It is worth noting that the directive specifically excludes the 13-member DC Council, which is comprised of representatives from each of the eight wards and four members elected at large. Attached to the human resources director’s memo is a short video message from a “workforce specialist” at the DC Mayor’s Office of LGBTQA Affairs [], which is dedicated to connecting LGBTQA residents with city services, advocating on behalf of policies that benefit them, providing grants to organizations that serve them and hosting events that enrich, promote and bring together the LGBTQA community. The workforce specialist, Rae Dyson, is a former Biden administration official and was recently hired by the DC Mayor’s office because her skills to empower individuals will be instrumental in leading trainings and expanding opportunities for DC’s LGBTQIA+ workforce, according to an announcement posted on social media. In the video attached to Hall’s memo Dyson introduces herself and promotes the new LGBTQIA+ training for all public employees, especially licensed health professionals who she says can receive two continuing education credits for completing it. The training promises to go beyond surface-level awareness by delving into critical areas such as intersectionality, health disparities, legal protections and creating inclusive environments. Intersectionality is described in Hall’s memo as “understanding the complex interplay of various social identities.” The health disparities training recognizes and addresses the unique health challenges faced by the LGBTQIA+ community and the portion on legal protections will clarify relevant laws and policies for the demographic. Practical strategies for building a respectful and supportive workplace for all will be covered in the section dedicated to creating inclusive environments. “Why is this training important?” the HR memo asks. “By participating, you’ll gain valuable insights that will contribute to a more equitable and welcoming environment for your colleagues and the community we serve.” The HR document further states that the training “provides the tools necessary to create a workplace where everyone feels valued and respected.” Besides widespread corruption among elected officials, DC government is notorious for its excessive leftist policies, which are typically described as progressive in the mainstream media. A few years ago, the DC Council passed legislation [] allowing incarcerated convicted felons to vote and months later a j [ murderer won public office [] in a DC election that featured five inmate candidates from the same prison. DC also established a Council Office of Racial Equity [] (CORE) to tackle racism as part of a broader initiative [).] to establish a racial equity framework across the entire DC government by, among other things requiring mandatory racial equity training for DC government employees as well as conducting racial equity impact assessments on council measures. A few years ago, DC’s Racial Equity Office ruled that installing an Abraham Lincoln Spirit of Freedom Emancipation Statue at the African American Civil War Museum would widen racial inequity. With DC crime out of control, local leaders wasted over a quarter of a million dollars to promote the extremist Black Lives Matter movement after days of protests and riots, allowing artists, residents, DC employees and demonstrators to paint “Black Lives Matter” in 50-foot-tall yellow capital letters and the District’s crest, which resembles three stars above an “equals” sign, on 16th Street NW near the White House. Judicial Watch obtained records [] from the DC Department of Transportation that show it cost taxpayers $271,231 to repaint the Black Lives Matter slogan on a street in the nation’s capital. Until next week, [advertisement] [] [32x32x1] [] [32x32x2] [] [32x32x3] [] [32x32x3] [] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2025, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [] |

# ** Donor Bequeaths Generous Gift to WAGOP**

**Bellevue** —“We're sort of like a startup organization all the time," says Chairman Jim Walsh in [t](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=82b843eaaa&e=6a281f566d)[his week's update,](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=b68e43bee1&e=6a281f566d) noting a generous donation by long-time supporter and PCO Peter Boonstra. The bequeathment is a sterling endorsement of WAGOP’s strategy to fix what's broken in WA. "We appreciate receiving this contribution, and we will use it effectively,” he adds.

"Neither the National Party (RNC) nor the State Party (WAGOP) sits on billions of dollars," explains Chairman Walsh. "Every few years, the parties must reinvent themselves, and to some degree start from 'ground zero,’ in terms of fundraising, staff, philosophy, and strategy on how to get conservative candidates elected to public office."

Please consider [making a contribution](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=acf0716e99&e=6a281f566d) to help WAGOP fix what's broken in WA after decades of one-party Democrat rule.

Thank you for your time and support.

Best,

Elizabeth Economou
WAGOP Comms. Dir.

clean_body: Donor Bequeaths Generous Gift to WAGOP | | | | | | | Donor Bequeaths Generous Gift to WAGOP Bellevue —“We're sort of like a startup organization all the time," says Chairman Jim Walsh in noting a generous donation by long-time supporter and PCO Peter Boonstra. The bequeathment is a sterling endorsement of WAGOP’s strategy to fix what's broken in WA. "We appreciate receiving this contribution, and we will use it effectively,” he adds. "Neither the National Party (RNC) nor the State Party (WAGOP) sits on billions of dollars," explains Chairman Walsh. "Every few years, the parties must reinvent themselves, and to some degree start from 'ground zero,’ in terms of fundraising, staff, philosophy, and strategy on how to get conservative candidates elected to public office." Please consider to help WAGOP fix what's broken in WA after decades of one-party Democrat rule. Thank you for your time and support. Best, Elizabeth Economou WAGOP Comms. name: Rep. Andy Biggs
subject: The scary truth about radicals in education
body:
I’ve been a Congressman since 2017, and as a member of the Freedom Caucus, I’m not ashamed to call myself a conservative.

|
---
| | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zc3l7qfkpgo517dvkbp6co18h4jvgkae1mbk2rp0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm6o35clh2bs)

Hello Friend,

I’m sure you’d agree that we can’t count on D.C. politicians and bureaucrats to fix our education system by throwing out the radicals in charge.

I’ve been a Congressman since 2017, and as a member of the Freedom Caucus, I’m not ashamed to call myself a conservative. I can tell you that the Beltway Swamp will never apply the common sense steps necessary to do anything positive for our kids and our future.

_But that doesn’t mean we can’t kick the radicals out of education_. There’s been tremendous success at the state level and through the courts, and one organization is leading the battle: **The Goldwater Institute**.

Through school choice, the Goldwater Institute is actively dismantling the power of teachers’ unions and the U.S. Department of Education.

The Goldwater Institute is defeating Critical Race Theory (CRT) and the woke nonsense that we see in the classroom. Goldwater’s legislative success created the blueprint for conservatives to tie funding to students instead of sending your tax dollars to school districts controlled by radical administrators and school boards.

[Before I tell you more about why the Goldwater Institute is so incredibly successful, I must ask for your immediate help.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z3u0vll9u6s7l5b8sh5q9cnolgn3c4la34i1142o_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm6o35clh2bs) To stay in the fight, Goldwater needs the support of Americans like you.

[Will you please donate $10, $35, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or any amount you can generously spare? Click here to support the Goldwater Institute. >>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zihpccu1a0rh1m1t5sup7ldf2gicoeqjk6kj4t78_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm6o35clh2bs)

Here is what makes the Goldwater Institute different from ALL other pro-liberty organizations and why I’m asking you for support on their behalf.

The Goldwater Institute transformed Arizona into the most pro-school choice state in the country. In fact, they created Education Savings Accounts, which ensures parents can use their own tax dollars to make the right choices for their families. Now, Goldwater is applying this formula across the country, and so far, 22 states have enacted school choice legislation.

The Goldwater Institute doesn’t engage in abstract theories or unreadable white papers. They focus entirely on results. Their policy research is used by legislators in every single state to pass laws that help Americans live freer, happier lives.

[Please support the Goldwater Institute with a donation of any amount today. >>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z7u4suuop8kqroa5rq7vajnu2fg3r1t4trlrh0go_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm6o35clh2bs)

The reason Goldwater’s school choice movement is so successful isn’t simply because legislation is passing in legislatures... It’s because they DEFEND those bills in the courts.

The Goldwater Institute is prepared for the teachers’ unions and their radical left-wing allies. Whenever conservatives have a victory, you can be certain the unions will sue to try to stop it. But the Goldwater Institute’s team of aggressive attorneys is ready to defeat the unions every time they try to overturn the rights of parents.

Not only is the Goldwater Institute shaping legislation, but they are defending it in the courts. **Conservative victories require both legislation and litigation**. And the Goldwater Institute is the ONLY pro-liberty organization that understands this and achieves major victories in both.

Extremists are doing everything they can to destroy public education:
* Radical bureaucrats show students how to organize BLM protests.
* Administrators lower our test standards in the name of "equity."
* Woke professors label basic math as “racist."

**You and I must defeat the radicals who are hijacking our education system.**

The Goldwater Institute is leading the school choice movement, abolishing Critical Race Theory, and changing the lives of both students and parents by providing children with the best possible education.

This is the start of a new movement where conservatives are on the offensive. I am personally urging you to join.

name: Updates For Great Americans
subject: Your Book to Expose the Climate Myth
body:
The Climate Cult is pushing their BIGGEST lie yet: that the very air you exhale – carbon dioxide – is a "dangerous pollutant" that must be regulated and controlled.

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zk145202605mkm0rhkt32juuqffbet2cf15qtooo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm6o31c1h2bs)
---
Friend, The Climate Cult is pushing their BIGGEST lie yet: that the very air you exhale - carbon dioxide - is a "dangerous pollutant" that must be regulated and controlled. **_Their real agenda?_**__**_To control every aspect of your life_** _,_**_from the car or truck you drive to the stove you cook on._** The CO2 Coalition is fighting back with an arsenal of truth that the Green Lobby fears most: real science. With over 180 renowned scientists, including 2022 Nobel Laureate in Physics Dr. John Clauser, we're exposing the Climate Fiction that's being used to steal your freedoms. _**[_**Your immediate gift of $30, $50, or $100 will help us flood the public sector, schools, and halls of Congress with scientific truth that dismantles their fear-mongering propaganda.**_](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z5k9bm53bl7ig9o1cajths14eq27hhumv7ashej8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm6o31c1h2bs)**_
---
[ **EXCLUSIVE OFFER - DONATE NOW AND**
**RECEIVE MY BOOK AS A GIFT**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zq1covectb3ea5crl9h7ojptuvadgtt637tl4evo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm6o31c1h2bs)

[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zd3gfr945vim3tkt8ef5q2f452k9pa378ojftmqg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm6o31c1h2bs)
---
Friend, our impact is already sending shockwaves through the establishment. Governments, international organizations, and big businesses are all getting behind the false climate narrative and seeking to silence voices like ours. That's because the science, the facts, and the data dispute what you are being told. **Not only is there NOT a climate crisis** , but the human condition is THRIVING because of modest warming and more CO2.
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z78cueftilmleod4jrru28t636n5id0l5b02tdkg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm6o31c1h2bs)
---
_But the Climate Cult is doubling down._ They're pouring billions into "green" initiatives that will destroy our economy while enriching their political allies. And they're indoctrinating our children from kindergarten through college with their apocalyptic fantasy that seeks to infringe on our individual liberties and control people through fear. Your support today will help us:
* Publish groundbreaking scientific studies

* Launch aggressive education campaigns

* Fight back against Green Lobby propaganda

* Restore scientific integrity in our schools

With your help, we can reach MILLIONS of Americans this year with facts that shatter the Green Lobby's narrative. _**[_**Will you please make an immediate gift of $30, $50, or $100 to expose the biggest Climate Fictions, defend the truth about CO 2, and fuel our efforts to preserve freedom?**_](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2ztv6ljkrhpj4gshs7e99mv7pupncv0uf6ufio6p0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm6o31c1h2bs)**_
---
[ **Fight Back Against Climate Propaganda - Donate Now AND RECEIVE LIMITED TIME BOOK OFFER AS A GIFT**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2znb4td4arikuf4nomi7sdun0um0ih3hbp5ma2doo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm6o31c1h2bs)
---
_Time is critical, Friend._ **While we have momentum and truth on our side, the Green Lobby is working overtime to silence voices like ours.** They NEED to silence people like me and my colleagues at the CO2 Coalition because we tell a compelling, fact-based story that confirms _there is no climate crisis_. But we won't be silenced so easily, especially with you standing alongside us. _**If you donate today with an amount of $30 of more, I will send you my newest book as a gift for your support. This book contains all of the facts that you need to stand against the big lie. **_ Thank you for standing with science and truth. Together, we'll defeat the Climate Cult's dangerous agenda. Best regards, Gregory Wrightstone
Executive Director
CO2 Coalition P.S. The Climate Cult fears nothing more than informed citizens armed with scientific facts. Please don't wait - act now to protect our freedoms and restore scientific integrity.
---

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: How often do you think about the Roman Republic?
body:
The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2qrtjovebb1df3njo9f86r41j1h8oufkii3h910_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm6o35c3h2bs)
---
| |
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z21ev7oa45hqln13k9c7uqhgj153oq1shiemeue8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm6o35c3h2bs) Dear Friend,

The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success. One that still impacts our world today.

To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we released our free online course, **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic."**

**You can now receive your own DVD box set of "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic" when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**

And, for a limited time, we'll also send you a **free color map** of the Roman world at the end of the Republic. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures.
Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic," **along with the companion map today:

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi4olgb97989armvjfjh7ubt563kgqa8iucoqjp8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm6o35c3h2bs)

By studying ancient Rome, you'll discover the conditions necessary to preserve a republic, and, conversely, how a republic may lose its way.

That's why we produced **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic"** and why I hope you'll watch and share the course on DVD.

Thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

Pop Acta Media | 1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Steve Hilton
subject: Stand with Charlie Kirk, Vivek, and Kirk Cameron
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE HILTON FOR GOVERNOR 2026
body:
Let’s Make California Golden Again!

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkapfb1vdcpl71u3ektc5u5iah83jcfsrqe7g4u0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm6o31c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, I’m Steve Hilton, and I’m running to be the next Governor of California to bring back freedom, opportunity, and common sense. To make **_[_California Golden Again_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znm76rc1o7fhu5ph3q7arps8g4lrgfih8ec5n4so_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm6o31c1h2bs)_.** Our grassroots movement is already gaining steam, and some of the strongest leaders in the conservative movement have already endorsed my campaign.
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsgeqate725hjsidmvrhulhauq1phiuu4rii2hgg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm6o31c1h2bs)
---
There’s nowhere better than California. But everyone can see how badly things have gone off track. We were once the land of opportunity but now we have America’s highest prices for gas, power outages are a regular occurrence, and almost a million Californians don’t have access to clean drinking water. Today we’re sadly famous for dystopian scenes of crime, chaos, and squalor. Let’s make California the land of opportunity again with:
---
# GREAT JOBS
---
# **GREAT HOMES**
---
# **GREAT KIDS**
---
We need to make California an inspiration again, not a warning of what not to do. There’s only one way to do it. We need to end the Democrat one-party rule that got us into this mess. California is ready for a change. In 2024 almost every county shifted away from the Democrats. Since Gavin Newsom took office, **one million new Republican voters** have registered. Earlier this year a poll found that **48%** of Californians would consider voting for a Republican governor. I’m honored to have strong conservative leaders like Vivek Ramaswamy, Charlie Kirk, and Kirk Cameron endorsing me, but your personal endorsement matters more to me.
---
[ **PLEASE ENDORSE MY CAMPAIGN TODAY!** ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ze164lkvd85h8iec013mbqi4q159o8pqju4r0jco_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm6o31c1h2bs)
---
To win, we’re building a grassroots movement. I know what I believe and what it takes to save California. Your contribution of **$25** , **$50** , or **$100** will get our message to millions of voters. I’m the only candidate that can win and I promise _I will never bend the knee to the left_. I truly appreciate your help.
---
[ DONATE TODAY! ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zucfqak7d2vq93b5gu9m1epl15tsi4sh9oeb4d60_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm6o31c1h2bs)
---
With your support, we’ll make **California Golden Again.**
---
Steve HiltonCandidate for Governor of California
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zabhcbms6pr1k2hmm7elmngt5gjn9lr0sbei1o98_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm6o31c1h2bs)
---
# Meet Steve Hilton
---
I love California so much. I moved to the Bay Area over a decade ago. I’ve raised my family here, taught at Stanford, started a business, written books, hosted a TV show ... lived the California dream. It’s my home, in the deepest sense. I’m a proud American, and an incredibly proud Californian too. But I’ve never forgotten where I came from. My parents were immigrants – they fled communism in Hungary to start a new life in England. In a free country. I appreciate exactly what that means.We didn’t have much money. My mother worked in a shoe store, my stepfather worked construction. My dad, who died when I was a kid, was the goalie for the Hungarian national ice hockey team. In 2012 we moved to California. I hosted a TV show — The Next Revolution with Steve Hilton — and podcasts: California Rebel Base, The Steve Hilton Show, Big Ideas Book Club. Through my policy organization, Golden Together, I’ve set out the changes we need to make to get this state back on track. Over the last few years, I’ve traveled the state, meeting people from all walks of life and backgrounds, in every part of California. I’ve spent time with business owners and workers in every industry, struggling with the absolute nightmare it’s become to start and grow a company here. I’ve seen the struggles so many Californians face raising a family given the unbelievable costs of living here. To make real change happen in government, you need the ability to think differently, the courage to challenge establishment groupthink and the conviction to follow through. That’s what I will bring to this job – to the urgent necessity of restoring the California Dream for everyone, and making this beautiful state, that we love so much, truly Golden Again.
---
[ **SUPPORT STEVE** ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zc7klgbe0l1snoe2ao91rrbbju6qvi20hn7n2vvg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm6o31c1h2bs)
---
|
---

FPPC ID#1480425
---

clean_body: Let’s Make California Golden Again! | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, I’m Steve Hilton, and I’m running to be the next Governor of California to bring back freedom, opportunity, and common sense. To make . Our grassroots movement is already gaining steam, and some of the strongest leaders in the conservative movement have already endorsed my campaign. There’s nowhere better than California. But everyone can see how badly things have gone off track. We were once the land of opportunity but now we have America’s highest prices for gas, power outages are a regular occurrence, and almost a million Californians don’t have access to clean drinking water. Today we’re sadly famous for dystopian scenes of crime, chaos, and squalor. Let’s make California the land of opportunity again with: GREAT JOBS GREAT HOMES GREAT KIDS We need to make California an inspiration again, not a warning of what not to do. There’s only one way to do it. We need to end the Democrat one-party rule that got us into this mess. California is ready for a change. In 2024 almost every county shifted away from the Democrats. Since Gavin Newsom took office, one million new Republican voters have registered. Earlier this year a poll found that 48% of Californians would consider voting for a Republican governor. I’m honored to have strong conservative leaders like Vivek Ramaswamy, Charlie Kirk, and Kirk Cameron endorsing me, but your personal endorsement matters more to me. To win, we’re building a grassroots movement. I know what I believe and what it takes to save California. Your contribution of $25 , $50 , or $100 will get our message to millions of voters. I’m the only candidate that can win and I promise I will never bend the knee to the left. I truly appreciate your help. With your support, we’ll make California Golden Again. Steve HiltonCandidate for Governor of California | | Meet Steve Hilton I love California so much. I moved to the Bay Area over a decade ago. I’ve raised my family here, taught at Stanford, started a business, written books, hosted a TV show ... lived the California dream. It’s my home, in the deepest sense. I’m a proud American, and an incredibly proud Californian too. But I’ve never forgotten where I came from. My parents were immigrants – they fled communism in Hungary to start a new life in England. In a free country. I appreciate exactly what that means.We didn’t have much money. My mother worked in a shoe store, my stepfather worked construction. My dad, who died when I was a kid, was the goalie for the Hungarian national ice hockey team. In 2012 we moved to California. I hosted a TV show — The Next Revolution with Steve Hilton — and podcasts: California Rebel Base, The Steve Hilton Show, Big Ideas Book Club. Through my policy organization, Golden Together, I’ve set out the changes we need to make to get this state back on track. Over the last few years, I’ve traveled the state, meeting people from all walks of life and backgrounds, in every part of California. I’ve spent time with business owners and workers in every industry, struggling with the absolute nightmare it’s become to start and grow a company here. I’ve seen the struggles so many Californians face raising a family given the unbelievable costs of living here. To make real change happen in government, you need the ability to think differently, the courage to challenge establishment groupthink and the conviction to follow through. That’s what I will bring to this job – to the urgent necessity of restoring the California Dream for everyone, and making this beautiful state, that we love so much, truly Golden Again. | | | PAID FOR BY STEVE HILTON FOR GOVERNOR 2026 FPPC ID#1480425 Please add mailto:info@stevehiltonforgovernor.com "info@stevehiltonforgovernor.com" to your email contacts to make sure our updates are making it into your inbox.
