name: Rep. Andy Biggs
subject: The scary truth about radicals in education
body:
I’ve been a Congressman since 2017, and as a member of the Freedom Caucus, I’m not ashamed to call myself a conservative.

|
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkt71e1t82lutqemv6r7gi8t8s72crqkbdov9lrg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm6p71chh2bs)

Hello Friend,

I’m sure you’d agree that we can’t count on D.C. politicians and bureaucrats to fix our education system by throwing out the radicals in charge.

I’ve been a Congressman since 2017, and as a member of the Freedom Caucus, I’m not ashamed to call myself a conservative. I can tell you that the Beltway Swamp will never apply the common sense steps necessary to do anything positive for our kids and our future.

_But that doesn’t mean we can’t kick the radicals out of education_. There’s been tremendous success at the state level and through the courts, and one organization is leading the battle: **The Goldwater Institute**.

Through school choice, the Goldwater Institute is actively dismantling the power of teachers’ unions and the U.S. Department of Education.

The Goldwater Institute is defeating Critical Race Theory (CRT) and the woke nonsense that we see in the classroom. Goldwater’s legislative success created the blueprint for conservatives to tie funding to students instead of sending your tax dollars to school districts controlled by radical administrators and school boards.

[Before I tell you more about why the Goldwater Institute is so incredibly successful, I must ask for your immediate help.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zgblkajqe6ecbb6baoh9gq0lkvqutghmhlu58ocg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm6p71chh2bs) To stay in the fight, Goldwater needs the support of Americans like you.

[Will you please donate $10, $35, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or any amount you can generously spare? Click here to support the Goldwater Institute. >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zn5fdgn7enu7gc1rv2sp6n7p6lknnv7qqj0lel1o_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm6p71chh2bs)

Here is what makes the Goldwater Institute different from ALL other pro-liberty organizations and why I’m asking you for support on their behalf.

The Goldwater Institute transformed Arizona into the most pro-school choice state in the country. In fact, they created Education Savings Accounts, which ensures parents can use their own tax dollars to make the right choices for their families. Now, Goldwater is applying this formula across the country, and so far, 22 states have enacted school choice legislation.

The Goldwater Institute doesn’t engage in abstract theories or unreadable white papers. They focus entirely on results. Their policy research is used by legislators in every single state to pass laws that help Americans live freer, happier lives.

[Please support the Goldwater Institute with a donation of any amount today. >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8uhvh98va2h181mmqmdnuo1npd5ngucm7guhr78_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm6p71chh2bs)

The reason Goldwater’s school choice movement is so successful isn’t simply because legislation is passing in legislatures... It’s because they DEFEND those bills in the courts.

The Goldwater Institute is prepared for the teachers’ unions and their radical left-wing allies. Whenever conservatives have a victory, you can be certain the unions will sue to try to stop it. But the Goldwater Institute’s team of aggressive attorneys is ready to defeat the unions every time they try to overturn the rights of parents.

Not only is the Goldwater Institute shaping legislation, but they are defending it in the courts. **Conservative victories require both legislation and litigation**. And the Goldwater Institute is the ONLY pro-liberty organization that understands this and achieves major victories in both.

Extremists are doing everything they can to destroy public education:
* Radical bureaucrats show students how to organize BLM protests.
* Administrators lower our test standards in the name of "equity."
* Woke professors label basic math as “racist."

**You and I must defeat the radicals who are hijacking our education system.**

The Goldwater Institute is leading the school choice movement, abolishing Critical Race Theory, and changing the lives of both students and parents by providing children with the best possible education.

This is the start of a new movement where conservatives are on the offensive. I am personally urging you to join.

[Please consider supporting the Goldwater Institute this month. Select any amount below to rush your support.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zi663kplhpgndsa4db9ns3ractkh87mgf46k2d38_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm6p71chh2bs)
[Donate $10 >>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zliqbajfnk77g3rkl7bkpf0aqigf353u9v9nbg58_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm6p71chh2bs)

[Donate $35 >>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1r3pmskqb58kkesvvvtbj775rbqpkpm1n136osg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm6p71chh2bs)

[Donate $50 >>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8etfbjarnqriui9sp2poaljr86o6pp11201bk5g_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm6p71chh2bs)

[Donate $100 >>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkp6r0kvkedq6ccno0hb3qv8juovim4sjagbsffo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm6p71chh2bs)

[Donate $250 >>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7veovl7l1i8823tek33f60pl36smeeotmkqifj8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm6p71chh2bs)

[Donate $500 >>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2ek87khbvck1nsji36078m53nhr9m13o706is48_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm6p71chh2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrhutb3cmrripkl403fg7vu3he2vnbgpel6iru3g_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm6p71chh2bs)

[Donate Any Amount >>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zovubukise8ogcj9nn0e2p8ablmsk6n1ejg4h0og_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm6p71chh2bs)
Once you complete your gift, the Goldwater Institute will be in touch with you on how to stay updated.

Can I count on you to be the first new donor?

**Please consider this both a personal and urgent favor to the Goldwater Institute and me. **

For liberty,

Congressman Andy Biggs

_The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Revenue Service as a 501(c)(3) organization. Our federal identification number is 86-0597661._

name: Steve Hilton
subject: Stand with Charlie Kirk, Vivek, and Kirk Cameron
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE HILTON FOR GOVERNOR 2026
body:
Let’s Make California Golden Again!

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztnccdb5ribp1mphnbc05fjk48o4mmf87c1er6g0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm6p71chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, I’m Steve Hilton, and I’m running to be the next Governor of California to bring back freedom, opportunity, and common sense. To make **_[_California Golden Again_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zse1c96jfssqdu161tv0c563bk6cj9ulsgb1k4k8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm6p71chh2bs)_.** Our grassroots movement is already gaining steam, and some of the strongest leaders in the conservative movement have already endorsed my campaign.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqh1qlcaduakq6el8hq4kku48vgdukduhghnia08_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm6p71chh2bs)
---
There’s nowhere better than California. But everyone can see how badly things have gone off track. We were once the land of opportunity but now we have America’s highest prices for gas, power outages are a regular occurrence, and almost a million Californians don’t have access to clean drinking water. Today we’re sadly famous for dystopian scenes of crime, chaos, and squalor. Let’s make California the land of opportunity again with:
---
# GREAT JOBS
---
# **GREAT HOMES**
---
# **GREAT KIDS**
---
We need to make California an inspiration again, not a warning of what not to do. There’s only one way to do it. We need to end the Democrat one-party rule that got us into this mess. California is ready for a change. In 2024 almost every county shifted away from the Democrats. Since Gavin Newsom took office, **one million new Republican voters** have registered. Earlier this year a poll found that **48%** of Californians would consider voting for a Republican governor. I’m honored to have strong conservative leaders like Vivek Ramaswamy, Charlie Kirk, and Kirk Cameron endorsing me, but your personal endorsement matters more to me.
---
[ **PLEASE ENDORSE MY CAMPAIGN TODAY!** ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z63i6t3c7g4vbca582e8ealsofvkprsgdv7gdnro_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm6p71chh2bs)
---
To win, we’re building a grassroots movement. I know what I believe and what it takes to save California. Your contribution of **$25** , **$50** , or **$100** will get our message to millions of voters. I’m the only candidate that can win and I promise _I will never bend the knee to the left_. I truly appreciate your help.
---
[ DONATE TODAY! ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zha2s685s7teolvnhhupei5oot04oqom99idbevg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm6p71chh2bs)
---
With your support, we’ll make **California Golden Again.**
---
Steve HiltonCandidate for Governor of California
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0h367ts503sr1bm4du9rs8vr5f6gqareelifvg8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm6p71chh2bs)
---
# Meet Steve Hilton
---
I love California so much. I moved to the Bay Area over a decade ago. I’ve raised my family here, taught at Stanford, started a business, written books, hosted a TV show ... lived the California dream. It’s my home, in the deepest sense. I’m a proud American, and an incredibly proud Californian too. But I’ve never forgotten where I came from. My parents were immigrants – they fled communism in Hungary to start a new life in England. In a free country. I appreciate exactly what that means.We didn’t have much money. My mother worked in a shoe store, my stepfather worked construction. My dad, who died when I was a kid, was the goalie for the Hungarian national ice hockey team. In 2012 we moved to California. I hosted a TV show — The Next Revolution with Steve Hilton — and podcasts: California Rebel Base, The Steve Hilton Show, Big Ideas Book Club. Through my policy organization, Golden Together, I’ve set out the changes we need to make to get this state back on track. Over the last few years, I’ve traveled the state, meeting people from all walks of life and backgrounds, in every part of California. I’ve spent time with business owners and workers in every industry, struggling with the absolute nightmare it’s become to start and grow a company here. I’ve seen the struggles so many Californians face raising a family given the unbelievable costs of living here. To make real change happen in government, you need the ability to think differently, the courage to challenge establishment groupthink and the conviction to follow through. That’s what I will bring to this job – to the urgent necessity of restoring the California Dream for everyone, and making this beautiful state, that we love so much, truly Golden Again.
---

clean_body: Let’s Make California Golden Again! | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, I’m Steve Hilton, and I’m running to be the next Governor of California to bring back freedom, opportunity, and common sense. To make . Our grassroots movement is already gaining steam, and some of the strongest leaders in the conservative movement have already endorsed my campaign. There’s nowhere better than California. But everyone can see how badly things have gone off track. We were once the land of opportunity but now we have America’s highest prices for gas, power outages are a regular occurrence, and almost a million Californians don’t have access to clean drinking water. Today we’re sadly famous for dystopian scenes of crime, chaos, and squalor. Let’s make California the land of opportunity again with: GREAT JOBS GREAT HOMES GREAT KIDS We need to make California an inspiration again, not a warning of what not to do. There’s only one way to do it. We need to end the Democrat one-party rule that got us into this mess. California is ready for a change. In 2024 almost every county shifted away from the Democrats. Since Gavin Newsom took office, one million new Republican voters have registered. Earlier this year a poll found that 48% of Californians would consider voting for a Republican governor. I’m honored to have strong conservative leaders like Vivek Ramaswamy, Charlie Kirk, and Kirk Cameron endorsing me, but your personal endorsement matters more to me. To win, we’re building a grassroots movement. I know what I believe and what it takes to save California. Your contribution of $25 , $50 , or $100 will get our message to millions of voters. I’m the only candidate that can win and I promise I will never bend the knee to the left. I truly appreciate your help. With your support, we’ll make California Golden Again. Steve HiltonCandidate for Governor of California | | Meet Steve Hilton I love California so much. I moved to the Bay Area over a decade ago. I’ve raised my family here, taught at Stanford, started a business, written books, hosted a TV show ... lived the California dream. It’s my home, in the deepest sense. I’m a proud American, and an incredibly proud Californian too. But I’ve never forgotten where I came from. My parents were immigrants – they fled communism in Hungary to start a new life in England. In a free country. I appreciate exactly what that means.We didn’t have much money. My mother worked in a shoe store, my stepfather worked construction. My dad, who died when I was a kid, was the goalie for the Hungarian national ice hockey team. In 2012 we moved to California. I hosted a TV show — The Next Revolution with Steve Hilton — and podcasts: California Rebel Base, The Steve Hilton Show, Big Ideas Book Club. Through my policy organization, Golden Together, I’ve set out the changes we need to make to get this state back on track. Over the last few years, I’ve traveled the state, meeting people from all walks of life and backgrounds, in every part of California. I’ve spent time with business owners and workers in every industry, struggling with the absolute nightmare it’s become to start and grow a company here. I’ve seen the struggles so many Californians face raising a family given the unbelievable costs of living here. To make real change happen in government, you need the ability to think differently, the courage to challenge establishment groupthink and the conviction to follow through. name: Hillsdale College via First Look News
subject: How often do you think about the Roman Republic?
body:
The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success.

This sponsored message from First Look News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zl0i4gn331uc57n3thp61aqc5r2q5ie3t1sv5q08_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm6p71c9h2bs)
---
| |
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zepc8fkc6ocjb0a1vej7hf1bc65r6fa8ka5a5pj0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm6p71c9h2bs) Dear Friend,

The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success. One that still impacts our world today.

To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we released our free online course, **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic."**

**You can now receive your own DVD box set of "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic" when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**

And, for a limited time, we'll also send you a **free color map** of the Roman world at the end of the Republic. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures.
Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic," **along with the companion map today:

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zqr6tn627tlja4ot14ng7a980fvbq3unej63cf20_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm6p71c9h2bs)

By studying ancient Rome, you'll discover the conditions necessary to preserve a republic, and, conversely, how a republic may lose its way.

That's why we produced **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic"** and why I hope you'll watch and share the course on DVD.

Thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

name: Rep. Lauren Boebert
subject: I’ve had it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
The Democrats’ effort to destroy our way of life ENDS NOW!

|
---
| | | Friend,

**As a mom of four, a small business owner, and a proud defender of our Second Amendment rights, I'm fed up with the Democrats' attempts to undermine our values and destroy our way of life. And I know you are too.**

I've just gotten my hands on a __**[confidential memo](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zst4u8iin2cs0aupuuugpbtq46rbrl2bao52q5ko_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm9or4c1h2bs "confidential memo")**__ from the _Democrats' top strategists,_ and it's worse than we thought. They're planning to unleash a **$100 MILLION** war chest to **TAKE DOWN** our House Majority and **IMPOSE** their socialist agenda on America.

_But I've got a message for them:_**Not on my watch.** As a member of the House Freedom Caucus and a proud representative of Colorado's rural communities, I'm used to fighting for what's right, even when the odds are against us.

---
| | | [DEFEND OUR HOUSE MAJORITY](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2ztke967cgbv9uqsdsl2bfvgp49gsnf34vght12t8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm9or4c1h2bs "DEFEND OUR HOUSE MAJORITY")
---

That's why I'm launching a _daring_ campaign to _[DEFEND THE HOUSE](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zjga308fllu1556knntgq8gae5g1mu68g2j99r20_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm9or4c1h2bs "DEFEND THE HOUSE")_ and send the Democrats packing. I need your urgent support to fuel our grassroots efforts and mobilize conservative voters. I know that every contribution, no matter the size, will be a crucial blow to the Democrats' plans. _**[Will you join me in this fight and make a secure online contribution today?](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zc7298dud0s10b399htsn0tmlph9r066h5o8r4e0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm9or4c1h2bs "Will you join me in this fight and make a secure online contribution today?")**_

---
| | | [SHOW THE DEMOCRATS WE MEAN BUSINESS](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zp7egqu0frnc3psc181fidp37atcaq6r7qq2j7h0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm9or4c1h2bs "SHOW THE DEMOCRATS WE MEAN BUSINESS")
---

This is our moment to **_RISE UP_** and _**TAKE BACK**_ our country. As a fellow patriot and defender of our values, I know I can count on you to stand with me in this fight.

**_Let's do this! Let's WIN THE HOUSE and SECURE A BRIGHTER FUTURE FOR AMERICA IN 2026._**

Sincerely,

Lauren Boebert

---

name: Team USA
subject: 90 DAYS OF HISTORIC TRADE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Political Action Committee (AmeriPAC)
body:
Trump just made a deal with China, and America is ON TOP >>

---
| | | | | | | Untitled Document **[90 DAYS OF AMERICAN FREEDOM
90 DAYS OF AMERICAN PROSPERITY

name: America First Alert
subject: Your input could shape America’s defense policy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
President Trump and Senate Republicans need your input to help shape the future of U.S. defense.

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsq9mrebhkildfvhvv5n971plp2e1ec9k8ni2lhg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm9or2cph2bs)

Friend,

President Trump is leading a **[powerful America First comeback](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn4omsculvfh68lliu6nv5egdskocoa65l74q7mg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm9or2cph2bs) **--and on June 14th, he's taking it to the streets with a **[historic military parade](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrovgd9u8ln5dmvrq3h7pa43g0ifl1otcov7sji8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm9or2cph2bs)** honoring his 79th birthday and the 250th anniversary of the U.S. Army.

But this isn't just about honoring our military--it's about **[reclaiming national strength](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgotj7vd8o97cv7db12ne4srsackj4peco0vkl28_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm9or2cph2bs)** and putting _American security, veterans, and defense back at the TOP of the agenda._

That's why President Trump and Senate Republicans are launching a **[National Security Survey](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmvol5sdr1cnv963c6pqpc4cf98t2tqnegl242ko_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm9or2cph2bs) **--and we need YOU to be part of it.

**[DO YOU BELIEVE IN AMERICA FIRST SECURITY?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zk8qd6u9ke0029nnl18mtbcme6mtpdns7te5hudo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm9or2cph2bs)**

This survey will help shape the next wave of America First policy:

✅ Military readiness and modernization
✅ Veterans' care and respect
✅ Border security and law enforcement
✅ Standing up to global threats like China and Iran
✅ Defending peace through strength--not weakness

**[If you believe in President Trump's vision for American strength, take the _National Security Survey_ today to support this critical effort.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmu0kpgmvd3c9qed0knfthlcnaem84n52mj52f58_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm9or2cph2bs)**

**[👉 TAKE THE SURVEY](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd7rl4ha8r530ap4msrnolnj66vtta4e3fabvqeo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm9or2cph2bs)**

**[America's future security begins with YOU.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zoq72qokjsdr2bm4115ag527ve7ha963schfs0m0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm9or2cph2bs)**

This is your chance to be heard--and help us shape the next America First defense agenda. President Trump and Senate Republicans are listening.

**[TAKE THE SURVEY- SUPPORT THE MOVEMENT »](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zukidhh7vs1apul6qbbejceh15b3bba9e34n8a4g_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5jm9or2cph2bs)**

Let's show Washington that the American people still believe in _strength, sovereignty, and leadership._

For America,
GOP Headquarters - Washington D.C.

***P.S. The parade is a symbol. But the real fight is about the future. Take the survey. Add your voice. Stand for strength.***

name: Steve Hilton
subject: Stand with Charlie Kirk, Vivek, and Kirk Cameron
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE HILTON FOR GOVERNOR 2026
body:
Let’s Make California Golden Again!

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z607ofd6vomvotkh0b2l6pb5tsfmh3stncdombl8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5ge0pb6cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, I’m Steve Hilton, and I’m running to be the next Governor of California to bring back freedom, opportunity, and common sense. To make **_[_California Golden Again_](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zk3rimarmmaq9qv74ps8g4ctkoo1u488j6dtcrso_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5ge0pb6cph2bs)_.** Our grassroots movement is already gaining steam, and some of the strongest leaders in the conservative movement have already endorsed my campaign.
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z041po07rqbatcv33vklsadc8pukbpndakqmeri0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5ge0pb6cph2bs)
---
There’s nowhere better than California. But everyone can see how badly things have gone off track. We were once the land of opportunity but now we have America’s highest prices for gas, power outages are a regular occurrence, and almost a million Californians don’t have access to clean drinking water. Today we’re sadly famous for dystopian scenes of crime, chaos, and squalor. Let’s make California the land of opportunity again with:
---
# GREAT JOBS
---
# **GREAT HOMES**
---
# **GREAT KIDS**
---
We need to make California an inspiration again, not a warning of what not to do. There’s only one way to do it. We need to end the Democrat one-party rule that got us into this mess. California is ready for a change. In 2024 almost every county shifted away from the Democrats. Since Gavin Newsom took office, **one million new Republican voters** have registered. Earlier this year a poll found that **48%** of Californians would consider voting for a Republican governor. I’m honored to have strong conservative leaders like Vivek Ramaswamy, Charlie Kirk, and Kirk Cameron endorsing me, but your personal endorsement matters more to me.
---
[ **PLEASE ENDORSE MY CAMPAIGN TODAY!** ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z09m8gnro90hnirusfh731pt0g2v3k9vmtf2t7g0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5ge0pb6cph2bs)
---
To win, we’re building a grassroots movement. I know what I believe and what it takes to save California. Your contribution of **$25** , **$50** , or **$100** will get our message to millions of voters. I’m the only candidate that can win and I promise _I will never bend the knee to the left_. I truly appreciate your help.
---
[ DONATE TODAY! ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zv40seaqkqnep1de1enplk3e5dul5k6m0rkn8r9o_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5ge0pb6cph2bs)
---
With your support, we’ll make **California Golden Again.**
---
Steve HiltonCandidate for Governor of California
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqj4mrlkfb64jmk3k51sdnhutde1tu8420eelq78_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5ge0pb6cph2bs)
---
# Meet Steve Hilton
---
I love California so much. I moved to the Bay Area over a decade ago. I’ve raised my family here, taught at Stanford, started a business, written books, hosted a TV show ... lived the California dream. It’s my home, in the deepest sense. I’m a proud American, and an incredibly proud Californian too. But I’ve never forgotten where I came from. My parents were immigrants – they fled communism in Hungary to start a new life in England. In a free country. I appreciate exactly what that means.We didn’t have much money. My mother worked in a shoe store, my stepfather worked construction. My dad, who died when I was a kid, was the goalie for the Hungarian national ice hockey team. In 2012 we moved to California. I hosted a TV show — The Next Revolution with Steve Hilton — and podcasts: California Rebel Base, The Steve Hilton Show, Big Ideas Book Club. Through my policy organization, Golden Together, I’ve set out the changes we need to make to get this state back on track. Over the last few years, I’ve traveled the state, meeting people from all walks of life and backgrounds, in every part of California. I’ve spent time with business owners and workers in every industry, struggling with the absolute nightmare it’s become to start and grow a company here. I’ve seen the struggles so many Californians face raising a family given the unbelievable costs of living here. To make real change happen in government, you need the ability to think differently, the courage to challenge establishment groupthink and the conviction to follow through. That’s what I will bring to this job – to the urgent necessity of restoring the California Dream for everyone, and making this beautiful state, that we love so much, truly Golden Again.
---

clean_body: Let’s Make California Golden Again! | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, I’m Steve Hilton, and I’m running to be the next Governor of California to bring back freedom, opportunity, and common sense. To make . Our grassroots movement is already gaining steam, and some of the strongest leaders in the conservative movement have already endorsed my campaign. There’s nowhere better than California. But everyone can see how badly things have gone off track. We were once the land of opportunity but now we have America’s highest prices for gas, power outages are a regular occurrence, and almost a million Californians don’t have access to clean drinking water. Today we’re sadly famous for dystopian scenes of crime, chaos, and squalor. Let’s make California the land of opportunity again with: GREAT JOBS GREAT HOMES GREAT KIDS We need to make California an inspiration again, not a warning of what not to do. There’s only one way to do it. We need to end the Democrat one-party rule that got us into this mess. California is ready for a change. In 2024 almost every county shifted away from the Democrats. Since Gavin Newsom took office, one million new Republican voters have registered. Earlier this year a poll found that 48% of Californians would consider voting for a Republican governor. I’m honored to have strong conservative leaders like Vivek Ramaswamy, Charlie Kirk, and Kirk Cameron endorsing me, but your personal endorsement matters more to me. To win, we’re building a grassroots movement. I know what I believe and what it takes to save California. Your contribution of $25 , $50 , or $100 will get our message to millions of voters. I’m the only candidate that can win and I promise I will never bend the knee to the left. I truly appreciate your help. With your support, we’ll make California Golden Again. Steve HiltonCandidate for Governor of California | | Meet Steve Hilton I love California so much. I moved to the Bay Area over a decade ago. I’ve raised my family here, taught at Stanford, started a business, written books, hosted a TV show ... lived the California dream. It’s my home, in the deepest sense. I’m a proud American, and an incredibly proud Californian too. But I’ve never forgotten where I came from. My parents were immigrants – they fled communism in Hungary to start a new life in England. In a free country. I appreciate exactly what that means.We didn’t have much money. My mother worked in a shoe store, my stepfather worked construction. My dad, who died when I was a kid, was the goalie for the Hungarian national ice hockey team. In 2012 we moved to California. I hosted a TV show — The Next Revolution with Steve Hilton — and podcasts: California Rebel Base, The Steve Hilton Show, Big Ideas Book Club. Through my policy organization, Golden Together, I’ve set out the changes we need to make to get this state back on track. Over the last few years, I’ve traveled the state, meeting people from all walks of life and backgrounds, in every part of California. I’ve spent time with business owners and workers in every industry, struggling with the absolute nightmare it’s become to start and grow a company here. I’ve seen the struggles so many Californians face raising a family given the unbelievable costs of living here. To make real change happen in government, you need the ability to think differently, the courage to challenge establishment groupthink and the conviction to follow through. That’s what I will bring to this job – to the urgent necessity of restoring the California Dream for everyone, and making this beautiful state, that we love so much, truly Golden Again. | | | PAID FOR BY STEVE HILTON FOR GOVERNOR 2026 FPPC ID#1480425 Please add mailto:info@stevehiltonforgovernor.com "info@stevehiltonforgovernor.com" to your email contacts to make sure our updates are making it into your inbox. name: Name: Rep. Lauren Boebert
subject: I’ve had it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
The Democrats’ effort to destroy our way of life ENDS NOW!

|
---
| | | Friend,

**As a mom of four, a small business owner, and a proud defender of our Second Amendment rights, I'm fed up with the Democrats' attempts to undermine our values and destroy our way of life. And I know you are too.**

I've just gotten my hands on a __**[confidential memo](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zujad3sp2g93tmb4ldj5grh9hgms72psqietn54g_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5ge0pb6chh2bs "confidential memo")**__ from the _Democrats' top strategists,_ and it's worse than we thought. They're planning to unleash a **$100 MILLION** war chest to **TAKE DOWN** our House Majority and **IMPOSE** their socialist agenda on America.

_But I've got a message for them:_**Not on my watch.** As a member of the House Freedom Caucus and a proud representative of Colorado's rural communities, I'm used to fighting for what's right, even when the odds are against us.

---
| | | [DEFEND OUR HOUSE MAJORITY](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ze2ec7kepcpj7vp2kk3codipkcnumsn9de9sticg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5ge0pb6chh2bs "DEFEND OUR HOUSE MAJORITY")
---

That's why I'm launching a _daring_ campaign to _[DEFEND THE HOUSE](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zhp2ndkt27j9p26sbq4b7gu5tutv4cogr4u3ro30_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5ge0pb6chh2bs "DEFEND THE HOUSE")_ and send the Democrats packing. I need your urgent support to fuel our grassroots efforts and mobilize conservative voters. I know that every contribution, no matter the size, will be a crucial blow to the Democrats' plans. _**[Will you join me in this fight and make a secure online contribution today?](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zdnitligst1tgrksc0ai867ghg682as6408as1d0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5ge0pb6chh2bs "Will you join me in this fight and make a secure online contribution today?")**_

---
| | | [SHOW THE DEMOCRATS WE MEAN BUSINESS](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z6catkt9tupp31kqm9bkhi80dbhl53vgiqb3o53o_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5ge0pb6chh2bs "SHOW THE DEMOCRATS WE MEAN BUSINESS")
---

This is our moment to **_RISE UP_** and _**TAKE BACK**_ our country. As a fellow patriot and defender of our values, I know I can count on you to stand with me in this fight.

**_Let's do this! Let's WIN THE HOUSE and SECURE A BRIGHTER FUTURE FOR AMERICA IN 2026._**

Sincerely,

Lauren Boebert

name: America First Alert
subject: Critical National Security Survey – Must Respond Now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
President Trump and Senate Republicans need your input to help shape the future of U.S. defense.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4342id16nfrkvfc13h8cffs4c81c76gq3et0um0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5ge0pb6chh2bs)

Friend,

President Trump is leading a **[powerful America First comeback](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z670u8qkbf4e0v28ju8cj8mqc0b4bb1eint17eug_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5ge0pb6chh2bs) **--and on June 14th, he's taking it to the streets with a **[historic military parade](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi3eho6k4efo4qnkus4g5jbshjqjrg3h1d7uidq8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5ge0pb6chh2bs)** honoring his 79th birthday and the 250th anniversary of the U.S. Army.

But this isn't just about honoring our military--it's about **[reclaiming national strength](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zonv0ir1j9it2lakms5jjcb207a0uci82s6aqsd0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5ge0pb6chh2bs)** and putting _American security, veterans, and defense back at the TOP of the agenda._

That's why President Trump and Senate Republicans are launching a **[National Security Survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3eb36qv1vs4qu02kbp1259ni9p65nh0367530oo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5ge0pb6chh2bs) **--and we need YOU to be part of it.

**[DO YOU BELIEVE IN AMERICA FIRST SECURITY?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2v1ps0ogill7pa0ro41ovemks1tpnjdt3cp66vg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5ge0pb6chh2bs)**

This survey will help shape the next wave of America First policy:

✅ Military readiness and modernization
✅ Veterans' care and respect
✅ Border security and law enforcement
✅ Standing up to global threats like China and Iran
✅ Defending peace through strength--not weakness

**[If you believe in President Trump's vision for American strength, take the _National Security Survey_ today to support this critical effort.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zua5c2idfsvm5b4qojst8lt0n175opbiqmdg0d5o_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5ge0pb6chh2bs)**

**[👉 TAKE THE SURVEY](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1msldh2ov1qfocl0fskks7nrmp27495kk89hr2o_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5ge0pb6chh2bs)**

**[America's future security begins with YOU.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1fls495l2e9ldjd6civfspsm6ge6pog4qlae7a8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5ge0pb6chh2bs)**

This is your chance to be heard--and help us shape the next America First defense agenda. President Trump and Senate Republicans are listening.

**[TAKE THE SURVEY- SUPPORT THE MOVEMENT »](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4kqo8h3qbt3ij84eafgl0lgg4sfi7oltqj78vi8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c5ge0pb6chh2bs)**

Let's show Washington that the American people still believe in _strength, sovereignty, and leadership._

For America,
GOP Headquarters - Washington D.C.

***P.S. The parade is a symbol. But the real fight is about the future. Take the survey. Add your voice. Stand for strength.***

---|---
| | | |
---
| |
# An Update From the Interim
_There is something special about Indy in May._

A palpable enthusiasm can be felt in every corner of our city as the winter wishes for warmer days come true, the end of the school year is fast approaching and we await the hundreds of thousands of folks from around the globe who take part in a yearly migration to witness the greatest spectacle in racing.

I have been fortunate to experience the enthusiasm, excitement and celebration firsthand through my time in our community over the past few weeks. I look forward to even more opportunities to connect with you over the coming months. **In the meantime, take a look at some of the incredible things happening around our City. ⬇️**
---
| | |
## 16-Tech Bridge Opening
---
| | |
---
Our city now boasts a new connection of a thriving 16-Tech with our medical research corridor. The focus on pedestrian and cyclist safety marks even more ways for folks to see all of what our city has to offer.
---
# The Peace Walk
---
| | | |
---
| | During National Youth Violence Prevention Week, I had the privilege of joining hundreds of Hoosiers at the Peace Walk to promote unity and nonviolence.

The number of young people who gathered together in the rain to stand up to violence in our community was inspiring, and I was fortunate to be able to witness these leaders in action.
---
# NAACP Youth & College Fund Banquet
---
| | | |
---
| | I had the distinct honor to speak at the Indiana NAACP Youth & College Fund Banquet honoring our young leaders who effecting change in the continued fight for equality.

I am constantly reminded of the fact that our future is in good hands, and this night was but one of many instances where I find myself with boundless hope for what the next generation will accomplish.
---
# AANHPI Community Market at the Stutz
---
| | | |
---
| | I was so excited to attend Indy's first AANHPI market to mark the start of Asian Heritage Month in Indy. Our city is so fortunate to be home to so many artists and small business owners from the Asian American community, and I appreciated the opportunity to join in celebrating them.
---
# Flags for Good Grand Opening
---
| | | |
---
| | Our city's small businesses are a large part of what makes Indianapolis so special.

One of these small businesses, Flags For Good now located in Fletcher Place, just opened its first brick-and-mortar store.

I was honored to attend their grand opening and welcome them to our community.
---
# James Whitcomb Riley 43
---
| | | |
---
| | James Whitcomb Riley School 43 was recognized by the Band Together for Music Education initiative by AXS TV and Spectrum for their work in Music Education.

Along with support for their program, the recognition also came with the John Lennon Educational Tour Bus, packed with state-of-the-art musical and video equipment, making a stop at the school for the entire week.
---
#
* * *
---
# Post-Session Legislation Overview
---
| | | | [](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=c9817c0909a46527d03fdd5e92b43f245c08a9acc37523bcb75528f554c049a37d3bd9535e092bbbc06b06171c66c14ab703d10cb4c00e75)

---
Above you can find a quick breakdown of our wins from this legislative session, as well as some of the legislation that we worked hard to fight against.

In my next newsletter, I will be sharing a more in-depth look at _the good, the bad and the ugly_ of the 2025 Legislative Session.
* * *
---
| | |
# **Liberating Minds: African American Literature and Libraries **
---
| | |
---
We are under one month away from the 8th Annual Book Fest & Juneteenth Celebration!

Now, as much as ever, it is critical that we find opportunities to come together to celebrate ourselves, our culture and the unmistakable impact our voices have had on the literature of this country.

To learn more, and to get information on tickets for a moderated conversation with Mychal Threets, click [here](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=c9817c0909a465276b11ed80ce5b4369861146f848b961d1ffc85a2bc17f273f7da41267212398285100d21868cf133eebfe17a4826f68cf "here").

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|--- | ---|--- | ---|--- | | | | | | An Update From the Interim There is something special about Indy in May. A palpable enthusiasm can be felt in every corner of our city as the winter wishes for warmer days come true, the end of the school year is fast approaching and we await the hundreds of thousands of folks from around the globe who take part in a yearly migration to witness the greatest spectacle in racing. I have been fortunate to experience the enthusiasm, excitement and celebration firsthand through my time in our community over the past few weeks. I look forward to even more opportunities to connect with you over the coming months. In the meantime, take a look at some of the incredible things happening around our City. ⬇️ | | | 16-Tech Bridge Opening | | | Our city now boasts a new connection of a thriving 16-Tech with our medical research corridor. The focus on pedestrian and cyclist safety marks even more ways for folks to see all of what our city has to offer. The Peace Walk | | | | | | During National Youth Violence Prevention Week, I had the privilege of joining hundreds of Hoosiers at the Peace Walk to promote unity and nonviolence. The number of young people who gathered together in the rain to stand up to violence in our community was inspiring, and I was fortunate to be able to witness these leaders in action. NAACP Youth & College Fund Banquet | | | | | | I had the distinct honor to speak at the Indiana NAACP Youth & College Fund Banquet honoring our young leaders who effecting change in the continued fight for equality. I am constantly reminded of the fact that our future is in good hands, and this night was but one of many instances where I find myself with boundless hope for what the next generation will accomplish. AANHPI Community Market at the Stutz | | | | | | I was so excited to attend Indy's first AANHPI market to mark the start of Asian Heritage Month in Indy. Our city is so fortunate to be home to so many artists and small business owners from the Asian American community, and I appreciated the opportunity to join in celebrating them. Flags for Good Grand Opening | | | | | | Our city's small businesses are a large part of what makes Indianapolis so special. One of these small businesses, Flags For Good now located in Fletcher Place, just opened its first brick-and-mortar store. I was honored to attend their grand opening and welcome them to our community. James Whitcomb Riley 43 | | | | | | James Whitcomb Riley School 43 was recognized by the Band Together for Music Education initiative by AXS TV and Spectrum for their work in Music Education. Along with support for their program, the recognition also came with the John Lennon Educational Tour Bus, packed with state-of-the-art musical and video equipment, making a stop at the school for the entire week. Post-Session Legislation Overview | | | | | | Above you can find a quick breakdown of our wins from this legislative session, as well as some of the legislation that we worked hard to fight against. In my next newsletter, I will be sharing a more in-depth look at the good, the bad and the ugly of the 2025 Legislative Session. | | | Liberating Minds: African American Literature and Libraries | | | We are under one month away from the 8th Annual Book Fest & Juneteenth Celebration! Now, as much as ever, it is critical that we find opportunities to come together to celebrate ourselves, our culture and the unmistakable impact our voices have had on the literature of this country. To learn more, and to get information on tickets for a moderated conversation with Mychal Threets, click "here". | | | | | News Around Our State | | "" "" "" COMMUNITY RESOURCES To view my community resources guide, "click here. " | | | | | | | | | Created and distributed by the Indiana Senate Democratic Communications office mailto:Nancy.Singh@iga.in.gov mailto:Chester.Bryant@iga.in.gov mailto:Molly.Neary@iga.in.gov ---|---|--- | This email was sent by: Indiana General Assembly 200 W. Washington St. Indianapolis, IN, 46204, US

subject: Join Me to Save OMG from a Lawsuit Threatening Press Freedom
body:
On May 14, 2025, Jamie Mannina, a former Pentagon contractor, sued me and OMG in Washington, D.C. federal courts after we caught him on tape saying, "Trump's a sociopathic narcissist...I'm in conversation with a couple of retired generals to try to explore what we can do" about Trump.

| [****](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/iDknkCDTA_jIA_0T-lczFQ~~/AARclBA~/e2r5qQMm8NMKo81sJLV59Wb6nU9kNC7huI1pClWI1y3jqVckqCcleIjMrIbYZpAsuXPHqHpSeNIC4IUM7BGPOj-2BUKWFQKrEpiwDZPiBsTmth97VYCmMtU7AZhTK3OqmgoZxoMsWe7QJBGaGMwNdcCWonKX2Pfzp89KZAv-3ff5mmQ-WEv7rSr2c-2VZ8AXWQL8gjf-WCoob_csztCd418m8ay2Pz5WTUsoLWJJcokuNbwAPF_RjRkMaFae6tRMWWN4VjxtU6zUT2qDKZhMEA~~)
[****](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/iDknkCDTA_jIA_0T-lczFQ~~/AARclBA~/e2r5qQMm8NMKo81sJLV59Wb6nU9kNC7huI1pClWI1y3jqVckqCcleIjMrIbYZpAsuXPHqHpSeNIC4IUM7BGPOj-2BUKWFQKrEpiwDZPiBsTmth97VYCmMtU7AZhTK3OqmgoZxoMsWe7QJBGaGMwNdcCWonKX2Pfzp89KZAv-3ff5mmQ-WEv7rSr2c-2VZ8AXWQL8gjf-WCoob_csztCd418m8ay2Pz5WTUsoLWJJcokuNbwAPF_RjRkMaFae6tRMWWN4VjxtU6zUT2qDKZhMEA~~) Dear Patriot,

I'm James O'Keefe, founder of O'Keefe Media Group (OMG), where we risk everything to expose corruption through undercover journalism.

Right now, we're facing a newly filed, **federal lawsuit that could destroy our mission and silence journalists everywhere** --[**and I need your help**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/iDknkCDTA_jIA_0T-lczFQ~~/AARclBA~/e2r5qQMm8NMKo81sJLV59Wb6nU9kNC7huI1pClWI1y3jqVckqCcleIjMrIbYZpAsuXPHqHpSeNIC4IUM7BGPOj-2BUKWFQKrEpiwDZPiBsTmth97VYCmMtU7AZhTK3OqmgoZxoMsWe7QJBGaGMwNdcCWonKX2Pfzp89KZAv-3ff5mmQ-WEv7rSr2c-2VZ8AXWQL8gjf-WCoob_csztCd418m8ay2Pz5WTUsoLWJJcokuNbwAPF_RjRkMaFae6tRMWWN4VjxtU6zUT2qDKZhMEA~~).

On May 14, 2025, Jamie Mannina, a former Pentagon contractor, sued me and OMG in Washington, D.C. federal courts after we caught him on tape saying, "**_Trump 's a sociopathic narcissist_** _..._ I'm in conversation with a couple of retired generals to try to explore what we can do" about Trump.

His baseless claims--defamation, fraud, wiretapping--**are meant to bankrupt us**.

As I told the Associated Press, "This is an attack against the First Amendment... the process is the punishment."

If Mannina's defamation claim wins, **it 's over for OMG**.

Our "American Swiper" program, which drives our exposes, could spark countless lawsuits from others we've exposed, ending our work.

**We have just 21 days from being served to hire top D.C. attorneys and respond, or we risk losing by default**.

Liberty Guard is hosting our legal defense fund, and [**I 'm asking you to join our fight with a donation today.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/iDknkCDTA_jIA_0T-lczFQ~~/AARclBA~/e2r5qQMm8NMKo81sJLV59Wb6nU9kNC7huI1pClWI1y3jqVckqCcleIjMrIbYZpAsuXPHqHpSeNIC4IUM7BGPOj-2BUKWFQKrEpiwDZPiBsTmth97VYCmMtU7AZhTK3OqmgoZxoMsWe7QJBGaGMwNdcCWonKX2Pfzp89KZAv-3ff5mmQ-WEv7rSr2c-2VZ8AXWQL8gjf-WCoob_csztCd418m8ay2Pz5WTUsoLWJJcokuNbwAPF_RjRkMaFae6tRMWWN4VjxtU6zUT2qDKZhMEA~~)

Please donate today to stand with OMG and save press freedom.

More than ever, I need patriots like you to help respond by this 21-day deadline and keep the OMG alive and allow us to **keep fighting corruption with the truth**.

[**Your support will defend not just OMG but the right to fearless journalism.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/iDknkCDTA_jIA_0T-lczFQ~~/AARclBA~/e2r5qQMm8NMKo81sJLV59Wb6nU9kNC7huI1pClWI1y3jqVckqCcleIjMrIbYZpAsuXPHqHpSeNIC4IUM7BGPOj-2BUKWFQKrEpiwDZPiBsTmth97VYCmMtU7AZhTK3OqmgoZxoMsWe7QJBGaGMwNdcCWonKX2Pfzp89KZAv-3ff5mmQ-WEv7rSr2c-2VZ8AXWQL8gjf-WCoob_csztCd418m8ay2Pz5WTUsoLWJJcokuNbwAPF_RjRkMaFae6tRMWWN4VjxtU6zUT2qDKZhMEA~~)

Join The Fight Today,
James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

P.S. We have 21 days to act, or the powerful win. [**Donate now to protect the First Amendment.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/iDknkCDTA_jIA_0T-lczFQ~~/AARclBA~/e2r5qQMm8NMKo81sJLV59Wb6nU9kNC7huI1pClWI1y3jqVckqCcleIjMrIbYZpAsuXPHqHpSeNIC4IUM7BGPOj-2BUKWFQKrEpiwDZPiBsTmth97VYCmMtU7AZhTK3OqmgoZxoMsWe7QJBGaGMwNdcCWonKX2Pfzp89KZAv-3ff5mmQ-WEv7rSr2c-2VZ8AXWQL8gjf-WCoob_csztCd418m8ay2Pz5WTUsoLWJJcokuNbwAPF_RjRkMaFae6tRMWWN4VjxtU6zUT2qDKZhMEA~~)

name: MAGA extremist
subject: If you hate BS political emails, read this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
Peter, if you hate BS political emails, good. You’re exactly who I want to talk to.

This is Troy Downing. 

I’m a combat vet, not a career politician. I didn’t risk my life overseas just to watch a bunch of self-serving cowards run our country into the ground.

I ran for Congress — and won — because I shoot straight and fight for We the People, not party bosses, lobbyists, or woke elites.

And because I refuse to play their games, the Left is coming after me.
RUSH REINFORCEMENTS
They want me gone because I call out their radical agenda, support President Trump, and won’t back down on the issues that matter.

In other words, I’m “deplorable.” 

“Garbage.”

“MAGA Extremist.”

They can label me whatever they want, but I guarantee you it won’t stop me from standing up to radical gun grabs, brainless open-border policy, and the mutilation of our kids in the name of “gender ideology.”

But here's the real problem: Democrats are drowning us in cash. 

They’ve stockpiled a $10 MILLION advantage over Republicans, aiming it straight at flipping the House Majority.

If I don’t flip the switch on fundraising soon, defending this seat will be like charging hell with a water pistol.

And if we lose it, we don’t just lose my seat. We’ll lose our only shot at advancing President Trump’s America First agenda.

I’m not asking for a handout. I’m asking for an ally. If you’re ready to join this fight, will you chip in $15.50 today?
JOIN THE FIGHT
DONATE TODAY
Thank you for your patriotic support,

-Troy Downing
Combat Veteran in Congress
Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress

Troy Downing is a former member of the U.S. Air Force/Air National Guard. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Air Force or the Department of Defense.

Troy Downing For Congress
P.O. Box 20333
Billings, MT 59104
Privacy Policy

To unsubscribe from Troy Downing for Congress, click here

They can label me whatever they want, but I guarantee you it won’t stop me from standing up to radical gun grabs, brainless open-border policy, and the mutilation of our kids in the name of “gender ideology.”

But here's the real problem: Democrats are drowning us in cash. 

They’ve stockpiled a $10 MILLION advantage over Republicans, aiming it straight at flipping the House Majority.

If I don’t flip the switch on fundraising soon, defending this seat will be like charging hell with a water pistol.

And if we lose it, we don’t just lose my seat. We’ll lose our only shot at advancing President Trump’s America First agenda.

I’m not asking for a handout. I’m asking for an ally. If you’re ready to join this fight, will you chip in $15.50 today?
JOIN THE FIGHT
DONATE TODAY
Thank you for your patriotic support,

-Troy Downing
Combat Veteran in Congress

name: Medhini Kumar, Evergreen
subject: Power Surge: May 16 edition
disclaimer_text: paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
Read our round-up of climate and clean energy news we're following
| | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3597908/87SdQ4wZ)
---
[](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3597909/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| _Welcome to Evergreen’s_** _Power Surge!_**_We made this bulletin because we believe you shouldn’t have to choose between keeping up with the news and your well-being. Here’s our latest round-up of the climate and clean energy news we're following—including short summaries and why we think they matter—and positive stories to keep us all hopeful in this fight.
(⚡Today’s voltage: 543 words)_ |
---
|
* * *
### 🔌 News We’re Plugged Into
**Budget Reconciliation and Defending Essential Programs**

The House GOP’s budget bill, released this week, is a disaster—but it’s also a moment of opportunity and action. It’s a chance for us to stand up and advocate for vital programs and show how the threatened climate and clean energy investments are already making a difference.

It’s been no secret that many Congressional Republicans would try to attack essential programs like Medicaid, food assistance, and climate, clean energy, and environmental justice programs. But it’s been all talk—until this week. The GOP released spending plans that include repealing effective clean energy and climate programs to fund tax cuts for the ultra-wealthy. ([We’ve summarized it all here.](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3597910/87SdQ4wZ))

While this is a concerning, pressing moment, here’s the upside: Clean energy and climate programs are designed to help everyone, and they are. People across the country, Democrats and some Republicans, businesses, and advocates are all pushing back to protect the programs that are helping them.

In Pennsylvania, [over 100 businesses signed onto a letter (PDF)](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3597911/87SdQ4wZ) expressing their strong support for these federal tax credits that boost private sector growth, global competitiveness, and jobs. [12 House Republicans](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3597912/87SdQ4wZ) called for revisions, and previously, 21 House Republicans [wrote a letter opposing cuts to clean energy credits (PDF)](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3597913/87SdQ4wZ), which help their constituents through more affordable energy and local investments in industry, infrastructure, and jobs. |
---
| **_Why this matters_** —The draft bill is currently going through the most critical stages of debate before it goes to the full House for a vote, and Republicans need almost every vote from their very small majority to get it across the finish line. Now is the best time for your representative to hear from you. [**Give them a call to protect critical services and programs.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3597914/87SdQ4wZ)

**_Amp up your knowledge:_**
* Evergreen Action: [Rapid Analysis: House GOP’s Clean Energy Repeal and What it Means for the Affordability Crisis](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3597915/87SdQ4wZ)
* Union of Concerned Scientists: [What’s at Stake in the Budget Reconciliation Process (And What You Can Do About It)](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3597916/87SdQ4wZ)
* Utility Dive: [21 House Republicans oppose cutting clean energy credits to pay for tax cuts](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3597917/87SdQ4wZ)
* E&E: [Defenders of climate law tax credits outline their demands](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3597918/87SdQ4wZ)

|
---
|
* * *
### 💪 Empowering Headlines
* The Allegheny Front: [Map shows what’s possible with federal clean energy investment in PA](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3597919/87SdQ4wZ)
* Canary Media: [Colorado’s rural electric co-ops are determined to build clean energy](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3597920/87SdQ4wZ)
* Georgia Public Broadcasting: [Climate advocates in Atlanta call on Congress to protect clean energy jobs](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3597921/87SdQ4wZ)
* Inside Climate News: [Climate Disaster Survivors Organize Across America, Turning Common Bonds of Loss Into Action](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3597922/87SdQ4wZ)
* Reuters: [Democratic-led states sue to block Trump's halting of wind projects](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3597923/87SdQ4wZ)
* E&E News: [Enviros release climate emissions data after EPA refused](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3597924/87SdQ4wZ)

|
---
|
* * *
### 🎧 Watts On Our Playlist
**Parenting in a Climate Crisis** Check out our first-ever episode of Hope This Helps, a podcast about climate and the costs for working people. Hosts Hannah, Emma, and Andrew are joined by Jessica Hamilton, Senior Director of Digital Advocacy at Evergreen and author of The Climate Conscious Parent, a substack about parenting in the age of climate change. The conversation ranges from Scottish fertility festivals to paying for childcare to foraging. Give it a listen, and let us know what you think!
* **Tune in** to [Hope This Helps: Think of the Puddles](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3597925/87SdQ4wZ)

|
| [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3597926/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
|
* * *
### ✨ Sparking Joy
|
[ ](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3597927/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
|
* * *
### ☝️ One last thing...
Did you like this content? [**Subscribe to Power Surge on LinkedIn to get these updates as soon as they’re published!**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3597928/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
| Thanks for plugging in, |
---
| | |
---
### Medhini Kumar
Digital Lead - Writer/Editor
Evergreen Action

name: Rep. Andy Biggs
subject: The scary truth about radicals in education
body:
I've been a Congressman since 2017, and as a member of the Freedom Caucus, I'm not ashamed to call myself a conservative.

|
---
| | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/lEi_tyJRusIBdKvoX_WD5g~~/AARclBA~/tAmacNwhfaNBmTbBR1dZLFozxg8bF2Mt6Fuc0z5NHXtic6sP6qBbXplSLN7lT-N6PAQVIvDi8mLAduu3NDIZ6rGswUGZfP2qCkksDkW8CvTOPBryfxSwswHOwxDSHehTTI9l0ehgN3Kf8BVxRbewWJVopsND69mHvJCklHJyuPrB-o_BkhLajvrZeqMf8bipxgg4DU5pJoWNK4jLvIKsJg~~)

Hello Friend,

I'm sure you'd agree that we can't count on D.C. politicians and bureaucrats to fix our education system by throwing out the radicals in charge.

I've been a Congressman since 2017, and as a member of the Freedom Caucus, I'm not ashamed to call myself a conservative. I can tell you that the Beltway Swamp will never apply the common sense steps necessary to do anything positive for our kids and our future.

_But that doesn 't mean we can't kick the radicals out of education_. There's been tremendous success at the state level and through the courts, and one organization is leading the battle: **The Goldwater Institute**.

Through school choice, the Goldwater Institute is actively dismantling the power of teachers' unions and the U.S. Department of Education.

The Goldwater Institute is defeating Critical Race Theory (CRT) and the woke nonsense that we see in the classroom. Goldwater's legislative success created the blueprint for conservatives to tie funding to students instead of sending your tax dollars to school districts controlled by radical administrators and school boards.

[Before I tell you more about why the Goldwater Institute is so incredibly successful, I must ask for your immediate help.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/lEi_tyJRusIBdKvoX_WD5g~~/AARclBA~/tAmacNwhfaNBmTbBR1dZLFozxg8bF2Mt6Fuc0z5NHXtic6sP6qBbXplSLN7lT-N6PAQVIvDi8mLAduu3NDIZ6rGswUGZfP2qCkksDkW8CvTOPBryfxSwswHOwxDSHehTTI9l0ehgN3Kf8BVxRbewWJVopsND69mHvJCklHJyuPrB-o_BkhLajvrZeqMf8bipxgg4DU5pJoWNK4jLvIKsJg~~) To stay in the fight, Goldwater needs the support of Americans like you.

[Will you please donate $10, $35, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or any amount you can generously spare? Click here to support the Goldwater Institute. >>](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/lEi_tyJRusIBdKvoX_WD5g~~/AARclBA~/tAmacNwhfaNBmTbBR1dZLFozxg8bF2Mt6Fuc0z5NHXtic6sP6qBbXplSLN7lT-N6PAQVIvDi8mLAduu3NDIZ6rGswUGZfP2qCkksDkW8CvTOPBryfxSwswHOwxDSHehTTI9l0ehgN3Kf8BVxRbewWJVopsND69mHvJCklHJyuPrB-o_BkhLajvrZeqMf8bipxgg4DU5pJoWNK4jLvIKsJg~~)

Here is what makes the Goldwater Institute different from ALL other pro-liberty organizations and why I'm asking you for support on their behalf.

The Goldwater Institute transformed Arizona into the most pro-school choice state in the country. In fact, they created Education Savings Accounts, which ensures parents can use their own tax dollars to make the right choices for their families. Now, Goldwater is applying this formula across the country, and so far, 22 states have enacted school choice legislation.

The Goldwater Institute doesn't engage in abstract theories or unreadable white papers. They focus entirely on results. Their policy research is used by legislators in every single state to pass laws that help Americans live freer, happier lives.

[Please support the Goldwater Institute with a donation of any amount today. >>](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/lEi_tyJRusIBdKvoX_WD5g~~/AARclBA~/tAmacNwhfaNBmTbBR1dZLFozxg8bF2Mt6Fuc0z5NHXtic6sP6qBbXplSLN7lT-N6PAQVIvDi8mLAduu3NDIZ6rGswUGZfP2qCkksDkW8CvTOPBryfxSwswHOwxDSHehTTI9l0ehgN3Kf8BVxRbewWJVopsND69mHvJCklHJyuPrB-o_BkhLajvrZeqMf8bipxgg4DU5pJoWNK4jLvIKsJg~~)

The reason Goldwater's school choice movement is so successful isn't simply because legislation is passing in legislatures... It's because they DEFEND those bills in the courts.

The Goldwater Institute is prepared for the teachers' unions and their radical left-wing allies. Whenever conservatives have a victory, you can be certain the unions will sue to try to stop it. But the Goldwater Institute's team of aggressive attorneys is ready to defeat the unions every time they try to overturn the rights of parents.

Not only is the Goldwater Institute shaping legislation, but they are defending it in the courts. **Conservative victories require both legislation and litigation**. And the Goldwater Institute is the ONLY pro-liberty organization that understands this and achieves major victories in both.

Extremists are doing everything they can to destroy public education:
* Radical bureaucrats show students how to organize BLM protests.
* Administrators lower our test standards in the name of "equity."
* Woke professors label basic math as "racist."

**You and I must defeat the radicals who are hijacking our education system.**

The Goldwater Institute is leading the school choice movement, abolishing Critical Race Theory, and changing the lives of both students and parents by providing children with the best possible education.

This is the start of a new movement where conservatives are on the offensive. I am personally urging you to join.

[Please consider supporting the Goldwater Institute this month. Select any amount below to rush your support.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/lEi_tyJRusIBdKvoX_WD5g~~/AARclBA~/tAmacNwhfaNBmTbBR1dZLFozxg8bF2Mt6Fuc0z5NHXtic6sP6qBbXplSLN7lT-N6PAQVIvDi8mLAduu3NDIZ6rGswUGZfP2qCkksDkW8CvTOPBryfxSwswHOwxDSHehTTI9l0ehgN3Kf8BVxRbewWJVopsND69mHvJCklHJyuPrB-o_BkhLajvrZeqMf8bipxgg4DU5pJoWNK4jLvIKsJg~~)

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1931, cult leader [Marshall Applewhite](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuwyAQxvGnwVsswGDigSGLt3TtiM7mEk692BZQO3n7Ku0jdPyWnz79P6_hCsS03D_ggb4-b2tY8CiMtWIOaf0umKiWiBCZFqz4hAJxD1pqe5L2pFyIQPwKpol-knFQDXrljDNucPrcJD_ZaIyx-oxa2WGWDlCr3nYzdPPZTdiQf2PSKqeU1NK13XCTBmWP1k793M3CSIxU19zW9Pfgxq91x9zO66Nhn2rdiuguQo9Cj7i0B33RhpGgXfNd6PG9hR6vkEsC5nDZNsYjUcUm-7gdxEyld8LI-wOIf9n6vxi71z8BAAD__xjndF0) was born in Spur. He and several dozen adherents of the Heaven’s Gate religious movement died in a mass suicide in 1997. Yesterday was Bike to Work Day, and the CBS News Texas team celebrated with a bike ride through downtown Fort Worth. ([See Report](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGSrCAQQE-DGRYiDhoQ_MRsfrqhhdCMXYMyBb063n7L2SNs2q_61ev-uk93ixG3x3-7gqF3SNMGR4lABHla0neBBal4sD7iBgRvW6zfJylkx0XHGz15i_GcVOXNLPzQVGAarbTSg5Z9tRghXN9732sZ-rZT2lo3eCWlGEIfXLAVmksmukY3jZBC1-0QhAJxg66bb651TAnwSCnXtPwWhHimHXLt0lpFsxC9Cmv_MTkyOR7HUbu5XFdcnMnxs8LkuKOHxOTo5sIvzD-AO4gwZ0tQ-IxP4JT4kfKTe3vyA2nhIWW6RrTwV4rogFPGDenkK1C-jFU2_nVgjFhuminxWC3GTx397ae7kT8BAAD__8sDjw4)) We are sponsored today by [Cemetery Preservation Supply,](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL-OrCAcRp8GOwz_FCkobmM3t93SIPwQEpQJMDq-_WZ3HmH7L985OV-P5WFiisf23-yg29vn5YCrJmgNyhLyq0KIrTowLsUDGrxNNe5cGGEDJgOmcnEmpnsRndMrcYp2oKkUUkgl2dQFrbyzVAnF_TjBREbigcMwTXbiihNGu6h_zshAJaWEEdlz5YkAMsIwrKPlFgkCLrZc-hY-Bj7d-YTS27x3SYfWnhXxf4jNiM3XdfVbMSfUlg-wCczxWSI2r2DzDrgFwAFKxtnjO78K9maP6a44wWbsjdjcFe2eV0wp1lEiQbbdxPSLa3-LdGr2HQAA__-CNH0i) a Texas-based business that can provide everything needed to maintain and restore your loved one’s gravestone.

## TX House Hits Deadline
Hundreds of bills died Thursday when the Texas House [reached a midnight deadline](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkb2unjAMhq8mbEH5xTBk6MJ2unZEITFgNfyI5INz7r7iq3puoJtly4_8-P31MXx4SrTNP_2KrnxO-7DhnROWguew7K-MC5Uc0cdEGxb89NnHa1BCWS4slzBET-lrMFV0o4idrNBJMGCgA9VWi2uFnVDEEEatrfDCKoMGzAjgUYfQVeQemLASpBRKQK27SRgUDVo7NkEHZgRGKvtZl-XvBVP62i8867CvVXJLKUdm-gdTPVP9fd_17-uFz5Cp3p-FQkKm-seLqf7YExUKT_lm8YQz5eTL68Tv3lucnz5g5ofPmY-UUuYrxY3mpXzv0IX832-Y6lXTcYu209ACb6FBbrDtuAclufFCBxlAmgjV6eJxU0qUG2BGzKun9LYp_5fB5dSfAAAA__8D5ptz) to pass legislation proposed by its members.

Democrats worked to slow proceedings throughout the day in an effort to prevent Republican-crafted bills from being voted on.

Among the bills that passed was a measure that would allow people to sue vaccine manufacturers under certain circumstances. Another proposal that received approval was a [repeal of the state’s defunct anti-sodomy law](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL1yqzAQhZ8GOjErgVgoVNzGnW-bklnQYjQRyIPWYL99xs4jpD9_3_m6DlcKMWy3_7Syk-echo3PHFmE92FJj8xLkOyZfAwbCz8pkz8GA8YqsErj4CnE19CU3o3ge12y09hggz2arlxc28593Rlk1L7r-gl6sh0T6JFnHInK4N5hYDVqDQawqvsZGoaWrR3bqZ6KBtgHSXsly--COb7SwXs1pbWMbhG556L-V5hLYS7neVZvhJP5-y0ozOXjUR8YdSThrHa-M0W1pDVlfj4oqilt_jGJGmlTBrDW2pa78_czxBhyi0UDt5VC_HTK3546nPkJAAD__2vFfw0).

Over in the Senate, a bill was approved that would [shut down](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDHOozAQRk8DnZEx2A6Fi23o_m23RBN7CCMZG-EJJLdfkRzh79-M3vf-_Uw_QJHS4y-s6Pg15ynhWSIy4z4t-VlwIS4BIURKyPiCAuGYlFRaSC1aOwWg-J76Ori7DENbo2ttb3s7WHWrF6dVZ8ygb_Lmh14F6MyMRlvtFQDY2dfkrmdSt7ZtpZK26YZZ9igNan03vvNVLzEQ573h5Wswx3c-cG98XuvoFuatVN2fSo2VGs_zbOb8svAsTOlCKjVemyo1fo5FwQSMArZtzwcWEfFBJQJTTqIsTxYhn0l82ZivEG_h87pSKZRTvbuwnRQjFWOrXj5WoPgx4d_1O5z6HwAA__8gZYjI) the Texas Lottery Commission and transfer administration of the lottery to another agency. The 140-day legislative session ends on June 2.
## Longhorns Win Baseball Season Title
In their first year in the conference, No. 3 Texas Longhorns baseball clinched the SEC [regular season title](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2S5CAMhU-DM1yAMbQDgk2c9aYbumSQG2pl6DJM_9x-yj1HmECKvpK-9_5dlyskSvn2F3Z07bWVJeOzEraGxxLLV8WYWg0IgVLGhi-oEB6LEmrkYuTSLgESvRfdBbeKMMkOnbTaajtZdemiUx59UFKaSWxWCz2AEYO5TMaPlw2l6ZI7j4lRWimFErYfpk1oFAbHcTV-8EwLDKmVo2_xx2Cjd3ng0fuyd-Ria_fKhj9MzUzNH4BKvsVy5HoiTM1nJqbm8xFT8znyXLnwga9QcQUiHnBDaJWX_wSx7MA9pewjr-h5S42wh3p_dYcL92ciStVYpsVth0Qfk_a7_h5OfQcAAP__eKCEQg) Thursday with a ninth-inning home run from right fielder Max Belyeu, defeating Oklahoma 7-4. It was the first game of the season-finale series against the Sooners, and it saw Texas [claw back](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkb-O2zAMh59G3hRI9B9dBg9dvF3XjgYtMbZQxgpEJrm8feEUBbrf8uNCfvwI_vqcPzFz3tefeKVRvy5l3ukpTKpU563chbaskggT552UvlAwPWZw0FvXWx_mhJlfc9ekcXHp7BsafehCF84BPpptpD5E3w7Jpx588hB6H0J01F4CumEZmjweMNf74L0DF07t-eI6cgP1_TLENprOUcpa6km3vwYXfpUH1VMs14bHTfUmpv1hYDIwcdnXrdRdnrnS6S6oJeHraDUwiZb6OuqtVBUDUyzMtNL_cwamBYUWZDYwHW4GJneEP-ItYBV_k9gVr2S9RbXlbiPnPW4kVijaSuudsVohlLLbf0CrWfnY9tEOgw_gnAsGpqaO6fbMzFmGYDq3XjHz-zr93k8eI_wJAAD__9CuoGU) from a 3-1 deficit, scoring three runs in the seventh. After Belyeu’s homer, left-hand closer Dylan Volantis pitched a shutout in the bottom of the ninth to secure the win. The Longhorns take their [No. 1 seeding](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDHSpCAQhU-DGRYgyhgQbGI2m25otdIqtUhPAY7j7becPcIfdEevvvfV-_Mcn-CDj-tv2NGWz0JjxDMHLAXTuNGRcfMlOwQXfMSCH8jg3qMSquWi5dKMDny4Rl05OwnXywqtNNpo0xv1qDbrpGpl7xqxNPMkZ9U_WgOTFrN-dN3S6crbGyZaaaQUSpi66RehUXTYtlM3NzPTAp0vlOqy_TdYwkVvTPVMexXsVsors-YXUwNTw3me9XSkWChBXDFC8RTvJFPDXcTUcJ-8n9K6kY3smRq-XB4orhulmLnh9DfARjvwTBQxZa75Dh8-Ybjw4GuCK1PkGY7oMVXJutfpQ_C5M0yLdQcfvn7lZ6u-rfoXAAD___Vzi8g) into next week’s SEC postseason tournament play, with their opponent still to be determined.
## New Adventure Trail, 'xTx', to Span Texas
A [new adventure trail,](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGunDAQRb_GdLOyvYCXgmKL0L0oRaKUaMDDMpKxV_YAb_8-2pdPePWR7j06fz_GD-TA8fETN-rlc0ljpLMEEqE8rmkvtLIUT-gDRxL6xIL-GK22DegGjBs9cniNdeX7SfvOVNQbV7vadc7eqrWfvbcTOuy66dZoNMusJ9_WN9O2dTddu4r795hujDNGW-0u127RNemWmmZq5-usak2eJeWLrP8NlvBKB-XLnLYq9KvIs6jrXdlB2eE8z8tW4pspO1CEvSg7SMaDgrJD2sWnlAFn4YOF6U3pyTOgPyjKngkkIwd4BoyRPCwpw9crGGi0ho0DFUgL5P3xIA8T4S4vZQfMcL-bH79__SlV7v3z5BC4tE7V-rEhhy9d-V7ko7f_AgAA__-Ob5Mu) announced last year, is now being tested, with some already coining it the Pacific Crest Trail of Texas. The Cross Texas Horse, Hike and Bike Adventure Route, or xTx for short, will [span 1,500 miles](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykj7FuwyAURb8GtlgPDMYeGLpkS9eOiPAeMRI2kaG28_dV00_ofu_ROV83d_Mpp_Xx6Rey7YzFrXTUTK3R5ubyXWlOrSJ5zGmlRqevHncnQeoL6IswDn3KL6c42jvgJDhZYZRRZjJy5LMNGAmwB4XDGKQapxhp9GRAY_ThrnmyvzDQwggBEkzXTxEUwUBa34fQB6aAMLWydW3-M4j5VXbaulAWnu3c2rOy_oPJK5PX4zi6873qyvZg8so3i88j5ZzqYJiCx-JTfl_b_4J3K38CAAD__8Ruawo) and run across the entire state from Orange (on the Louisiana border) to El Paso, factoring in all the varied types of terrain Texas has to offer along the way. The new trail is the brainchild of Charles Gandy, a renowned traveler who says he has personally covered every inch of the proposed route. The project, currently adding ground-proofers to prove the route, beat its funding goal of $40,000 in 2024 and looks to add [$310,000](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykj7FuwyAURb8GtlgPDLx6YOiSLV07ImweMRI2qaG28_dV00_ofu_ROZ83d_Mpp_X-4Rey7YzFrXTUTK3R5ubyXWlOrQbyIaeVGp2--rA7CVJfQF8EuuBTfjrFgx0hDIKTFahQ4YDyjc_W44SeMCpN_WDMGDUY1GNvRgIhQuDJ_sJACxQCJGDXDxEUgSGtRzP1E1NAIbWydW3-M4j5WXbauqksPNu5tUdl_TuTVyavx3F052vVle3O5DX6r8o3Gx5HyjlVg0zBffEpv-7tf9G7lT8BAAD__-2Sa_I) this year as the adventure trail takes shape.

clean_body: Several key bills progressed while others were in a pivotal few days for the Texas legislature, especially as the House reached its deadline for first approval on proposed bills midnight Thursday. | | | | | | Saturday, May 17, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1931, cult leader was born in Spur. He and several dozen adherents of the Heaven’s Gate religious movement died in a mass suicide in 1997. Yesterday was Bike to Work Day, and the CBS News Texas team celebrated with a bike ride through downtown Fort Worth. () We are sponsored today by a Texas-based business that can provide everything needed to maintain and restore your loved one’s gravestone. Abilene ☁️ 94/67° | Amarillo ☁️ 88/54° | Austin 🌩️ 98/75° | Brownsville 🌥️ 94/80° | Corpus Christi 🌥️ 90/79° | DFW ⛈️ 90/73° | El Paso 🌤️ 91/67° | Houston 🌩️ 93/76° | Laredo 🌥️ 103/78° | Lubbock ☁️ 90/61° | Midland ☁️ 92/67° | San Antonio 🌩️ 100/75° | Tyler ⛈️ 88/72° | Waco 🌩️ 91/73° Don’t feel like reading the national edition of The Flyover? Tune in to The Flyover Podcast! New episodes drop daily—watch on YouTube or listen on Spotify and Apple Podcasts, all in under 15 minutes. | | TX House Hits Deadline Hundreds of bills died Thursday when the Texas House to pass legislation proposed by its members. Democrats worked to slow proceedings throughout the day in an effort to prevent Republican-crafted bills from being voted on. Among the bills that passed was a measure that would allow people to sue vaccine manufacturers under certain circumstances. Another proposal that received approval was a . Over in the Senate, a bill was approved that would the Texas Lottery Commission and transfer administration of the lottery to another agency. The 140-day legislative session ends on June 2. Longhorns Win Baseball Season Title In their first year in the conference, No. 3 Texas Longhorns baseball clinched the SEC Thursday with a ninth-inning home run from right fielder Max Belyeu, defeating Oklahoma 7-4. It was the first game of the season-finale series against the Sooners, and it saw Texas from a 3-1 deficit, scoring three runs in the seventh. After Belyeu’s homer, left-hand closer Dylan Volantis pitched a shutout in the bottom of the ninth to secure the win. The Longhorns take their into next week’s SEC postseason tournament play, with their opponent still to be determined. New Adventure Trail, 'xTx', to Span Texas A announced last year, is now being tested, with some already coining it the Pacific Crest Trail of Texas. The Cross Texas Horse, Hike and Bike Adventure Route, or xTx for short, will and run across the entire state from Orange (on the Louisiana border) to El Paso, factoring in all the varied types of terrain Texas has to offer along the way. The new trail is the brainchild of Charles Gandy, a renowned traveler who says he has personally covered every inch of the proposed route. The project, currently adding ground-proofers to prove the route, beat its funding goal of $40,000 in 2024 and looks to add this year as the adventure trail takes shape. The Flyover is just like The Texas Flyover, except it covers news from all 50 states. | Memorial Day is approaching, a time to honor and remember our friends, neighbors and loved ones that served our proud nation. Over the years, the gravestones of our veteran heroes can accumulate biological growth like mold, mildew, and lichens, diminishing their appearance. But you can make a difference. . This safe and effective cleaner tackles stains from biological growth, restoring the honor and beauty of our Veterans' gravestones. Greg Abbott has officially requested that the Trump administration restrict the use of food stamps for the buying of “unhealthy, highly processed food.” () ➤ Houston: Two separate highway accidents resulted in hazmat spills that caused significant delays Friday morning. Both crash scenes were cleared by mid-morning. () ➤ San Antonio: San Pedro Creek Culture Park is now complete and fully open to the public, showcasing a transformed downtown cement drainage ditch with two miles of trails, 11 acres of new landscaping, and multiple works of art. name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Mississippi’s Economic Surge - Leading the Way
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/mseconomicsurge?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| _**If you're not in front of our Saturday email, you're behind.**_
---
| Dear Friend, **Federalism is the secret of American success.** Thanks to the Founders, each state is allowed to do things differently, which enables innovation.

**It is so exciting to see Mississippi now leading the way with bold, free-market reforms that have begun to unleash growth, providing a model for other states to follow.**

After decades being last, Mississippi is has started to see some remarkable results:
* **Explosive Economic Growth** : In 2024, Mississippi’s real GDP grew by 4.2%, ranking 2nd nationally, outpacing California (2.1%), New York (1.8%), and Texas (3.9%), per the BEA’s Q4 2024 data. Nominal GDP jumped 6.7% ($2.58 billion), also 2nd in the nation.
* **Surging Incomes** : Personal income growth ranked 4th nationally in Q3 2024. From 2000 to 2022, per capita income soared 140% (3.6% annually), from $21,500 to $46,200. With our low cost of living, Mississippians are enjoying one of the most rapid increases in living standards in America.

---
|
---
_Mississippi personal income has increased rapidly_
|
* **Global Competitiveness** : Being a British immigrant, I was fascinated to see that in 2023, Mississippi’s per capita output surpassed the UK’s. Even better, this year, we’re projected to overtake Germany’s per capita output.
* **Investment Boom** : Over $20 billion in new investment projects have been announced in the past couple of years. That means private dollars are investing in the future of our state because they think we have a great future.

**This economic renaissance didn’t happen by accident.** Growth is a direct consequence of the kind of free market reform MCPP has been advocating for:
* **Historic Tax Cuts** : In 2022, Mississippi passed the largest tax cut in state history, phasing in a 4% flat income tax by 2026.
* **Labor Market Deregulation** : By reducing red tape, we’ve empowered businesses to hire and innovate, boosting job creation (some estimates suggest 56,000 export-related jobs in 2022 alone).
* **Conservative Budget Responsibility** : A steady budget surplus has been important.
* **Low cost energy:** Mississippi managed to avoid a lot of the renewable energy policies that have pushed up costs in places like California.

We need to maintain this new momentum – and to do that there are plenty more policy changes we must make.

Education standards are not as good as some would like to suggest. It is vital that we allow school choice.

There are far too many red tape restrictions holding back the local economy, especially the protectionist rules in the healthcare sector.

Most important of all, perhaps, our state leaders need to restrain public spending, which has increased rapidly. We need to ensure that we continue to control spending so that we maintain modest budget surpluses.

But let’s take a moment to recognize that Mississippi is actually doing rather well. So much so, in fact, that other states might have something to learn from what our state leaders have got right.

Have an awesome weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=79959ba50f&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mcpp-c58f.mailchimpsites.com/manage/preferences?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=b58ef5fa58) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=b58ef5fa58).

_Copyright © 2025 Mississippi Center for Public Policy, All rights reserved._

**“Republicans advance bill with steep cuts to Medicaid as part of Trump agenda”**
\- _The Hill_ **[The headline says it all. Rush a donation ASAP to help Unite the Country fight back against the GOP’s reckless and deadly agenda>>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107858576/546061980/-593197506?refcode=em_UTC_FR_GOPHealthCareCuts_051725_RESEND&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIyMzU5NWQ5LTFlMzMtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=j8rRHIefVs2nkQwqDuzuROt15pTYx5vbvCOw5qzWSlY=)**
* * *
**10.3 million people would lose Medicaid coverage by 2034.** **7.6 million Americans would be uninsured.** These cuts mean seniors losing nursing home care; children losing access to doctors; and hospitals, especially in rural communities, shutting down for good. More than 70 million Americans need these programs to survive. **And let’s be clear: This is _exactly_ what Republicans have wanted for YEARS.** They tried and failed 100 times to repeal Obamacare outright because it’s too popular, and now? They’re starving it of funding and kicking millions of working families off their health insurance. Is this their plan to make America “great” and “healthy” again? No, it’s not, Peter. They’re not even trying to hide it behind those cheap slogans — it’s all to pay for their $4.5 trillion in tax cuts for the ultra-rich. That’s why Unite the Country is fighting back — exposing Trump’s cruelty, holding Republicans accountable, and building the movement to take back the House and FIRE Trump from the Oval Office. **Now more than ever, we need your support to punch back against this attack on Americans’ healthcare.** **[There’s no time to waste — House Republicans are pushing this bill through as fast as they can.
