clean_body: Americans need these programs to survive. | “Republicans advance bill with steep cuts to Medicaid as part of Trump agenda” \- The Hill = 10.3 million people would lose Medicaid coverage by 2034. 7.6 million Americans would be uninsured. These cuts mean seniors losing nursing home care; children losing access to doctors; and hospitals, especially in rural communities, shutting down for good. More than 70 million Americans need these programs to survive. And let’s be clear: This is exactly what Republicans have wanted for YEARS. They tried and failed 100 times to repeal Obamacare outright because it’s too popular, and now? They’re starving it of funding and kicking millions of working families off their health insurance. Is this their plan to make America “great” and “healthy” again? No, it’s not, Peter. They’re not even trying to hide it behind those cheap slogans — it’s all to pay for their $4.5 trillion in tax cuts for the ultra-rich. That’s why Unite the Country is fighting back — exposing Trump’s cruelty, holding Republicans accountable, and building the movement to take back the House and FIRE Trump from the Oval Office. I'm running for the U.S. Senate in Georgia because President Trump needs backup and Jon Ossoff is AWOL |
[](http://links.votekingforgeorgia.com/u/click?_t=6919cd1beff3411d8e4f07712332f3ec&_m=076b7296893a4e2d9dd242875f7fbfc1&_e=9wrQ5kgrgoLyZC5rejPFhsNWEziftkJdBXiqkHsf8kk-iY5NH2VVClVe4zTM_4umdiZsBl2pxyAMT6Qhxx_uo01IIw8aX2lIBogWIlDihpF3vFdnLj8ieKUN9K-iXtHLS5R-sb2FcpyGvipBRzWVsktLE-xcc_fAWnlWZVHFlbA6AZnbd9OhpCGvIGZploENSS3rWm8TfWo1Bz6gSSFk87evMSB7vJkBACRZycpb8WUNeqlIIoMGOGgYx7R4bajEeZdujDcoxLkJe_bU_wymWLptORp-Owr04_Evk_zTqdgbl6vJ3zBQLpvpxpyRMML6X6ZMGSi3mTB6jjIMDbyWzJwpdZFo0FuUrX3PS_D9zvBzLHr_-PunG4Rr4wF9B9t0Imi25bRr6DR7dEND-OUwngCEfcVlTpwfvj_20cySTMmfZEpI4-UK11lE9VDnUh8p)

Fellow Conservative, my name is John King.

[**I'm running for the U.S. Senate in Georgia because President Trump needs backup and Jon Ossoff is AWOL - I’m asking you to help me defeat him.**](http://links.votekingforgeorgia.com/u/click?_t=6919cd1beff3411d8e4f07712332f3ec&_m=076b7296893a4e2d9dd242875f7fbfc1&_e=9wrQ5kgrgoLyZC5rejPFhsNWEziftkJdBXiqkHsf8kk-iY5NH2VVClVe4zTM_4umdiZsBl2pxyAMT6Qhxx_uo01IIw8aX2lIBogWIlDihpF3vFdnLj8ieKUN9K-iXtHLS5R-sb2FcpyGvipBRzWVsktLE-xcc_fAWnlWZVHFlbA6AZnbd9OhpCGvIGZploENSS3rWm8TfWo1Bz6gSSFk87evMSB7vJkBACRZycpb8WUNeqlIIoMGOGgYx7R4bajEeZdujDcoxLkJe_bU_wymWFw03GWJxrMuToc29c5X3vKqVx2NV70zXNy_UScARBdZIhSOXuhOLDd4mGj74ZnimaWR_hlfs7jXfyvOYQ56_fXRsSH8m5WWyJIcUM8rEa-Rs7yVNefJwdVZdiqxBcRT1bM9_UuKvy0W-hq2l4bQuLMtM4c6lLdlGhsGVxFDX1N5)

**Let me tell you more about myself.**

**I was born and raised in Mexico.** I came to America when I was 17. My story is only possible in this country.

**I enlisted in the Army as a private and retired as a two-star major general.** I deployed to Afghanistan, Iraq, Bosnia, Africa, and our southern border.

**I joined the Atlanta police as a beat cop and became a police chief.** I’ve locked up drug dealers, deported criminals here illegally, and I was shot in the line of duty.

[](http://links.votekingforgeorgia.com/u/click?_t=6919cd1beff3411d8e4f07712332f3ec&_m=076b7296893a4e2d9dd242875f7fbfc1&_e=9wrQ5kgrgoLyZC5rejPFhsNWEziftkJdBXiqkHsf8kk-iY5NH2VVClVe4zTM_4umdiZsBl2pxyAMT6Qhxx_uo01IIw8aX2lIBogWIlDihpF3vFdnLj8ieKUN9K-iXtHLS5R-sb2FcpyGvipBRzWVsktLE-xcc_fAWnlWZVHFlbA6AZnbd9OhpCGvIGZploENSS3rWm8TfWo1Bz6gSSFk87evMSB7vJkBACRZycpb8WUNeqlIIoMGOGgYx7R4bajEeZdujDcoxLkJe_bU_wymWIH_9ryLsaYv4sEE19JhBqKlUAhbiJN_Qq12uBqgZa2-PSKg6fFcBixbS8xlPIhk5uMd2dBnVqaLQOZokMOAI3kF45HTRiUC6ZKcQjMrAhQrQUXVqKAVSyMREy327y4vousUxTsP9a2RHon5AVLJyJW4uE-xlvaJ-Z7lkbCICDko)

**I'm proud to support President Trump.** I co-chaired his Georgia campaign in 2020, spoke at rallies in 2024, and turned out Latinos to support Republicans across the state.

[**President Trump is putting America First, but for his agenda to succeed he needs a four-year majority - and that road runs straight through Georgia.**](http://links.votekingforgeorgia.com/u/click?_t=6919cd1beff3411d8e4f07712332f3ec&_m=076b7296893a4e2d9dd242875f7fbfc1&_e=9wrQ5kgrgoLyZC5rejPFhsNWEziftkJdBXiqkHsf8kk-iY5NH2VVClVe4zTM_4umdiZsBl2pxyAMT6Qhxx_uo01IIw8aX2lIBogWIlDihpF3vFdnLj8ieKUN9K-iXtHLS5R-sb2FcpyGvipBRzWVsktLE-xcc_fAWnlWZVHFlbA6AZnbd9OhpCGvIGZploENSS3rWm8TfWo1Bz6gSSFk87evMSB7vJkBACRZycpb8WUNeqlIIoMGOGgYx7R4bajEeZdujDcoxLkJe_bU_wymWKfg2xquNz05kS74-pxpnZ2tzV3lkl4OWNgq02hDj65qlNbb6iNsGN7y1Wwt2WsTpT54d05NiK66I0In01I10jLGkHmWA-K0P1Cn_3qzYi6-5sWwaJiddg-HTqDPL_8igVria0e6-M70LhpcD9Lh2o4Dq8dynCUHvmzC5xRXnWWr)

[](http://links.votekingforgeorgia.com/u/click?_t=6919cd1beff3411d8e4f07712332f3ec&_m=076b7296893a4e2d9dd242875f7fbfc1&_e=9wrQ5kgrgoLyZC5rejPFhsNWEziftkJdBXiqkHsf8kk-iY5NH2VVClVe4zTM_4umdiZsBl2pxyAMT6Qhxx_uo01IIw8aX2lIBogWIlDihpF3vFdnLj8ieKUN9K-iXtHLS5R-sb2FcpyGvipBRzWVsktLE-xcc_fAWnlWZVHFlbA6AZnbd9OhpCGvIGZploENSS3rWm8TfWo1Bz6gSSFk87evMSB7vJkBACRZycpb8WUNeqlIIoMGOGgYx7R4bajEeZdujDcoxLkJe_bU_wymWF5viaYjytM6ccZNHKX9_BEocvn6x2aEMWZ3TQhgPO5Xr0LUbm8axdrZjvjAuEz4pcfOKt27xNwH04QwPIoUeul3H_fH4Z_4Y7dw8t09ctqFgBMzZfMVMwUp4nI6d1PGpLCMoZVzD5afIGnyiWSE5RKWbiTPhxYdNvzOFjif167P)

**I’m running for Senate now because Jon Ossoff is an AWOL senator.**

He was nowhere to be found when Biden opened our borders and humiliated our country in Afghanistan.

And since the last election, he’s voted against supporting Israel, against keeping men out of women’s sports, and against confirming President Trump’s team.

**Enough already.** Georgians need a senator who fights for them and President Trump needs backup to pass his agenda.

[**But I can’t do this alone. I’m not a rich self-funder; I’m a lawman and soldier who’s humbly asking for your help to start this campaign the right way. Can you pitch in any amount?**](http://links.votekingforgeorgia.com/u/click?_t=6919cd1beff3411d8e4f07712332f3ec&_m=076b7296893a4e2d9dd242875f7fbfc1&_e=9wrQ5kgrgoLyZC5rejPFhsNWEziftkJdBXiqkHsf8kk-iY5NH2VVClVe4zTM_4umdiZsBl2pxyAMT6Qhxx_uo01IIw8aX2lIBogWIlDihpF3vFdnLj8ieKUN9K-iXtHLS5R-sb2FcpyGvipBRzWVsktLE-xcc_fAWnlWZVHFlbA6AZnbd9OhpCGvIGZploENSS3rWm8TfWo1Bz6gSSFk87evMSB7vJkBACRZycpb8WUNeqlIIoMGOGgYx7R4bajEeZdujDcoxLkJe_bU_wymWGlI0PXPwoV__gM5lR1A8pQ00afSNvd8CqawQiNWwB43EnD38eDBom-jbdSiOzgCKeOFUO20JQ5Q0pvXrfEovhVshI127LLkU4Km5jSH5PHwI5hsfQi-eyK9Gl7uga6t9ZBXFtGhSRg5eJyag5GjLQ2sUUwpnrpxJjKl0R0qKjW8)

clean_body: I'm running for the U.S. Senate in Georgia because President Trump needs backup and Jon Ossoff is AWOL | Fellow Conservative, my name is John King. Let me tell you more about myself. I was born and raised in Mexico. I came to America when I was 17. My story is only possible in this country. I enlisted in the Army as a private and retired as a two-star major general. I deployed to Afghanistan, Iraq, Bosnia, Africa, and our southern border. I joined the Atlanta police as a beat cop and became a police chief. I’ve locked up drug dealers, deported criminals here illegally, and I was shot in the line of duty. I'm proud to support President Trump. I co-chaired his Georgia campaign in 2020, spoke at rallies in 2024, and turned out Latinos to support Republicans across the state. I’m running for Senate now because Jon Ossoff is an AWOL senator. He was nowhere to be found when Biden opened our borders and humiliated our country in Afghanistan. And since the last election, he’s voted against supporting Israel, against keeping men out of women’s sports, and against confirming President Trump’s team. Enough already. Georgians need a senator who fights for them and President Trump needs backup to pass his agenda. I’m not afraid of how tough and expensive this campaign will be. I’m not afraid of the Swamp in Washington. I am afraid of giving Jon Ossoff six more years to put America last. Thanks, Maj. Gen. John King (retd.) | General John King is a soldier, lawman, and the first Hispanic elected statewide in Georgia history. He’s running for the Senate now because Georgians need a leader who will fight for them, fight for President Trump’s agenda, and put America First. | | | Paid For By John King For Senate Inc. I'm told my reputation precedes me.

I hope that's a good thing.

I try not to sound like some stuffy politician - I like talking in plain English and speaking from the heart.

So believe me when I say that I'm deeply concerned right now.

My friend, Steve Scalise, just informed me that the top House Democrat Super PAC is already unloading $50,000,000.000 (and no, this ain't a typo) into key battleground districts. They're hitting us harder and earlier than ever before.

That's enough cash to completely overwhelm DOZENS of our most vulnerable Conservatives!

_And to make matters even worse, my buddies in the House have a HUGE deadline coming up, and I just got word they 're falling 15-20% behind their goal._

It'll be a real disaster if they miss it.

With all due respect, I'm personally asking you for just a few bucks before time officially runs out. _**[We've only got DAYS 'til May is over and done with so do you think you could do that for me?](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=e7c11f4dcafc4f2da75e7ee94876ffec&_e=vgcCdZ0bHvQjB_SIMbgMW7qLBAA1gfFJQx_O6aIVgFw8d_hZajfuH3oi9j-f1BDVTmsWcAHJyWVKRxQtokNZy8l5dyT8HaYon_gy9hP686qvL5CDp-NRYs0sNi_L-ZByjpFKX5IKJXn_BoMOXy4QJgOYWzHO6oHs8CGh1uW5iKcnNwuDJdIMINaJoBCWzrJJra7SG8gwi9PrKC-cL0koqkwULteUM51Ajg1AQanWPSeIemCGft7qEm4sqEkx-1onbjKwpKvB0ktUV-t3CgOxf1WMJvfiKnP8mxZp7uFTb8fNUsk8dcI7LspUTyYNjIFqDetAmp3Jz59tuQ2w8kwZ-dXUhxv--4_CYjwYmgIXOcpqF7xO47MgYcy8mt59aj1R "We’ve only got DAYS ‘til May is over and done with so do you think you could do that for me?")**_

Conservatives control the House by the slimmest margins in 100 years.

I know we still have the Senate and White House but it could all be over for us if we don't dig deep and help SAVE the House Majority. That's why:

_Newt Gingrich already reached out ...
Steve Scalise already reached out...
And FOUR freshmen Members of Congress reached out too..._

I hate being a pest but we don't have time to sit around - not if we want to win!

## Army bomb squad rush to primary school after boy brought GRENADE for ‘show-and-tell’
A primary school in Derbyshire was evacuated after a pupil brought a World War Two hand grenade to show-and-tell. The incident occurred at Osmaston CofE Primary School in Ashbourne when a boy unexpectedly produced the grenade from his pocket during an assembly. name: General John King
subject: I'm running for Georgia's Senate seat
disclaimer_text: Paid For By John King For Senate Inc
body:
I’m running for the U.S. Senate in Georgia because President Trump needs backup and Jon Ossoff is AWOL The Federal Election Commission's filing deadline for the runoff is tomorrow ... we have LESS THAN 24 HOURS TO HIT OUR FUNDRAISING GOAL |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=84043efd7d2a4c3c9779d9542ad1b76c&_e=QCtoMP_rHOtgT6AodbxHtMyn_B92imjlvDyMTN6pVmgdkfkRiptkY9RAe33TZaTKkBIsbOjllBDV5mP--uULTh1rotB8L0Hni_piG9MTjKDDM9mN2jTnjjf9qzWFWGiXFM4T5K3nyuZFhj4AjQDY1ah4hlXX8CFiAUsFRFyy2n3YtdxT_Ni1gXbGfSwzyw8IBQMSSa_hFq2JehcaFNh4MNncf4eRvkZ0BPEpd1QB3omMfhDHvLTpxE8-upBiqM_JrkMqj7IExDl9pI2OgsSvXazC2-o67cN8ra6E4iFh-eL9-6v8F_t2YAi2YVTXNMLHnwH1wOFi70G0rcTkwJ_wVR3BCRmDh0DDa2V41DcdrAmL9LSfoA0TR3uZQw6a0zGJmdF4pd-iREsoiaKm20k2ilGW3PXexVsZvPVYqyd-V3w%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative, my name is John King.

[**I'm running for the U.S. Senate in Georgia because President Trump needs backup and Jon Ossoff is AWOL - I’m asking you to help me defeat him.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=84043efd7d2a4c3c9779d9542ad1b76c&_e=QCtoMP_rHOtgT6AodbxHtMyn_B92imjlvDyMTN6pVmgdkfkRiptkY9RAe33TZaTKkBIsbOjllBDV5mP--uULTh1rotB8L0Hni_piG9MTjKDDM9mN2jTnjjf9qzWFWGiXFM4T5K3nyuZFhj4AjQDY1ah4hlXX8CFiAUsFRFyy2n3YtdxT_Ni1gXbGfSwzyw8IBQMSSa_hFq2JehcaFNh4MNncf4eRvkZ0BPEpd1QB3omMfhDHvLTpxE8-upBiqM_JnpHg9nozTA_Kf17psXWVW3SXn6PAKao-gUdTvybZsRMyCnLqx1h4QchG6ywFj0Xrl1HPh503KbOqMuGOMyDfYI5xBzWbGL5kdt7V8aU-y8ZV862h9XoMtHbITM2y-OoEAnYPQvpW3rVVRsdYQNnXESxUpUKfIbJg9wFco_EluyY%3D)

**Let me tell you more about myself.**

**I was born and raised in Mexico.** I came to America when I was 17. My story is only possible in this country.

**I enlisted in the Army as a private and retired as a two-star major general.** I deployed to Afghanistan, Iraq, Bosnia, Africa, and our southern border.

**I joined the Atlanta police as a beat cop and became a police chief.** I’ve locked up drug dealers, deported criminals here illegally, and I was shot in the line of duty.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=84043efd7d2a4c3c9779d9542ad1b76c&_e=QCtoMP_rHOtgT6AodbxHtMyn_B92imjlvDyMTN6pVmgdkfkRiptkY9RAe33TZaTKkBIsbOjllBDV5mP--uULTh1rotB8L0Hni_piG9MTjKDDM9mN2jTnjjf9qzWFWGiXFM4T5K3nyuZFhj4AjQDY1ah4hlXX8CFiAUsFRFyy2n3YtdxT_Ni1gXbGfSwzyw8IBQMSSa_hFq2JehcaFNh4MNncf4eRvkZ0BPEpd1QB3omMfhDHvLTpxE8-upBiqM_Jhz6NPiQgBHQlpaLqrNTcCjsjkLUO8aIqZdg7Cb9NhB8bkLo6s3vDxHH80gJmafUp1qsiFTaJMFmp5yzPJSaui5W8v89XjgOI7r-eNGjrNHId49RSyuFIVop0n0fqkSqwf3jzWM_w5v6z4z0G2ebpaqxsgJhszz5im1Y7itT_oSo%3D)

**I'm proud to support President Trump.** I co-chaired his Georgia campaign in 2020, spoke at rallies in 2024, and turned out Latinos to support Republicans across the state.

[**President Trump is putting America First, but for his agenda to succeed he needs a four-year majority - and that road runs straight through Georgia.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=84043efd7d2a4c3c9779d9542ad1b76c&_e=QCtoMP_rHOtgT6AodbxHtMyn_B92imjlvDyMTN6pVmgdkfkRiptkY9RAe33TZaTKkBIsbOjllBDV5mP--uULTh1rotB8L0Hni_piG9MTjKDDM9mN2jTnjjf9qzWFWGiXFM4T5K3nyuZFhj4AjQDY1ah4hlXX8CFiAUsFRFyy2n3YtdxT_Ni1gXbGfSwzyw8IBQMSSa_hFq2JehcaFNh4MNncf4eRvkZ0BPEpd1QB3omMfhDHvLTpxE8-upBiqM_JdAoJ9zciYe3bmopio24VHyBKYpXVod9MCtynhK1JNetKcnC5bCgTGXyTzQYHLWdD8u-CRvAJyYHweB3r1Yqbad5K9H-Q_ComeC6b7g4ZIGX1H6sOdqZtw_1zEkmkaS5QasJmBe-iNlEGhYDWFKlHZEBaxwoOhlJgVA1lCP65nqY%3D)

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=84043efd7d2a4c3c9779d9542ad1b76c&_e=QCtoMP_rHOtgT6AodbxHtMyn_B92imjlvDyMTN6pVmgdkfkRiptkY9RAe33TZaTKkBIsbOjllBDV5mP--uULTh1rotB8L0Hni_piG9MTjKDDM9mN2jTnjjf9qzWFWGiXFM4T5K3nyuZFhj4AjQDY1ah4hlXX8CFiAUsFRFyy2n3YtdxT_Ni1gXbGfSwzyw8IBQMSSa_hFq2JehcaFNh4MNncf4eRvkZ0BPEpd1QB3omMfhDHvLTpxE8-upBiqM_JcSYiQfgZ_8rVrmlWWoqVB2y0V70fo-WpqUlc6QQsk9fz9a0PiBsF0ybGLq-PDinJxmQiYOVPUL4EcR5C0SwXA6yhUW-5Pm7T5JiMYkP-MDsuPzSTyfF3RmQz-hha8Bbcl3__VXC7hBuUdxNC_K1KFMlDUFTBLiUO1PBnnpXh8g0%3D)

**I’m running for Senate now because Jon Ossoff is an AWOL senator.**

He was nowhere to be found when Biden opened our borders and humiliated our country in Afghanistan.

And since the last election, he’s voted against supporting Israel, against keeping men out of women’s sports, and against confirming President Trump’s team.

**Enough already.** Georgians need a senator who fights for them and President Trump needs backup to pass his agenda.

[**But I can’t do this alone. I’m not a rich self-funder; I’m a lawman and soldier who’s humbly asking for your help to start this campaign the right way. clean_body: I’m running for the U.S. Senate in Georgia because President Trump needs backup and Jon Ossoff is AWOL The Federal Election Commission's filing deadline for the runoff is tomorrow ... we have LESS THAN 24 HOURS TO HIT OUR FUNDRAISING GOAL | Fellow Conservative, my name is John King. Let me tell you more about myself. I was born and raised in Mexico. I came to America when I was 17. My story is only possible in this country. I enlisted in the Army as a private and retired as a two-star major general. I deployed to Afghanistan, Iraq, Bosnia, Africa, and our southern border. I joined the Atlanta police as a beat cop and became a police chief. I’ve locked up drug dealers, deported criminals here illegally, and I was shot in the line of duty. I'm proud to support President Trump. I co-chaired his Georgia campaign in 2020, spoke at rallies in 2024, and turned out Latinos to support Republicans across the state. I’m running for Senate now because Jon Ossoff is an AWOL senator. He was nowhere to be found when Biden opened our borders and humiliated our country in Afghanistan. And since the last election, he’s voted against supporting Israel, against keeping men out of women’s sports, and against confirming President Trump’s team. Enough already. Georgians need a senator who fights for them and President Trump needs backup to pass his agenda. I’m not afraid of how tough and expensive this campaign will be. I’m not afraid of the Swamp in Washington. I am afraid of giving Jon Ossoff six more years to put America last. Thanks, Maj. Gen. John King (retd.) | General John King is a soldier, lawman, and the first Hispanic elected statewide in Georgia history. He’s running for the Senate now because Georgians need a leader who will fight for them, fight for President Trump’s agenda, and put America First. | | | Paid For By John King For Senate Inc. name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: If you’ve got a minute, could you personally endorse Ruben?
body:
He’s holding Trump accountable every day, spreading the word about the damage Trump’s doing, and blocking Trump’s VA nominees as long as his Administration plans on firing 80,000 critical VA staff.
#

Peter:
In a tough year, Ruben Gallego managed to win his campaign for U.S. Senate in Arizona, even as the state went to Donald Trump by 5.5%.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/personal_endorse_em_may25/?source=em250517-1-90&akid=3868%2E734936%2EyWnXMm)
Ruben ran a smart race. No doubt.
But he knows that he never would have had a chance if hundreds of thousands of people hadn’t chipped in and supported his campaign. **He is incredibly grateful, and he’ll never forget it.**
But now, we’re months into Trump’s second presidency. **Our institutions are under attack.** Trump’s trampling the Constitution, and he’s coming for Medicaid, Medicare, Social Security, and the VA.
In difficult times like these, we’re lucky to have leaders like Ruben in Washington. _He’s holding Trump accountable every day, spreading the word about the damage Trump’s doing, and blocking Trump’s VA nominees as long as his Administration plans on firing 80,000 critical VA staff._
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/personal_endorse_em_may25/?source=em250517-1-90&akid=3868%2E734936%2EyWnXMm)
We sent Ruben to the Senate to fight for us, and that’s exactly what he’s doing. **But as he takes this work on, it’s still important for him to know that he has a big team behind him.**
[**So, we’re asking if you could add your name to join the thousands of others on Team Gallego and personally endorse Ruben. It’s a small act, but it speaks volumes about the movement we are building.** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/personal_endorse_em_may25/?source=em250517-1-90&akid=3868%2E734936%2EyWnXMm) Thanks so much for your support. It means a lot to us, and to Ruben. Team Gallego

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts. If you'd like to receive only the most important emails going forward, [tell us at this link](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/fewer_emails/?source=fewer-emails&t=1&akid=3868%2E734936%2EyWnXMm). Or, if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=3868%2E734936%2EyWnXMm). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=3&refcode2=3868_734936_yWnXMm&akid=3868%2E734936%2EyWnXMm)

subject: Last-ditch request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
As you read this, there's been a dramatic slowdown in our fundraising since Marjorie Taylor Greene said she wasn’t running
#

Good morning, Peter.
We are reaching out on behalf of Jon Ossoff with a last-ditch request to make a contribution to his re-election campaign.
As you read this, there's been a dramatic slowdown in our fundraising since Marjorie Taylor Greene said she wasn’t running. And it's happening at a time when more and more Republicans are getting in the race.
Look at this chart from ActBlue.
[](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-may25.ZUBy2n&refcode=em250517-ex&t=1&akid=351%2E5691347%2EwV8p0Q)
You can see the trend – our fundraising is going the wrong way and the timing is not great at all.
That's why we're reaching out. These individual, small-dollar donations make up the vast majority of our fundraising and we can’t afford to slow down while Republicans are ramping up.
**[If re-electing Jon Ossoff and giving Democrats a chance to flip the Senate is worth $5 to you – and if you can afford to give it – please make that donation to Jon Ossoff’s re-election campaign today.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-may25.ZUBy2n&refcode=em250517-ex&t=2&akid=351%2E5691347%2EwV8p0Q)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $10](https://act.electjon.com/go/1525?c0=ossoff-em-may25.m5wiqz&refcode=em250517-ex&t=21&akid=351%2E5691347%2EwV8p0Q)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE $25](https://act.electjon.com/go/1526?c0=ossoff-em-may25.sCvt_Z&refcode=em250517-ex&t=22&akid=351%2E5691347%2EwV8p0Q)**
---
****
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $50](https://act.electjon.com/go/1520?c0=ossoff-em-may25.bjSglV&refcode=em250517-ex&t=23&akid=351%2E5691347%2EwV8p0Q)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE $100](https://act.electjon.com/go/1521?c0=ossoff-em-may25.Jw8NYM&refcode=em250517-ex&t=24&akid=351%2E5691347%2EwV8p0Q)**
---
****
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $250](https://act.electjon.com/go/1522?c0=ossoff-em-may25.dHnkSs&refcode=em250517-ex&t=25&akid=351%2E5691347%2EwV8p0Q)**
---
****
| **[Another Amount](https://act.electjon.com/go/34?c0=ossoff-em-may25.qypQqM&refcode=em250517-ex&t=26&akid=351%2E5691347%2EwV8p0Q)**
---
****
Thank you in advance for contributing today. We are hoping for lots of donations to make up for the recent shortfall.
\- Team Ossoff

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=351%2E5691347%2EwV8p0Q) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

## Jake Tapper Tells Americans What They Already Knew in Latest Book
WASHINGTON—Penguin Press touts its new book, “Original Sin: President Biden’s Decline, Its Cover-Up, and His Disastrous Choice to Run Again,” by Jake Tapper and Alex Thompson, as “an explosive account of one of the most hubristic mistakes in American history: Joe Biden’s decision to run for reelection despite mounting evidence of his decline, and his [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/nnjR-gRiwQo6k3Q2i4knAun6m2Te7Ty-DD4g4lGLUzoz2-R8QwKvnxhxDtp9Xze5QRjxzu8pnBRVPMwHKD2wZmtbrN8ylsJb_XHct1MCc-yaJY8cy3iEyZUhDL-L2PpVg0Z5KhNZ-ccWYiIFtaNAJF_eJQpxqp2M_07_vcppwUzQVEE-dBlz8NBdKI_-hoimiS2ED43Y43a8rnJQXSfRPXES9Cg5kQQBHLidkRYwSz4oLRB8XIQKfdYK7X5oGq3e5tQmBwr1ki6wB9hP-kVYuGOJHVUi1Z83lGdyivrYhKKlAsWhbds38osps51m4Kb-EuJBpA3uwzQIyvUdLNcZgKK-BpA4lkwvKg8/JmiS0rh0FHjIR0fNd2-nfWrZnENOOr3d/9)

The recent controversy surrounding K-pop group Kiss of Life’s hip-hop-themed live stream has sparked heated debate, with accusations of cultural mockery and racism leveled against the group. The four members—Julie, Natty, Belle, [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/SkLvGv2NqRLhXyQFHgP8WzgveM7e7JL2ee0bhQrNVKDiDvSS_qo-ycx_HKILGli-dBbcvMvQPgT2LAn-0ZYi2Dj6akyUNXeDEdhuoPfTioMSJnuqv1-R2JIJ6Ngd2QVMmG7_Wwm8mI7TvSTEiESs2mlN22bJisHmSE2PLJvya9tRpn5zxqHZet0sj18vlYvQlxlbXPro6_ixMg7Su3p9l0qYUAAetHUueM7G27_sMLdIUuzfZcWrE9_KAzopYa0-2Dr53TqOnNg_SZIs__Qh85fDeNCkzNNq-E-V_vZcCb2kQhjdrKv0bxR_lg/K8jh1X6d_TRF2nJhuSfI2224D9taVVEo/9)

It is National Foster Care Month, so this week's Feel-Good Friday gives attention to the programs and people that give a home, hope, and relief to foster children across the nation. According to Adoption and Foster Care Reporting System numbers, almost 400,000 children and teens are currently in foster care throughout the nation. Since [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/4yhZ6dbKFRT6Ag1mUFFB8yWm82gUnIvM1Nxvdymuv3mPwxyaNWsFgsuvOon5jwpgJa4KZm-el-X7-Buxqs_YtvC8JNp_VCqerjSpbTHTZH5KsCYXrbJOyP5ECaQAvbNEfZ0TfPD5Xo0Cf49K7xg_eyHQB59L34FlLOPmMR6GARAEtyINIKOw6590myAhetE-6z1FKz3Uq3Demy6X--7L6du6ms9h4FcT4GPWipCTGYowvATvamfb8UK50kG8NuB6uo4FYJ07fnPJwFYVN0irK_3jemII5o92kUv55CnyZY-tRCm5eAZcxr2bosJpiauf1CC3k6Uqiw15bs_CLtih1LjBZAqZ5FLKFkDo-c6O2JCEz7dcSiwInWtoiXK6lbeuqvxEYw/OBEaf7P-jLpgAEupsoGruMywTg0slStl/9)

The man who was convicted of trying to kill bestselling author and free speech advocate, Salman Rushie, has now learned his sentence. On Friday, in Chautauqua County (New York) court, the judge handed down the maximum sentence to the attacker, Hadi Matar, who repeatedly slashed Rushie with a knife in an attempt to kill [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/vLjFZddtVhPiZ3dA3Nslozr9Kz6BcUNuRLKu6iUqPnRUjw5n13ikXh879Kg3hnU2jfNrVtfEnqMIPLYaolwx0KBK108lrXhRJF2rhYjHumdMfyTBL9RnpPRJQXItXqOVRZnilWcTeNzSY4LZa1ov-Rm3YJkPp7_zIswuZBKnaAZYYoD5ttLaAzTsPpe-wGLbK6kQvVSggLxGuXEyhVfPlhQSSUzWxa0ieEz2KE3OxvUz878OR43wKAETdlwEN8eFSVilk87LEllGb_dQBdgz_njMFM_giPVKeFm4uy0OCOJl7wFbqTR_L1BvdKEtWshVwfgWat5kFKB9dRRE5YcyBEBURm-i_JthY34VlJg4slOkMVCLilohYpe6Amb_52QugJWwWwEmNTH_hLWukoU/a6rdKDulmovLxIieBaEJZM52bHh0vmri/9)

The Supreme Court has extended its block on the Trump administration’s use of the Alien Enemies Act to deport illegal alien gang members from Venezuelan. “The Supreme Court has just ruled that the worst murderers, drug dealers, gang members, and even those who are mentally insane, who came into our country illegally, are not [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/SFpyvKHKng1HzKx-fNxqyIljmskXWSK36cXyc9dog-0ZGHjW4Uv1j0mQKP871EBiU-k72Ou3RKGoG5FvuH-kN80FDIClm6l8ce6BJZULKBWv3IvxhoIQMlgDSvdYg7v4GydFOHmtxP1Tawnd0zvzb--vSSF0A-YI0CEi12v8IXgv_1u99YWbC_sKmcfXufrvPZkRD-zOc8A5AZpgI3wcXu_2yu6MPblm9quTJTqswZOUdazTUtWucjhzmae4Bo7arvLY73cJNf1X6u-EzY4U_IMPtu_XjhGaY2DE788qI3rqWVe1tO_EkB9KvrmAjYQL2emVnNTANyxYt0YEuE58WRtsaY84/GgACUELWo4q_vYP9b24kN_qShRhVea1g/9)

subject: This may sound like an odd request…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Scalise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit Scalise For Congress and Eye Of The Tiger PAC
body:
| Not interested? [Unsubscribe here](https://links.house-republicans.org/unsubscribe?e=998fa18fd50048d580e64d9cd10dc33f&utm_source=hdscalise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_e5ab85792bb4a9ddad1e5e4a705&n=1).
---
| **[This may sound like an odd request but I promise it’ll make sense after you read this email – would you be willing to chip in just $4 today?](https://links.house-republicans.org/r?u=-KKwfzWl7oK4gNPooZXuJ4Zn2xET82xeGk9Y43EVmFKrKilQjb_TykfVin6emj6pj1SEqDbuSJxoV3nmYgKYYR-8XK3Lwd9a2nEfmLdPUuBqRwymuisxEYKvGaYB-qMHGnkAIJXmUrMYHknHCCgbGpJcXgdk2-94xjHKtOAWhxwymtJSjvfggsxIiXrtin4pyofDc_GpgoktJ4yUdMeQpKJ2iyCD5gSURruCH8oqkb87ZhPC5DxFdGpdCi2X5K6_&e=998fa18fd50048d580e64d9cd10dc33f&utm_source=hdscalise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_e5ab85792bb4a9ddad1e5e4a705&n=2 "This may sound like an odd request
but I promise it’ll make sense after you read this email – would you
be willing to chip in just $4 today?")**

Let me explain why:

As House Majority Leader, I've seen firsthand how just a few bucks from Conservatives nationwide can help win close elections. That’s what helped President Trump win every swing state, keep the House in Republican control, and establish a strong Senate Majority.

I've ALSO seen how Hollywood Elites, Silicon Valley billionaires, and megadonors have bankrolled the Democrats to victory.

So when I looked at the latest FEC reports, I got a chilling feeling of what’s about to come:

– The Democrats just raised _$37+ MILLION_
– They're _+1_ on the Midterm generic ballot
– Cook Political Report predicts a _Democrat House Majority_ in 2026

I'm counting on you to help me turn the tide.

_I’m asking 10,000 grassroots Patriots (like you!) to pitch in just $4 within the next 48 hours to help kickstart our efforts to save our Conservative House Majority._
---
| | | [PITCH IN $4 >>> MAKE AN IMPACT](https://links.house-republicans.org/r?u=-KKwfzWl7oK4gNPooZXuJ4Zn2xET82xeGk9Y43EVmFKrKilQjb_TykfVin6emj6pj1SEqDbuSJxoV3nmYgKYYR-8XK3Lwd9a2nEfmLdPUuBqRwymuisxEYKvGaYB-qMHGnkAIJXmUrMYHknHCCgbGpJcXgdk2-94xjHKtOAWhxwymtJSjvfggsxIiXrtin4pyofDc_GpgoktJ4yUdMeQpKJ2iyCD5gSURruCH8oqkb87ZhPC5DxFdGpdCi2X5K6_&e=998fa18fd50048d580e64d9cd10dc33f&utm_source=hdscalise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_e5ab85792bb4a9ddad1e5e4a705&n=3 "PITCH
IN $4 >>> MAKE AN IMPACT")
---
| | | [PITCH IN $12 >>> TRIPLE YOUR IMPACT](https://links.house-republicans.org/r?u=-KKwfzWl7oK4gNPooZXuJ4Zn2xET82xeGk9Y43EVmFKrKilQjb_TykfVin6emj6pj1SEqDbuSJxoV3nmYgKYYR-8XK3Lwd9a2nEfmLdPUuBqRwymuisxEYKvGaYB-qMHGnkAIJXmUrMYHknHCCgbGpJcXgdk2-94xjHKtOAWhxwymtJSjvfggsxIiXrtin4pyofDc_GpgoktJ4yUdMeQpKJ2iyCD5gSURruCH8oqkb87ZhPC5DxFdGpdCi2X5K6_&e=998fa18fd50048d580e64d9cd10dc33f&utm_source=hdscalise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_e5ab85792bb4a9ddad1e5e4a705&n=4 "PITCH
IN $4 >>> MAKE AN IMPACT")
---
| | | [PITCH IN $40 >>> 10X YOUR IMPACT](https://links.house-republicans.org/r?u=-KKwfzWl7oK4gNPooZXuJ4Zn2xET82xeGk9Y43EVmFKrKilQjb_TykfVin6emj6pj1SEqDbuSJxoV3nmYgKYYR-8XK3Lwd9a2nEfmLdPUuBqRwymuisxEYKvGaYB-qMHGnkAIJXmUrMYHknHCCgbGpJcXgdk2-94xjHKtOAWhxwymtJSjvfggsxIiXrtin4pyofDc_GpgoktJ4yUdMeQpKJ2iyCD5gSURruCH8oqkb87ZhPC5DxFdGpdCi2X5K6_&e=998fa18fd50048d580e64d9cd10dc33f&utm_source=hdscalise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_e5ab85792bb4a9ddad1e5e4a705&n=5 "PITCH
IN $4 >>> MAKE AN IMPACT")
---
I know that $4 may not seem like a lot but trust me, it adds up.

And with the Democrats pouring tens of millions of dollars into destroying us, every single dollar counts.

Your contribution today will go directly towards recruiting strong Conservative candidates, building election-winning campaign infrastructure, and mobilizing a grassroots army to help register more Republican voters.

**[Please don’t wait. Don’t hesitate. The future of America hangs in the balance.](https://links.house-republicans.org/r?u=-KKwfzWl7oK4gNPooZXuJ4Zn2xET82xeGk9Y43EVmFKrKilQjb_TykfVin6emj6pj1SEqDbuSJxoV3nmYgKYYR-8XK3Lwd9a2nEfmLdPUuBqRwymuisxEYKvGaYB-qMHGnkAIJXmUrMYHknHCCgbGpJcXgdk2-94xjHKtOAWhxwymtJSjvfggsxIiXrtin4pyofDc_GpgoktJ4yUdMeQpKJ2iyCD5gSURruCH8oqkb87ZhPC5DxFdGpdCi2X5K6_&e=998fa18fd50048d580e64d9cd10dc33f&utm_source=hdscalise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_e5ab85792bb4a9ddad1e5e4a705&n=6 "Please don’t wait. Don’t
hesitate. The future of America hangs in the balance.")**

God bless,
_– Steve_

STEVE SCALISE
**House Majority Leader**

| Hi Friend—
---
Earlier this week, I shared an epiphany I had while sitting in the 11th Circuit Court of Appeals. The response from everyone was overwhelming— thank you!! Many of you asked for more details, so I wanted to follow up and paint a clearer picture of the future I believe we’re heading toward.
As you know, True the Vote has spent over fifteen years on the front lines— exposing vulnerabilities, fighting lawfare, and standing up for voters. We've been in the trenches. But now, we’re standing at the edge of something new. Something transformative.
We live in a world where you can unlock your phone with your face, move money in seconds, and track a package from warehouse to doorstep. And yet, our elections remain vulnerable, opaque, and slow.
That’s not a technology problem. That’s a _leadership_ problem. It’s time for the era of excuses to end. So let’s start here - with **Voter Singularity.**
**What is voter singularity?** It’s the point where election systems become frictionless, transparent, and incorruptible. Where voter identity, residency, and citizenship can be verified instantly and securely. Where every lawful voter— no more, no less— can cast a ballot with total confidence. Where elections are no longer hidden behind bureaucratic curtains but open, auditable, and accountable in real time.
Another example of a future innovation is something we’re calling **Smart Paper**.
Smart Paper doesn’t exist yet— but it will. And it’s not electronic voting. It’s not centralized systems run by big tech. It’s something much simpler, and much more powerful.
Smart Paper will be a physical, hand-marked ballot, just like what we use now— but embedded with a secure digital fingerprint, backed by blockchain. That fingerprint creates a one-to-one match between your paper ballot and a record stored on a distributed ledger. It can’t be altered. It can’t be faked. Once it’s printed, it’s tracked. Once it’s cast, it’s locked.
When polls close, _anyone_ — voters, observers, watchdogs— can verify that the process worked. That’s not less control for the people. That’s _more_.
And thanks to advances in AI and encryption, it could be reality in a matter of months. Start-up companies are already innovating this space.
This is our moment. The tech is here. The solutions are coming. What’s needed now is bold, citizen-led demand, and the courage to build what the political class refuses to. We’ve never settled for the status quo. And we won’t now. Our elections belong to _the people_ , not the politicians.
| | _“The liberties of our country, the freedom of our civil Constitution, are worth defending at all hazards.”_
---

—Samuel Adams
Over the coming weeks, we’ll continue introducing new concepts and opportunities. Along the way, we’ll host calls and build discussion forums so that the community’s inspirations aren’t siloed.
| | _" As iron sharpens iron, so one person sharpens another."_
---

—Proverbs 27:17
Voter singularity is the future— undeniable, unstoppable— and thanks to you, we’re already on the path.
Keep the faith. Never quit. Ephesians 6 FTW!
Ever onward -
|
---
P.S. One last thank you. You make our existence possible. Thank you for all you do.

clean_body: A continuation of thoughts on the future of election integrity. | | | | May 17, 2025 | | | Hi Friend— Earlier this week, I shared an epiphany I had while sitting in the 11th Circuit Court of Appeals. The response from everyone was overwhelming— thank you!! Many of you asked for more details, so I wanted to follow up and paint a clearer picture of the future I believe we’re heading toward. As you know, True the Vote has spent over fifteen years on the front lines— exposing vulnerabilities, fighting lawfare, and standing up for voters. We've been in the trenches. But now, we’re standing at the edge of something new. Something transformative. We live in a world where you can unlock your phone with your face, move money in seconds, and track a package from warehouse to doorstep. And yet, our elections remain vulnerable, opaque, and slow. That’s not a technology problem. That’s a leadership problem. It’s time for the era of excuses to end. So let’s start here - with Voter Singularity. What is voter singularity? It’s the point where election systems become frictionless, transparent, and incorruptible. Where voter identity, residency, and citizenship can be verified instantly and securely. Where every lawful voter— no more, no less— can cast a ballot with total confidence. Where elections are no longer hidden behind bureaucratic curtains but open, auditable, and accountable in real time. Another example of a future innovation is something we’re calling Smart Paper. Smart Paper doesn’t exist yet— but it will. And it’s not electronic voting. It’s not centralized systems run by big tech. It’s something much simpler, and much more powerful. Smart Paper will be a physical, hand-marked ballot, just like what we use now— but embedded with a secure digital fingerprint, backed by blockchain. That fingerprint creates a one-to-one match between your paper ballot and a record stored on a distributed ledger. It can’t be altered. It can’t be faked. Once it’s printed, it’s tracked. Once it’s cast, it’s locked. When polls close, anyone — voters, observers, watchdogs— can verify that the process worked. That’s not less control for the people. That’s more. And thanks to advances in AI and encryption, it could be reality in a matter of months. Start-up companies are already innovating this space. This is our moment. The tech is here. The solutions are coming. What’s needed now is bold, citizen-led demand, and the courage to build what the political class refuses to. We’ve never settled for the status quo. And we won’t now. Our elections belong to the people , not the politicians. | | “The liberties of our country, the freedom of our civil Constitution, are worth defending at all hazards.” —Samuel Adams Over the coming weeks, we’ll continue introducing new concepts and opportunities. Along the way, we’ll host calls and build discussion forums so that the community’s inspirations aren’t siloed. | | " As iron sharpens iron, so one person sharpens another." —Proverbs 27:17 Voter singularity is the future— undeniable, unstoppable— and thanks to you, we’re already on the path. Keep the faith. Never quit. Ephesians 6 FTW! Ever onward - | P.S. One last thank you. You make our existence possible. Thank you for all you do. | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- | | Update your email preferences or unsubscribe (C) 2025 True the Vote 3120 Southwest Frwy Ste 101, PMB 19128 Houston, Texas 77098-4520, United States of America

| **BOMBSHELL NEWS:**
**Michigan Democrat files Articles of Impeachment against your President**

This comes 24 hours after Chuck Schumer took to live television refusing to rule out impeachment. It’s just the first step in the Democrats' plot to SABOTAGE President Trump’s second term, OBLITERATE our Conservative House Majority, and CLAW BACK power.

If that happens, it will be a death knell for everything we’ve worked so hard for. But hear this:

**We won't back down. We won't be silenced. We won't be intimidated.**

As a key member of our movement, we’re asking you to play a major role in our plan to fight back:

**[We’re assembling a team of the TOP MAGA warriors nationwide _(at least 1,000,000 strong)_ to help us defend our Pro-Trump Majority in the House.](https://links.house-republicans.org/r?u=-KKwfzWl7oK4gNPooZXuJ4Zn2xET82xeGk9Y43EVmFJwQsqQGqsSAQgJbLIwvPZB2xmVkCAEv2hrgHedozkVeqYlBvPUjh44SrhPcD7-FML5QafB5s3ZB_D4NbtEVXD_FOvpFM7M0v7RLklXIrykKcBj1n9VAEkfYAr9UPpL6bfSILHFY8kR-jRVJWMgRWwgV1yFaUxjbEZF1tMap43E7OU4Xyviozjgi2M70XuXB74e-4QNk7OXRoaFcbxwBE7FjtxRy2aCCnTwVAHhIKUmi4Bb5H5zxYB0rC1YtBAdvF1xxzcgA7_Dd_k1fVluW7rF&e=998fa18fd50048d580e64d9cd10dc33f&utm_source=hdscalise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_6001b72f941d57fea155ac26ebd&n=2 "We’re

Democrats returning to power would mean the end for our MAGA movement and could spell disaster for this great nation.

If they manage to steal our House Majority, they’ll have the power to impeach, investigate, and bring his entire legislative agenda to a SCREECHING HALT!

" | "JOIN OUR EFFORTS" We’re counting on you to do your Patriotic duty right here and right now. For God and Country, House Republicans via Team Scalise

| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3844b93e-d175-4c74-aa43-636391636756/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Hey there — it’s Gina Ortiz Jones, former Under Secretary of the Air Force under President Biden and candidate for San Antonio Mayor, the 7th largest city in the country. I’m officially in a runoff against Greg Abbott’s hand-picked candidate, and I need your help to build the grassroots movement we need to go toe-to-toe with right-wing megadonors. [Before I explain, can you split a donation of $10 between Blue Amp Action and my campaign towards our Battle for Texas Fund to power my campaign to victory over the next 20 days?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4a1daf5a-a80b-49ef-83a2-f988be6d194f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| That’s right — I’m officially running against Greg Abbott’s former Secretary of State, Rolando Pablos. Greg Abbott and his buddies dumped hundreds of thousands of dollars into this race at the last minute to drag Rolando across the finish line. Why? Because Rolando has — and is willing to again — bend the knee for Greg Abbott’s whims. More people live in San Antonio than in 11 states. We can do a lot of good for a lot of folks, or they’ll be made to suffer under Greg Abbott’s puppet. As Democrats, we need to hold ground, and that includes San Antonio. We only have 20 days to secure victory, and with Greg Abbott’s dark money megadonors bankrolling my opponent, there is no time to waste. Greg Abbott really wants to say that San Antonio — a majority Hispanic community — just voted for a Republican to be its next mayor. The Republicans get a talking point, Greg Abbott gets a puppet, and my community suffers. That’s why my team has set up an emergency $10,000 Battle for Texas fundraising goal to help us through the final stretch. [Can I count on you to split $10 between Blue Amp Action and my campaign to our Battle for Texas Fund to help me cross the finish line on Election Day?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbc1bfa0b-1ada-46f5-b746-bb6b19e1a506/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3739d69f-4e8d-4744-ba3a-808a70372f25/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Fellow activist, we have some good news to share for a change!

**This week, the House Speaker Joanna McClinton’s bill (HB 1396) – the Voting Rights Protection Act – passed through the State House** , along party lines, 102-101. We applaud the members of the House for passing this bill that represents much-needed modernization efforts. As McClinton stated, “House Bill 1396 responds to the needs of our most essential election stakeholders and would make all of our elections free, fair, efficient, uniform, safe and secure.” Under the false pretext of preventing election fraud, some political actors have sought to potentially disenfranchise millions of Americans across not only Pennsylvania but the nation, particularly women, people of color, and low-income families. Trump issued an executive order trying to roll back voting rights, while Republicans in Congress are rewriting the rules with the passage of the SAVE Act to dismantle longstanding voter protections.

**Given these efforts, it is encouraging to see that the Pennsylvania House of Representatives has stepped up to meet this moment. HB 1396 represents a promising approach to election modernization that maintains security while expanding access. **

The legislation would improve the administration of the state’s elections while strengthening ballot access for Pennsylvania’s eligible voters. This legislation is designed to encourage public participation in our elections by reducing barriers that keep people from casting their ballots. With proper coordination and implementation planning, this legislation could meaningfully improve Pennsylvania's election system in three key ways:
* Expand access to the ballot box through machine-based early voting
* Crucial updates like electronic poll books and recount reform to modernize and secure our elections
* Standardized ballot drop box requirements
* Practical improvements to mail ballot procedures
* Mandatory mail ballot cure procedures, and
* Pre-registration for 16- and 17-year-olds.

**We are thrilled that this bill continues to make its way through the PA legislature. But with anti-voter bills also progressing, we cannot afford to sit back and wait to see what happens.**

**[Join us in advocating for protecting voting rights in the Commonwealth by rushing a donation today →

](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yr19exo8ATdRfiqRDml-2FPz7N1bdan8dqslucv3braa57iroH1-2FNyT9glGiUy6uuKRzfbYbXPd-2BHRzQrO54JVLhDx3MEZl-2FQ9uRHBPP-2FUZ-2Fywm4U4bj2G8JdN8b-2FWxjLNajy4kS0i0Jt-2FMEfzs84zi7o-3DPPas_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYMS3EGDwZmlde6ZTtJ2n3zmw7YwPmY1yNAHkonOH8M1Il0MAanJ7MO-2FjBPEmfblcLOisJiYK7vT0Q8EmkEoKvYeTFN3zsB-2FE4RwfTJTIso7BDS1lcNHgnVHD7lWEySV4hveqQewM9A8SZAyECpFFAO5XNP9nOOhvvYGJP9W1iLJVw9Tk383ZrxO6affl-2FEwPa)** Together,

Team NPP

_Donations to the New Pennsylvania Project supports our staff’s community engagement efforts including; organizing and hosting town halls, educational webinars, community conversations, and creating digital content, bi-weekly blasts and social media to reach the communities we engage year-round._
---
| | _The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth._

clean_body: | | | Fellow activist, we have some good news to share for a change! This week, the House Speaker Joanna McClinton’s bill (HB 1396) – the Voting Rights Protection Act – passed through the State House , along party lines, 102-101. We applaud the members of the House for passing this bill that represents much-needed modernization efforts. As McClinton stated, “House Bill 1396 responds to the needs of our most essential election stakeholders and would make all of our elections free, fair, efficient, uniform, safe and secure.” Under the false pretext of preventing election fraud, some political actors have sought to potentially disenfranchise millions of Americans across not only Pennsylvania but the nation, particularly women, people of color, and low-income families. Trump issued an executive order trying to roll back voting rights, while Republicans in Congress are rewriting the rules with the passage of the SAVE Act to dismantle longstanding voter protections. Given these efforts, it is encouraging to see that the Pennsylvania House of Representatives has stepped up to meet this moment. HB 1396 represents a promising approach to election modernization that maintains security while expanding access. The legislation would improve the administration of the state’s elections while strengthening ballot access for Pennsylvania’s eligible voters. This legislation is designed to encourage public participation in our elections by reducing barriers that keep people from casting their ballots. With proper coordination and implementation planning, this legislation could meaningfully improve Pennsylvania's election system in three key ways: Expand access to the ballot box through machine-based early voting Crucial updates like electronic poll books and recount reform to modernize and secure our elections Standardized ballot drop box requirements Practical improvements to mail ballot procedures Mandatory mail ballot cure procedures, and Pre-registration for 16- and 17-year-olds. We are thrilled that this bill continues to make its way through the PA legislature. But with anti-voter bills also progressing, we cannot afford to sit back and wait to see what happens. Together, Team NPP Donations to the New Pennsylvania Project supports our staff’s community engagement efforts including; organizing and hosting town halls, educational webinars, community conversations, and creating digital content, bi-weekly blasts and social media to reach the communities we engage year-round. | | The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. Will you support us with a monthly contribution today? || || || The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project Our Contact Information New Pennsylvania ProjectP.O. Box 443 West Chester, PA 193814126996771 | | | |

subject: I am MAGA’s #1 target without a doubt

body:
This is not a drill, and it’s not a bad dream
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107871554/546100188/274859036?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5538-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTRkMTJhMS0yODMzLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=558iuQ0KNETe0fr6w2xrdkXmIbptp4WQBZ65mhJdx54=)
_Let me lay this out, clear as day:_
I am the only Democratic Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won in 2024.

This Senate race in Georgia will be the most competitive and most expensive in the nation.
If you’re outraged by what’s happening to our country — and you’re ready to fight –– [**please split $5 between my re-election campaign and Jacky Rosen today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107871555/546100189/274859036?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk5538-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTRkMTJhMS0yODMzLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=558iuQ0KNETe0fr6w2xrdkXmIbptp4WQBZ65mhJdx54=)
| | [SPLIT A DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107871556/546100190/274859036?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5538-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTRkMTJhMS0yODMzLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=558iuQ0KNETe0fr6w2xrdkXmIbptp4WQBZ65mhJdx54=)
---
Otherwise, let me remind you why I ran for Senate — and why this moment is just as urgent.

Before I was elected, I led investigations of corruption and human rights abuses worldwide. We exposed wrongdoing in countries where criticizing the government is dangerous, where whistleblowers and witnesses will only meet in secret, where protest carries the risk of prosecution.
More and more, the atmosphere under Trump reminded me of those places where dissent was silenced by intimidation.

Trump’s rise wasn’t just a crisis. It was a warning.
I ran for Senate because I saw the danger in electing someone so profoundly unfit for the presidency, and I wanted to confront the corruption that made his rise possible.

I also ran — years before the _Dobbs_ decision — because it was already clear the GOP was coming for reproductive rights. I saw Georgia as the front line in that fight. With a six-week ban now in place here, and Republicans pushing for a national abortion ban, it still is.
**Now this President is staging a power grab unprecedented in our history. In his first 100 days:**
| • | He’s freed violent criminals who attacked the Capitol on his behalf.
---|---
• | Purged independent watchdogs across government.
• | Stacked key agencies with loyalists—and called on them to investigate his political opponents.
• | Defied and threatened federal judges.
• | Undermined the press.
• | Handed sweeping, unaccountable power to the billionaire who spent $300 million to elect him.
Trump’s goal isn’t just revenge. He wants to use the government to crush the opposition. And now, Americans are living in fear of their own government.

This is not a drill, and it’s not a bad dream. As citizens, it is the test of our lifetimes.
**In 2020, the pundits said flipping a Republican Senate seat in Georgia couldn’t be done. But we built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history—and we won. That victory won the Senate majority.**
Now we must win again. And we _will_ win again.

Just like last time, I can’t do it alone.

So I’m asking:
[**Please split a contribution between my re-election campaign and Jacky Rosen today, of $5 or any amount that works for you.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107871557/546100191/274859036?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5538-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTRkMTJhMS0yODMzLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=558iuQ0KNETe0fr6w2xrdkXmIbptp4WQBZ65mhJdx54=)
The average online donation to our campaign is around $30. Many give less. Some give more.

All that matters is that lots and lots of people are contributing what they can to power our grassroots campaign. Please, contribute today.
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107871558/546100192/274859036?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5538-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTRkMTJhMS0yODMzLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=558iuQ0KNETe0fr6w2xrdkXmIbptp4WQBZ65mhJdx54=)
---
Thanks for being part of this team.

As always,

Jon Ossoff
|

Peter,

It's Kellyanne Conway, President Donald Trump's former campaign manager, and **I need your immediate attention on something.**

Senator Lindsey Graham is up for re-election in South Carolina, and it should come as no surprise to anyone that he is the Left's #1 target to beat in 2026.

Senator Graham has President Trump's endorsement and is helping pass Trump's winning agenda in the Senate daily. To top it off, last year Senator Graham crisscrossed the country, rallying voters to secure a Senate Republican majority.

**Peter, those three things are the perfect credentials to make Lindsey Graham the Left's biggest enemy.**

Sen. Graham is the Left's worst nightmare, and they'll do anything to put him out of office. They tried hard last time. In his last race, Democrats smashed fundraising records, pouring $132 million into lies and smear campaigns to defeat him. It didn't work then, but we can't let it work this time.

Peter, I've seen and been a part of tough races. Let me tell you, _this one won't be easy, but we can't risk losing South Carolina to the radical Left._

**[Will you join me in supporting Senator Lindsey Graham as he fights hard to keep South Carolina Red and maintain the strong Conservative Senate majority he helped build?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ecce540aaa204c6cab1b855532b54dca&_e=fgyLWUXoW9_yU1YUJ9WRRLOE2iFj6oiwqUMQw98oUKYQ_GiaZelL9hnHN8QwMlX0iwaEfWwS5tm3vIesofwk0bmAUPli5jWidHahaIXwld_ORKg0PTwh7Jx1Pw4_ybXvnQ_tVZAewIgieOGJC9AjcgbG6hZv8gtfvHQOy3L162K54nEXVviaUyIZOnmJ2ZHOXkTcsSWd38AxRElqN_qCaVKCx9focFmBqaJLTwSWOx9IBOu-p5fsn1xPlB36Q_3bpBE2BJLTLDixLrQ6HlwWuDa-8lJz05Ttqt3TJYwVxt-tllDr3ZmtNDReObo6_F2GAmeKXYXhbUz_FVuigsNGn-B-cNME5S-vPvHiCp1qhvh3bSyuSHGGeBtUvmIPidb4K6HreaeOGbL_qQL3AQiejbRkakmjCPX6H3Zi34Ut8LM%3D)**

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: I know how to win tough fights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
#
Friends —
This U.S. Senate race in Georgia isn’t just another election.
It’s the one race MAGA is banking on.
See, as the only Democratic Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won, I am, quite literally, their #1 target.
You know the stakes. And you know your support is crucial. If you are ready to make a donation today, please use this link to split a donation between my campaign and The Long Run today:
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-ossoff**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-ossoff.w1PR_G&refcode=em250517-1-150&t=1&akid=5552%2E196590%2ETHTMWN)
Otherwise, I hope you’ll give me a minute or two to explain why your support is so important.
They’re going to come after me with every dirty trick in the book and will spare no expense to defeat me.
That means we need to build the largest statewide campaign Georgia has ever seen.
That means more rallies. More organizers. More outreach — and early outreach — to voters in every corner of the state.
All of that takes resources. And it’s why donations from supporters like you are so important to our campaign.
The road ahead won’t be easy. But I know how to win tough fights. I’ve done it before.
I can’t do it alone, which is why I’m asking:
[**Please, consider splitting a contribution between my re-election and The Long Run. Every donation counts in a race as close as this one will be.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-ossoff.w1PR_G&refcode=em250517-1-150&t=2&akid=5552%2E196590%2ETHTMWN)
[DONATE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-ossoff.w1PR_G&refcode=em250517-1-150&t=3&akid=5552%2E196590%2ETHTMWN)
Thanks for all you do to support our campaign.
As always,
Jon

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=5552%2E196590%2ETHTMWN). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=5&akid=5552%2E196590%2ETHTMWN)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=5552_196590_THTMWN&akid=5552%2E196590%2ETHTMWN)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=7&akid=5552%2E196590%2ETHTMWN)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

Fellow Conservative, The attempted takeover and temporary occupation of Columbia University's library by pro-Hamas forces is yet another example of how individuals with radical ideologies abuse the generous education visas that our government has long supplied to those wishing to study here in the United States. One witness to the encounter described to the New York Post how the events unfolded:
---
_**" Somebody hung up a flag, posters, stickers, people were scribbling on the walls, dancing on the tables, singing ... Chanting like, I don't know, 'Free Palestine,' the classics," said the young woman, who did not want to be identified." **_
---
Secretary Rubio is making it abundantly clear: We will not tolerate mob violence, civil unrest, or anti-Semitic protests, period. And if you're here in our country as a guest on a visa, we won't bat an eye over revoking your credentials and deporting you. As he said on X on May 8th, "We are reviewing the visa status of the trespassers and vandals who took over Columbia University's library. Pro-Hamas thugs are no longer welcome in our great nation." **This is common sense. ** I want to know if you agree. **_Should we arrest and deport all anti-American terrorism supporters who have slipped into our country? _** **[Please take a quick survey to let me know where you stand.](http://trk.tedcruz.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6MjE0NTQxMDEsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4NzQ5MDg0NSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI1MTM3LTE2ZDZkMzg5YTEyMjQ0YzRhNTg0OGZmYmIxZGJlNTViIiwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMiIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVkLWNydXovcGdfZV96bS1tYXJjb3Zpc2EtZnRqXzIwMjUwNTEzX2Ffb3RoZXI_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el96bS1tYXJjb3Zpc2FfMjAyNTA1MTMmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD16bS1tYXJjb3Zpc2EmdXRtX2FnZW5jeT1QRyZhbW91bnQ9NzUmcmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUifQ/35PBr3ntSsgdmWNj3vVGwQ)** With gratitude, Sen. clean_body: Agree or disagree: we need to revoke the visas of any guest here in the United States who has broken our laws in support of Hamas | | | | | Fellow Conservative, The attempted takeover and temporary occupation of Columbia University's library by pro-Hamas forces is yet another example of how individuals with radical ideologies abuse the generous education visas that our government has long supplied to those wishing to study here in the United States. One witness to the encounter described to the New York Post how the events unfolded: " Somebody hung up a flag, posters, stickers, people were scribbling on the walls, dancing on the tables, singing ... Chanting like, I don't know, 'Free Palestine,' the classics," said the young woman, who did not want to be identified." Secretary Rubio is making it abundantly clear: We will not tolerate mob violence, civil unrest, or anti-Semitic protests, period. And if you're here in our country as a guest on a visa, we won't bat an eye over revoking your credentials and deporting you. As he said on X on May 8th, "We are reviewing the visa status of the trespassers and vandals who took over Columbia University's library. Pro-Hamas thugs are no longer welcome in our great nation." This is common sense. I want to know if you agree. Should we arrest and deport all anti-American terrorism supporters who have slipped into our country? With gratitude, Sen. Ted Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | PO Box 25400 Houston, TX 77265 | | | To stop receiving emails from Ted Cruz for Senate, to unsubscribe. |

name: Ilhan Omar for Congress
subject: government inefficiency
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
This is a struggle between America’s working class and the billionaire oligarchs in the White House
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1637%2E791427%2EASeQq9)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/4413?t=2&akid=1637%2E791427%2EASeQq9)
Friend, I wrote to you recently that in my opinion, DOGE has been a complete failure.
Now, more and more stories are coming out of federal agencies that are confirming DOGE’s misguided and mismanaged approach.
This group of tech bros thought they could swoop into critical agencies and the complicated systems that provide services for hundreds of millions of people and treat it like a tech startup.
_They ended up creating more government inefficiency,_ because they constantly looked for problems in all the wrong places and broke many things along the way.
The only real thing they accomplished was the firing of thousands of critical public workers and the shuttering of essential agencies and programs in places like the EPA, the Department of Education, and USAID.
**So yes, DOGE continues to be a complete failure.** And we must continue to fight to keep DOGE and Elon Musk’s hands off the services and programs that help so many of our communities, from kids in working class families who survive off SNAP assistance to our elders who rely on their Social Security.
This is a struggle between America’s working class and the billionaire oligarchs in the White House. I know what side I’m on.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar
* * *

**One more thing!**
If you can spare $5, $10, or any other amount for Ilhan Omar’s campaign today, please chip in. We have to stay on track towards our goal or we risk getting the attention of the billionaires and Super PACs who are watching this race closely. **[Chip in today and help Ilhan Omar hit her fundraising goal and continue to build a winning campaign:**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-may25.meJdrd&refcode=em250517-1-180&t=3&akid=1637%2E791427%2EASeQq9)

name: Delia Ramirez
subject: This is deeply personal to me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

On Day 1 back in the White House, Donald Trump wasted no time issuing an
unconstitutional executive order to rip away our fundamental right to
birthright citizenship, which is guaranteed by the 14th Amendment.

Since then, we’ve seen his far-right administration unleash ICE agents,
wearing plain clothes and face coverings, on our communities, terrorizing
immigrants and separating families to carry out their mass deportation
plan.

I’ve fought this cruel, anti-immigrant agenda from the start, and this
week, I introduced legislation to protect birthright citizenship from
being illegally rolled back by Trump. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250517-dr?refcode=em20250517-36687&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36687_1203867_TxdHcD&akid=36687%2E1203867%2ETxdHcD ]If I have your support in this
fight, will you rush a donation to my campaign and Justice Democrats now?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250517-dr?refcode=em20250517-36687&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36687_1203867_TxdHcD&akid=36687%2E1203867%2ETxdHcD ]A screenshot of a headline from The Intercept. The heading reads
'Democrats to introduce bill to block Trump's attack on birthright
citizenship'. The subheading reads 'Rep. Delia Ramirez told The Intercept
she will introduce legislation to stop Trump from restricting birthright
citizenship.'

As I told The Intercept, revoking the right to birthright citizenship,
which guarantees citizenship for anyone born on United States soil, is not
about immigration: it’s about upholding white supremacy.

This fight is deeply personal to me,
Peter.

I'm the proud daughter of Guatemalan immigrants. My parents came to the
U.S. while my mother was pregnant with me, and they've worked their
hardest to give me and my siblings a better life. In addition, my husband
was a Dreamer. He came to the U.S. when he was just 14 years old, and
worked constantly to help his parents make ends meet.

I’m also the first Latina ever elected to Congress from Illinois, and was
the only member of Congress in a mixed-status family before my husband
received his green card late last year.

Needless to say, my goal has always been to be a champion for immigrant
families like mine, and this bill is the next step in our fight against an
authoritarian administration’s attempt to demean and erase us.

But our movement against white supremacism requires everyday people like
you stepping up, speaking out, and giving where you can to fuel our fight
for justice for ALL.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250517-dr?refcode=em20250517-36687&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36687_1203867_TxdHcD&akid=36687%2E1203867%2ETxdHcD ]With all that said, my campaign and Justice Democrats don’t take a cent
from corporate PACs, so we could really use your support today in this
critical moment. Please split a grassroots contribution of
$5 or whatever you can — I appreciate it.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250517-dr?refcode=em20250517-36687&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36687_1203867_TxdHcD&akid=36687%2E1203867%2ETxdHcD ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Delia Ramirez

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250517-36687-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36687_1203867_TxdHcD&akid=36687%2E1203867%2ETxdHcD

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36687%2E1203867%2ETxdHcD

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster, PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Deb Haaland
subject: I got some big news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
A Republican challenger has entered the race for Governor of New Mexico.
Hi, it’s Deb Haaland.
I’m reaching out with some big news, and I’m grateful to Heartland Patriots for giving me the opportunity to share it directly with you.
**A Republican challenger has entered the race for Governor of New Mexico.**
We know that Donald Trump and Republicans are trying to flip New Mexico red, and we can expect them to spend a lot of money to do it.
**[Peter, can I count on you to split a donation of $10 between my campaign and Heartland Patriots today to show the Republicans the strength of our grassroots movement?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88653?refcode=em20250517-8946&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8946%2E614464%2EIublzF)**
With Donald Trump and his party in power in Washington, we know what the Republicans have to offer: chaos, corruption, and policies that advantage billionaire insiders over regular New Mexicans.
We can’t let them bring the same playbook to the governor’s office.
As governor, I’ll focus on finding real solutions to our challenges instead. And I’ll fight to make sure the system works for everyday people the way it should.
But I’m counting on your support to keep growing this campaign and win next November.
**[If you’re able, will you split a donation of $10 between my campaign and Heartland Patriots today? This race just changed, and we need to respond now.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88653?refcode=em20250517-8946&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8946%2E614464%2EIublzF)**

[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88654?refcode=em20250517-8946&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=8946%2E614464%2EIublzF) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88654?refcode=em20250517-8946&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=8946%2E614464%2EIublzF) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88654?refcode=em20250517-8946&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=8946%2E614464%2EIublzF) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88654?refcode=em20250517-8946&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=8946%2E614464%2EIublzF) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88654?refcode=em20250517-8946&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=8946%2E614464%2EIublzF) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88654?refcode=em20250517-8946&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=8946%2E614464%2EIublzF) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88653?refcode=em20250517-8946&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=8946%2E614464%2EIublzF)

name: General John King
subject: A soldier and a lawman
disclaimer_text: Paid For By John King For Senate Inc
body:
Honor. Integrity. Service. America First. That’s what our country needs right now, but Democrat Senator Jon Ossoff is totally AWOL. The Federal Election Commission's filing deadline for the runoff is tomorrow ... we have LESS THAN 24 HOURS TO HIT OUR FUNDRAISING GOAL |
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=67d80823567a4c52ae8cb501c80942a5&_e=pNrGv42QthFIOxu1EZNYWzDb5l8z64WPufkRh1xr5GdWWBx1jT4uVCJVIG7F4iMJ_sZagaKKsuGZvhOetVa-tAE58i4IGb4ULXznFaEE9blt07Yt27EqjPmNSU1IHGhMJPi5gAvrWS5JneMd_VbW0TGRzFDaHsyQG9Jacw5fsqJvA7fq6IVnYQoLVHs8KA8kVIxuYl1fbKTkSImgfeEUK7BV1NOUpWupGNScIyVtrUP-CIVa9X3eyFSMkPNjgdQLmLTJ6jxpSRLtPrkjq4oW1LpghXH8q5EZRfvY2jaKMCJJb_Y6kgzTCQ35t0FlqPKuKhEM_De7DWA91IFa4xp7ZvWh036WZVSgLYkRVJJMKz2vPPyiWG6N3Imhmpw7TnvXDYpyFB7SUekvZtzrmgKjFw%3D%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

**I enlisted in the U.S. Army as a private and retired as a two-star major general.** I deployed and led troops around the world, including Afghanistan, Iraq, Bosnia, Africa, and at our southern border during President Trump’s first term.

**I joined the Atlanta Police Department as a beat cop and became Doraville’s Chief of Police.** I locked up drug dealers, deported criminals here illegally, and was shot and stabbed in the line of duty.

**I’m proud to support President Trump.** I co-chaired his Georgia campaign in 2020, spoke at rallies in 2024, and turned out Latinos to support Republicans across the state.

Honor. Integrity. Service. America First. That’s what our country needs right now, but Democrat Senator Jon Ossoff is totally AWOL.

[**My name is John King, solving problems is what I do, and I’m answering the call to run for U.S. Senate in Georgia to defeat Jon Ossoff and give President Trump the reinforcements he needs to Make America Great Again.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=67d80823567a4c52ae8cb501c80942a5&_e=pNrGv42QthFIOxu1EZNYWzDb5l8z64WPufkRh1xr5GdWWBx1jT4uVCJVIG7F4iMJ_sZagaKKsuGZvhOetVa-tAE58i4IGb4ULXznFaEE9blt07Yt27EqjPmNSU1IHGhMJPi5gAvrWS5JneMd_VbW0TGRzFDaHsyQG9Jacw5fsqJvA7fq6IVnYQoLVHs8KA8kVIxuYl1fbKTkSImgfeEUK7BV1NOUpWupGNScIyVtrUP-CIVa9X3eyFSMkPNjgdQLJfucPF7uTEMoLYa63l5r-s1JkLYDBUeBTtbYaZye89yupuCb5QOSnWLAe5nDHsvVD70Ikv_chMP44a87zWzAsl5WlCtaPd8_pbrkQXLO4IKvVcjUKAE6QPaWGeI_cCLDtOw5BKtkWNjZ-mMxuECeYw%3D%3D)

[**JOIN THE MISSION
TO SAVE AMERICA**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=67d80823567a4c52ae8cb501c80942a5&_e=pNrGv42QthFIOxu1EZNYWzDb5l8z64WPufkRh1xr5GdWWBx1jT4uVCJVIG7F4iMJ_sZagaKKsuGZvhOetVa-tAE58i4IGb4ULXznFaEE9blt07Yt27EqjPmNSU1IHGhMJPi5gAvrWS5JneMd_VbW0TGRzFDaHsyQG9Jacw5fsqJvA7fq6IVnYQoLVHs8KA8kVIxuYl1fbKTkSImgfeEUK7BV1NOUpWupGNScIyVtrUP-CIVa9X3eyFSMkPNjgdQLFTlKIT1-WKbOuNkVIAnsuogAsuWSzJB2AtcH5YLij8giFMB4E05wt44LQd9hv8AApGlarzCW9Hzn_NU1Q1ufEmjThxsWkZEY9zUSD5-Ft0PpZDhqoW7lYkI6Qs_9RoV4YKBcw7OO5CjTtRFactz_4w%3D%3D)
Jon Ossoff was AWOL when Biden opened our borders and humiliated our country in Afghanistan. He voted against supporting Israel and for letting men play women’s sports.

**And now he says he wants to impeach President Trump.**

_Ossoff is California’s third senator, not Georgia’s senior senator._

**Enough already.** President Trump needs reinforcements, and Georgia needs a new senator.

**But I can’t do this alone.** I’m not a rich self-funder. clean_body: Honor. Integrity. Service. America First. That’s what our country needs right now, but Democrat Senator Jon Ossoff is totally AWOL. The Federal Election Commission's filing deadline for the runoff is tomorrow ... we have LESS THAN 24 HOURS TO HIT OUR FUNDRAISING GOAL | Fellow Conservative, I enlisted in the U.S. Army as a private and retired as a two-star major general. I deployed and led troops around the world, including Afghanistan, Iraq, Bosnia, Africa, and at our southern border during President Trump’s first term. I joined the Atlanta Police Department as a beat cop and became Doraville’s Chief of Police. I locked up drug dealers, deported criminals here illegally, and was shot and stabbed in the line of duty. I’m proud to support President Trump. I co-chaired his Georgia campaign in 2020, spoke at rallies in 2024, and turned out Latinos to support Republicans across the state. Honor. Integrity. Service. America First. That’s what our country needs right now, but Democrat Senator Jon Ossoff is totally AWOL. Jon Ossoff was AWOL when Biden opened our borders and humiliated our country in Afghanistan. He voted against supporting Israel and for letting men play women’s sports. And now he says he wants to impeach President Trump. Ossoff is California’s third senator, not Georgia’s senior senator. Enough already. President Trump needs reinforcements, and Georgia needs a new senator. But I can’t do this alone. I’m not a rich self-funder. I’ve walked high crime foot patrol and served in some of the most dangerous parts of the world. I’m not afraid of a fight, but I am afraid of giving Jon Ossoff six more years to ignore Georgia and put America last. Thanks, Maj. Gen. John King (retd.) | General John King is a soldier, lawman, and the first Hispanic elected statewide in Georgia history. He’s running for the Senate now because Georgians need a leader who will fight for them, fight for President Trump’s agenda, and put America First. | | | Paid For By John King For Senate Inc. Use of military images or rank does not imply endorsement by the U.S. Dept. of Defense or any Service Branch._
