name: News Team @ Our Revolution
subject: UPDATES: Warren vs. Crypto, Bernie vs. Drug Prices, All of Us vs. Oligarchy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

NEWS FROM THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

HEADLINES: Sen. Warren Joins Us to Tackle Trump’s Crypto Corruption |
Bernie Challenges Trump on Drug Prices | Citizen Action Team Fights
Oligarchs | Confronting GOP to Save Medicaid | New Endorsements! | &
MORE!

★ ★ ★

PEOPLE POWER

Right now, Congress is racing to ram through a budget that will kick
millions of people off of Medicaid and SNAP – while funneling
trillions of taxpayer dollars to billionaires and military
contractors.

Our massive grassroots army is joining Bernie, AOC, and other
progressive leaders in Congress and in the streets to pressure a
handful of vulnerable Republicans to vote against Trump’s disastrous
budget bill — and it’s working. A dozen lawmakers have started to
backtrack, we can’t let up now!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/28750?t=1011&akid=8487%2E5885482%2EvYSAXL ]ADD YOUR NAME TO SAVE MEDICAID!

★ ★ ★

Our collective action is making an impact — and now is the time to
rally our movement and ramp up our fight.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8510?t=1012&akid=8487%2E5885482%2EvYSAXL ]Grab some buttons, protest posters, a yard sign, and other great
gear to help fund the work our movement is doing in the streets, on
Capitol Hill, and around the country.

★ ★ ★

[3]Fight Trump & The Oligarchs

★ ★ ★

US Senators Elizabeth Warren and Jeff Merkley joined our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/28751?t=1013&akid=8487%2E5885482%2EvYSAXL ]LIVE Town
Hall Monday to break down Trump's crypto corruption — and how we can
actually stop it.

Big Tech Oligarchs spent over $200 million to elect Trump and now
he’s paying them back.

An industry-written crypto bill — the “GENIUS Act” — is moving
through Congress, and Democrats must stand together to block it
unless the bill includes Merkley’s End Crypto Corruption Act to stop
politicians from profiting off crypto deals.

★ ★ ★

The GENIUS Act would open the floodgates to untraceable crypto
donations, deregulate stablecoins, and allow elected
officials—including Trump himself—to personally profit from crypto
ventures.

Warren laid out how Trump is selling his crypto coins directly to
foreign governments, and getting rich off transactions and
interest-free loans. “This is not some small grift on the side.
Trump’s stablecoin is now the fifth largest in the world,” she said.

★ ★ ★

Merkley echoed the alarm: “This is about the direct corruption of
our elected officials.”

He said Trump could see $80 million a year from the United Arab
Emirates buying his crypto coins as part of a $2B deal. "They are
very clearly seeking influence for a result: They want
microprocessors for AI.”

★ ★ ★

Any version of the so-called 'GENIUS' Act must include Sen. Merkley’s
measure to block politicians (like Trump!) from profiting off crypto
schemes.

This is more than just about crypto — it’s about taking a stand
against the billionaire takeover of our government. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/28752?t=1014&akid=8487%2E5885482%2EvYSAXL ]Sign the
petition and stop the crypto power grab!

★ ★ ★

BERNIE VS TRUMP ON DRUG PRICES

Trump loves to talk big about lowering prescription drug prices,
signing an executive order this week claiming he'd finally stand up
to Big Pharma. Bernie is calling his bluff:

“If Trump is serious about making real change rather than just
issuing a press release, he will support legislation I will soon be
introducing to make sure we pay no more for prescription drugs than
people in other major countries.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/28753?t=1015&akid=8487%2E5885482%2EvYSAXL ]Add your name and join Bernie in issuing a challenge to Trump and
Republicans in Congress: if you’re serious about lowering drug
prices, pass Bernie’s bill to make it happen!

★ ★ ★

CONFRONTING COWARDLY CONGRESSMEN

Trump and his billionaire backers are trying to push through a budget
that would slash Medicaid in order to pay for massive tax cuts for
the wealthy.

We’re keeping the heat on GOP Reps, with our activists directly
confronting many of them in the halls of Congress. When we
encountered Rep. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/28754?t=1016&akid=8487%2E5885482%2EvYSAXL ]Rich McCormick (GA-7), he literally RAN up three
flights of steps to avoid accountability for his support for
TRILLIONS to the Pentagon and wealthy billionaires at the expense of
healthcare and essential programs.

These Republicans are getting nervous – and our direct organizing
paired with Bernie’s rallies in key red districts turned up the heat
— leading 12 GOP Congress members to publicly denounce the Medicaid
cuts.

The fight to pick off wavering Republicans continues — and we’re
making sure they understand the backlash coming for them if they vote
to cut Medicaid, SNAP, and Social Security in order to give billions
more to the Pentagon and to wealthy tax cuts.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/28750?t=1017&akid=8487%2E5885482%2EvYSAXL ]SAVE MEDICAID AND BLOCK TAX CUTS FOR BILLIONAIRES

★ ★ ★

From massive Hands Off protests and May Day actions to another wave
of record-breaking Bernie Rallies — our movement is rising up
nationwide to say NO to Trump and Oligarchy.

Last week, we [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/28755?t=1018&akid=8487%2E5885482%2EvYSAXL ]protested at the Federalist Society — the judicial
arm of the American oligarchy, funded by megadonors to reshape the
courts in service of corporate power and elite privilege. “No more
judges for billionaires! No more courts for corporations!”

Our activists and volunteers are on the phones and amassing petitions
and showing up on Capitol Hill to pressure members of Congress. We’re
even lighting up oligarch’s mansions with projectors — like Trump’s
Treasury Secretary [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25480?t=1019&akid=8487%2E5885482%2EvYSAXL ]Scott Bessent.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/28756?t=1020&akid=8487%2E5885482%2EvYSAXL ]Chip in a donation of any amount to help us pull off more actions
and train more activists coast to coast!

★ ★ ★

NO KINGS DAY OF DEFIANCE

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/28757?t=1021&akid=8487%2E5885482%2EvYSAXL ]GET YOUR RALLY SIGN HERE

Mark your calendars for the next MASSIVE nationwide protest! Our
Revolution activists are organizing dozens of actions for No Kings
Day of Defiance on June 14th — Trump’s birthday and the same day he’s
planning to celebrate himself with an authoritarian military parade
through Washington D.C.

We will be showing up in force from cities to small towns — from
Philly and Los Angeles to Bowie, MD and Steamboat Springs, CO — we
will be all across the nation, demonstrating the strength of the
opposition against Trump and his regime.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/28758?t=1022&akid=8487%2E5885482%2EvYSAXL ]Sign up to join a NO KINGS ACTION or help organize one near you!

★ ★ ★

Our Mission in this moment: Fight Oligarchy. We have built a powerful
network of organizers and activists — 57,000+ connected across the
country — and we’re getting to work!

And now we have a [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/28759?t=1023&akid=8487%2E5885482%2EvYSAXL ]brand new tool to help you plug in the way you
want. Whether it’s pressuring lawmakers in their office or amplifying
the message online — there are tons of ways to help!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/28759?t=1024&akid=8487%2E5885482%2EvYSAXL ]JOIN OUR CITIZEN ACTION TEAM

★ ★ ★

[16]Take Back The Party

★ ★ ★

NEW ENDORSEMENTS

Our Revolution is proudly supporting Larry Krasner for Philadelphia
District Attorney in the Democratic primary this Tuesday!

Krasner's commitment to ending mass incarceration, abolishing cash
bail, and tackling corruption sets a national standard. His
leadership has transformed Philly's justice system:

- Exonerated nearly 50 wrongfully convicted, restoring justice and
faith in our legal system.

- Reduced the juvenile incarceration rate by 70%, focusing on
rehabilitation over punishment.

- Cut future incarceration days by half, saving taxpayers millions
and reuniting families.

In the face of right-wing attacks and misinformation, Krasner stands
firm — let's continue the fight for a just and equitable
Philadelphia and get him in the DA’s seat in Philly! [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1025&akid=8487%2E5885482%2EvYSAXL ]Donate to
help us get out the vote in these final days.

★ ★ ★

We support Joshua Cole for re-election to Virginia’s House of
Delegates, where he has stood out as a progressive leader,
championing policies that prioritize working families and social
justice.

Joshua has been a strong advocate for affordable healthcare, raising
wages, and tuition-free community college. And, he has consistently
fought for reproductive rights and equitable investments in public
education, infrastructure, and economic opportunities.

Election Day is June 17th!

★ ★ ★

For the June 24th New York City Council race in District 7, we are
happy to endorse Edafe Okporo — who brings a powerful personal story
and a bold vision for justice and equity.

A formerly detained asylum seeker and LGBTQ+ refugee from Nigeria, he
founded the RDJ Refugee Shelter in Harlem and now leads Refuge
America — both dedicated to supporting marginalized immigrants.

His campaign centers on expanding affordable housing, safeguarding
public healthcare, defending LGBTQ+ rights, and challenging the
influence of real estate developers and austerity-driven politics in
City Hall.

★ ★ ★

Texas Victories

TEXAS SWEEP! All 4 of our candidates were victorious in key City
Council races! We’re proud to support grassroots leaders who are
organizing in their communities, not cozying up to corporate donors:

First up — Laura Cadena won a City Council seat in Dallas. After
serving in City Hall for eight years, she understands how local
government can work hand-in-hand with the community.

From cost of living and affordable housing to climate action and
sustainability, Laura is a champion on the issues that matter most.

Also in Dallas, Adam Bazaldua won re-election to city council in
District 7.

Adam chaired the Dallas Green Alliance before being elected in 2019.
He has served on committees for the environment, workforce education,
and economic development, and has brought bold leadership to City
Hall as Deputy Mayor Pro Tem.

★ ★ ★

In Fort Worth, Chris Nettles was re-elected to City Council in
District 8.

Chris knows local government must meet the needs of Fort Worth’s
growing population. He is working to expand public transportation,
increase affordable housing, grow good-paying jobs, and help the
houseless population in Fort Worth.

★ ★ ★

In San Antonio, Councilwoman Teri Castillo was victorious in her bid
for re-election!

A community organizer and fierce advocate for housing, climate, and
public investment, Teri has delivered historic wins for District 5
and continues to lead with urgency and integrity.

★ ★ ★

A resource for you and your future

As we look forward to the future of Our Revolution, we invite you to
plan for your own future through our partnership with FreeWill.

Using their online estate planning tool, you can create a will or
revocable living trust 100% for free and protect the people,
communities, and causes you care about. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25487?t=1026&akid=8487%2E5885482%2EvYSAXL ]Create your free plan
here.

★ ★ ★

[19]Action Center

★ ★ ★

Our Revolution’s Citizen Action Team is 57,000 activists strong and
new leaders are being trained up in cities across the country. We’re
taking action in the streets and in the halls of power to stop the
worst of the Trump regime and fight for our values.

Our grassroots army is mounting pressure campaigns to protect
Medicaid, Social Security, the Postal Service, public media, the EPA,
worker rights, and more. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20584?t=1027&akid=8487%2E5885482%2EvYSAXL ]Sign up here to be part of the Citizen
Action Team!

★ ★ ★

As Bernie and AOC draw record-breaking crowds along their Fight
Oligarchy Tour, Our Revolution’s Citizen Action Team is organizing
thousands of activists to turn this energy into action in D.C. and
across the country.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/19903?t=1028&akid=8487%2E5885482%2EvYSAXL ]When you pick up this new vintage Bernie hat (and other great NEW
merch!) in the Our Revolution store, you’re helping to power our
actions and pressure campaigns to block the worst of the Trump
agenda. Thank you.

★ ★ ★

[22]Thank you to all who Donate & Volunteer

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?t=1029&akid=8487%2E5885482%2EvYSAXL ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN!

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=8487%2E5885482%2EvYSAXL ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=8487%2E5885482%2EvYSAXL ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=8487%2E5885482%2EvYSAXL ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=8487%2E5885482%2EvYSAXL ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=8487%2E5885482%2EvYSAXL ]Website |

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13120?c0=revreport%2020250517.nun-9Z&t=1008&akid=8487%2E5885482%2EvYSAXL ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a
month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13121?c0=revreport%2020250517.C5MBL0&t=1009&akid=8487%2E5885482%2EvYSAXL ]GIVE MONTHLY

Our massive grassroots army is joining Bernie, AOC, and other progressive leaders in Congress and in the streets to pressure a handful of vulnerable Republicans to vote against Trump’s disastrous budget bill — and it’s working. A dozen lawmakers have started to backtrack, we can’t let up now! [ ]ADD YOUR NAME TO SAVE MEDICAID! ★ ★ ★ Our collective action is making an impact — and now is the time to rally our movement and ramp up our fight. [ ]Grab some buttons, protest posters, a yard sign, and other great gear to help fund the work our movement is doing in the streets, on Capitol Hill, and around the country. ★ ★ ★ [3]Fight Trump & The Oligarchs ★ ★ ★ US Senators Elizabeth Warren and Jeff Merkley joined our [ ]LIVE Town Hall Monday to break down Trump's crypto corruption — and how we can actually stop it. Big Tech Oligarchs spent over $200 million to elect Trump and now he’s paying them back. An industry-written crypto bill — the “GENIUS Act” — is moving through Congress, and Democrats must stand together to block it unless the bill includes Merkley’s End Crypto Corruption Act to stop politicians from profiting off crypto deals. ★ ★ ★ The GENIUS Act would open the floodgates to untraceable crypto donations, deregulate stablecoins, and allow elected officials—including Trump himself—to personally profit from crypto ventures. Warren laid out how Trump is selling his crypto coins directly to foreign governments, and getting rich off transactions and interest-free loans. “This is not some small grift on the side. Trump’s stablecoin is now the fifth largest in the world,” she said. ★ ★ ★ Merkley echoed the alarm: “This is about the direct corruption of our elected officials.” He said Trump could see $80 million a year from the United Arab Emirates buying his crypto coins as part of a $2B deal. "They are very clearly seeking influence for a result: They want microprocessors for AI.” ★ ★ ★ Any version of the so-called 'GENIUS' Act must include Sen. Merkley’s measure to block politicians (like Trump!) from profiting off crypto schemes. This is more than just about crypto — it’s about taking a stand against the billionaire takeover of our government. [ ]Sign the petition and stop the crypto power grab! ★ ★ ★ BERNIE VS TRUMP ON DRUG PRICES Trump loves to talk big about lowering prescription drug prices, signing an executive order this week claiming he'd finally stand up to Big Pharma. Bernie is calling his bluff: “If Trump is serious about making real change rather than just issuing a press release, he will support legislation I will soon be introducing to make sure we pay no more for prescription drugs than people in other major countries.” [ ]Add your name and join Bernie in issuing a challenge to Trump and Republicans in Congress: if you’re serious about lowering drug prices, pass Bernie’s bill to make it happen! ★ ★ ★ CONFRONTING COWARDLY CONGRESSMEN Trump and his billionaire backers are trying to push through a budget that would slash Medicaid in order to pay for massive tax cuts for the wealthy. We’re keeping the heat on GOP Reps, with our activists directly confronting many of them in the halls of Congress. When we encountered Rep. [ ]Rich McCormick (GA-7), he literally RAN up three flights of steps to avoid accountability for his support for TRILLIONS to the Pentagon and wealthy billionaires at the expense of healthcare and essential programs. These Republicans are getting nervous – and our direct organizing paired with Bernie’s rallies in key red districts turned up the heat — leading 12 GOP Congress members to publicly denounce the Medicaid cuts. The fight to pick off wavering Republicans continues — and we’re making sure they understand the backlash coming for them if they vote to cut Medicaid, SNAP, and Social Security in order to give billions more to the Pentagon and to wealthy tax cuts. [ ]SAVE MEDICAID AND BLOCK TAX CUTS FOR BILLIONAIRES ★ ★ ★ From massive Hands Off protests and May Day actions to another wave of record-breaking Bernie Rallies — our movement is rising up nationwide to say NO to Trump and Oligarchy. Last week, we [ ]protested at the Federalist Society — the judicial arm of the American oligarchy, funded by megadonors to reshape the courts in service of corporate power and elite privilege. “No more judges for billionaires! No more courts for corporations!” Our activists and volunteers are on the phones and amassing petitions and showing up on Capitol Hill to pressure members of Congress. We’re even lighting up oligarch’s mansions with projectors — like Trump’s Treasury Secretary [ ]Scott Bessent. body:
Let’s be clear: this budget is a direct attack on New Jerseyans.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107873041/546104610/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWM3NzdkNC0yYjMzLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EbsO3qXDXqECDwQvcuJoGFEFkUNcLAK4_Mkskanp8ak=&emci=6279a71c-6232-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=5ac777d4-2b33-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=26261389)

| | The GOP budget plan is as dangerous as it is reckless. Here's what they're proposing:
* Rip healthcare away from millions of Americans, including countless New Jerseyans who rely on Medicaid and the ACA.
* Hand out massive tax breaks to billionaires and the ultra-wealthy – all while working families struggle to afford groceries, gas, and rent.

**Let's be clear: this budget is a direct attack on New Jerseyans.** It's not about balance. It's not about responsibility. It's about serving the wealthiest and well-connected few at the expense of everyone else. This is what we're up against. **And I'm not sitting on the sidelines.** I'm in this fight because I believe government should work for working people, not corporate lobbyists and mega-donors. But I can't do it alone. If you believe in protecting Medicaid and New Jerseyans' healthcare, investing in our communities, and building an economy that works for all – not just the rich – I need your support. [**We've got a lot of work ahead, but I know we can win – because we've done it before, and we'll do it again. Chip in now to power our grassroots movement and help us fight back against Trump's dangerous agenda:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107873042/546104611/-1197072038?refcode=2025-05-17-budget&recurring=&amount=12&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=5ac777d4-2b33-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWM3NzdkNC0yYjMzLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EbsO3qXDXqECDwQvcuJoGFEFkUNcLAK4_Mkskanp8ak=) [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107873043/546104612/-1197072038?refcode=2025-05-17-budget&recurring=&amount=12&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=5ac777d4-2b33-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWM3NzdkNC0yYjMzLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EbsO3qXDXqECDwQvcuJoGFEFkUNcLAK4_Mkskanp8ak=) Thanks for being in this with me. clean_body: Let’s be clear: this budget is a direct attack on New Jerseyans. | | | | The GOP budget plan is as dangerous as it is reckless. Here's what they're proposing: Rip healthcare away from millions of Americans, including countless New Jerseyans who rely on Medicaid and the ACA. Hand out massive tax breaks to billionaires and the ultra-wealthy – all while working families struggle to afford groceries, gas, and rent. Let's be clear: this budget is a direct attack on New Jerseyans. It's not about balance. It's not about responsibility. It's about serving the wealthiest and well-connected few at the expense of everyone else. This is what we're up against. And I'm not sitting on the sidelines. I'm in this fight because I believe government should work for working people, not corporate lobbyists and mega-donors. But I can't do it alone. If you believe in protecting Medicaid and New Jerseyans' healthcare, investing in our communities, and building an economy that works for all – not just the rich – I need your support. = = Thanks for being in this with me. More soon, Andy | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andy Kim instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey | This email was sent by . name: GIFFORDS Alert
subject: The Trump administration just effectively legalized machine guns
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This is not a moment when we can sit idly by.
#

Team — we hate to come to you with bad news. But we need to let you know about this dangerous development:
**The Trump administration just effectively legalized machine guns.** One person said this is “by far the most dangerous thing this administration has done” on gun policy. Let us explain.
Last night, we learned that the Trump administration gave in to an extreme gun group and agreed to legalize forced reset triggers (FRT), devices that convert regular firearms to fire like machine guns — allowing guns to fire more shots and enabling shooters to inflict even more damage.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may25.7MLdP7&refcode=em250517-1-b&t=1&akid=10447%2E3935704%2EdXg13f)_Picture of a forced reset trigger_
The Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives (ATF) classified the FRT as a machine gun. Under federal law you cannot buy a machine gun — new machine guns have been illegal for civilians to purchase since 1986 and should only be used by our military.
[**This is not a moment when we can sit idly by. We need you with us to fight back against this new dangerous action from the Trump administration. If you’re ready to join the fight, please rush a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC right now:**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may25.7MLdP7&refcode=em250517-1-b&t=2&akid=10447%2E3935704%2EdXg13f)
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may25.7MLdP7&refcode=em250517-1-b&t=3&akid=10447%2E3935704%2EdXg13f)**
It comes as no surprise that this news dropped on a Friday. Donald Trump knows that this is unpopular.
It is abhorrent that our president is choosing to prioritize gun lobby profits over gun safety when nearly 46,000 people die from gun violence every year in America, and when it is this country’s number one cause of death for children and teens.
[**We will be fighting with everything we’ve got to make sure that all of our hard-earned progress is not trampled on by the Trump administration. Please, chip in to GIFFORDS PAC right now to help us with this critical work.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may25.7MLdP7&refcode=em250517-1-b&t=4&akid=10447%2E3935704%2EdXg13f)

name: Steve Roberts
subject: Tornado Response
body:
| | | | City of St. Louis
---
| |
# **Tornado Response**
---
May 17, 2025
---
| |
---
My thoughts are with everyone impacted by yesterday's horrendous storm. First responders and many in our community are continuing to assist those who are injured, in need of shelter, and more. St. Louisans are being asked to stay home tonight and tomorrow to allow our first responders to do their work.
Thank you and please keep St. Louis in your thoughts and prayers.
**Senator Steve Roberts ** \-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
**TORNADO RESPONSE** **TOP ITEMS**
Public Safety
City Services
Health and Human Services
Curfew Update
Priority Contacts in Mayor’s Office (if needed)
How You Can Help
Media Advisory
**Public Safety**
**Fire/Police**
The Fire Department and Police Department will be clearing
homes in the affected grid from now until 8 am, Saturday, 5/17, to ensure
everyone is safe. There are at least five confirmed fatal casualties. We are
still assessing broader injuries.
**Ameren (live wire)**
Priority for Ameren is ensuring there are no more live
wires, then a focus on restoring power. **City Services**
**Parks, Recreation, Forestry / Street Department**
All staff are being called in for emergency declaration with
mandatory work, if available.

* 12-hour shifts starting tomorrow from 7a-7p, Parks, Recreation, Forestry, and Street Department will begin addressing trees and traffic light/signal issues.
* All staff are being called in for an emergency on mandatory work, if available

**Parks, Recreation, and Forestry Priorities** :
Priority 1: Cutting down trees blocking streets
and alleys and pushing things to the side to clear right away.
Priority 2: City trees on vehicles, personal
property, or hazardous hanging limbs.
Priority 3: Disaster recovery debris removal.
**Street Department Priorities** :
Priority 1: Clear debris and things in the
street in collaboration with Park, Recreation, and Forestry.
Priority 2: Traffic signals and getting them up
and running. Multiple groups are deploying mobile light stations in
neighborhoods to ensure streets are visible (20-30 light stations on their way,
total)
**Building Division**
4,500 – 5,000 buildings impacted; inspectors will be out
again tomorrow after buildings are cleared by fire and police.
Many will be condemned, focusing on
documentation for FEMA to begin to garner federal support.
Too far out to determine process for demolition/stabilization
but will focus on potential falling or unsafe structures first.
**Utilities - Ameren UE**
Three major power substations are down, with over 90K
customer power outages; will be a multi-day restoration event, and no ETA on completion yet.
**Utilities - Water Division** We are still taking reports on water main breaks and working
to shut off water, where necessary
If a water main breaks, the Water Division will
address or fix (first water shut-off, then address damage over the next couple
of days). If the house waterline is broken, please call a
private plumber.
Coordinating additional crews with Missouri
American Water to support, if needed. **Health and Human Services**
**Shelters**
Open shelters to direct individuals, in partnership with the
Red Cross:
· **The Recreational Center** (12th and Park
Recreation Center): 1410 S. Tucker Blvd, MO 63104
· **Grace United Methodist Church** : 6199
Waterman Blvd, St. Louis, MO 63112
· **Friendly Temple Outreach Center** : 6356 Dr.
Martin Luther King Drive, St. Louis, MO 63133
· A range of private hotels and other facilities
have opened locations
**DHS - St. Louis Area Agency on Aging**
Coordinating with impacted seniors across 58 Senior
buildings in relevant neighborhoods, 11 of which are without power.
· Prioritizing with Ameren getting power back on
in these facilities.
· For unstable buildings or seniors with special
issues, we are working on getting them relocated to the shelters above or a
senior facility/hospital.
**Office on the Disabled**
Coordinated to get individuals with disabilities from
various facilities to a shelter or destination.
**Curfew Update**
Curfew was established from 9pm to 6am starting May 16, 2025,
for select areas (initially Districts 5 & 6). This will repeat daily, but
we will modify times and neighborhoods as relevant in coordination with SLPD, Fire, and other authorities.
**Priority Contacts in the Mayor’s Office (if needed)**
All City Services and Health & Human Services-related
questions (broader neighborhood or coordination efforts)
· Julian Nicks, Deputy Chief Operating Officer:
(314) 920-1369
· Krizia Lopez, Bloomberg Harvard City Hall
Fellow: (773)-860-5319
Immediate ward or individual issues (special CSB-like requests in neighborhoods): · Dan Guenther, Liaison to Board of Alderman:
(314) 304-6797 **How You Can Help**
**Stay away from affected areas all day Saturday, May 17, 2025,** to leave room for emergency crews and departments to clear the area unobstructed and ensure it is safe; we will provide an update on how/when people can help later on Saturday · For **emergencies** , call 911 · For **tree limbs, traffic signals/poles, debris** : rto CSB, ideally with photos Please submit online, if possible, via CSB Otherwise, call 314-622-4800
For **relevant utility issues** (gas, water, sewer, electric), call the utility company
For individuals who want to **volunteer with United** **Way** , visit [www.stlvolunteer.org](http://url5914.robertsforstl.com/ls/click?upn=u001.fzG53TkBvmRvO32ahM-2BnoXCLfGDIRk4vD9efepnMDwXiIQS-2Bg3Rf-2FqapxZZO2klzPDyBr-2BXKJcxekYEY84zAWLLr9Jwu8e4dyc6aN2i5jYgMGABcEgRDXp826DMZfHPq9FD1NYFyroZAa4a73VKMKPKKc1AG9-2F1M2XnTLHIlq8yInOb3pZW-2BhKJ5uccV1YUfdi6P8d-2Fp7XespAZyyXsg6qHE2KACCRECS0gQy7Ti2xHYH-2FmQ-2FgauTbeSTh2mgphSNnVt2tx60BJ-2BkayQbRKGbQ-3D-3DBiJw_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVCKy-2B-2B58EQo9OBZ1DFkEmwuM7vQygzizVvxKmA-2F9J-2FE19DrCJBiChnWEt1YTcce0486aCCtakNmtIV2Bwhjynf9Hi6ChikaWGsW2E-2FoTBQUwyBQo0hLt8lSATHF8r7p-2Fqs0Nahvr27uvb4ZCCgf-2FqJ7GL2EeqhoTLvZ82xlP0gjiWPMnDYhnyojaNOimbBpWPDpM0-2F2-2FGppSLtn0yzEvE9q-2BbegcsTwJ-2BW1R-2B2dVDpt5ICZUHOHCkfbB9ALGScM0Oe5XvWbMNBzZ6JFLGpkpppEUkfBVGogT-2BwifE0Uws-2BrovV-2FiY0S61QoYlOxemtFtsKtK-2FE7iTYt0TdGXXuM3hAaPBZKBTWPOSbpnIddAtfQrBY4LreVBicYhUbPAT-2BvTL5RMrb0szy-2BAVcYEixbezXSutX2hg2Zv1LqcNkmiUycRLY-2F7dHXpNyviDtgGMvFHOzSYn9X2-2BQEFP0sxTLOZNLFu5FXt0pz6qHxs966CH1ekKgYgGFbURi8c4qJmM55kqM1Yqf4YXWraoshJQjATT1hnwLVL3C4cBqtqiBNrzI531rbAWcPSzGt0Ztkar8UssEiTUNGea7c-2BgEvHCuUAXo9F0HLsp-2B1a2HJwrw-2FJz8e6WOb8HbRLGrBasEPZaq5D-2F1z7-2FhJtWaUAEueXX6nRfpcS67fbamFB66x3bOZ-2FPOyUhW5OPMdW9djf7TQkTBLD5S8mt1ZdrpTWLf9wwbDM1tVxZ-2BWuVurTkgwslvjTyTHiWw6OUcTE9hpxZn0VCEudQMbP4WUwBGSmPJQzdvraCEIgKyKRTVHODEx9PcD0bbTAEvyFfA-2B6vP63-2FOldalzOvlTv7U8yUqAh9e9vAolT7TCp9UePVpDIN397DF9wOZbcg-3D-3D **About Steve Roberts**
Senator Steven Roberts, a fourth-generation St. Louis native, was sworn into office on January 6, 2021, to represent Missouri’s 5th Senatorial District and currently serves as the Assistant Minority Floor Leader. Previously, he served in the Missouri House of Representatives from 2017 to 2020 and chaired the Missouri Legislative Black Caucus. A graduate of the University of Miami and Pepperdine Law, he has worked in Congress, as a prosecutor in St. Louis, and as a Captain in the Missouri Air National Guard’s JAG Corps. He also manages Roberts Law, LLC, and remains active in Missouri’s legal and civic communities.

Senator Steve Roberts \------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- TORNADO RESPONSE TOP ITEMS Public Safety City Services Health and Human Services Curfew Update Priority Contacts in Mayor’s Office (if needed) How You Can Help Media Advisory Public Safety Fire/Police The Fire Department and Police Department will be clearing homes in the affected grid from now until 8 am, Saturday, 5/17, to ensure everyone is safe. There are at least five confirmed fatal casualties. We are still assessing broader injuries. Ameren (live wire) Priority for Ameren is ensuring there are no more live wires, then a focus on restoring power. City Services Parks, Recreation, Forestry / Street Department All staff are being called in for emergency declaration with mandatory work, if available. 12-hour shifts starting tomorrow from 7a-7p, Parks, Recreation, Forestry, and Street Department will begin addressing trees and traffic light/signal issues. All staff are being called in for an emergency on mandatory work, if available Parks, Recreation, and Forestry Priorities : Priority 1: Cutting down trees blocking streets and alleys and pushing things to the side to clear right away. Priority 2: City trees on vehicles, personal property, or hazardous hanging limbs. Priority 3: Disaster recovery debris removal. Street Department Priorities : Priority 1: Clear debris and things in the street in collaboration with Park, Recreation, and Forestry. Priority 2: Traffic signals and getting them up and running. Multiple groups are deploying mobile light stations in neighborhoods to ensure streets are visible (20-30 light stations on their way, total) Building Division 4,500 – 5,000 buildings impacted; inspectors will be out again tomorrow after buildings are cleared by fire and police. Many will be condemned, focusing on documentation for FEMA to begin to garner federal support. Too far out to determine process for demolition/stabilization but will focus on potential falling or unsafe structures first. Utilities - Ameren UE Three major power substations are down, with over 90K customer power outages; will be a multi-day restoration event, and no ETA on completion yet. Utilities - Water Division We are still taking reports on water main breaks and working to shut off water, where necessary If a water main breaks, the Water Division will address or fix (first water shut-off, then address damage over the next couple of days). If the house waterline is broken, please call a private plumber. Coordinating additional crews with Missouri American Water to support, if needed. Health and Human Services Shelters Open shelters to direct individuals, in partnership with the Red Cross: · The Recreational Center (12th and Park Recreation Center): 1410 S. Tucker Blvd, MO 63104 · Grace United Methodist Church : 6199 Waterman Blvd, St. Louis, MO 63112 · Friendly Temple Outreach Center : 6356 Dr. Martin Luther King Drive, St. Louis, MO 63133 · A range of private hotels and other facilities have opened locations DHS - St. Louis Area Agency on Aging Coordinating with impacted seniors across 58 Senior buildings in relevant neighborhoods, 11 of which are without power. · Prioritizing with Ameren getting power back on in these facilities. · For unstable buildings or seniors with special issues, we are working on getting them relocated to the shelters above or a senior facility/hospital. Office on the Disabled Coordinated to get individuals with disabilities from various facilities to a shelter or destination. Curfew Update Curfew was established from 9pm to 6am starting May 16, 2025, for select areas (initially Districts 5 & 6). This will repeat daily, but we will modify times and neighborhoods as relevant in coordination with SLPD, Fire, and other authorities. Priority Contacts in the Mayor’s Office (if needed) All City Services and Health & Human Services-related questions (broader neighborhood or coordination efforts) · Julian Nicks, Deputy Chief Operating Officer: (314) 920-1369 · Krizia Lopez, Bloomberg Harvard City Hall Fellow: (773)-860-5319 Immediate ward or individual issues (special CSB-like requests in neighborhoods): · Dan Guenther, Liaison to Board of Alderman: (314) 304-6797 How You Can Help Stay away from affected areas all day Saturday, May 17, 2025, to leave room for emergency crews and departments to clear the area unobstructed and ensure it is safe; we will provide an update on how/when people can help later on Saturday · For emergencies , call 911 · For tree limbs, traffic signals/poles, debris : rto CSB, ideally with photos Please submit online, if possible, via CSB Otherwise, call 314-622-4800 For relevant utility issues (gas, water, sewer, electric), call the utility company For individuals who want to volunteer with United Way , visit "www.stlvolunteer.org" To stay up to date on emergencies: · Sign up for local CEMA emergency notifications at "www.stlouis-mo.gov/notifystl" · Visit our website "www.stlouis-mo.gov/tornado" Media Advisory National Weather Service Survey to look at damage and tornado rating WHEN : Saturday, May 17, 2025, 8:30 a.m. WHERE : Incident Command Post - Corner of Kingshighway Ave. and Delmar Blvd, St. Louis, MO 63108 WHO : · Sarah Russell, Commissioner, City Emergency Management Agency · Kevin Deitsch, Meteorologist, National Weather Service in St. Louis | About Steve Roberts Senator Steven Roberts, a fourth-generation St. Louis native, was sworn into office on January 6, 2021, to represent Missouri’s 5th Senatorial District and currently serves as the Assistant Minority Floor Leader. Previously, he served in the Missouri House of Representatives from 2017 to 2020 and chaired the Missouri Legislative Black Caucus. A graduate of the University of Miami and Pepperdine Law, he has worked in Congress, as a prosecutor in St. Louis, and as a Captain in the Missouri Air National Guard’s JAG Corps. He also manages Roberts Law, LLC, and remains active in Missouri’s legal and civic communities. | | Steve Roberts P.O. Box 771671, St. Louis, MO 63177

body:
| | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/s/c/FKCLdw9aPbDCdKScYimR2uokzqsEmF4IOFiI59GyH8Xr-Etq1bCd7512zD-456oy46CAVRUHoF0o6G936G0sN7n12nkF626AHv3wQq1gyDGAwkXFJY01kvAgCbkmYIGNvpoZ9PZWgXimFOq79I-wYIJ2STvalvSzOH6xY8L5vN2Lb96s43B0uZ_SDAt1jhsieVr2m4B_LD-BdW59pK-s5CSAy4PVHjso7Pcw-kmWhzTzAzs68PzqW1q7V2Ebcpa1r-JaoHv1sS4R2q7vvOpjv_GBrmwYN5DGDXyK8Jq_hatWaUN6LWJ0zCGRyt2gufzY-tbLpeOGMuXgx5PjbkzooIq5fXMWKS5DMLGUiCIfc3wkoauoCVatOzoUiIj4f_LSkdR4gMLyOgdZNxl038-zajSU-rXKjKHElnzB2Ml79S_2ZXULGc5-UXyfVziZw874vLmjFyR5LSUKHfo0mSA/lPo00HveuyQLz88tzn-S7tqni-zee3EJ/9) Friend, Donald Trump and Lauren Boebert have made it clear: they want to defund NPR and PBS — two of the most trusted sources of news, education, and cultural programming in the country. **[Add your name letting us know you support NPR, PBS, and public media.](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/s/c/KfaQrztD-hn8yNIRUQ0Ya6f-Y9qLTbKMmksleIroHmQ9TSW_AVyFOpUxTZnEpAd8Hcf5J4HqQPEbjFNd02oRKdb5D8W84O8qN5Eb6jNZEj0B2IR7p3-9OnEm09w7TtKr6eMWnnDmcv5o44uzmHdbeyXIeAna70_Y3aa1GY1ZRKxPJRsqltUHziP7smldDb_BmHvmrAcjFwuktxxj5BC0E3xwyFyTc_DQenLj266-ajnzkLt-p9nBIO_k-hnpIFaurmvu3X0zcG5NSx9eCecIzgL7r8kJGu7if1Y/uopvTB-bFXivYd5ArQoIy30Q7NhdiOsn/9)** [ADD MY NAME](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/s/c/XiCVwRfbD6TwOYNRI4Bsz0f_KoAhAAdoi9NT8RKYewKNh0EnJ6W_0RuLoIfGa1-uY_qc2uHg0JGLjPGk-VjScRXnyw5KbWmB_UYYT8KiXza3niLaDxtdLPYVaGs7yqYgI9pL3bRjYrOp8BFLKy4KtneuuNq_s-2jnOYe2K2l46G7lyVw3wyRMs-Y_ssqqtermOeyNfE0XCCW07Q3fjmW_ediYAfpwsEODwp0MAwVdQqWqTEHMgk89jcP2k_WiEGGgF1VwOfq1y0Rn54PJ-tip4Wt70rCNsZkQmo/bVGffC7TVd6R3MqEfzT_LCsV5syxLMF3/9) It’s not just talk. MAGA Republicans have introduced proposals to slash federal support for public media, cheered on by far-right voices who see facts and independent journalism as a threat. Public media connects rural communities, supports educational programming for kids, and gives Coloradans access to reliable, independent reporting. In a time of chaos and disinformation, it’s never been more essential — **and it’s never been more under threat.** Lauren Boebert doesn’t want Colorado’s 4th District to have access to honest, public-interest journalism. I do. I’m John Padora — a manufacturing engineer running for Congress to bring real leadership to our district, and to stand up against the chaos and censorship of MAGA extremism. **[Let’s send a message: we support public media — and we won’t let Boebert take it away.](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/s/c/tMwNOoEJavLRJH-QgzQGmSR_3RU33UtCH02ZvcbWACiixBv36xoskHxWCSPGp5-uM-0BZjIYIwYkbq39LF23DEnzTUWSIOpcb1tjZU5RlnTsfOwRwrkYGtCxRarWnmekpBnCw7pYTMY3vV1Lqsq7UzXX4SEuFZZfA95RDGwXDQUcSnUBLsxelR3VbTZpxBcmWclGW1pyFFK8OErzjKhtahxi3qpeF_klSWScj0CLY0seZcnNsvCRMChG_NTbcLPDC8TuXCZKSgaqD1Tu5Kt3dTShTOoT4rLimSk/cEO6TCIYNbxwLvuVsODmWs0DGE-5RrNo/9)** [ADD MY NAME](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/s/c/6HzzS9F68vokAXrTk1_MHs1kWNx6w309oLoEuQdKfqEop1j8N3Azr8SPgTF2s91OoUEWw-3Amxyf9KeqYxLoGGd7_PLbM4oPKyggotKu3wBDBULx5PvtmNKi--Kjx6OMVKSEX6qLxRAwPuXiDqu0cEJV2Lc9C7sEASGK7qh-GwQuuQfQhcTA39ZXRPa4Bq4HU7TmP7VnD0WmRVvQvwUtLbXCx9UZzxviotZkraNKfHnuo3MRahS_BgQ6AuyS9pwnseZ1teYDohFmX-ZtfhDFLueVLd8-WBD383Y/qq-vufRkSk2JA97HOn-Xfi-1IAmpAZUM/9) Thanks for standing up for truth, facts, and public service We’re almost there. Let’s finish this. — Team Padora [DONATE](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/s/c/0ZPfMRRrTARkvjQpVhhPLcQSs7mFA0qaqcbBmlfA9YmdN8ZyQV3sdVOvSS3SmKTjrxaDltDI685wns0MjBhc148gbSobXelHw9tMw2c8nLcYZDbbevbLr34fhzp98H3c3Vimytz81dhuzMjY2iMHColm2mQ5ozCxnj08jt5F3GCR26FKSGpVAM3iBzh-_SB_hRr-ANBP39Fg1WgZ8nOkCCDOPggZRsHw-1uQmh5TIp6zmwYUTYajbxpUJUBkd5Poi5AP7aMyJCP9BG2Dzac5LExKyk76vIhADoug3Xufuwb8AIqMN2gaM__X8sYdejoeViUKBcIPtnTF8ECRliIkMyeY1nfxRWn0ml4DarsxnlHeBBn2cZ8FD_xSBe2GD4WOwJ2hPUCZ3I80RVJ1Hx58YiZuRp5G_tJlkibAqbWvC7fBQnUvl_yrlhdgsliF1HVewfGYrsM0K9WtK2ZZzQE/NPpZpzBGrcFOPCASeao6AE_RUT_pPxpA/9) Paid for by Padora for Colorado

clean_body: | | | Friend, Donald Trump and Lauren Boebert have made it clear: they want to defund NPR and PBS — two of the most trusted sources of news, education, and cultural programming in the country. It’s not just talk. MAGA Republicans have introduced proposals to slash federal support for public media, cheered on by far-right voices who see facts and independent journalism as a threat. Public media connects rural communities, supports educational programming for kids, and gives Coloradans access to reliable, independent reporting. In a time of chaos and disinformation, it’s never been more essential — and it’s never been more under threat. Lauren Boebert doesn’t want Colorado’s 4th District to have access to honest, public-interest journalism. I do. I’m John Padora — a manufacturing engineer running for Congress to bring real leadership to our district, and to stand up against the chaos and censorship of MAGA extremism. Thanks for standing up for truth, facts, and public service We’re almost there. Let’s finish this. — Team Padora Paid for by Padora for Colorado

If there's one thing you should know about me, friend, it's this:**I have always proudly stood in solidarity with union workers. And I always will.**
Why am I sharing this right now? Well, after Donald Trump and Elon Musk unleashed unprecedented chaos on the federal government, fired thousands of employees and illegally accessed millions of people's sensitive data, **three unions representing federal workers are suing the administration.**
Trump and Musk's indiscriminate mass firings are not making government more efficient - they’re making it worse, and putting the rights of all workers’ at risk. _We should all be extremely concerned._

**I hope you'll join me today in speaking out against Trump's massive power grab. Please respond to our poll before it closes at midnight:**

name: Team James
subject: Our fight against Big Pharma
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107876224/546113668/-1997846894?code=jtk1894-su-nd&refcode=jtk1894-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzY3ZGM0ZS0zMDMzLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X1VUWGDEnQ9_bZ6B6z6fP5zblVMZBzAOYlkPPIKoH6o=)
---
Peter, when drug companies put profits over people, innocent patients can get sucked into deadly cycles of addiction and overdoses.

**That's why Letitia James is fighting back – and winning:**
**FIRST,** Letitia James went toe-to-toe with pharmaceutical companies for illegally driving up prescription drug costs as much as _1,000%_.
**THEN,** the attorney general's office held Big Pharma accountable by securing a **$7.4 _billion_** __ settlement – the largest of its kind – to fund opioid addiction treatment, prevention, and recovery programs across the country.
**NOW,** AG James has secured a critical win of **$335 million** from another pharmaceutical company for fueling the opioid crisis through deceptive marketing.
The funds we've secured from these hard-fought battles will help us continue to save lives, support families, and end this epidemic once and for all.
**This is the kind of accountability we can achieve when we fight back – but as Attorney General James continues to make progress for New Yorkers and Americans everywhere, she needs to know what she should tackle next.

[We're counting on 10,000 fearless fighters to weigh in on what matters most to them before midnight – including you, Peter. Will you take our priorities survey now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107876225/546113669/1945634563?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1894-su-nd&refcode=jtk1894-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzY3ZGM0ZS0zMDMzLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X1VUWGDEnQ9_bZ6B6z6fP5zblVMZBzAOYlkPPIKoH6o=&emci=57e7ab76-c131-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=a767dc4e-3033-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=25369504)**

clean_body: | | | = Peter, when drug companies put profits over people, innocent patients can get sucked into deadly cycles of addiction and overdoses. That's why Letitia James is fighting back – and winning: FIRST, Letitia James went toe-to-toe with pharmaceutical companies for illegally driving up prescription drug costs as much as 1,000%. THEN, the attorney general's office held Big Pharma accountable by securing a $7.4 billion settlement – the largest of its kind – to fund opioid addiction treatment, prevention, and recovery programs across the country. NOW, AG James has secured a critical win of $335 million from another pharmaceutical company for fueling the opioid crisis through deceptive marketing. The funds we've secured from these hard-fought battles will help us continue to save lives, support families, and end this epidemic once and for all. This is the kind of accountability we can achieve when we fight back – but as Attorney General James continues to make progress for New Yorkers and Americans everywhere, she needs to know what she should tackle next. | | Thank you for making wins like these possible. – Team James | With so many tough and crucial fights ahead, Letitia James is counting on people like you to fuel her fight for justice, progress, and true equality. Will you make a donation now or contribute monthly to make sure AG James can continue using the full power of the Attorney General's office to make a difference for everyday people and families? | | = | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY 2026 PO Box 20656 Brooklyn, NY 11202 United States | | Paid for by James for NY 2026

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Why I’m fighting for our future.
body:
Fellow American, I grew up in a single room behind my parents’ family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina. I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. |
---
Fellow American,

I grew up in a single room behind my parents' family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina.

I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. I quickly took on the responsibility of helping raise my 13-year-old sister, Darline, and running the family businesses.

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=86bffa777c8a4b0d9d039d6c91247100&_e=502-qjwBmBQEnWa_ddN2Io5aly769hMDwG6XD4jyKW8vsXewj9joSeq7N6WT0IkHMK7_4vZYgO62tTcfI3qUo9RzZxgmqTK6i8wFV0jFy1yZX2f3R6_a3SsQg-6YXiSfX418sFcp1K2PT8KLvbEnzP9SxO3w2T1QyqlhM_ZuNUoOQlnuHrIzhLT5CPprkxPY_is5TY-XlkwSO7wz3oE4d9CL27gM-jVyWayRLxoxa-jYaiWF7XL3Azb71Lvo9TjNVhUnwhc0-3vEqlHOyBTlbeHAEEN1kSNWw6cJ3WtFzv2AmSoffKzyMH_KNd9AJTSQdteWzRz9X4NWs5eWPypoMv4WdzsmZysckOzxFrWPN2eJT9dsDXYEUi834WII79z5)
**I had to grow up fast, Fellow American,_and I learned many life lessons at an early age._**

After attending law school, I joined the U.S. Air Force as a member of the Judge Advocate General Corps, where I served as a military prosecutor and defense attorney.

Even after being elected to the United States Senate, I continued to wear the uniform and served in the U.S. Air Force Reserves, where I performed several short deployments in the war zones of Afghanistan and Iraq.

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=86bffa777c8a4b0d9d039d6c91247100&_e=502-qjwBmBQEnWa_ddN2Io5aly769hMDwG6XD4jyKW8vsXewj9joSeq7N6WT0IkHMK7_4vZYgO62tTcfI3qUo9RzZxgmqTK6i8wFV0jFy1yZX2f3R6_a3SsQg-6YXiSfX418sFcp1K2PT8KLvbEnzP9SxO3w2T1QyqlhM_ZuNUoOQlnuHrIzhLT5CPprkxPY_is5TY-XlkwSO7wz3oE4d9CL27gM-jVyWayRLxoxa-i4Bc_CCec5g17Dv7PwMokpDDsfJB4Fw0jKKclBYE6jIsIA78bdR5InHzTCJJhMUGzhXKPnu-OyNrgK-wJ5eREKIvchEAoJqZxLWJmViQSzKTUa4RDSlLxhUn4mhi1gIOaa6Xcfx27a2v-CsmKwzW3F)
Fellow American, my story is similar to that of most Americans. I didn't grow up with a silver spoon in my mouth with everything handed to me. I had to grow up fast and work hard. I learned a lot of valuable lessons at a young age and took on a whole lot of responsibility.

But one thing stuck with me over the years -- the perspectives I gained from listening to the hard-working South Carolinians who were regulars at my family's pool hall or my brave colleagues in the military. Their perspectives, whether I agreed with them or not, helped build my foundation for understanding what Americans need.

**It's no secret that our nation is sharply divided right now, but there are some things we should all agree on.**

**We need a country that is a safe place to live and raise a family, and we need a country where the American Dream is alive and possible for everyone, no matter where they start from.**

Fellow American, I'm fighting every day to make those two things a reality. Sadly, there are people across the aisle in Washington who simply can't agree with us on these issues. They are okay with open borders and the flow of violent crime into our neighborhoods and onto our streets. They are okay with punishing hard-working Americans with higher taxes, deepening the burden on them and their families.

**[That's why I'm reaching out with a simple request: if you have a few dollars to spare, would you consider making a contribution to support my campaign by clicking this link or the button below?](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=86bffa777c8a4b0d9d039d6c91247100&_e=502-qjwBmBQEnWa_ddN2Io5aly769hMDwG6XD4jyKW8vsXewj9joSeq7N6WT0IkHMK7_4vZYgO62tTcfI3qUo9RzZxgmqTK6i8wFV0jFy1yZX2f3R6_a3SsQg-6YXiSfX418sFcp1K2PT8KLvbEnzP9SxO3w2T1QyqlhM_ZuNUoOQlnuHrIzhLT5CPprkxPY_is5TY-XlkwSO7wz3oE4d9CL27gM-jVyWayRLxoxa-jlY0ozsDXuv2Abl02-AYGH0KQcQlPV-vzZUb6gxVKvowieBTfwxJJf2sjHVHpX4JxqmptmWjycBe8F7TF514nhsBbVbNgbDBJy_IM-diFJt6huwYt41dU0fsDpOmkMY4GqpLbDvZdU309BKe3tfm8B)**

| [** CONTRIBUTE HERE **](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=86bffa777c8a4b0d9d039d6c91247100&_e=502-qjwBmBQEnWa_ddN2Io5aly769hMDwG6XD4jyKW8vsXewj9joSeq7N6WT0IkHMK7_4vZYgO62tTcfI3qUo9RzZxgmqTK6i8wFV0jFy1yZX2f3R6_a3SsQg-6YXiSfX418sFcp1K2PT8KLvbEnzP9SxO3w2T1QyqlhM_ZuNUoOQlnuHrIzhLT5CPprkxPY_is5TY-XlkwSO7wz3oE4d9CL27gM-jVyWayRLxoxa-gXABn62dagR0ux2kHY5jxt2ESE4yzr14yx8I6mkYM3zemHZ4RQ6skw3ykSAJmpl8lZobMB-2-JsboYu23UZLkxDhDGHrR-PRlEMo6qUz1W9jLGbs2wJ3TSITnrgg68G3gqT5FaPpcPlOFyMCwOsc7g)

If you're unable to contribute financially, I understand. I'd greatly appreciate it if you could forward this email along to a friend or family member to help amplify my message.

Together, I know we can build the country that protects our communities, rewards hard work, and ensures every hard-working American has a shot at their dreams, just like I was so fortunate to have.

Thank you for taking a moment out of your busy day to read this message.

Sincerely,
Lindsey Graham

Peter,[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=835d488827dd4f76a90416d4a4542201&_e=cqxxXluu2yQ45AEO7SMtcyofCOgGT4m2rAHq3PlYe_eK69IxFZi82Vw2TbZf3I2nAFndzzdIFHCqyzeBrfzdv0gyTaEjLnz_eICxl2l-BpAZYyFuTzoN-Roeu_BCv2nRA6zDh0Uk6Mn6nr13e1LutIOZk-kYH0GNrL0lBtdnQMbTSqapB1vyy-lva_PI7qWvhYHXpgnwc_H9EkAV86sxf-_zHvPRddkyIAcbCZE-ARJ8y5AuoIC1AEnN8j5o9HE2Gj8vUchoAihOItEnmaaBAF9DSJve_I_qIo_tq8JWE9hFYApibiVNUoV0hSZ4gzc75Bh_h6MNGHByg4ihodUAeuQvNIHSMSy_SY39XhcIXd3BsgK7F5NYVwJIDryRvePCUs0sb9cH4zVqakcOnWe64UO9QQUqW9rybzcNBtSLtMvYXj9DhewKqOgQ3Ov4DF0yW2vmcNKIm2xaZnhlThC13p2IUKtK87Dqm5CoO847jdo%3D) **THANK YOU for being a patriot!** You’ve stood with President Trump and me through thick and thin!

You’ve helped us fight back against the radical left’s vicious attacks and lawfare!

You’re the reason that, after four years of the Biden-Harris disaster, we can finally Make America Great Again!

Your continued support does not go unnoticed. President Trump and I know that we can count on you as we take on the Deep State.

| | Dear Friend, In November of 2024, the American people rejected the radicalism of the Democrats and saved our nation from four years of Kamala Harris.But now, Californians must take up the gauntlet—because Kamala is getting ready to run for Governor of California.She just kicked off her “comeback” tour with a speech to a room full of Democrat elites in San Francisco. And while she was cracking jokes and spewing her usual word salad nonsense, 35% of Californians are struggling just to afford the basics—**food, rent, medicine.** Kamala didn’t say a single word about that.Not one word about working families...
Not one plan to fix the mess her party created...
And not even a hint of humility... Just more preening, more posturing, and more political theater from someone who’s been a disaster in every job she has had.Let’s be clear: this isn’t just her comeback tour. It’s a coronation plan. The Democrat machine wants to hand Kamala the Governorship.**Not on my watch.** I’m Steve Hilton, and I’m running for Governor of California to bring back _freedom, opportunity, and common sense_ —to **Make California Golden Again**.[**Join my campaign today!**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6e4bb6df9db044dfa35178c48d5daa05&_e=KgvkMGBuff6puOgF5WbJn-2LDvaek2xVxjl5FEWJcw9DaQLiwqhl23yJ6NATNoyuX0cMJM3XSshSUJ4YwwqEqFc7_7ClrAv1BXUxpJym6KJL3VD2hUtPVbq8p5B7U4qBuNP1xQQpXCIgBDXxiWIHIgFrfKmsBYEoV2DKJmQuknQH-_IKI0Qz8syyGXFAA3V78KhKXJV0qAJNG51gF78SXNu6yy6yo7Sans48dI3DtfNCTz6rzNvKbBJP6QpNdrxA1UAO_4lLyuSbbgFuGrYFac581059ZVaBbc1x-Iq-wj6oNpffqTsKhQcEnxG1mAJb14UF8zdKiS8chL3yP3JboIghX1qSJzf_j_gVTOOyVjVRgWt_N9D3GTOx-V7Lo-VaVTklQN-LFhO36kF2u3rgz-tLnmzbh-50bkWYQQDZ5YA%3D) It does not have to be like this. Californians do not have to be the victims of failed Democrat policies any longer.California can still be the greatest state in the country. I truly believe that with all my heart. We are the home of innovation, creativity, and hard work. But radical democrats like Gavin Newsom, Kamala Harris and their elite allies have turned our state into a cautionary tale for the rest of America.
---
* Crime is up.
* Homelessness is exploding.
* Public schools are failing.
* Housing is unaffordable.
* Businesses and families are fleeing.

---
And Kamala? She wants more of the same. **Kamala Harris failed as a presidential candidate. She failed as Vice President. And she would be catastrophic as Governor.** But make no mistake—Kamala believes she can walk right into the Governor’s mansion. The elites are rallying around her. They think they can buy this race. They don’t believe someone like me—an outsider, a problem-solver, someone who speaks truth to power—can beat their broken machine.**[Let’s prove them wrong.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6e4bb6df9db044dfa35178c48d5daa05&_e=KgvkMGBuff6puOgF5WbJn-2LDvaek2xVxjl5FEWJcw9DaQLiwqhl23yJ6NATNoyuX0cMJM3XSshSUJ4YwwqEqFc7_7ClrAv1BXUxpJym6KJL3VD2hUtPVbq8p5B7U4qBuNP1xQQpXCIgBDXxiWIHIgFrfKmsBYEoV2DKJmQuknQH-_IKI0Qz8syyGXFAA3V78KhKXJV0qAJNG51gF78SXNu6yy6yo7Sans48dI3DtfNCTz6rzNvKbBJP6QpNdrxA1UAO_4lLyuSbbgFuGrYFaU3gBJBtMLwP4E6hfE3qf5ptovBb9hNMjQwbIA0v7iNIxD9RL_-TTdW0T45FBWNWPw-MD4XCCKA1eO6FLEhS53n6WK08XrV8sPq-XyX3EehBhiJu4w_eYSATzjiGQW6zkq6wB5gcSCPv1O84DwLe1Nc%3D)** This race is going to come down to a clear choice: **_Fifteen more years of one-party rule from failed Democrats who wrecked this state_**
__**OR**__

clean_body: Help Make our beautiful state Golden Again.| | | | | | | Dear Friend, In November of 2024, the American people rejected the radicalism of the Democrats and saved our nation from four years of Kamala Harris.But now, Californians must take up the gauntlet—because Kamala is getting ready to run for Governor of California.She just kicked off her “comeback” tour with a speech to a room full of Democrat elites in San Francisco. And while she was cracking jokes and spewing her usual word salad nonsense, 35% of Californians are struggling just to afford the basics—food, rent, medicine. Kamala didn’t say a single word about that.Not one word about working families... Not one plan to fix the mess her party created... And not even a hint of humility... Just more preening, more posturing, and more political theater from someone who’s been a disaster in every job she has had.Let’s be clear: this isn’t just her comeback tour. It’s a coronation plan. The Democrat machine wants to hand Kamala the Governorship.Not on my watch. I’m Steve Hilton, and I’m running for Governor of California to bring back freedom, opportunity, and common sense —to Make California Golden Again. It does not have to be like this. Californians do not have to be the victims of failed Democrat policies any longer.California can still be the greatest state in the country. I truly believe that with all my heart. We are the home of innovation, creativity, and hard work. But radical democrats like Gavin Newsom, Kamala Harris and their elite allies have turned our state into a cautionary tale for the rest of America. Crime is up. Homelessness is exploding. Public schools are failing. Housing is unaffordable. Businesses and families are fleeing. And Kamala? She wants more of the same. Kamala Harris failed as a presidential candidate. She failed as Vice President. And she would be catastrophic as Governor. But make no mistake—Kamala believes she can walk right into the Governor’s mansion. The elites are rallying around her. They think they can buy this race. They don’t believe someone like me—an outsider, a problem-solver, someone who speaks truth to power—can beat their broken machine. This race is going to come down to a clear choice: Fifteen more years of one-party rule from failed Democrats who wrecked this state OR A new era of bold, common-sense leadership that will make California golden again. So I’m calling on every proud Californian who wants to turn things around: We don’t need another elitist who talks in circles and dodges accountability. We need real leadership. We need to talk about the real issues. We need to take our state back.Join me—and let’s get to work. Steve Hilton Candidate for Governor of California P.S. Kamala Harris doesn’t want a serious debate—because her ideas are the ideas that have led to this calamity. If you’re ready to fight back, I need you on this team. ** | | | | | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY STEVE HILTON FOR GOVERNOR 2026 FPPC ID#1480425 Please add mailto:info@stevehiltonforgovernor.com "info@stevegarvey.com" to your email contacts to make sure our updates are making it into your inbox. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Republicans want to cut health care so that Mark Zuckerberg can host more parties dressed up like Benson Boone.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
I’m in this fight all the way, and I’m ready to go.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2548%2E4032634%2EC_r4vA)
---
I’m going to sum up this week using one sentence: **Republicans want little kids to go hungry so Jeff Bezos can buy a third yacht.** It’s as simple as that. Republicans in Congress proposed their budget reconciliation bill earlier this week. This “big beautiful bill,” as Trump likes to call it, gives trillions of dollars in tax breaks to billionaires — all by slashing Medicaid, food assistance, and educational programs. Oh, and Republicans are now going back to the drawing board on their original "big beautiful bill" because this one didn't cut health care for ENOUGH people. We often hear a lot of numbers thrown around when we talk about budget plans and reconciliation, but it’s not just about the numbers. It’s about the real people who are impacted by these decisions. The real lives who count on the programs we’re discussing. The real pain that will be inflicted by these cuts. We could be talking about investments to fix our roads and bridges. Investments to make child care affordable so parents can get to work. Investments to help Black and Brown communities get a fighting chance after decades of discrimination and injustice. Investments to expand health care access to ensure nobody needs to take out a loan to cover a hospital visit. Instead, the GOP wants to shortchange our children so Jeff Bezos can buy another $40 million clock that ticks once a year. They want to hollow out our communities so Elon Musk can plan a trip to Mars. They want to cripple our small businesses so Mark Zuckerberg can host even more black tie events, dress up like Benson Boone, and dance around. (That’s not a joke — I’ve seen the video.) It’s disgraceful. These are tax cuts that could cost $52 trillion over the next thirty years. (To put that into context, that’s more debt than we’ve built up in our entire 249-year history as a country.) Republicans know that their vision for these tax cuts is deeply unpopular. Not just with Democrats, but with Republicans, too. That’s why Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and the spineless Republicans in Congress are creating a sandstorm so that we’re all looking in fifty different directions. From talking about invading Greenland to starting the dumbest trade war in history, they’re trying to distract us from their deeply unpopular agenda. They don’t want us to see the number one place where they’re driving this country: Trillions of dollars in tax cuts for billionaires, paid for on the backs of seniors, little kids, veterans, and working families. **The Republicans are hoping Americans look anywhere else as they ram their tax cuts for billionaires through. I won’t let that happen. I’m fighting every single day to raise the alarm about this blatant giveaway to Trump’s “rich as hell” donors. I’m working to get every Republican on the record and hold them accountable.** **The Democrats are in this fight all the way — and we’re ready to go.** Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth

---
| | | |
---
| [DONATE](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3008?t=11&akid=2548%2E4032634%2EC_r4vA)
---

body:
I’m running for the U.S. Senate in Georgia because President Trump needs backup and Jon Ossoff is AWOL The Federal Election Commission's filing deadline for the runoff is tomorrow ... we have LESS THAN 24 HOURS TO HIT OUR FUNDRAISING GOAL |
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5072e08b6a2742c5b72395a61d336e3d&_e=wKyZCr4wnPltWf7JsZgtgWhYRCWQi6__o9lurl00MQvrz9o39vD3xlUqLoMcRIs7T8gCwM13A7Lifouir-MPeQdkafNk5lLa_EFhVGOanr2qi1bDxZC6Pf3fuwvyzSrUxNo_ka21Q5lYJXwNLe78pMnu6QOe--n8YxaWJzcth1X8hG2hPEHKL9QDf2kTHK-X3JSluqm_o8FjxaxSXYf5HW1V4YJq_0xqV7KUislXKhzkwTDV9vqvMp4Cjx4_0XLVNyasnt64km-QgkrEicTee7hCC3O1QD4TPsAU7hG0ludt1sbrW-Mh7v6XM8wdcqLHYExa-Bu-XNvo7DagZzg-xTKVOlrjadxboEwTe1E3N7eU_dm2z6Yt9HTEkHpqcfDfEszBrFvAolCsBfk9Rpy30LQlHtlmEeMK__UeUlD8NuM%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative, my name is John King.

[**I'm running for the U.S. Senate in Georgia because President Trump needs backup and Jon Ossoff is AWOL - I’m asking you to help me defeat him.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5072e08b6a2742c5b72395a61d336e3d&_e=wKyZCr4wnPltWf7JsZgtgWhYRCWQi6__o9lurl00MQvrz9o39vD3xlUqLoMcRIs7T8gCwM13A7Lifouir-MPeQdkafNk5lLa_EFhVGOanr2qi1bDxZC6Pf3fuwvyzSrUxNo_ka21Q5lYJXwNLe78pMnu6QOe--n8YxaWJzcth1X8hG2hPEHKL9QDf2kTHK-X3JSluqm_o8FjxaxSXYf5HW1V4YJq_0xqV7KUislXKhzkwTDV9vqvMp4Cjx4_0XLVw7IiuK7kYnXcNarqRmAlQLrfRHj3j5IN1SgvqZ0fHgXM2m-83NZXSwmOLRlUej7MyUrLsOSOQQPkbTVqRyeoiRB2yPt0Fe_b91igXEosLHF2VQ4i2_ECyINTrhckkuwv7eXnsoF_yv0Kwsnkomiq5ur-BWOM--KxbpH8iZX7zoc%3D)

**Let me tell you more about myself.**

**I was born and raised in Mexico.** I came to America when I was 17. My story is only possible in this country.

**I enlisted in the Army as a private and retired as a two-star major general.** I deployed to Afghanistan, Iraq, Bosnia, Africa, and our southern border.

**I joined the Atlanta police as a beat cop and became a police chief.** I’ve locked up drug dealers, deported criminals here illegally, and I was shot in the line of duty.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5072e08b6a2742c5b72395a61d336e3d&_e=wKyZCr4wnPltWf7JsZgtgWhYRCWQi6__o9lurl00MQvrz9o39vD3xlUqLoMcRIs7T8gCwM13A7Lifouir-MPeQdkafNk5lLa_EFhVGOanr2qi1bDxZC6Pf3fuwvyzSrUxNo_ka21Q5lYJXwNLe78pMnu6QOe--n8YxaWJzcth1X8hG2hPEHKL9QDf2kTHK-X3JSluqm_o8FjxaxSXYf5HW1V4YJq_0xqV7KUislXKhzkwTDV9vqvMp4Cjx4_0XLVNowAwcx3s2Rs653hhZ0ZodCGpDouXVFtwd2fUe0UaXOhm9EIA-vEDOX0toUIZfrkem_jp0xPQg1Mff3zDniciC3UgOpzQrnoj7WGJK3fweIdCltag5QYP4au9NN6SZr1JRZQaKFQ-d8aLRB6zWsiPAoKe3YDb4K4w1_OGreQbE4%3D)

**I'm proud to support President Trump.** I co-chaired his Georgia campaign in 2020, spoke at rallies in 2024, and turned out Latinos to support Republicans across the state.

[**President Trump is putting America First, but for his agenda to succeed he needs a four-year majority - and that road runs straight through Georgia.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5072e08b6a2742c5b72395a61d336e3d&_e=wKyZCr4wnPltWf7JsZgtgWhYRCWQi6__o9lurl00MQvrz9o39vD3xlUqLoMcRIs7T8gCwM13A7Lifouir-MPeQdkafNk5lLa_EFhVGOanr2qi1bDxZC6Pf3fuwvyzSrUxNo_ka21Q5lYJXwNLe78pMnu6QOe--n8YxaWJzcth1X8hG2hPEHKL9QDf2kTHK-X3JSluqm_o8FjxaxSXYf5HW1V4YJq_0xqV7KUislXKhzkwTDV9vqvMp4Cjx4_0XLV2cVXt3eskMnJKRLMD0HgE29m8qCVnAjp6s-gd6goGPh6Cm-pLWedmoSdj3vgHY634QrxXNvulfaROF65SMRUfUUnqiHq1VRm8wXO493C6J93HJ8CTdSLxkjiw2EIuqC1rkUy1QIsSPiAaVQxVdLCOVvz8BFMeuEJxblQU51nXv8%3D)

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5072e08b6a2742c5b72395a61d336e3d&_e=wKyZCr4wnPltWf7JsZgtgWhYRCWQi6__o9lurl00MQvrz9o39vD3xlUqLoMcRIs7T8gCwM13A7Lifouir-MPeQdkafNk5lLa_EFhVGOanr2qi1bDxZC6Pf3fuwvyzSrUxNo_ka21Q5lYJXwNLe78pMnu6QOe--n8YxaWJzcth1X8hG2hPEHKL9QDf2kTHK-X3JSluqm_o8FjxaxSXYf5HW1V4YJq_0xqV7KUislXKhzkwTDV9vqvMp4Cjx4_0XLVD14ljyX54B06xYbwPxYdbHgDEiTLUPcRJmed6p5dtelW_JE_Pjckqy8YIPU_HtSxXfJPr1sgwY4MdFTSH2OsatdMsyktbenXxJB8hY9flY7ykIxiKVqVKGVdo9AsoX6BwLioEgX4Cwt4yBNFbaOVCANp36a5eFegn9YNeIUNiLo%3D)

**I’m running for Senate now because Jon Ossoff is an AWOL senator.**

He was nowhere to be found when Biden opened our borders and humiliated our country in Afghanistan.

And since the last election, he’s voted against supporting Israel, against keeping men out of women’s sports, and against confirming President Trump’s team.

**Enough already.** Georgians need a senator who fights for them and President Trump needs backup to pass his agenda.

[**But I can’t do this alone. I’m not a rich self-funder; I’m a lawman and soldier who’s humbly asking for your help to start this campaign the right way. Can you pitch in any amount?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5072e08b6a2742c5b72395a61d336e3d&_e=wKyZCr4wnPltWf7JsZgtgWhYRCWQi6__o9lurl00MQvrz9o39vD3xlUqLoMcRIs7T8gCwM13A7Lifouir-MPeQdkafNk5lLa_EFhVGOanr2qi1bDxZC6Pf3fuwvyzSrUxNo_ka21Q5lYJXwNLe78pMnu6QOe--n8YxaWJzcth1X8hG2hPEHKL9QDf2kTHK-X3JSluqm_o8FjxaxSXYf5HW1V4YJq_0xqV7KUislXKhzkwTDV9vqvMp4Cjx4_0XLV8QNSFWHFyJeeZy4pure-sgNzmKyxXpfCy3KMuwlcdxwP1Tuh3xcBR9tDfL_sQiEi7TL9Ht23WTRuyq25T8DV1u9HipSWToOLQim5zmAHMTI8YmtL7HAUyQyaRxRD-hsgwaPjEpuqy7uG2p_0rYbL6a8dE61znIo2FQkH-NDEcH0%3D)

clean_body: I’m running for the U.S. Senate in Georgia because President Trump needs backup and Jon Ossoff is AWOL The Federal Election Commission's filing deadline for the runoff is tomorrow ... we have LESS THAN 24 HOURS TO HIT OUR FUNDRAISING GOAL | Fellow Conservative, my name is John King. Let me tell you more about myself. I was born and raised in Mexico. I came to America when I was 17. My story is only possible in this country. I enlisted in the Army as a private and retired as a two-star major general. I deployed to Afghanistan, Iraq, Bosnia, Africa, and our southern border. I joined the Atlanta police as a beat cop and became a police chief. I’ve locked up drug dealers, deported criminals here illegally, and I was shot in the line of duty. I'm proud to support President Trump. I co-chaired his Georgia campaign in 2020, spoke at rallies in 2024, and turned out Latinos to support Republicans across the state. I’m running for Senate now because Jon Ossoff is an AWOL senator. He was nowhere to be found when Biden opened our borders and humiliated our country in Afghanistan. And since the last election, he’s voted against supporting Israel, against keeping men out of women’s sports, and against confirming President Trump’s team. Enough already. Georgians need a senator who fights for them and President Trump needs backup to pass his agenda. I’m not afraid of how tough and expensive this campaign will be. I’m not afraid of the Swamp in Washington. I am afraid of giving Jon Ossoff six more years to put America last. Thanks, Maj. Gen. John King (retd.) | General John King is a soldier, lawman, and the first Hispanic elected statewide in Georgia history. He’s running for the Senate now because Georgians need a leader who will fight for them, fight for President Trump’s agenda, and put America First. | | | Paid For By John King For Senate Inc. But I won’t let them intimidate or silence me.Will you, Peter? = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Bonnie Watson Coleman and Becca Balint will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you for standing with me, Bonnie Watson Coleman mailto:beccabalintvt@beccabalint.com | Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont P.O. Box 291 Burlington, VT 05402

Justice Sotomayor is 100% correct. Without reliable sources of truthful information, our country could suffer _unimaginable harm._ But that's exactly what Trump and Musk want!

We can't sit idly by as Trump's attacks on our media expand, so **we've launched an URGENT Rapid Response Petition to show that Democrats support PBS, MSNBC, NPR, and the independent journalism that's vital to our nation.** But as of 11:10 A.M. name: Team Fair Shot
subject: Standing up for our troops
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Shot PAC
body:
We recognize their commitment, bravery, and sacrifice in defending our nation. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107878308/546118994/-1346133780?refcode=AU_FSP_CL_GEN_NOA_AC_20250517_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDgyYzhmMS0zMzMzLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hrNxS-FPZ_FcZKIVmYtmPA9lGVLYbcNRbUS1eVY6TCU=)
---
Peter — Today is Armed Forces Day, when we honor and express gratitude to the service members in the U.S. Army, Navy, Air Force, and Marine Corps. We recognize their commitment, bravery, and sacrifice in defending our nation. Donald Trump claimed to support service members on the campaign trail, yet has used his first 100 days to attack transgender service members, make cuts to the Veterans’ Affairs department, and fired hundreds of veterans from government positions. The best way we can honor veterans’ commitment to service to our country is by making it easier, not harder, for those who are called to serve to do so and ensuring that veterans have the resources they need once they return from duty. That means a full range of benefits — health care, mental health services, job support, and much more that they deserve. The cuts this administration has made will leave millions of veterans in need. Katherine and House Democrats are focused on delivering for those who serve our country, but we can't do it alone. We hope you’ll stand with us in support of America’s troops as we bring the fight for veterans to the House floor. 🇺🇲 Team Fair Shot
Fair Shot PAC
600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180
Washington, DC 20003
United States **[fairshotpac.org](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107878309/546118995/-1338460526?refcode=AU_FSP_CL_GEN_NOA_AC_20250517_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDgyYzhmMS0zMzMzLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hrNxS-FPZ_FcZKIVmYtmPA9lGVLYbcNRbUS1eVY6TCU=&emci=b782c8f1-3333-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=bd82c8f1-3333-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=30620316) | [info@fairshotpac.org](mailto:info@fairshotpac.org)** | Paid for by Fair Shot PAC

name: Carolina, United We Dream
subject: Finding home, even when the world around us seems to crumble
body:
Pre-order “Dreaming of Home” by UWD co-founder, Cristina Jiménez | | | Peter — In her book **_Dreaming of Home: How We Turn Fear Into Pride, Power, and Real Change,_** Cristina Jiménez writes a roadmap for finding the power that each of us has within ourselves and our communities to create change. As an immigrant who grew up undocumented in New York City, Cristina knows what it's like to live in fear of deportation and family separation. **But she found her voice and power when she met a community of undocumented youth and immigrant justice organizers who were fighting to stop deportations.** In _Dreaming of Home_ , Cristina writes of the experiences of her family living undocumented in the United States. With vivid details about her father getting pulled over while driving and having an employer abruptly stop paying him, she paints a picture of what life is like for undocumented people. Cristina and her brother were tormented by the fear that they would return home and not find their parents there. They lived in the shadows, in constant dread of making the slightest slip-up that could lead to their family being broken apart by a broken immigration system. By pairing these anecdotes with compelling data, Cristina pulls back the curtain on the historical facts that created the tangle of immigration policies and politics that is gripping this country today. But fear will never stop us from finding a home in our families, in our communities, and in the ways we stand up for each other. Since Cristina first co-founded United We Dream, our mission has remained the same: **Empower immigrant youth to advocate for their communities, learn new skills, and mobilize to change their world.** To fuel that mission, Cristina is generously donating proceeds from her book to United We Dream. **[Will you pre-order Cristina’s powerful memoir and support United We Dream’s efforts to mobilize immigrant clean_body: Pre-order “Dreaming of Home” by UWD co-founder, Cristina Jiménez | | | Peter — In her book Dreaming of Home: How We Turn Fear Into Pride, Power, and Real Change, Cristina Jiménez writes a roadmap for finding the power that each of us has within ourselves and our communities to create change. As an immigrant who grew up undocumented in New York City, Cristina knows what it's like to live in fear of deportation and family separation. But she found her voice and power when she met a community of undocumented youth and immigrant justice organizers who were fighting to stop deportations. In Dreaming of Home , Cristina writes of the experiences of her family living undocumented in the United States. With vivid details about her father getting pulled over while driving and having an employer abruptly stop paying him, she paints a picture of what life is like for undocumented people. Cristina and her brother were tormented by the fear that they would return home and not find their parents there. They lived in the shadows, in constant dread of making the slightest slip-up that could lead to their family being broken apart by a broken immigration system. By pairing these anecdotes with compelling data, Cristina pulls back the curtain on the historical facts that created the tangle of immigration policies and politics that is gripping this country today. But fear will never stop us from finding a home in our families, in our communities, and in the ways we stand up for each other. Since Cristina first co-founded United We Dream, our mission has remained the same: Empower immigrant youth to advocate for their communities, learn new skills, and mobilize to change their world. To fuel that mission, Cristina is generously donating proceeds from her book to United We Dream. When you claim your copy, you’re helping us continue our efforts to send the message that our home is here, and nothing will change that. **** you, Carolina, United We Dream | Follow us on: | | | | |

re: Donald Trump’s birthday celebration next month
#
Peter — next month, Donald Trump is planning to throw himself a _totally normal and not at all concerning_ birthday celebration.
**He wants the military to parade through the streets of DC** — and he’s willing to pay TENS OF MILLIONS of dollars to make it happen.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88780?refcode=em20250517-8956&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8956%2E614464%2EXrtKVS)
**All this, while his administration works furiously to make deep cuts to critical programs everyday Americans rely on simply to survive** — like Social Security, Medicaid, and so much more.
