body:
#

Hey friend, it’s Mark Kelly. My friend Katie Hobbs is running for Governor in Arizona and needs our help. I hope you’ll read the message below from her team, and [**rush a split donation between Katie's campaign and mine.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-hobbs.0syrPb&refcode=em250517-1-90&t=1&akid=6072%2E6688874%2E8Z3pYX)
---
Breaking news, team.
**Donald Trump just endorsed BOTH of Katie’s extreme GOP opponents, Karrin Taylor Robson and Andy Biggs.**
This early dual endorsement guarantees that Katie will be facing a Trump-backed opponent next November — and that means we need to prepare _right now_ for the dark money attacks headed Katie’s way.
[**There’s no limit to how much Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and the entire MAGA establishment will spend to defeat Katie. Can you split $3 between Katie Hobbs and Mark Kelly to help us fight back?**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-hobbs.0syrPb&refcode=em250517-1-90&t=2&akid=6072%2E6688874%2E8Z3pYX)

---
****
There’s a reason the _Cook Political Report_ rated this race a “toss-up,” team.
In 2022, Katie won by _less than one percentage point._
And just last November, Donald Trump won Arizona by 5 points.
Donald Trump and National Republicans see Arizona as a top pick-up opportunity. That he’s chosen to endorse BOTH of Katie’s GOP opponents this early means that the floodgates have opened for dark-money spending to enter this race.
**They’re hoping that their MAGA millions will overwhelm our grassroots campaign — _and it’s up to us to prove them wrong.**_
[**Please, split $10 or more right now to help us re-elect Katie and fight back against the Trump fundraising machine.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-hobbs.0syrPb&refcode=em250517-1-90&t=27&akid=6072%2E6688874%2E8Z3pYX)

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: I’m sick and tired of this
body:
| | | | |
---
Peter,
If you’re sick and tired of** _do-nothing Republicans who talk a big game before every election and then lose all their courage when it’s time to pass laws_** ...
If you’re sick and tired of **_RINO’s begging for your money everyday only to disappear the instant a tough fight begins_** ...
If you’re sick and tired of spending your time and money to help **_politicians who turn their backs on you the moment their plane lands in DC_** ...
**Then you feel exactly the way I do.**
[STAND WITH MTG](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/pyxoN_bFQNRUL1E-wbo2yTAzUqzyURzB-o70TA0IfbtbaN7d4lSPXDwXEF46AXFJZef72yaTfABg7CUwjLXQ_hU1MyI-JKhLlQxMbmQzoCd_1Prl63xbBQWNRmxnN07-8zCnERdO2seUtZpyRA3B_Uv9C0NI71HXMtcU7gzr7NZNLURE4FTVEs2dJyZmoHeEIsAWBNFulRWNqA8wd6fSFYqs82DvaxqiXuyLrVSA-cLU8cHqH1a-Ds-WdPH27N0FqlOp6dVM7OmBwRwTmVehJyaigGggh99gXCbWxVgl6xtgg8OUKmpmMHUY13vq98aVhu57GzUYg0Z2w17fO3X_uQNjQH9lkpMz-uIr8GsCLlyQelmI48wkS0lzmR4r2FJLbAq8Hu2kk2vkOA-3hwmkmATOrjOuqHQB6EsSkqGGqvIgRjnwATnk9BkFClf1b9U_t79rPvhzsFOMQ2MZZRLK/QY0jwemoqoFqZbsqZlBGc_2_Sdh9Jir_/9)
It’s time for Republicans in Congress to get it through their heads that we won an historic landslide election in November on the coattails of President Trump and his America First agenda, and that the Republican base, and the American people, expect swift action.
**Republicans need to get serious about:**
* Making the DOGE cuts permanent.
* Making it a felony to do sex change operations on children.
* Investigating and prosecuting those responsible for the Republic-ending lawfare waged against President Trump and his allies.
* Stopping the blank checks to Ukraine.
* Holding the COVID tyrants at the CDC accountable.
* Passing NO tax on tips, overtime, and social security.
* Reigning in the rogue federal judiciary.

If we don’t take bold action on these priorities, voters will justifiably lose faith in Congressional Republicans and they will punish us at the ballot box in the midterm elections.
**I’m sending a wake up call to Republicans in DC: **
**When MTG is upset, the base is upset.**
We have a once-in-a-generation opportunity to save our country and if we blow it we deserve to lose the next election.
That’s why I’m holding the establishment’s feet to the fire in the fight to codify President Trump’s agenda.
The powers in Washington are going to punish me for saying this but let me be clear: I don’t care. I don’t work for the Establishment, Special Interests, or the Corrupt Swamp. **I work for YOU.**
**_[That’s why I’m so proud to fund my political operation $10, $25, and $50 at a time from patriots across this country like you who are sick and tired of the status quo](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/0NvlHlwtLbpj6T2HapJ1aTYKBSTs1X8WfrTPGQ4NMSz_g98RhvDtWksaZme8UELaePMAPm2nyDOpP0snS19N_5Dn55ymCgVe3tIYksdoSSb7vLnDbxWgUR5pdBhExXHYpwM5WuD7740ezrPy5DZZQuiKvd3tyY8bZbTKr5pDIZE9hFpU7xSd-0UUtZMhzV_-SuAAOuQ_CRW6jtauMSLIMgCA458NBvwoJPXua2RWUQY3Fsu0l4Izq68Wa03PRlhcqV0DA0LoOPqVpdjmbMaRCdDY7AyOgwyyQQMZvBq6FUC0BhCsTCr6s4athq9JmEY_0ONCIiM10OtraKTaN9FkJcl6ZR98S4D85dLfPB4ayYgrx3yNIwhvQWgHS_A9nr_rgKgheBHYEJRVIWmPQakYLkks4zBQ6H9ttfRMlspckRVHFVbezJ-SQ_u7FqY4YUFs-8YcEFbkRV-fEbjH0ku4/8wMrqom311UIVCqvjyVuUTyLXVMM6G_6/9)_.**
I didn’t come to Congress to make friends, I had enough before I got here.
I came to Congress to deliver for the American people, to truly REPRESENT the interests of **_We The People_**.
**_[And that’s exactly what I’m doing](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/mOvzebCfo2h9h65S5jnS9anCRQqlox8mOic6gcC6RJdlJVVS266Hq0Z4urGwBukbfOCTfDg569wyOGYdCXXzztSTaL1Lt-H7DAQRtYJgkWLnlXMPP4qR6kUjP7gO8IpUsaf135Rrchbmau4mgdJzphtSlRd8PVkPxaKMv-EtnNLubc2sz9zNxrgorBW_CSuU1-7P_DoPLyJxih-MDvoKn4Qu_7M4wzrEeD0kmuad_opIHICdW20fv1lv5tmkx_Ko_xGQ9T760tbAdXZecOz5ZlQnPPVWoJSoQvdzdqIHRltZYuzQSnKxcHc3WJwlMkRLapR80nl5OJ0bcgjUZDVLSQAuNMFGD1fLs8hJ0sArNiIDhVfU0kxkyN6CI7lwFyO_5waVgnrjBsfqZsKyj4zlBSXW0rpdjfHfT7BqsOgO11_capan1fWdEaP9wgMhtVGd5iIzSMeDBTj1M6o5AlBm/aCqpOUt60-rAERsTJ0WRxZNrLc1GK3UN/9)_.**

clean_body: | | Peter, A few months ago, we proved that Pennsylvania Democrats are fired up and ready to fight back against Trump’s agenda. We not only won here in SD36, but flipped a Trump +15 district – one that has never elected a Democrat. But now, it’s time to build on this momentum. This November, 3 Supreme Court seats are up for retention – and this election could decide the balance for the next decade. We’ve shown that PA voters are not going to sit by while extremists destroy our democracy. = We need leadership that will work with compassion, honesty, and respect for our neighbors. That’s who the Pennsylvania Democratic Party is working hard to elect, and why I’m proud to be standing with them today. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and split between PA Dems and the Pennsylvania Senate Democratic Committee. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, James Malone State Senator, SD 36 = | Follow us on , , and **! name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: I’m ready for the fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association
body:
_[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107879792/546123855/-1558904994?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_160525_FR_Budzinski&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGZhNGNmZmUtMzczMy1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Cj_YTHXKyh-gdqwG7gCKjgyBYBzq2HSbVo9_bwcmdes=)_
Hey folks – it’s Rep. Nikki Budzinski here, and I’m excited to reach out to you to talk about how the IL Dem County Chairs’ Association and I are teaming up to hold Republicans accountable.

As I’m sure you’re aware, Republicans have fully embraced the chaos they’ve created. They’re trying to pass nonsense legislation like renaming the Gulf of Mexico and rubber-stamping Trump’s extremist agenda, allowing him to impose reckless tariffs that are raising prices on working families.

To add to that, they’re refusing to hold town halls to answer to their constituents and take accountability.

But IDCCA and I are working together to fill that void. If Republicans refuse to hear folks from Illinois, then we’re happy to step up and do that work. I ran for Congress to listen to folks directly and try to solve problems. That work doesn’t stop because Democrats are in the minority.

We’re working together – at all levels – to harness grassroots power and elect changemakers. [**If you want to support IDCCA’s mission and ensure we’re supporting Democrats at every level right now, you can make a split contribution now between IDCCA and my re-election campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107879794/546123857/-1558904994?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_160525_FR_Budzinski&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGZhNGNmZmUtMzczMy1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Cj_YTHXKyh-gdqwG7gCKjgyBYBzq2HSbVo9_bwcmdes=)

running for office, most of my career was in the Labor Movement – so I know firsthand how to mobilize communities, bring people together, and make change.

And I’m committed to doing all of that in the lead up to 2026, and I know IDCCA is too. With all of us at every level up for the fight, we need your support to make it happen.

clean_body: = Hey folks – it’s Rep. Nikki Budzinski here, and I’m excited to reach out to you to talk about how the IL Dem County Chairs’ Association and I are teaming up to hold Republicans accountable. As I’m sure you’re aware, Republicans have fully embraced the chaos they’ve created. They’re trying to pass nonsense legislation like renaming the Gulf of Mexico and rubber-stamping Trump’s extremist agenda, allowing him to impose reckless tariffs that are raising prices on working families. To add to that, they’re refusing to hold town halls to answer to their constituents and take accountability. But IDCCA and I are working together to fill that void. If Republicans refuse to hear folks from Illinois, then we’re happy to step up and do that work. I ran for Congress to listen to folks directly and try to solve problems. That work doesn’t stop because Democrats are in the minority. We’re working together – at all levels – to harness grassroots power and elect changemakers. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = = running for office, most of my career was in the Labor Movement – so I know firsthand how to mobilize communities, bring people together, and make change. And I’m committed to doing all of that in the lead up to 2026, and I know IDCCA is too. With all of us at every level up for the fight, we need your support to make it happen. = you, Nikki Budzinski, IL-13 | | | | GET TEXT UPDATES FROM THE IDCCA! | | | | | | = = | | | | Contributions or gifts to the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association are not tax deductible. Friend,

I wanted to share a quick update on everything I’ve been up to around the district over the past few weeks. I hope you’ll take a minute to read it the whole way through!

But if you’re busy, I understand, and I’d really appreciate a **[donation of $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107879918/546124355/753003349?refcode=em-5.17.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzk0ZTcyZS0zODMzLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ENggr2dS3OGZyr79rjn8JtLmc_1fODS9DV24M7JJJw=)** to power my fight in Washington. From protecting Medicaid to SNAP and more, I’m standing up for Illinoisans every day.

Thank you,

Nikki

* * *

Earlier this month, I joined a group of incredible Illinois women for a Democratic Power Hour. We discussed how we're building coalitions throughout the state, from Chicago to the Metro East, to stand up for working families.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107879920/546124383/753003349?refcode=em-5.17.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzk0ZTcyZS0zODMzLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ENggr2dS3OGZyr79rjn8JtLmc_1fODS9DV24M7JJJw=)
Last week, I connected with a group of women in Springfield who are joining me in the fight for our communities. We’re not giving up, and our work is stronger together.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107879921/546124384/753003349?refcode=em-5.17.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzk0ZTcyZS0zODMzLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ENggr2dS3OGZyr79rjn8JtLmc_1fODS9DV24M7JJJw=)
Last month, I joined the Monroe County Democrats to talk about our fight for rural America – from protecting the postal service from privatization to expanding access to healthcare.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107879922/546124385/753003349?refcode=em-5.17.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzk0ZTcyZS0zODMzLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ENggr2dS3OGZyr79rjn8JtLmc_1fODS9DV24M7JJJw=)
And in case you missed it, I joined _Fox News_ on Sunday to share my thoughts on House Republicans’ disastrous plan to cut Medicaid for the most vulnerable Americans.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107879923/546124386/-803653937?v=NfXOgmR3OWU&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzk0ZTcyZS0zODMzLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ENggr2dS3OGZyr79rjn8JtLmc_1fODS9DV24M7JJJw=&emci=0294e72e-3833-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=0394e72e-3833-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=13891387)
_Click**[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107879924/546124387/-803653937?v=NfXOgmR3OWU&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzk0ZTcyZS0zODMzLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ENggr2dS3OGZyr79rjn8JtLmc_1fODS9DV24M7JJJw=&emci=0294e72e-3833-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=0394e72e-3833-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=13891387)** to watch my remarks._
I’m busier than ever meeting with folks across our communities, hearing their stories, and fueling my fight for working families back in Washington.

This fight is far from over. I hope you’ll continue to stand with me as I work toward real progress on the issues that matter most.

Thank you!

Nikki

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swexxv&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6ja4b8283goivb27y66231plygd04qxt819oq3ayhs3i1txd0orn1twmg0k117nhcx0haubozz1tbt9sp6df189w60t0kviohnkp6v2n0qthtzsm8gm6m49ox0ra5pxcq3gxvqfbkpzi10fpmrepu&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swexxv&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swexxv&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swexxv&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swexxv&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6ja4b8283goivb27y66231plbcplsc6g5hrnnho7vxpr01mlfj7t4jht9t5phic4vh5ndauo6azexoprnq1bc8qkhk9api553ol2i4jlaymnbr0w3zj0mtq8l7ppi5rnbdcj3iex5irnq223elg5q&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swexxv&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=swexxv&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Team Bennet
subject: Celebrating Colorado Public Lands Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250517_copubliclands_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250517_copubliclands_act]
Happy Colorado Public Lands Day, folks,
Since arriving to the Senate, Michael has fought alongside Coloradans to protect and preserve hundreds of thousands of acres of Colorado public land from Camp Hale to Chimney Rock, Browns Canyon to Hermosa Creek.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250517_copubliclands_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250517_copubliclands_act]
Susan and Michael on the top of Mount Flora
To celebrate this special day, Michael and Senator John Hickenlooper reintroduced two bills this week to protect over 68,000 acres of public land in southwestern Colorado and 730,00 acres in the Gunnison Basin and the surrounding region. Michael is doing everything he can to pass these bills —and the CORE Act—in the Senate.
But right now, our public lands are under attack. The Trump administration has made clear that it hopes to sell off our public lands to the highest corporate bidder to pay for their tax cuts for the wealthy.
But Michael won’t stand by while that happens —he’s going to fight back, and he’s going to need your help to do so effectively. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250517_copubliclands_act]
Michael knows better than anyone how to put up a fight and get big things done—and he has the track record to prove it.
As our next Governor, Michael will stand up to President Trump as he tries to strip our public lands of their protections and work with communities across Colorado to make our state the gold standard for new ideas and bold investments to support our parks, public lands, and outdoor economy.
Michael is ready to bring his experience fighting back against Trump—and winning—to the Governor’s office. If you’re ready to join us in this fight, donate a few bucks today. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250517_copubliclands_act]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=X_250517_copubliclands_act]

DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=X_250517_copubliclands_act]
MORE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?express_lane_other=true&refcode=X_250517_copubliclands_act]
Thank you,
Team Bennet
https://www.facebook.com/michaelbennet [https://www.facebook.com/michaelbennet] https://x.com/MichaelBennet [https://x.com/MichaelBennet] https://www.instagram.com/michaelbennet [https://www.instagram.com/michaelbennet]

name: THANK YOU SEN. OSSOFF! (via VPP)
subject: You & Sen. Ossoff vs. Elon Musk!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
This is HUGE >>
| **FIRST:** Trump gave Elon Musk UNBRIDLED access to YOUR private Social Security data.

**THEN:** Senator Ossoff fought BACK — and Republicans are FURIOUS: [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90193?t=6&akid=19881%2E878179%2EiYP1Fr) **NOW:** Trump and Musk are going after Senator Ossoff, so we need to URGENTLY round up public support for him!

[**We’re sending Senator Ossoff a letter to stand with him in the face of escalating MAGA attacks, and we need 10,000 Democrats to sign before we can hit send. Please: Will you add your name to our time-sensitive letter in support of Senator Jon Ossoff? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90193?t=7&akid=19881%2E878179%2EiYP1Fr) | [**10,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED TODAY: Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90193?t=8&akid=19881%2E878179%2EiYP1Fr)
---
TO: Senator Jon Ossoff
FROM: A proud supporter
Subject: I stand with you. Senator Ossoff,

__Thank you for all your hard work leading the Anti-Elon Musk resistance!__

It’s easy to feel helpless with MAGA Republicans in charge of the House, Senate, and White House, but you keep us hopeful that we _can_ fight back.

From fighting for Social Security to introducing a bill to guarantee the right to vote for all Americans, we KNOW we have someone in the Senate that we can ALWAYS count on to protect our rights.

**I know it isn’t easy fighting off Trump, Musk, and the GOP’s escalating threats to take you down, so please know that Democrats across the country stand with you.**

Your leadership is absolutely critical right now, and we hope more Democrats follow your lead.

[**I can’t thank you enough for all of your work to stop Donald Trump and Elon Musk from destroying our Democracy! So I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my gratitude and to keep electing incredible Democrats who will save our democracy from MAGA extremists like Donald Trump. »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90193?t=9&akid=19881%2E878179%2EiYP1Fr) | [**RUSH $3 TO SIGN ON BEFORE WE CLOSE THIS LETTER AT MIDNIGHT »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90193?t=10&akid=19881%2E878179%2EiYP1Fr)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19881%2E878179%2EiYP1Fr). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19881%2E878179%2EiYP1Fr).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=19881%2E878179%2EiYP1Fr) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=19881%2E878179%2EiYP1Fr). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=19881%2E878179%2EiYP1Fr)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=19881%2E878179%2EiYP1Fr)

| Not interested? [Unsubscribe here](https://links.trump-emails.com/unsubscribe?e=842ef65ef8d85782fb1e56d6aceaa22a&utm_source=hdtsajfc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_05cb31deb1b676bfb56df5b8959&n=1).

[ ](https://links.trump-emails.com/r?u=J8zLkuUXGPM2FSV8vQ7AMtLxYAL_pQxZK3wN_CKhjKwVSEoc6WueVVX1ax4KDxcixngSjhYelQKRZq5aj5Z8s3q21JZZ9pxAv2rP0x7jhy_ROdXhHpXRRj3Cp91vj8CYVJpjAe6cnWn-P3N808Fa_ET_hxZmPXMbFKInP41O45Qdix18_tt6PCJXMHNUSJOonyo-XR7b1WS0bSYaPWkCWrT9OwBn9kkhhEj8TvBkmgBDG_wh672GN-g86G050B8zcFSPzLEIEcvsbVT-ramauLIt0mEseOo9sJHLu3c4CGfrPT4gMtZrDWfigNMLn6z_IkXmegOlVSrvK9RUyZ5c4GQE4RbxZ0TcRdnhpFERj6RgGvyGwT57C0Lfq7awFWU2CEEWn5l88s6wPOmf-thyqQv55B_JQOdQBEaAJvYlhTjZzc7azwrO8abtVYfeRJ5rLFBSVUoKNfV0HQpbuO4iK7N1QuqKM4Lcs7Hx0yRdQPZ-dECKFoaGnuHpanvgn62MpTVhjp3XBYcqEyi2PtstoQ&e=842ef65ef8d85782fb1e56d6aceaa22a&utm_source=hdtsajfc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_05cb31deb1b676bfb56df5b8959&n=2) Dear Peter, As we celebrate our nation's founding principles, we're reminded that the fight for freedom and limited government is far from over. **[President Trump's bold action to drain the swamp and make our government more efficient](https://links.trump-emails.com/r?u=J8zLkuUXGPM2FSV8vQ7AMtLxYAL_pQxZK3wN_CKhjKwVSEoc6WueVVX1ax4KDxcixngSjhYelQKRZq5aj5Z8s3q21JZZ9pxAv2rP0x7jhy_ROdXhHpXRRj3Cp91vj8CYVJpjAe6cnWn-P3N808Fa_ET_hxZmPXMbFKInP41O45Qdix18_tt6PCJXMHNUSJOonyo-XR7b1WS0bSYaPWkCWrT9OwBn9kkhhEj8TvBkmgBDG_wh672GN-g86G050B8zcFSPzLEIEcvsbVT-ramauLIt0mEseOo9sJHLu3c4CGfrPT4gMtZrDWfigNMLn6z_IkXmegOlVSrvK9RUyZ5c4GQE4RbxZ0TcRdnhpFERj6RgGvyGwT57C0Lfq7awFWU2CEEWn5l88s6wPOmf-thyqQv55B_JQOdQBEaAJvYlhTjZzc7azwrO8abtVYfeRJ5rLFBSVUoKNfV0HQpbuO4iK7N1QuqKM4Lcs7Hx0yRdQPZ-dECKFoaGnuHpanvgn62M9Qh-3Rwk6cMYXVWHzpQ3TA&e=842ef65ef8d85782fb1e56d6aceaa22a&utm_source=hdtsajfc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_05cb31deb1b676bfb56df5b8959&n=3)** is a beacon of hope in these uncertain times. By ordering his Cabinet secretaries to work with the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE), he's showing that he's committed to [cutting waste and making our government work for the American people, not the bureaucrats](https://links.trump-emails.com/r?u=J8zLkuUXGPM2FSV8vQ7AMtLxYAL_pQxZK3wN_CKhjKwVSEoc6WueVVX1ax4KDxcixngSjhYelQKRZq5aj5Z8s3q21JZZ9pxAv2rP0x7jhy_ROdXhHpXRRj3Cp91vj8CYVJpjAe6cnWn-P3N808Fa_ET_hxZmPXMbFKInP41O45Qdix18_tt6PCJXMHNUSJOonyo-XR7b1WS0bSYaPWkCWrT9OwBn9kkhhEj8TvBkmgBDG_wh672GN-g86G050B8zcFSPzLEIEcvsbVT-ramauLIt0mEseOo9sJHLu3c4CGfrPT4gMtZrDWfigNMLn6z_IkXmegOlVSrvK9RUyZ5c4GQE4RbxZ0TcRdnhpFERj6RgGvyGwT57C0Lfq7awFWU2CEEWn5l88s6wPOmf-thyqQv55B_JQOdQBEaAJvYlhTjZzc7azwrO8abtVYfeRJ5rLFBSVUoKNfV0HQpbuO4iK7N1QuqKM4Lcs7Hx0yRdQPZ-dECKFoaGnuHpanvgn62MpTVhjp3XBYcqEyi2PtstoQ&e=842ef65ef8d85782fb1e56d6aceaa22a&utm_source=hdtsajfc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_05cb31deb1b676bfb56df5b8959&n=4). But we can't let our guard down. Peter — Are you ready to make history? Together, we can by flipping North Carolina blue — electing Wiley to the U.S. Senate and securing a Democratic majority. **Winning** means _loosening the grip of extremism and billionaires undermining our government_ to protect our rights. It means safeguarding Social Security and Medicare and _ensuring these essential programs remain strong for millions_ who rely on them. And it means _fighting for economic policies that uplift workers, public education, and working families_ across North Carolina. **This is our moment, Peter — and we can’t let this chance slip away with inaction. clean_body: | = Peter — Are you ready to make history? Together, we can by flipping North Carolina blue — electing Wiley to the U.S. Senate and securing a Democratic majority. Winning means loosening the grip of extremism and billionaires undermining our government to protect our rights. It means safeguarding Social Security and Medicare and ensuring these essential programs remain strong for millions who rely on them. And it means fighting for economic policies that uplift workers, public education, and working families across North Carolina. This is our moment, Peter — and we can’t let this chance slip away with inaction. Every day is another opportunity to move the needle in our favor.= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue, your donation to Wiley Nickel will process immediately: | | = = = = = = Thanks for chipping in to make history, flip the Senate, and create a future we deserve. — Team Wiley Wiley Nickel for North Carolina PO Box 563 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States | mailto:info@wileynickel.com | Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina

clean_body: The emergency card is closing soon. | | | | | | Peter, Let's remind the world that courage still counts. | In moments of bold leadership and courage, we must not stay silent--we must show our gratitude. That's why I'm reaching out one last time. Our emergency card is about to close, and you still haven't signed your name, Peter! Elon has stood strong for free speech, innovation, and against the radical waste in Washington --and now, it 's our turn to stand up and say thank you. "This is your final opportunity to join us, Peter!" | | | | | President Trump made history with his return to the White House & it's time for our country to rally behind the values that make us Great- AMERICA IS BACK! You can flaunt your support for a stronger America by contributing a one-time gift of $10 to claim your free bumper sticker. | | "CLAIM YOUR STICKER" "These stickers are an extremely limited one-time print, so be sure to secure yours while they remain in stock."** | PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR AMERICA Tim Scott for America 7620 Rivers Ave, Ste. 370 #312 North Charleston, South Carolina 294067 | To ensure that you don't miss out on important messages, please add "info@email.votetimscott.com" to your address book. Not Sure How? Follow the link below to your email provider to get step by step instructions on how to add us to your address book. , , , , |

name: Byron Donalds
subject: Democrats defend the indefensible
body:
I just went on Primetime to expose the TRUTH.
| | | | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=4d990e1701a24ea1abd7dac74eed89a0&_e=R8yCtT3L_ca2_5PkOnvHhKNRgXDn83t-8gVeNfHRbPjFCzd_DgwFppvVv4y_li2Be1Lbhoanmo7QqA75Ss1YqDOYG2aXf9pUSrcAFCD_JqDA0bEE687W5tPbtxAVUGZPO0JkLLzzvY3p-_Me1n7O2QFxslU2MIOyiE_-mToPGdp9N07kol9ty8dvxUhR_V8XtTgh394R9tF0oepvxa_VKnCBeX1-fAAW0P1lQvctHe7q7M3hbzeSV5dwNVFWP01z7tfVwku9LbWff_X_W3n4yLXhBr-aRpQY9Oysqzv9LWJvpYPAtX-pppWjaR5hM8UoMMF2sbMFdiXaQ-nHuRDbhKtWUliCwWuH9gDmMNFU6KKpPBxPcyMXNJ3M2Gp1WT-RlQ_noNDJ9fEkMzMitqbidg%3D%3D)
---
|
---
_**Democrats defend the indefensible.**_
Whether they are imposing men in women’s bathrooms, raising taxes on working families, or defending criminal illegals over American citizens, the Democrats have lost their minds.
That’s why I went on Primetime TV to expose their _RADICAL_ and _DESPERATE_ agenda.
Fellow American, this is MAGA Patriot _Byron Donalds_.
I fight for President Trump’s agenda every day on the House floor, and today I’m fighting to be the Governor of Florida, where I’ll be _**[President Trump’s strongest ally](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=4d990e1701a24ea1abd7dac74eed89a0&_e=R8yCtT3L_ca2_5PkOnvHhKNRgXDn83t-8gVeNfHRbPjFCzd_DgwFppvVv4y_li2Be1Lbhoanmo7QqA75Ss1YqDOYG2aXf9pUSrcAFCD_JqDA0bEE687W5tPbtxAVUGZPO0JkLLzzvY3p-_Me1n7O2QFxslU2MIOyiE_-mToPGdp9N07kol9ty8dvxUhR_V8XtTgh394R9tF0oepvxa_VKnCBeX1-fAAW0P1lQvctHe7q7M3hbzeSV5dwNVFWP01z-3LIa3Rw-ZNGRX1KzecFwxTi03FCew_fQ0bkuYib1MI-_snoQ5nX3nJq6EWNwdS2BRXaNpEIg2EMIJ3unMNJe7OqFGOCVGbmmU5jk3MHwa8WEPkuO_7Ed16ZmfO6M7p3HdH7P_tUZ9sNiNBaTag2jg%3D%3D)**_ in the country.
The Radical Left doesn’t want that to happen. So they're raising **millions** to bring their agenda to Florida.
But with MAGA Patriots like you on my side, the Democrats will never win.
I’ve _**[NEVER backed down](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=4d990e1701a24ea1abd7dac74eed89a0&_e=R8yCtT3L_ca2_5PkOnvHhKNRgXDn83t-8gVeNfHRbPjFCzd_DgwFppvVv4y_li2Be1Lbhoanmo7QqA75Ss1YqDOYG2aXf9pUSrcAFCD_JqDA0bEE687W5tPbtxAVUGZPO0JkLLzzvY3p-_Me1n7O2QFxslU2MIOyiE_-mToPGdp9N07kol9ty8dvxUhR_V8XtTgh394R9tF0oepvxa_VKnCBeX1-fAAW0P1lQvctHe7q7M3hbzeSV5dwNVFWP01zJh766w5tkmtCNJBCXaU3ZWmUjieSMJmf53Ua20vSaRp78A151PTWMVCQLK4vebWALucQbpxctf47p05rG8kjOP75pqxtHrDOYpNihhiVQxRjgZ9WVRoBL2xUrB-NWGWqhITNlfDLCT3wuFfUXHjpxw%3D%3D)**_ from a fight, and I won’t start now. The future of our state and our country is ON THE LINE.

|
---
[SUPPORT MY RACE](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=4d990e1701a24ea1abd7dac74eed89a0&_e=R8yCtT3L_ca2_5PkOnvHhKNRgXDn83t-8gVeNfHRbPjFCzd_DgwFppvVv4y_li2Be1Lbhoanmo7QqA75Ss1YqDOYG2aXf9pUSrcAFCD_JqDA0bEE687W5tPbtxAVUGZPO0JkLLzzvY3p-_Me1n7O2QFxslU2MIOyiE_-mToPGdp9N07kol9ty8dvxUhR_V8XtTgh394R9tF0oepvxa_VKnCBeX1-fAAW0P1lQvctHe7q7M3hbzeSV5dwNVFWP01zsDFKSG7gyCccvj6gOFuZMhHDcXXxKVbodhbVh-VpYxGwCo3-ky7EKDW19qlAKIZrSKxpzBCTC8ILwl9fvdNqwiO4XESkgo4WkxJoMYh9w88KwsLw0XWp2HBjWU7iqzqk0TQ23HgaZgfGqgGHr7BMSw%3D%3D)
|

**My race is the tip of the spear in the fight to HOLD THE LINE in 2026. So can I humbly ask for your support?**

|

[SUPPORT MY RACE](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=4d990e1701a24ea1abd7dac74eed89a0&_e=R8yCtT3L_ca2_5PkOnvHhKNRgXDn83t-8gVeNfHRbPjFCzd_DgwFppvVv4y_li2Be1Lbhoanmo7QqA75Ss1YqDOYG2aXf9pUSrcAFCD_JqDA0bEE687W5tPbtxAVUGZPO0JkLLzzvY3p-_Me1n7O2QFxslU2MIOyiE_-mToPGdp9N07kol9ty8dvxUhR_V8XtTgh394R9tF0oepvxa_VKnCBeX1-fAAW0P1lQvctHe7q7M3hbzeSV5dwNVFWP01zYnZji408ro9RrJlWt-05MbEFngL6TTYslDspqz9g5o0L3u5nyeQphnY9u59U0FAul64MKfvZM2VYH5pFBzsC-eLPxGK4e90KvNL7-XKxloLNE9onDZdH2pVG6EM-1lf22RosrDpz4qSc2tjD8lJ6fg%3D%3D)

_I love each and every one of you for supporting the MAGA Movement._
You’re the reason I **wake up** each and every morning.
We can’t let the Democrats outraise us. We must act now to fight back.
So, will you step up now and support my race and keep the Dems’ radical agenda _**[OUT of Florida?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=4d990e1701a24ea1abd7dac74eed89a0&_e=R8yCtT3L_ca2_5PkOnvHhKNRgXDn83t-8gVeNfHRbPjFCzd_DgwFppvVv4y_li2Be1Lbhoanmo7QqA75Ss1YqDOYG2aXf9pUSrcAFCD_JqDA0bEE687W5tPbtxAVUGZPO0JkLLzzvY3p-_Me1n7O2QFxslU2MIOyiE_-mToPGdp9N07kol9ty8dvxUhR_V8XtTgh394R9tF0oepvxa_VKnCBeX1-fAAW0P1lQvctHe7q7M3hbzeSV5dwNVFWP01zA3FIA1bcWM6VaDUJU5WJpbBZHYeYak1TL9QYaApw5UPfFjiwH9WQ0-CvgSANSFgv60_fSooGk8-lLFKfEGq4UYi9K36WL8cln25Fi5RYXtfRCsUYdCJVDiGKSHz0-ojCH0J2vv8uSh_Q6azvLa9ZRA%3D%3D)**_

Each month, my team and I do our best to hit online fundraising goals so that we can run the strongest campaign possible and keep delivering real results for the working families of Pennsylvania.
This is important now more than ever, as our state has attracted the attention of national Republicans in a big way for continuing to stand up to Trump’s aggressive and radical agenda. **It makes us a target, Peter, but that only means we have to work a little harder to keep fighting back. **
Here’s what I can promise you: I will not give up on Pennsylvania. I won’t stop fighting for a better future for us. I’m here for YOU, not to listen to Donald Trump. So no matter what he’s choosing to do at the federal level, I will stay laser-focused on holding him accountable, mitigating the damage, and getting results that protect us.
**[If you want to help my team and I, chipping in now, ahead of our mid-month deadline, would be a huge help.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107881843/546131474/15868926?amount=10&source=SBD_AD_EM_FR_051625_PROMISEFWD_90DO30MO_D1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzRmNmZiZS0zYTMzLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t8p8sNmDfyOqbaT3oJhFK3dgrgYBv_5-n7cIoDUy2D0=) **

We need all the help we can get to keep a real fighter for Pennsylvanians in the Lieutenant Governor's office. = = | | = Here’s Austin’s email! ⬇️ \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Austin Davis Date: May 15, 2025 Subject: What I can promise you To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Peter, it’s Austin Davis. My team and I are up against our mid-month fundraising deadline. = | = Each month, my team and I do our best to hit online fundraising goals so that we can run the strongest campaign possible and keep delivering real results for the working families of Pennsylvania. This is important now more than ever, as our state has attracted the attention of national Republicans in a big way for continuing to stand up to Trump’s aggressive and radical agenda. It makes us a target, Peter, but that only means we have to work a little harder to keep fighting back. Here’s what I can promise you: I will not give up on Pennsylvania. I won’t stop fighting for a better future for us. I’m here for YOU, not to listen to Donald Trump. So no matter what he’s choosing to do at the federal level, I will stay laser-focused on holding him accountable, mitigating the damage, and getting results that protect us. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for standing with me, Austin Davis * | | | ---|---|--- | get involved to support austin davis for PA Lieutenant Governor While serving as Lieutenant Governor, Austin Davis helped advance some of the most progressive changes the Commonwealth has seen in decades. My situation is in your hands, Fellow American. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. _Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so _please_ read this message to the end._ My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. **But right now I have a few _SERIOUS_ challenges:**
---
**I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session.** But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising _**BIG TIME**_ while I was working hard in our capital. **Seriously** _**, a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response!**_
---
Now Spanberger has an _ENORMOUS_ fundraising advantage, Fellow American. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage._If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission _will_ be cut short. _ **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; _please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!_**

I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. _**[That's why I'm reaching out to you asking for a helping hand to propel me to a win in my race for Governor.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c78db047cc6449d08d2c5cc54483b340&_e=PRxT2kM-QijYt81p9mkMOoKRNMl15gZlSmYD0kku1hOFEcly9Wde8DA5prtuJvar366XfJ4nc9JmXmodDDtPc-tMw7-W1TkKsnJHC9FropOBEP1bSl_5WjuSZ8GBavdR-b-M9KQE6u3TMfdRxUZDP_JiVzOOUAyV0IGQutRkgsxQR04m8_jvtuvSjkzknq_zfK30ZbUemp_GSQLCtoMAD8kAGe8pmw_Eqp-AL6-ZWgpWWmHOs0fenZQRwOnRvUekA7-Wl1PJsa65y8X3Sdd7QdmFzw8oFwuVQjdJSiEiD2hToe3xKL7vdKrsU9bt7I0O2-mOjrgFSZnSJLm8J93XctJG-adcSkbbnzVqIcNF2PGjsd8QeuQbvdZuZdIlr7MGvMDwfc7DcNRHwzUyjKra4A%3D%3D)**_ This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this.

clean_body: Without your support, we will fall even further behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism!| | | My situation is in your hands, Fellow American. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so please read this message to the end. My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. But right now I have a few SERIOUS challenges: I was legally barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session. But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising BIG TIME while I was working hard in our capital. Seriously , a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response! Now Spanberger has an ENORMOUS fundraising advantage, Fellow American. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage.If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission will be cut short. Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign! | | Without your support, we will fall even further behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism!I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think it was worth it. And Fellow American, I know we will win if we hold strong and fight this battle together. I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving! Ever Forward,Lt. Governor Winsome Earle-Sears Immigrant Marine First black female Lt. Governor of VA | Immigrant. Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. name: Former Navy SEAL Adam Schwarze
subject: I’m running against Tim Walz …
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
You may or may not remember how close the 2008 Minnesota Senate race was, but here are a few reasons why you should know. | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=47ef3e44a7a441bab2b8a263cc4bc33a&_e=ioVshIRgmUEQ8L0yZVvXCVNu1MLIvv6IvVnMvZQQKGR17bDYQm2hkMyMUgJfBmmhOKdqE7Z-oz6Ps_dwZIgV4yVh0oCp7d8iuOguPbKLu1CDEBSWFPo8LXFVxC_XM0hC1gCo0di7mqn-5JGqfVIbUprWdbl1wChaWyiVXYUmQ3IFGmFcV0DBTYeXBG5FFGQhGYQ6tnfTNpKC_DVmIDj2RmyJEhSWzTPBJGRwNErlPoy9HhojV4Jm4UNCbB_LmwC1TZ4av1jYFa8TvLtD0oK_5cThoILd56pdYplLVi07uAwjfo7e2euL9XTr6wUWu8RPJnSRLbukgwGGTT9rwCmtPPH3kLxWTjyg_Fs1qFZ2S7jwvjnccGj2KqJ-6Ww4BtWfbxp6GguTQte5cb0V9E0VQvk-5GzIG_4yPWodWZXdJznZD07yLBRcM7g9I0Eniogt)

---

Peter,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and _**I’m a former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps vet, avid hockey player, and lifelong Minnesotan.**_ I know it’s early in the 2026 election cycle and you may not be paying attention to races in their infancy, like mine, still, I’m reaching out to you today to tell you a little about myself, who I am, and to make my case to earn your support in the upcoming battle I’m currently running headfirst into.

I’m running for the U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, who, if you can believe it, **is politically more radical than the former VP nominee**.
**_
_**_People like the lieutenant governor were leading the violent unrest in Minneapolis in the summer of 2020._**_While the governor, whom the nation embarrassingly became acquainted with, eventually called for law and order in the street; his lieutenant governor was preparing a lawsuit against the Minneapolis Police Department for discrimination._**

The Minnesota I grew up in was far away from the world these two government officials call home.

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=47ef3e44a7a441bab2b8a263cc4bc33a&_e=ioVshIRgmUEQ8L0yZVvXCVNu1MLIvv6IvVnMvZQQKGR17bDYQm2hkMyMUgJfBmmhOKdqE7Z-oz6Ps_dwZIgV4yVh0oCp7d8iuOguPbKLu1CDEBSWFPo8LXFVxC_XM0hC1gCo0di7mqn-5JGqfVIbUprWdbl1wChaWyiVXYUmQ3IFGmFcV0DBTYeXBG5FFGQhGYQ6tnfTNpKC_DVmIDj2RmyJEhSWzTPBJGRwNErlPoy9HhojV4Jm4UNCbB_LmwC1TZ4av1jYFa8TvLtD0oK_5cThoILd56pdYplLVi07uAxRj4axYgHHYUAYFzE-H5aE363SNwvjZfQqIsymaZUfkz4XGgIy9u4pN6VFlasVAM2cfewxApITnE789Jo65-uHjgUadRwLtoz-tuLDKc-ClnYZPa0PPclh_8UGL72zQO5lzrYBYfbkl2EBmXVwzHT0)

As the son of two working-class parents, I have nothing in common with either my opponent or her boss, former VP candidate and Minnesota Governor Tim Walz.

I grew up playing hockey and joined the military on my 18th birthday in October 2001, less than two months after the horrific attack on New York, Pennsylvania, and Washington, D.C. Unlike Governor Walz, I was proud to deploy to over 70 countries in service to our nation;**I didn’t retire before being shipped out to serve our nation in war. I’ve willingly put myself into harm’s way more times than I can count in order to protect the American people, our shared conservative values, and our democratic way of life.**

I never imagined that I would run for high office, but _**everytime I came home from deployment things in Minnesota and the country seemed to have gotten worse because of the radical left policies.**_ I’m doing this because of the state of our current leadership. Minnesota is currently being led by two radical Democrats who have done their best to push this state as far left as anyone could tolerate.

**Something had to be done. **

With Sen. Tina Smith’s recent retirement announcement, now is a time to leap into the unknown—something I’ve done and found very fulfilling. While Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican in a presidential election since 1976, we’re not a deep blue state.

This election isn’t going to be an easy one for a Republican to win, but throughout my life and career I have always defied the odds. _**And as a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I excel in harsh environments - on and off the battlefield.**_

**[You don’t know me, and you have no real reason to make a financial contribution to my Senate campaign other than that I’m humbly asking you to do so.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=47ef3e44a7a441bab2b8a263cc4bc33a&_e=ioVshIRgmUEQ8L0yZVvXCVNu1MLIvv6IvVnMvZQQKGR17bDYQm2hkMyMUgJfBmmhOKdqE7Z-oz6Ps_dwZIgV4yVh0oCp7d8iuOguPbKLu1CDEBSWFPo8LXFVxC_XM0hC1gCo0di7mqn-5JGqfVIbUprWdbl1wChaWyiVXYUmQ3IFGmFcV0DBTYeXBG5FFGQhGYQ6tnfTNpKC_DVmIDj2RmyJEhSWzTPBJGRwNErlPoy9HhojV4Jm4UNCbB_LmwC1TZ4av1jYFa8TvLtD0oK_5cThoILd56pdYplLVi07uAxmDjRIQ8Nve3NKPxLjf25KCo-oBFPTuYrRGX6-JGG2LIGzPjbk6RPd2Ve0SqPcThfMPuBu_dBUY8y22ZsfcSHgulrJeTM7ryyXQWoKrfxfscVrJMPV-ACv5t8aTdJRnxdZL6iYcV7qJUn774d2IRJT)**

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND WITH A GIFT OF $5 OR MORE**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=47ef3e44a7a441bab2b8a263cc4bc33a&_e=ioVshIRgmUEQ8L0yZVvXCVNu1MLIvv6IvVnMvZQQKGR17bDYQm2hkMyMUgJfBmmhOKdqE7Z-oz6Ps_dwZIgV4yVh0oCp7d8iuOguPbKLu1CDEBSWFPo8LXFVxC_XM0hC1gCo0di7mqn-5JGqfVIbUprWdbl1wChaWyiVXYUmQ3IFGmFcV0DBTYeXBG5FFGQhGYQ6tnfTNpKC_DVmIDj2RmyJEhSWzTPBJGRwNErlPoy9HhojV4Jm4UNCbB_LmwC1TZ4av1jYFa8TvLtD0oK_5cThoILd56pdYplLVi07uAwRCaSV97unbzQzDJLi1gmGcJXJ3Ib0uQ0oEWjlsvU6-QZFZkmuDMd9iA6OioVUBELpctnkvqBF34fc7rk4Sh9OWJOR-F-F54eyZQSNLepql2q_BtwwC5bWq64l9M1ed41Lo0468MLWbRQ0izqjT9W8)
_**I love our country, so on my 18th birthday in October 2001, I enlisted in the United States Marine Corps with a deep desire to serve my nation, make my parents proud, and defend freedoms.**_

Twenty-four years later, I’m still looking to serve Minnesotans in service to our nation - that's why I'm running for the United States Senate.

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=47ef3e44a7a441bab2b8a263cc4bc33a&_e=ioVshIRgmUEQ8L0yZVvXCVNu1MLIvv6IvVnMvZQQKGR17bDYQm2hkMyMUgJfBmmhOKdqE7Z-oz6Ps_dwZIgV4yVh0oCp7d8iuOguPbKLu1CDEBSWFPo8LXFVxC_XM0hC1gCo0di7mqn-5JGqfVIbUprWdbl1wChaWyiVXYUmQ3IFGmFcV0DBTYeXBG5FFGQhGYQ6tnfTNpKC_DVmIDj2RmyJEhSWzTPBJGRwNErlPoy9HhojV4Jm4UNCbB_LmwC1TZ4av1jYFa8TvLtD0oK_5cThoILd56pdYplLVi07uAxC_EfMou1kkuahRWEHE8WFs84N5nkGmc5dK2qz5bBJ-XZMDEbDqmWbVIGOW5tHyj0ptU0bh4xUnnAMVAmAR-09dRZTsPBGVQJTIyDbj3KkYl8SwNGfFhZx_YSxBqQUI606XgqvTcYRkKMmAYkXMYi3)

Since 2001, I’ve been deployed nine times to 70 countries to defend our shared conservative American values.

I obtained a Master's degree from Harvard and a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins University in Security and Nuclear Deterrence. I also received my MBA degree.

[**CHIP IN TO SEND A NAVY SEAL TO THE SENATE**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=47ef3e44a7a441bab2b8a263cc4bc33a&_e=ioVshIRgmUEQ8L0yZVvXCVNu1MLIvv6IvVnMvZQQKGR17bDYQm2hkMyMUgJfBmmhOKdqE7Z-oz6Ps_dwZIgV4yVh0oCp7d8iuOguPbKLu1CDEBSWFPo8LXFVxC_XM0hC1gCo0di7mqn-5JGqfVIbUprWdbl1wChaWyiVXYUmQ3IFGmFcV0DBTYeXBG5FFGQhGYQ6tnfTNpKC_DVmIDj2RmyJEhSWzTPBJGRwNErlPoy9HhojV4Jm4UNCbB_LmwC1TZ4av1jYFa8TvLtD0oK_5cThoILd56pdYplLVi07uAzkqRGBC_0EZ6HBP3SC1jI_PsY6_BxRsTJnwNMsltWIdmapsuPp_0msTg5oD6kJUeKCNjP6DfgVgxGNA72HLwBZL7GRMB6fYjiIV_NleAp_XKjJXE3iMcJY1GkG6QId98hYgqgDhPmtw0bkz9Puj4dX)
So when people tell me this will be one of the most challenging things I’ll ever endure, I smile and nod.

clean_body: You may or may not remember how close the 2008 Minnesota Senate race was, but here are a few reasons why you should know. | Peter, My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps vet, avid hockey player, and lifelong Minnesotan. I know it’s early in the 2026 election cycle and you may not be paying attention to races in their infancy, like mine, still, I’m reaching out to you today to tell you a little about myself, who I am, and to make my case to earn your support in the upcoming battle I’m currently running headfirst into. I’m running for the U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, who, if you can believe it, is politically more radical than the former VP nominee. People like the lieutenant governor were leading the violent unrest in Minneapolis in the summer of 2020.While the governor, whom the nation embarrassingly became acquainted with, eventually called for law and order in the street; his lieutenant governor was preparing a lawsuit against the Minneapolis Police Department for discrimination. The Minnesota I grew up in was far away from the world these two government officials call home. As the son of two working-class parents, I have nothing in common with either my opponent or her boss, former VP candidate and Minnesota Governor Tim Walz. I grew up playing hockey and joined the military on my 18th birthday in October 2001, less than two months after the horrific attack on New York, Pennsylvania, and Washington, D.C. Unlike Governor Walz, I was proud to deploy to over 70 countries in service to our nation;I didn’t retire before being shipped out to serve our nation in war. I’ve willingly put myself into harm’s way more times than I can count in order to protect the American people, our shared conservative values, and our democratic way of life. I never imagined that I would run for high office, but everytime I came home from deployment things in Minnesota and the country seemed to have gotten worse because of the radical left policies. I’m doing this because of the state of our current leadership. Minnesota is currently being led by two radical Democrats who have done their best to push this state as far left as anyone could tolerate. Something had to be done. With Sen. Tina Smith’s recent retirement announcement, now is a time to leap into the unknown—something I’ve done and found very fulfilling. While Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican in a presidential election since 1976, we’re not a deep blue state. This election isn’t going to be an easy one for a Republican to win, but throughout my life and career I have always defied the odds. And as a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I excel in harsh environments - on and off the battlefield. I love our country, so on my 18th birthday in October 2001, I enlisted in the United States Marine Corps with a deep desire to serve my nation, make my parents proud, and defend freedoms. Twenty-four years later, I’m still looking to serve Minnesotans in service to our nation - that's why I'm running for the United States Senate. Since 2001, I’ve been deployed nine times to 70 countries to defend our shared conservative American values. I obtained a Master's degree from Harvard and a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins University in Security and Nuclear Deterrence. I also received my MBA degree. So when people tell me this will be one of the most challenging things I’ll ever endure, I smile and nod. The simple truth is that I believe that my purpose in this life is to serve others, and I’m just a regular guy from Minnesota who was asked to do extraordinary things who wants to make my mom proud, serve my country, and do good by the people I meet. With gratitude, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense._

subject: Bruce Springsteen denounces “corrupt, incompetent, and treasonous” Trump administration, and Trump goes ballistic
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Bruce Springsteen denounces “corrupt, incompetent, and treasonous” Trump administration, and Trump goes ballistic](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb19de84c-31dd-4244-9004-6222f2d4e1d9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4984ebaf-cf23-4860-8c67-fcd6d7d76a67/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Kudos to the Boss for [calling out Trump](https://default.salsalabs.org/T90b03d90-341a-445b-9978-48f497e893ed/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) forcefully and unambiguously this week. In front of a huge crowd in Manchester, England, Springsteen let the world know that real Americans are united in their opposition to Trump: _" In my home, the America I love, the America I've written about, and has been a beacon of hope and liberty for 250 years, is currently in the hands of a corrupt, incompetent, and treasonous administration. Tonight, we ask all who believe in democracy and the best of our American experience to rise with us, raise your voices against the authoritarianism, and let freedom ring." ([source](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tabf0c343-e9ff-46b7-8cf3-09e0e219d9b1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9))_ It makes a difference when artists as popular and respected as Springsteen speak out, because millions pay attention. And make no mistake, Springsteen is putting himself in the crosshairs of the MAGA lunatics, and he will catch all kinds of hell for this from them [UPDATE: Trump has responded, [going ballistic](https://default.salsalabs.org/T02141d0c-a262-4e63-bc37-c3b214ca2d28/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)]. Which is why we need to stand with Springsteen, and let him know that real Americans support him and thank him. [**Add your name: Thank Bruce Springsteen for calling out the "corrupt, incompetent, and treasonous" Trump administration.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T41465103-db77-45ae-b12a-b8b033272be8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2ab1ada9-a967-48c5-aba8-730f9d1d0817/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action

|
---

name: Patriot Alerts - Team Downing
subject: China is taking over the USA one farm at a time.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
It’s time to draw a line in the sand. Please read:

Peter,
Whether you want to admit it or not, the Chinese Communist Party is quietly taking over America one farm at a time.
China already owns land in **27 states** , including properties alarmingly close to U.S. military bases. **
* **Our ****farmers are being undercut.**
* **Our food supply is at risk.**
* **The CCP is expanding its footprint on American soil.**

** We’re not just facing a serious economic threat. This is a full-blown national security crisis.
**It’s time to draw the line.**
President Trump’s Cabinet, including Treasury Secretary Bessent, is working overtime to rein in the abuse China has inflicted on the United States for far too long. But that’s not enough.
We need grassroots support to stop this takeover. That means citizens like YOU stepping up and demanding real action to thwart China’s takeover efforts.
[Peter, we’re begging you to add your name RIGHT NOW and support a federal ban on China buying U.S. farmland:](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-LujhCOSjw) [](https://trk.emails.troydowning.) [ BAN CHINA FROM BUYING OUR LAND
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-QCYQhiV0konyWg) [ SIGN THE PETITION TODAY
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.) Remember, Peter: **No Farms = No Food. No Action = No Freedom.**
America’s future depends on our actions today.
Thank you for your patriotic support,
Patriot Alerts (via Team Downing) | | |

| | Dear Peter,
---
| | Yes, after worshiping in the Rotunda of the U.S. Capitol (with permission), we were suddenly told we had to leave. But that’s not where the story ends!

The Speaker of the House heard about our dilemma and offered his personal balcony for us to finish worshiping. The sounds of praise shook the Rotunda and then echoed out across Washington, D.C.

What the enemy meant for evil, the Lord used for GOOD—and our praise reached MUCH farther than it would have if we were only indoors. GOD’S PLANS ARE GOOD!!!
---

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: fighting back against Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Here are some ways I’m fighting back against Trump in Congress. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWvRRcoNKl-AfgAsauRnIJhNFJqPPu5nIYnYPogA8TRR5DBnmdgACuO7h-rgqqccx4ez9SCsp6fijsJnyTsjbCNhTJ_nvJFg7lup_VJan5qLkAcylGQy2KoFnmjoEj_HzuL9MRGw1c6bdzJ5LqpM0IBA/4gk/6S6dM53nQUSDV4fFAyfQYg/h0/h001.vNwXTfim40MFxyCK3Tq4NgyJH5t-IIsLXplb8-W7zhA)
---
Friend, Our resistance has power. After we pushed in Congress, on the streets, and in the courts, more than 1,000 student visas have been reinstated and some detained students have been released—including Rumeysa Ozturk, Dr. Badar Khan Suri, and Mohsen Mahdawi. I will keep pushing to free them all and to defend our constitutional rights to free speech and due process. Upon his release, Mohsen told Trump, “I’m not afraid of you.” These victories for our movements and our rights show that our pressure is working and we cannot back down. **Every week, I have been resisting and exposing the truth about how Trump is abusing his power. Using the power of the letterhead, introducing and cosponsoring bills, joining amicus briefs, and using all the tools available to us to fight back against Trump’s illegal abuses of power.** During Trump’s first term, I led the movement to impeach him—twice. I will continue to be one of the loudest voices in Congress resisting Trump’s agenda. Please read on to learn more about how I’m resisting. [**Will you chip in to my campaign to grow our resistance movement? Together, we’ll keep fighting back against Trump and Musk’s agenda, and fighting for the government that we deserve.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquxewXXSWu898dZ-6Pr1Y9JYWgL1T88OpWGaXefUwoVKNlAm4GWvYQYej35g3f5YsEx_38onEt9Mxw2F44f5im3TrvMcDGmz_GzGI84Be5jyZ9_xshv56KC6IIsHYJ0Z7wz-gLxPnS3yStlhOsCHx2ck63UAe7qh7BoZoxeVst3VnjtCjO-0lu4vV4cXJ3KJpxsTCUvO7D9NZ7OrH7G0Ju99G3q7hLPGnY4k7AcsChokKz3QDjFEawcELHiLLBy_hYsLsj09lI2OOQEFNr9dUiCzBKuQUwAaRUqKS-g5-Ih-Q/4gk/6S6dM53nQUSDV4fFAyfQYg/h1/h001.ZXMm6abJx6fCU_RlliTK98SJfb4iayPBV9JAhSo-QO4) | [CHIP IN TO FUEL THE RESISTANCE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquxewXXSWu898dZ-6Pr1Y9JKOf-yUMhtXFyGWlk2jKH91CqrxYX2dpsZMXkD2UI007KbZKuiUZwKHehlccES4h2oCRc2QbO4Y_Qmf6PX2PjH6t7eFdr1dOoJO1uAAR-s4-zOnA2uDf4eEbmc_cMmWyx3l0d8UAvImOomBNfrDnRfqDWhdqSc8HJEixtZ6aZ7JnHsQESj57yHJLgxFbOF_mv1OkyjrJd9Jlw9vEzsPk56SncNndDaLIfmep8sXu19yfPJWydfMW_LTSA5PZRmUszvz7sZBLS86I6EejCZi-ReA/4gk/6S6dM53nQUSDV4fFAyfQYg/h2/h001.sLf9jQ-r1x_56p296-TYyM_JchpRpbUsuVlP7Tu71co)
---
Here are some ways I’m fighting back against Trump and Musk in Congress:
* **I led the Congressional Mamas’ Caucus and 23 of my colleagues in sending a letter to Trump demanding that his administration immediately restore all Head Start funding.** After sending our letter, we saw immediate improvements to help Head Start centers access their funding. But Trump continues to threaten this vital early education program, so I led another letter demanding answers from the Department of Health and Human Services about the proposed closure of some Head Start offices.

* **In the Financial Services Committee, I introduced an amendment to prevent any budget that cuts programs for working families and the poor to pay for billionaire tax breaks.**

* **In the House Oversight Committee,** **I motioned to subpoena Elon Musk to testify before Congress** and explain why a billionaire that nobody voted for is apparently in charge of our government.

* **I’m demanding Customs and Border Protection (CBP) stop separating families, secretly detaining people, and using CBP facilities for long-term detention.** I visited a local CBP detention facility where hundreds of people have been detained in the past few months, simply for making a wrong turn on the Ambassador Bridge from Detroit into Canada.

* **I’m pushing my colleagues** **to defend vital services like Medicaid and SNAP** , including Republican Congressman John James who represents a neighboring district. We only need a few Republicans to vote against cuts, so my team and I have called and sent postcards to James’ constituents to push him on this. He refuses to hold town halls, so I accepted his constituents’ invitation to join a community town hall where I helped answer questions from 300 residents.

* **I reintroduced legislation to expand civil rights protections for marginalized communities and to help unhoused young people with direct cash assistance.**

* After the Trump administration proposed gutting the office that upholds our fair housing laws,**I questioned the Acting Inspector General for the Department of Housing and Urban Development (HUD)** and called on him to move with urgency in investigating this administration.

* **I’m supporting legislation** to protect immigrants’ right to counsel, to revoke the _Alien Enemies Act_ which Trump wants to use to deport and detain U.S. citizens, to block cuts to Medicaid and food assistance, and more.

* **I’ve joined my colleagues in signing onto letters** demanding DHS stop the transfer of U.S. residents to the notorious CECOT prison camp in El Salvador, calling on FEMA to resume funding for the Emergency Food and Shelter Program, urging the DHS Inspector General to investigate systemic abuse and due process violations, defending consumer protections, condemning Trump’s corrupt market manipulation and insider trading, opposing the closure of Social Security Administration field offices and threats to Meals on Wheels, urging protections for national parks, opposing attacks on transgender Americans, and demanding the Department of Education continue programs that support English learners and also rescind its threat to defund schools with DEI programs.

* As a proud Arab American Congresswoman representing one of the largest Arab American communities in our country,**I reintroduced a resolution to recognize April as Arab American Heritage Month** and uplift the culture, history, and contributions of Arab Americans. Our stories matter, now more than ever: They cannot erase us.

* **I introduced Joint Resolutions of Disapproval to block billions in Trump’s planned weapons transfers to the Israeli military**. I also reintroduced historic legislation to recognize the ongoing Nakba against Palestinians.

* My team and I are **training progressives who want to run for office** and supporting young people who want to be involved in their communities. We’re also **holding Know Your Rights workshops** and trainings on union organizing.

We can’t give into cynicism. Our communities are hurting, but we are not backing down.

clean_body: Here are some ways I’m fighting back against Trump in Congress. | | | Friend, Our resistance has power. After we pushed in Congress, on the streets, and in the courts, more than 1,000 student visas have been reinstated and some detained students have been released—including Rumeysa Ozturk, Dr. Badar Khan Suri, and Mohsen Mahdawi. I will keep pushing to free them all and to defend our constitutional rights to free speech and due process. Upon his release, Mohsen told Trump, “I’m not afraid of you.” These victories for our movements and our rights show that our pressure is working and we cannot back down. Every week, I have been resisting and exposing the truth about how Trump is abusing his power. Using the power of the letterhead, introducing and cosponsoring bills, joining amicus briefs, and using all the tools available to us to fight back against Trump’s illegal abuses of power. During Trump’s first term, I led the movement to impeach him—twice. I will continue to be one of the loudest voices in Congress resisting Trump’s agenda. Please read on to learn more about how I’m resisting. | Here are some ways I’m fighting back against Trump and Musk in Congress: I led the Congressional Mamas’ Caucus and 23 of my colleagues in sending a letter to Trump demanding that his administration immediately restore all Head Start funding. After sending our letter, we saw immediate improvements to help Head Start centers access their funding. But Trump continues to threaten this vital early education program, so I led another letter demanding answers from the Department of Health and Human Services about the proposed closure of some Head Start offices. In the Financial Services Committee, I introduced an amendment to prevent any budget that cuts programs for working families and the poor to pay for billionaire tax breaks. In the House Oversight Committee, I motioned to subpoena Elon Musk to testify before Congress and explain why a billionaire that nobody voted for is apparently in charge of our government. I’m demanding Customs and Border Protection (CBP) stop separating families, secretly detaining people, and using CBP facilities for long-term detention. I visited a local CBP detention facility where hundreds of people have been detained in the past few months, simply for making a wrong turn on the Ambassador Bridge from Detroit into Canada. I’m pushing my colleagues to defend vital services like Medicaid and SNAP , including Republican Congressman John James who represents a neighboring district. We only need a few Republicans to vote against cuts, so my team and I have called and sent postcards to James’ constituents to push him on this. He refuses to hold town halls, so I accepted his constituents’ invitation to join a community town hall where I helped answer questions from 300 residents. I reintroduced legislation to expand civil rights protections for marginalized communities and to help unhoused young people with direct cash assistance. After the Trump administration proposed gutting the office that upholds our fair housing laws,I questioned the Acting Inspector General for the Department of Housing and Urban Development (HUD) and called on him to move with urgency in investigating this administration. I’m supporting legislation to protect immigrants’ right to counsel, to revoke the Alien Enemies Act which Trump wants to use to deport and detain U.S. citizens, to block cuts to Medicaid and food assistance, and more. I’ve joined my colleagues in signing onto letters demanding DHS stop the transfer of U.S. residents to the notorious CECOT prison camp in El Salvador, calling on FEMA to resume funding for the Emergency Food and Shelter Program, urging the DHS Inspector General to investigate systemic abuse and due process violations, defending consumer protections, condemning Trump’s corrupt market manipulation and insider trading, opposing the closure of Social Security Administration field offices and threats to Meals on Wheels, urging protections for national parks, opposing attacks on transgender Americans, and demanding the Department of Education continue programs that support English learners and also rescind its threat to defund schools with DEI programs. As a proud Arab American Congresswoman representing one of the largest Arab American communities in our country,I reintroduced a resolution to recognize April as Arab American Heritage Month and uplift the culture, history, and contributions of Arab Americans. Our stories matter, now more than ever: They cannot erase us. I introduced Joint Resolutions of Disapproval to block billions in Trump’s planned weapons transfers to the Israeli military. I also reintroduced historic legislation to recognize the ongoing Nakba against Palestinians. My team and I are training progressives who want to run for office and supporting young people who want to be involved in their communities. We’re also holding Know Your Rights workshops and trainings on union organizing. We can’t give into cynicism. Our communities are hurting, but we are not backing down. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you for standing alongside me as we resist together. The way to fight fascism is by continuing to advocate and speak truth to power. Let’s continue rising up against this fascist government. With you in this fight, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: Team Maxine
subject: Republicans’ all-out attack on Medicaid
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maxine for Congress
body:
https://maxinefororegon.com/ [https://maxinefororegon.com/]
Peter,
Republicans are launching an all-out attack on Medicaid, putting millions of lives at risk.
By this Memorial Day, they aim to:
* Cut healthcare for millions of Americans
* Pass a budget that rewards wealthy donors while working families pay the price
* Betray those who served, using a day of honor to gut care
They’ve made their priorities clear: big promises during election season, but cruel policies the moment they have power.
We have a little less than two weeks to stop this budget before it hits the floor.
Maxine is one of six Democrat doctors in the House, and she and the Democratic Doctors Caucus are leading the fight. They stood up to RFK Jr.’s dangerous snakeoil pseudoscience, and now they’re standing up for patients who trust them as well as the hospitals and staff who keep us healthy.
Life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness should include healthcare.
Let’s boot the grifters and get back on track. Chip in $6 to support Maxine and elect leaders who care about our families every day, not just on Election Day. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q2?refcode=X_250517_Midmonth_act&amount=6]

| | Since Donald Trump took office, nothing has been as clear as his intention to side with corporations over the American people at every possible opportunity. From the Republican bailout for billionaires and corporations, to their plans to slash billions from Medicaid, to going after the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB). It's clear the Republican agenda begins and ends with helping corporations turn a profit. The CFPB is the single most important watchdog protecting consumers from predatory companies and their shady sales tactics that nickel and dime hard-working American families. As part of their initial battery of executive actions, designed to throw a wrench in the federal government's work, they've installed Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent as Acting Director of the agency. Since taking office, he has done everything in his power to kneecap the agency and all power it has to go after corporations. Now that they've stopped the creation of new rules, the GOP majority in Congress is hard at work trying to undo rules created under the Biden administration to protect Americans from unnecessary fees and predatory practices. Just a few weeks ago, they passed legislation to do away with overdraft fee caps. This is basically a green light for banks to further rip off consumers and working families. These caps were created to prevent big banks from padding their profits with the hard-earned cash of Americans living paycheck to paycheck. By targeting the cap on exorbitant overdraft fees, Congressional Republicans are sending a clear message that there's no one they won't sell out to please Donald Trump and his billionaire allies.
We quite literally **cannot afford** for these rubber-stamp Republicans to keep control of Congress. Democrats have a real path to taking it back in 2026, but the efforts to re-energize and organize our movement need to start now. [**Soplease, donate $3 today. With your help, we can take our message across the country and break through the noise created by right-wing media narratives.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107883835/546138544/-2044921950?refcode=2025-05-17-cfpb&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=bf398860-4033-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjM5ODg2MC00MDMzLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BHhIzlzDAUG8d4rzo__lRQiP_ZwJOY32YONDknLJZII=) [Donate Today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107883840/546138547/-2044921950?refcode=2025-05-17-cfpb&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=bf398860-4033-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjM5ODg2MC00MDMzLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BHhIzlzDAUG8d4rzo__lRQiP_ZwJOY32YONDknLJZII=) Onward, _Ron_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Ron Wyden instantly:

name: John Fetterman
subject: the GOP wants the rich to get richer 🤮
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50678?t=1&akid=10098%2E434096%2E6B_ngW)
| | |
---
Hi, Derek – John here.
Did you know that the GOP's got Medicaid on the chopping block in their latest budget plan? All to fund tax cuts for the wealthiest dudes in America?
That’s right. Republicans want to gut a lifeline for millions of Americans so the rich can get richer. 🤮
There's a lot at stake, so before this comes up for a vote, I’m asking: [**Will you please take 60 seconds and share your thoughts in my budget survey now?**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51120?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk101-su-fl&t=2&akid=10098%2E434096%2E6B_ngW)
| | [TAKE THE SURVEY >>](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51120?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk101-su-fl&t=3&akid=10098%2E434096%2E6B_ngW)
---
Republicans are calling it “trimming the fat,” but let’s be real: This isn’t belt-tightening – it’s a full-on hack job. And they’re pretending it won’t hurt regular folks? Right, and I'm 5 feet tall.
We're talking about rural hospitals having to close their doors, seniors losing home care services or getting kicked out of nursing homes, and already long wait times in the ER getting even longer.

Experts say cuts to addiction funding will mean overdose deaths, and folks who need lifesaving mental health care won't get the support they need.
These so-called savings come straight out of folks’ health care. Plain and simple.
So I need folks on this team, you included, to fill out this survey so I know where yinz stand before the Senate votes. [**Click here and take the survey now.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51120?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk101-su-fl&t=4&akid=10098%2E434096%2E6B_ngW)
Thanks for your time,
John ❤️
| |

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-2025?refcode=jtk101-su-fl-footer&t=5&refcode2=10098_434096_6B_ngW&akid=10098%2E434096%2E6B_ngW)**
---

Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
