clean_body: | | | Hi, Derek – John here. Did you know that the GOP's got Medicaid on the chopping block in their latest budget plan? All to fund tax cuts for the wealthiest dudes in America? That’s right. Republicans want to gut a lifeline for millions of Americans so the rich can get richer. 🤮 There's a lot at stake, so before this comes up for a vote, I’m asking: | | Republicans are calling it “trimming the fat,” but let’s be real: This isn’t belt-tightening – it’s a full-on hack job. And they’re pretending it won’t hurt regular folks? Right, and I'm 5 feet tall. We're talking about rural hospitals having to close their doors, seniors losing home care services or getting kicked out of nursing homes, and already long wait times in the ER getting even longer. Experts say cuts to addiction funding will mean overdose deaths, and folks who need lifesaving mental health care won't get the support they need. These so-called savings come straight out of folks’ health care. Plain and simple. So I need folks on this team, you included, to fill out this survey so I know where yinz stand before the Senate votes. Thanks for your time, John ❤️ | | | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

name: Josh Harder
subject: This is exactly what Trump wants
body:
Chaos, fear, and uncertainty.

Hi Peter,
I'm checking in because we just hit the halfway point of the fundraising quarter, and I’m worried. Our fundraising numbers have slowed down and if we don’t pick up the pace now, I’m scared we’ll never be able to catch up.

GOP Rep. John James **[destroyed Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez](https://substack.com/redirect/53925da3-b265-4150-a7fe-02262f27a457?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during a heated congressional hearing for making false claims about the Trump administration's energy independence agenda.
**[He trashed the Green New Deal right to her face...](https://substack.com/redirect/53925da3-b265-4150-a7fe-02262f27a457?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/53925da3-b265-4150-a7fe-02262f27a457?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/53925da3-b265-4150-a7fe-02262f27a457?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
AOC started by criticizing the Trump administration, claiming that its actions are raising energy prices for Americans instead of lowering them. "What we're seeing is that the Trump administration is saying one thing and doing another!"
**["Apparently Democrat gaslighting produces zero emissions,"](https://substack.com/redirect/53925da3-b265-4150-a7fe-02262f27a457?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** James quipped at the congresswoman. "Folks in southeast Michigan have experienced their jobs being extinct, shipped to other states, shipped to other countries because Green New Deal woke policies do not work in the real world!"
James noted that the U.S. not being energy independent solidifies its reliance on "dictators and despots" in nations who are not our friends and who compromise our national security.

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: No silver spoon
body:
Fellow American, I grew up in a single room behind my parents’ family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina. I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. |
---
Fellow American,

I grew up in a single room behind my parents' family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina.

I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. I quickly took on the responsibility of helping raise my 13-year-old sister, Darline, and running the family businesses.

[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=f51ff782fa654c01bb0a1ca3e74d9ef4&_e=QTp5TwJbO4lH6IWU4oNOExzitHK8W_GqGQzuRKERijICHEG3OB-znFJhgae76EvjlJG45tNLMbUl4IbRkYqedIDudrTvNrRrWtsMNlEwNMd9no8fZ32DzkVCcWSwvl7QaVsqsclA6BX1qvEH1PTE1MUoQ5qQ3QgGm2Rey8SzYCUmvwzpTP8pw6YSVsCLedPxqBK7NhS3kF0S8BLaqIXNeE9wH0AmXOSx0xa84t4egDO7tx8poRkdy4dApVsc88_2uLBrSA8c2jKZ7fccDvXlqpstmaKYwrfgy03XqBdHTLV62Uw0dloghKCYNk0wdLwxsef2-K3mpBOjwJ8_74PhJ5B3WEXKis4fDjplzriNYjiFZcZb2i96jXaaTu6Km6ZI)
**I had to grow up fast, Fellow American,_and I learned many life lessons at an early age._**

After attending law school, I joined the U.S. Air Force as a member of the Judge Advocate General Corps, where I served as a military prosecutor and defense attorney.

Even after being elected to the United States Senate, I continued to wear the uniform and served in the U.S. Air Force Reserves, where I performed several short deployments in the war zones of Afghanistan and Iraq.

[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=f51ff782fa654c01bb0a1ca3e74d9ef4&_e=QTp5TwJbO4lH6IWU4oNOExzitHK8W_GqGQzuRKERijICHEG3OB-znFJhgae76EvjlJG45tNLMbUl4IbRkYqedIDudrTvNrRrWtsMNlEwNMd9no8fZ32DzkVCcWSwvl7QaVsqsclA6BX1qvEH1PTE1MUoQ5qQ3QgGm2Rey8SzYCUmvwzpTP8pw6YSVsCLedPxqBK7NhS3kF0S8BLaqIXNeE9wH0AmXOSx0xa84t4egDMcZvet3UBqibRoJXkDYLtLahTkzJJ1ysYC4DT2EvyAR3XCaanTCM_NhrDXEb-ctPPauNUDCXB2X9MwgZHxzdgekBVC7Z5aee1UmCXPFiz6gbKGsu9sOQxQSi-y49tJ3LPDqjuZAC1d9dUKW80hTxNK)
Fellow American, my story is similar to that of most Americans. I didn't grow up with a silver spoon in my mouth with everything handed to me. I had to grow up fast and work hard. I learned a lot of valuable lessons at a young age and took on a whole lot of responsibility.

But one thing stuck with me over the years -- the perspectives I gained from listening to the hard-working South Carolinians who were regulars at my family's pool hall or my brave colleagues in the military. Their perspectives, whether I agreed with them or not, helped build my foundation for understanding what Americans need.

**It's no secret that our nation is sharply divided right now, but there are some things we should all agree on.**

**We need a country that is a safe place to live and raise a family, and we need a country where the American Dream is alive and possible for everyone, no matter where they start from.**

Fellow American, I'm fighting every day to make those two things a reality. Sadly, there are people across the aisle in Washington who simply can't agree with us on these issues. They are okay with open borders and the flow of violent crime into our neighborhoods and onto our streets. They are okay with punishing hard-working Americans with higher taxes, deepening the burden on them and their families.

**[That's why I'm reaching out with a simple request: if you have a few dollars to spare, would you consider making a contribution to support my campaign by clicking this link or the button below?](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=f51ff782fa654c01bb0a1ca3e74d9ef4&_e=QTp5TwJbO4lH6IWU4oNOExzitHK8W_GqGQzuRKERijICHEG3OB-znFJhgae76EvjlJG45tNLMbUl4IbRkYqedIDudrTvNrRrWtsMNlEwNMd9no8fZ32DzkVCcWSwvl7QaVsqsclA6BX1qvEH1PTE1MUoQ5qQ3QgGm2Rey8SzYCUmvwzpTP8pw6YSVsCLedPxqBK7NhS3kF0S8BLaqIXNeE9wH0AmXOSx0xa84t4egDM2QsEHDmfqlXarWxG0COiI1_Jqkh_zeBhnKPzVpixppQ_SPLgUUzwlJPD22sEgmg6M9by8dBWKpfFOz2v6JYT2K0GBQPL-sfOrxEU0BKEf-5ZqfgcPpya-2tgNNqc0qkKh__dWq1EqxzQ5-ZYoS-ns)**

| [** CONTRIBUTE HERE **](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=f51ff782fa654c01bb0a1ca3e74d9ef4&_e=QTp5TwJbO4lH6IWU4oNOExzitHK8W_GqGQzuRKERijICHEG3OB-znFJhgae76EvjlJG45tNLMbUl4IbRkYqedIDudrTvNrRrWtsMNlEwNMd9no8fZ32DzkVCcWSwvl7QaVsqsclA6BX1qvEH1PTE1MUoQ5qQ3QgGm2Rey8SzYCUmvwzpTP8pw6YSVsCLedPxqBK7NhS3kF0S8BLaqIXNeE9wH0AmXOSx0xa84t4egDOi8QFmPeyxmhcEL-sla4GskQ5EQz-SmANt1fqlNxv4t4EhtHxeoJbDbU8pYzXeo_QH5hvt2CCc0NHsMW6mnOMgesq5hoXHU6sqW-J5InzX8QX756brNs2wU4xsiOw8QAD8VteqH74ueR7LvFhd0xDE)
---

If you're unable to contribute financially, I understand. I'd greatly appreciate it if you could forward this email along to a friend or family member to help amplify my message.

Together, I know we can build the country that protects our communities, rewards hard work, and ensures every hard-working American has a shot at their dreams, just like I was so fortunate to have.

Thank you for taking a moment out of your busy day to read this message.

Sincerely,
Lindsey Graham

[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=f51ff782fa654c01bb0a1ca3e74d9ef4&_e=QTp5TwJbO4lH6IWU4oNOE8kf6cNDVfbN2WaKEx19yLyWpgd63mmlV_wnBxbYb9bptmFs07Zdic6hI5OAUay8dPi3B1KDmJT9MZnCENcnb6SRcgIh4sRB-uzINJ1tcdJtb5z-JbLUXbD6g5byRpMgm2TeQaodtsnQvOzJ5AOuCtBW0bIITkFtklSWWr_bk4raG8YKZNqtrA30lidwx7e5SGF1k3G9TG5aJqVJPc-Wn1U%3D)

[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=f51ff782fa654c01bb0a1ca3e74d9ef4&_e=QTp5TwJbO4lH6IWU4oNOExzitHK8W_GqGQzuRKERijICHEG3OB-znFJhgae76EvjlJG45tNLMbUl4IbRkYqedIDudrTvNrRrWtsMNlEwNMd9no8fZ32DzkVCcWSwvl7QaVsqsclA6BX1qvEH1PTE1MUoQ5qQ3QgGm2Rey8SzYCUmvwzpTP8pw6YSVsCLedPxqBK7NhS3kF0S8BLaqIXNeE9wH0AmXOSx0xa84t4egDNQa3NFTNdOOC4GeRjeip84vr5AFtDqc751tff1MbmfBOp0Q7RSKwHbQhZHKZ6czC1LfD-KygRPSOXdA7K1GDB4pymE6X50wE2Z7TT-blRUaUA4A4HgJkZJ8Ht3rmKaT8_Z-BmQYvczGI7-pR3zQJK7)
In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges.

| [** SUPPORT SENATOR GRAHAM **](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=f51ff782fa654c01bb0a1ca3e74d9ef4&_e=QTp5TwJbO4lH6IWU4oNOExzitHK8W_GqGQzuRKERijICHEG3OB-znFJhgae76EvjlJG45tNLMbUl4IbRkYqedIDudrTvNrRrWtsMNlEwNMd9no8fZ32DzkVCcWSwvl7QaVsqsclA6BX1qvEH1PTE1MUoQ5qQ3QgGm2Rey8SzYCUmvwzpTP8pw6YSVsCLedPxqBK7NhS3kF0S8BLaqIXNeE9wH0AmXOSx0xa84t4egDM-gOercE4gCotrgCLVb6AfClmZl2ImGCEYrs_sERV8lRt1lFBG4V_FAgzbCs5j9YSEbbr8qb39Nw5nX-vs2MEmEqhVVlIe0SMUQNrV3FCHAwNSyMldNUXfZQjBJS3NUzfKcUTwOzP1nJFFB4HWj9CV)

clean_body: Fellow American, I grew up in a single room behind my parents’ family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina. I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. | Fellow American, I grew up in a single room behind my parents' family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina. I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. I quickly took on the responsibility of helping raise my 13-year-old sister, Darline, and running the family businesses. I had to grow up fast, Fellow American,and I learned many life lessons at an early age. After attending law school, I joined the U.S. Air Force as a member of the Judge Advocate General Corps, where I served as a military prosecutor and defense attorney. Even after being elected to the United States Senate, I continued to wear the uniform and served in the U.S. Air Force Reserves, where I performed several short deployments in the war zones of Afghanistan and Iraq. Fellow American, my story is similar to that of most Americans. I didn't grow up with a silver spoon in my mouth with everything handed to me. I had to grow up fast and work hard. I learned a lot of valuable lessons at a young age and took on a whole lot of responsibility. But one thing stuck with me over the years -- the perspectives I gained from listening to the hard-working South Carolinians who were regulars at my family's pool hall or my brave colleagues in the military. Their perspectives, whether I agreed with them or not, helped build my foundation for understanding what Americans need. It's no secret that our nation is sharply divided right now, but there are some things we should all agree on. We need a country that is a safe place to live and raise a family, and we need a country where the American Dream is alive and possible for everyone, no matter where they start from. Fellow American, I'm fighting every day to make those two things a reality. Sadly, there are people across the aisle in Washington who simply can't agree with us on these issues. They are okay with open borders and the flow of violent crime into our neighborhoods and onto our streets. They are okay with punishing hard-working Americans with higher taxes, deepening the burden on them and their families. | If you're unable to contribute financially, I understand. I'd greatly appreciate it if you could forward this email along to a friend or family member to help amplify my message. Together, I know we can build the country that protects our communities, rewards hard work, and ensures every hard-working American has a shot at their dreams, just like I was so fortunate to have. Thank you for taking a moment out of your busy day to read this message. Sincerely, Lindsey Graham In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges. | Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Air Force or the Department of Defense. We want to make sure you're a proud member of Team Graham, and we don't want to bother you. We need to push back against these early attacks. **It’s been a slower than expected fundraising month.** As the weather gets nicer, we are admittedly seeing a down month in grassroots fundraising so far. Our numbers need to tick up, and we’re hoping YOU can help us get back on track. One critical lesson I learned from Eric is that we need to build a war chest sooner – before the election year – rather than leave it to chance. Friend, this is not some mass email.

I asked my team to pull up a short list of the most loyal supporters -- the people who've never wavered, who have real courage -- and your name was at the top.

That's why I'm writing to you personally.

name: Deb Haaland
subject: My op-ed for Outside Magazine
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=2007%2E400544%2Ep2PnQA)
I recently wrote an op-ed for _Outside Magazine_ about the threat the Trump administration poses to our national parks, monuments, wildlife refuges, and all of the public lands that belong to all of us. It’s critical that we step up to defend them.
New Mexico needs leaders who can meet this moment. As governor, I’ll step up to conserve our lands and waters for future generations, secure clean air and water for our communities, and mitigate the risk that wildfires pose to families across our state.
I hope you’ll take a few moments to give my editorial a read and join us as we work to protect our public lands.
— Deb
* * *
Public Lands Are Under Attack.
State Leaders Should Protect Them.
_Deb Haaland_
April 28, 2025
From 2021 until 2024, while I was Secretary of the Interior, we worked to forge stability, create jobs in a clean energy economy, conserve more lands and waters for future generations, and secure clean air and water for communities in every corner of the country.
We treated everyone with dignity and respect—values that New Mexicans live by. Today, the work we accomplished, alongside conservationists, farmers, ranchers, Tribes, rural communities, and cities is under attack.
In a time of questions and uncertainty in Washington, governors around the country will be on the front lines of defense against this president’s reckless firing of federal workers, massive cuts to services that people rely on, and general chaos. The Trump administration is vigorously defending its actions in court, and if they’re allowed to stand, the harm will only grow.
When wildfires strike, there will now be fewer federal firefighters to put out the flames. Jobs and livelihoods in the outdoor recreation sector are at risk. Families who plan to visit Carlsbad Caverns in New Mexico, Yellowstone in Wyoming, and other national parks will encounter longer wait times and possibly limited hours.
When folks are looking to gather firewood on national forest lands, they could have a harder time contacting support staff. Veterans who seek solace on our public lands might not have the access they once did. Hunters may notice that their organizations are losing funding, and their hunting grounds slowly disappearing and being sold off to the highest bidder.
I’m running for Governor of New Mexico because leadership matters.
Governors will need to meet this moment with bold and steady leadership, and I will be a Governor who stands up for New Mexicans and the public lands that we love. While I was Secretary of the Interior, we made tremendous strides to address climate change, expand access to public lands, address drought, and manage resources responsibly. This was all done with clear direction and respect for the workforce tasked with implementing our goals. We tried new things and shot for the moon, and we did it all hand-in-hand with the people most impacted.
We created meaningful change because we were a serious agency led by, frankly, serious people. The Interior was one of the largest agencies in the federal government with nearly 70,000 dedicated employees—park rangers, firefighters, climate scientists, biologists, and more. These are the jobs in New Mexico that kids deserve to have when they’re grown.
As I travel around my home state listening to communities, I’m hearing time and again that people are afraid. I’ve met federal workers who were worried about their jobs, seniors anxious about Medicare, veterans concerned about VA services, and families worried about their kids’ schools. Trump and Elon Musk are striking fear into our communities while failing to deliver the things they promised.
Governors have the obligation to protect our communities. I know I will carry the weight of standing up in the face of these attacks, but it’s a weight I will happily carry because I believe in a future where we all share in New Mexico’s bounty and success. It’s a vision that has sometimes been out of reach, but I believe that with my experience, we can change the system to work for the people.
Similar to the way I changed the system at the Department of the Interior by bringing Tribal Nations and local communities in as active participants in stewarding our lands, I will make that a reality for traditional communities and Tribes in New Mexico. I will also collaborate with other governors who recognize the threats posed by this administration and with the state attorney general to pursue legal routes to fight for the protection of our lands. I hope and expect that governors—as chief executives of states—will work together to share and learn from their successes and find opportunities to pursue new solutions. We must recognize the urgency of this moment and lock arms against these very real threats.
As governor, I will make sure New Mexico’s state parks are maintained and accessible, and I’ll work to break down barriers to access these treasures. If the national parks and other federal lands in New Mexico suffer further staffing and resource cuts, I will explore ways for the state to step up and provide support to keep federal lands safe and available. I will continue efforts to recruit and hire federal workers who have lost their jobs so that they can continue to share their valuable skills and training.
I’m running for governor because the experience I gained leading a federal department and working in Congress will help working people. And I will stand alongside all of the governors who will be on the frontlines to protect our beautiful landscapes, outdoor traditions, and natural resources for future generations.
* * *
**Thank you for reading!** Deb knows that jobs, health, housing, education, and safety will help New Mexico families prosper. She’s running for governor because the fights we face today are bigger than ever, and she’s ready to tackle them head-on and make the system work for people the way it should. **But since Deb’s running a grassroots campaign, she’s counting on supporters like you to pitch in $10, $20, $50, or whatever you can to help her win.** **[Will you pitch in any amount today to help elect Deb as New Mexico’s next governor?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250517_1_oped?refcode=em20250517-2007&refcode2=2007_400544_p2PnQA&akid=2007%2E400544%2Ep2PnQA)** **[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250517_1_oped?refcode=em20250517-2007&refcode2=2007_400544_p2PnQA&akid=2007%2E400544%2Ep2PnQA)**
---
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250517-1&t=2&refcode2=2007_400544_p2PnQA&akid=2007%2E400544%2Ep2PnQA)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=2007%2E400544%2Ep2PnQA)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=2007%2E400544%2Ep2PnQA)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)

If the national parks and other federal lands in New Mexico suffer further staffing and resource cuts, I will explore ways for the state to step up and provide support to keep federal lands safe and available. I will continue efforts to recruit and hire federal workers who have lost their jobs so that they can continue to share their valuable skills and training. I’m running for governor because the experience I gained leading a federal department and working in Congress will help working people. And I will stand alongside all of the governors who will be on the frontlines to protect our beautiful landscapes, outdoor traditions, and natural resources for future generations. Thank you for reading! Deb knows that jobs, health, housing, education, and safety will help New Mexico families prosper. She’s running for governor because the fights we face today are bigger than ever, and she’s ready to tackle them head-on and make the system work for people the way it should. But since Deb’s running a grassroots campaign, she’s counting on supporters like you to pitch in $10, $20, $50, or whatever you can to help her win.

Then, they threw the economy into chaos with Donald Trump’s disastrous tariffs. And now, they’re launching a full-scale attack on ActBlue — the platform that powers grassroots fundraising for Democrats in Georgia and across the country. This is about silencing small-dollar donors and giving billionaires total control over our elections. And if we don’t act fast, **_they just might succeed._** That’s why we’re racing to hit our $20,000 Protect ActBlue fund goal before midnight. Fellow Conservative, my name is John King.

[**I'm running for the U.S. Senate in Georgia because President Trump needs backup and Jon Ossoff is AWOL - I’m asking you to help me defeat him.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=dcb2d6a20fc24a24bdf455f2dc080de2&_e=0K1YKdsUuGjpOfSAoWDrtftr8PXtHyr7WORNp4UmUnxvekoNpWCX3UC8DwCCMQcoXE8EDNu2YJiuFqcy_nw8zZj2w8CIxfa9iofiMRAl-0w4SKcdPOVlB2AQEUBv1yumnrDenuATm6939a62d-Q3r8RuDL24SsvF3N4Av7pKepnNPXPc5yVjiGTYH7hXCeEiM0nTaNQ1QNJpQQijcwMz9tTvMMbyNOvQF2Vm1Ld3GmB60WmeYt4HNGyhGm1tpfCyawcGRMsub-9acXFtZ2g9tm67p6CpBC0hs2ohpFxoVRKyluRL5QB4uLLB5RC4euXlQWIIRdZUbkpNOqu8EOh2WBH84VlcwOxCv6ltCeXE3GxKPVZ38_yDApbu7zy0ezY3Y2yJX0fKxNi9njfnfAIHudI9_dC7TYl5T66v8JQUA0E%3D)

**Let me tell you more about myself.**

**I was born and raised in Mexico.** I came to America when I was 17. My story is only possible in this country.

**I enlisted in the Army as a private and retired as a two-star major general.** I deployed to Afghanistan, Iraq, Bosnia, Africa, and our southern border.

**I joined the Atlanta police as a beat cop and became a police chief.** I’ve locked up drug dealers, deported criminals here illegally, and I was shot in the line of duty.

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=dcb2d6a20fc24a24bdf455f2dc080de2&_e=0K1YKdsUuGjpOfSAoWDrtftr8PXtHyr7WORNp4UmUnxvekoNpWCX3UC8DwCCMQcoXE8EDNu2YJiuFqcy_nw8zZj2w8CIxfa9iofiMRAl-0w4SKcdPOVlB2AQEUBv1yumnrDenuATm6939a62d-Q3r8RuDL24SsvF3N4Av7pKepnNPXPc5yVjiGTYH7hXCeEiM0nTaNQ1QNJpQQijcwMz9tTvMMbyNOvQF2Vm1Ld3GmB60WmeYt4HNGyhGm1tpfCyFdZTq-6lngld2qS7cmR4UtNwilqriFlFxdXGpyS9FL6QTDycHEcNBzRyYUZa9AuN5j3wP-ZRyUWXvxzqcWbExiQtj0NXgF7I1V1zjOVFx1ULJAzlBZriMp946yUW8KRhlyVM9IyXndm34y8G2LxVg0AmcQrnG4_QQfsV9P4G1AQ%3D)

**I'm proud to support President Trump.** I co-chaired his Georgia campaign in 2020, spoke at rallies in 2024, and turned out Latinos to support Republicans across the state.

[**President Trump is putting America First, but for his agenda to succeed he needs a four-year majority - and that road runs straight through Georgia.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=dcb2d6a20fc24a24bdf455f2dc080de2&_e=0K1YKdsUuGjpOfSAoWDrtftr8PXtHyr7WORNp4UmUnxvekoNpWCX3UC8DwCCMQcoXE8EDNu2YJiuFqcy_nw8zZj2w8CIxfa9iofiMRAl-0w4SKcdPOVlB2AQEUBv1yumnrDenuATm6939a62d-Q3r8RuDL24SsvF3N4Av7pKepnNPXPc5yVjiGTYH7hXCeEiM0nTaNQ1QNJpQQijcwMz9tTvMMbyNOvQF2Vm1Ld3GmB60WmeYt4HNGyhGm1tpfCyX9NSOlsL72rfzOyp6HZ6kPnXpvVdAyHucvvx7Uo52k5VI4dNXOt7SSGCQMEQ7eS6aEaDA-ncLXUcbjPE2y-F7RS0wowpS_ekRhjWTarUtAk2QMGMHt-ja5kXaeFyrR9ZJT9DPnPSfSW8YU5rMAnPES5aYJqugHEcnmPYq4ilKGw%3D)

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=dcb2d6a20fc24a24bdf455f2dc080de2&_e=0K1YKdsUuGjpOfSAoWDrtftr8PXtHyr7WORNp4UmUnxvekoNpWCX3UC8DwCCMQcoXE8EDNu2YJiuFqcy_nw8zZj2w8CIxfa9iofiMRAl-0w4SKcdPOVlB2AQEUBv1yumnrDenuATm6939a62d-Q3r8RuDL24SsvF3N4Av7pKepnNPXPc5yVjiGTYH7hXCeEiM0nTaNQ1QNJpQQijcwMz9tTvMMbyNOvQF2Vm1Ld3GmB60WmeYt4HNGyhGm1tpfCyPnTGbn_n5gecmOs4tCpML7_wPi4_l2FIcBeLX5lWGdOOUUI4yQpLMLG6kUfaq20LuLSONuhs9DIpU5iZLZEwvIIHojRhOMWFrXqerqUnDv17apqj4eIOz8Nw2KJTNPD9XcBcZa93YIUVu6N2WvPNOE2CZLU33B-XlyYIT8Cepzg%3D)

**I’m running for Senate now because Jon Ossoff is an AWOL senator.**

He was nowhere to be found when Biden opened our borders and humiliated our country in Afghanistan.

And since the last election, he’s voted against supporting Israel, against keeping men out of women’s sports, and against confirming President Trump’s team.

**Enough already.** Georgians need a senator who fights for them and President Trump needs backup to pass his agenda.

[**But I can’t do this alone. I’m not a rich self-funder; I’m a lawman and soldier who’s humbly asking for your help to start this campaign the right way. Can you pitch in any amount?**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=dcb2d6a20fc24a24bdf455f2dc080de2&_e=0K1YKdsUuGjpOfSAoWDrtftr8PXtHyr7WORNp4UmUnxvekoNpWCX3UC8DwCCMQcoXE8EDNu2YJiuFqcy_nw8zZj2w8CIxfa9iofiMRAl-0w4SKcdPOVlB2AQEUBv1yumnrDenuATm6939a62d-Q3r8RuDL24SsvF3N4Av7pKepnNPXPc5yVjiGTYH7hXCeEiM0nTaNQ1QNJpQQijcwMz9tTvMMbyNOvQF2Vm1Ld3GmB60WmeYt4HNGyhGm1tpfCy7k23AmtqvFuP6zxt-_ZO7TP4MHFMKCR8ZQU5siwvNdy9ol9fyfwRCwqvCBUZw-apiS64JHsgt8hCcU8SM4vlWPOyvWIhpHZ57E8dot0YfdNvQeUPGBJmYxiyWl7Z70bKBRM5r2REU08qWrKWs249p92zxo_hms-10Y5micCJeRQ%3D)

clean_body: I’m running for the U.S. Senate in Georgia because President Trump needs backup and Jon Ossoff is AWOL The Federal Election Commission's filing deadline for the runoff is tomorrow ... we have LESS THAN 24 HOURS TO HIT OUR FUNDRAISING GOAL | Fellow Conservative, my name is John King. Let me tell you more about myself. I was born and raised in Mexico. I came to America when I was 17. My story is only possible in this country. I enlisted in the Army as a private and retired as a two-star major general. I deployed to Afghanistan, Iraq, Bosnia, Africa, and our southern border. I joined the Atlanta police as a beat cop and became a police chief. I’ve locked up drug dealers, deported criminals here illegally, and I was shot in the line of duty. I'm proud to support President Trump. I co-chaired his Georgia campaign in 2020, spoke at rallies in 2024, and turned out Latinos to support Republicans across the state. I’m running for Senate now because Jon Ossoff is an AWOL senator. He was nowhere to be found when Biden opened our borders and humiliated our country in Afghanistan. And since the last election, he’s voted against supporting Israel, against keeping men out of women’s sports, and against confirming President Trump’s team. Enough already. Georgians need a senator who fights for them and President Trump needs backup to pass his agenda. I’m not afraid of how tough and expensive this campaign will be. I’m not afraid of the Swamp in Washington. I am afraid of giving Jon Ossoff six more years to put America last. Thanks, Maj. Gen. John King (retd.) | General John King is a soldier, lawman, and the first Hispanic elected statewide in Georgia history. He’s running for the Senate now because Georgians need a leader who will fight for them, fight for President Trump’s agenda, and put America First. | | | Paid For By John King For Senate Inc. name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Peter, you lit this match...
body:
-It all started in a garage with no budget and a dream. -You didn't just believe in us. You built us. -From one spark to a nationwide fire. -You helped make the impossible possible. -What started small is now shaking campuses across America. -This is what a real youth revolution looks like. -Because of you, the tide is turning. -See what you helped unleash on the campuses they said we'd never reach. -We were never supposed to be winning--and yet here we are. -One dream. One vision. A whole new generation rising. -You were there from the beginning--even if you didn't know it. -Let me show you what you helped ignite. -This fire's not going out anytime soon. -We're about to go further than we ever thought possible. -Thanks to you, we're lighting up the map. -This is the cultural shift you prayed for. -What we're building together is bigger than you think. -This isn't nostalgia--it's mission fuel. -When they said we'd fail, you said "go." -Let's make this a turning point for history.

| | | [](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/QxIqioenZZ1CPDumcqWzIdI1XSx98qG4fjVj_EfzYYrPDeLXPITlLYtEdsG2WQfSSjAMTDN7oEu8uSlU_AjLlWvWSUBxZKRUJ4Y6NJUlzUtPamJz3VTW8VceeJg4FggbvxKz3n3b_5UcaOnSfr0UE3BJSmIqZ4FODhFp6Omr_B7V5ZVNvYX5t_kuvyrpJdFgY9NaGEt6Xnee-1DVVcjtBNJaLH2lijZwge4VSbCsxaKjqJunYM8uilbhDOEeLt78wg97NiORJ8oklT1Nbk6ZDEcU4GSsB9M0pY3Be6JujAKh_rIgXNhexe5l3knX_IjL80HtiNTsNAk9lZuF6ouLxeDrdJvtnahZzbF90C550-MSCPWxyQ7zxEhey4pmVIgqhBGs8XHUxzVIDtteg7suE8onjrHjFZVjNrZOsPzgAhgBfxwIWDK0Zp-YThlPjLnbiBXjrxYbGtVWls5-Mw/7ovt_5IQCdUQ44H8iwxmAKDYNUupOSdf/9)
---
Peter, We recently wrapped up one of Turning Point USA's latest stops on the American Comeback Tour at UC San Diego... I wish you could have been there to see it. Another packed quad. Students eager to listen. Flags waving. Cheers for America. Energy you could feel in your bones. _Not in Texas... Not in Florida..._ **_California._** The "Deep Blue" stronghold the Left said we'd never touch. But we did. And we'll keep going. **Because of patriots like you.**
---
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/yHXsx2THHEl6fhL57-Q1eaVVfyvX_TsGayvH163tFR7dMqSB-XUy2oSZhuHGP2m6Jo3klLTU7cOb98N0bPyD58RuxOD3J_amxsGBBj2i1T0Ax8o7HDOvpOrDZluA6pEb2zCuYRS-KdXnmjUzQr0OrqdDNVZCnZ9URWETK0JhY31ZEThffmllmbVCM3GB2so4jsu7k_95hbdTyXXbu7by51Bnhd3ZlvCALw50Gs3IQ7PglzbqCZF_NBGQdtFutFT4u8FaFeMHyNSA2cZOd5-LR4OWvltLbRutZe61rserj7U4vVjd6sv6UCY54RWVCe4EAF7ud7JgMeI9pW-DHLzloqYea1oaZ5jqwUp75e_OX4hJTsP97HjJ3vVazv7IYhu5aC0r1gg9mxHNtOMNXT-FwVbXq9jAlVBf_oDbqmty9NBGoewR_eIfsZBlxKWU5favJze8Fu3_BvV8QVi3zA/Kwj_-T5mNmdzyPNJq9t9AsiInWz8EwEK/9)
---
As I stood there looking out at the crowd -- hundreds of young patriots rising up in a place the Left said they owned -- I couldn't help but think... **Nearly 13 years ago, all of this felt...****_impossible._** Back then, Turning Point USA wasn't the cultural phenomenon it is today.It wasn't an office. It wasn't a team. _It was just me._ No money. No connections. Just a desk and an old computer in a dusty garage in the Chicago suburbs._But what I did have was a vision..._ It was 2012. The Left controlled every classroom, every campus, and nearly every corner of our culture.Their narrative was everywhere: America was evil... Faith was "oppressive"... Freedom was outdated... The Conservative movement was dead... _And most of all, young people belonged to the Left._**I didn 't believe that. I couldn't accept that. I couldn't just stand by and watch the Left win.** Back then, it was no wonder WHY we were losing young people to the Left...The Conservative movement felt stale... Conservative organizations felt like a snooze... And it felt like no one had an idea of how to reach America's youth... I believed if we were ever going to win young people back for America, we needed excitement. Energy. Passion. And ZEAL for our ideas.**My dream was to launch a conservative youth movement that would inspire young people to stand for truth -- and LOVE this country again.** I didn't know what I was going to call this dream... this feeling... this movement.So, I picked up the phone, called my dad, and said, "I think I'm supposed to start something, but I don't have a name for it..." **He replied...****_"How about Turning Point?"_** And just like that, a fire was lit. Turning Point USA was born. On the promise that we could TURN this country around, one young heart at a time. The early days were brutal.I remember driving across the Chicago suburbs to small Tea Party meetings talking about "generational theft"... I remember my first Turning Point USA speaking event in Peoria, Illinois during the summer of 2012, where just six people showed up...**And I remember the look in their eyes -- those early patriots --****when I told them the vision:**_" We're going to create a youth movement that LOVES America."__" We're going to go on campus and win hearts and minds."__" We're going to push back -- and we're going to WIN."_They didn't laugh... They didn't walk out...**They believed. And Peter -- so did patriots like you.**
---
You see, this isn't my story. This is YOUR story.Because without patriots like you... _there is no Turning Point USA._ Without you... _there is no American Comeback story._ Without you... _there is no cultural shift happening right now in schools, churches, homes, and on every campus across our great nation._ You were there when the campus quads and halls were empty... stood by us when our signs got torn down. You had our backs when the mob showed up -- when they shouted, screamed, and tried to wipe us off the map.**You didn 't give up. And neither did we.**But we were never supposed to be winning...The Left thought they owned this generation. They thought their indoctrination had worked. _But they were wrong._ I remember standing at tables on hostile campuses with nothing but flyers and hope, praying to have a conversation that would light a spark. I went where I was told a young conservative didn't belong. And I kept going back.
---
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/1FC0MFlFZDIQQjN3ZFKykAyVGpxKHhK_IVbCR5lby43aTQY1TYC3iaxD4yxISICPDSodYKlYUtT3_GdXOZxlinWZ5n4Yf9QJ3u9NKpH6IQ6ERCcMfLsdwAnL2T2EULGUGZZL4FoIRDskMdUgZ09OkEfX_8yZOMb_8QtNe7GnhZS7h9-PRPQCbHz1v8PR-O6boLDaNS4X6ABDeP9pc3Q10I6UTHsBfNA-Wvbamwh0Qmd60qaJit-GkCW192CRzdn05QbLrQ5s2OhfNsg5fEEUGBAPXhkuPq1W2WjuKzt1qdA6zG1ER7YEZa8iHgBiAloSX6rIIQwJNZS1GOkFG-bbC_qXnFE0u6wyOz1yIiGR2fqsSQl-kPqshV5VYm_MYgvNtstzTdj2ljHr0JC1IHv-rPbz8S2BkD2jWUGV5_Q_5F0pFdjEQl3MIgN-YEynmjfXKdTEY6dD16jgH1CB4A/bMNejbIxbyv8bDsqo2fv59p4zbH-CAZk/9)
---
**And then... something happened...** **_The students started listening._** They started to question everything, think for themselves, and no longer be afraid to stand up. Then, they started showing up. _In DROVES._ And now? We're not just watching history unfold... you and I are making it. **Peter, just LOOK at the movement we 've built:** 🔥 A network of 820,000+ conservative student activists
🔥 1,800+ college and high school chapters
🔥 All 50 states. No territory unclaimed.🔥 16 BILLION+ total views across online platforms🔥 5 MILLION+ daily viewers online
🔥 Over 10 million young people turned away from the Left
🔥 Students rising up -- even in DEEP blue states Peter, we're not just winning arguments and "owning the libs" anymore... We're winning hearts. We're changing minds. We're turning the tide. This generation wasn't "lost." _They were LIED to._ **But because of patriots like YOU -- they're hearing the truth. They're finding their voices. They're discovering their courage. They're falling in love with this country again!**
---
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/rvw8JV4V4q7WNWQcmeNfjAVWG_CcSx94stwBBm7_RKyqGuJjHzZNiexMPGA6xP7sYot6S8nBsNCg_6ryqxdMQOgmlL65n_Vs7u7ruk9McWcHMoNuGx61b5ZFgt7nyAbtBdKFO-flBLm_JwW9zmhT_rRx69C7CpTNSfFyWEVgGnPIP2O6LRqbCYDQNV7MGcMEmodqQKd_KAvnRDBAvhbOjkXf1gGv5fESEsLGtzEaPP7Pa5SsZRXIekMntEppz-HaMdRfWA51M69AiWYM3tLuxDZsAahFW7W5nsIWozVQu2iGNmT-JwYGUJ1nNuDYpU5doQmDzbzUmbcmAKO-eYVwAQG-N_jl_Y2R9fjOSeZEF9ZpzcHxOZ3BKZfW69DEcdvehctWjxxdW3Lg7vzHmEEAr-HTgghFviaU2h_gw383mmTRubtw8H4R3bfHgboNCCSj5j6XKgjLQmG4tshbNA/gyv8xXdLl8oubhayVKII9OvU8cfXHYQC/9)
---
_Peter, praise God!_ And you know what? This generation is just getting started.**But let me say this clearly: The battle is far from over.** The Left is on the ropes -- but still dangerous.They're doubling down with new tactics. They're more aggressive than ever in our schools, our media, our digital spaces. They're coming after our students harder than ever before -- because they know we're winning._We cannot give them back an inch._ So now, as we look back on how far we've come... It's time to fight even harder.We're going to press in. We're going to drive deeper into enemy territory.**We 're going to reach more students, train more leaders, and destroy more strongholds of Leftist control.** Not with violence. Not with hate. But with truth. With courage. And with patriots like YOU standing shoulder-to-shoulder with us.
---
Peter, I want you to feel proud as you read this today. Because this movement -- the energy, the fire, the growth, the headlines -- it belongs to patriots like you... The grassroots patriots who lit the match... fanned the flames... stood in the gap. **And now, we 're raising up the most Conservative, most Patriotic, most fired-up youth generation in 50 years.** That's not hype. That's reality. And it's only possible because of our proud supporters, people like you, who never gave up. **I can 't say thank you enough to the patriots who've fought alongside us... those who loved this country enough to invest in its future... those who believed this country was worth saving.** Let's keep our foot on the gas. Let's keep changing minds. Let's keep winning this culture war. Because we were never supposed to be winning... And yet here we are. For America, Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA
---
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/I4JFzUVJBelrJd6TalNmLUuPEgNtPcZpaGY2ceTOBfRKqd9Y__4t7flVbjr2vZ2wKpItSLrkZ5PXN7Q6Yvu9jyLvosv7WlTWT4cOquExV9EM-0jqLDFWVo_6B8P3dHiNEfEtRhbmVUPU0sIYVgyMUvwVWpfGwu0rQ8MLEAatMg1BbmHI-jNqaGzq0EYUMzZFO-C9EA1flaxi3jZ_R79yzk3NOhmyNLTPDw2htxMkmQ_1wmik_T-CgYVUoSG9FVx4rEZ5Kspudh50ZKURPnOaRhA8GWO1OiCW0w3C_icKtoEba0xgDChHZ70sBNkX-JVNk4uUhL5smatvX6tuIIdXQOS8Ck5nSCA3igvwE0Dm5TC_S8O2oXDP-GblUb_cFJXLZTebcpIOjSqRLSlSdJ0NsYQE0oHIBD2zIVlN85zOdo4-9ZPAAbHsA-15c6Sg2CzkWUmHEW9F0foXzQK1NQ/IzOiYfKWtC4siEDnFy0ldn6CiFlxUmAV/9)
---
**P.S.** Peter, thank you for reading what was admittedly a long email.But I wanted you to know how far we've come and how thankful I am for patriots like you! And if this email stirred something in you... If you'd be proud to be a part of the movement that's going to save our GREAT nation...If you want to see even MORE students come alive for truth, for God, and for America... Then I have good news.**Right now, through the month of May, every single donation to Turning Point USA is being MATCHED, dollar-for-dollar, up to $2.5 MILLION.** Why? Because an extremely generous Turning Point USA supporter wanted to rally as many grassroots patriots as possible to DEFEAT the Left in our culture... for good.That means your impact gets DOUBLED. **That means two times the students you 'll reach. Two times the truth heard. Two times the hearts and minds you'll win over for AMERICA.**So, if you've been waiting for the right moment to take your stand -- this is it. This is your chance to pour fuel on the fire that patriots like you helped start.You just won't be supporting a cause anymore -- you'll be powering a cultural REVOLUTION. _**[Let's carry the momentum through to every campus, every platform, every cultural stronghold until we WIN. Double the impact of your gift to Turning Point USA today.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/EGunRFFJUbfBNXCRSKm5NylIeTkDRru1wWpE7uEkXIccss5FTIWet-yKvLUabDTPzk4HuJ4qHLU8PpsUhRnmW8_UpsopJTO_rLIMJx4olD7BmYhKUhdJWDnxAuSeuqegJY27yo2jmPSi0GKbvuem8R2kqVlkxxn0SyU7QlzmAQ8SWxtAUvYM-F5xTe_j_ldHZyx4_ut4jVhlotvEU2ZdOFFV42fJaroGOQZyMtGkStteLn196JsKCUlu7vE0xDLAbbn3bnaCLJ3qC3RzAdO5FR9qRiHJkVyXhzr1_WdrYpsjAUX3XW-Sp_hxgC-dcILZ8j839O1NI_5t6gA2W1J30mZERr5C98oIflKz3EnPQXPmdvjdJyVQl3eBKoKIYHv1NZdfvCbM6R9gDBnhiB3-JSIuPrnABnFYOJjQ8nkOOPvfsMMisYl23jSZabNPlUSYAtfDhbVmWbMdkEXwRQ/vAbL87fg4Ry55vsMoS7GksDQoL7ZDNYS/9)**_
---
[ **Join Turning Point USA &**
**DOUBLE Your Impact**](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/eEVvREp-Iqv3DCA3cGOb6W68jfyv8aEgmNddV0_ZI59sBbny56inxc2E5Hgg--eUGs0FzxyfWu5s9fOmZJQ7s1X4zM-ZMbVqhFMDNc14IAVtsxhP1gfZsIiw9PkorHAUqI2_n7_GAjjYEoEBBaRLh2df6MOn0XfrZCynPQJdeDCVNkEyURSUULeRHeBFWC16EgbwW4nhPbcfdYANsceMJsejDAt46FEiaKqq7sEg0uDK9vefaQq_dj5oA3L0WwnB53sog6UoyGaHdUTIbParPc7WPhDpgFWcU2SxLdP1gTBzBaHLqICrabGPdXK2oiut-4KtXfV11sobCgbr1EzZ9gDG4vfhCd3UCCQ29HkSX-_aJfWFuwsfMGUL-R32-v1cRXE0ZfHbwkrUMov7E9tKhvMCok_-o1W0UM4f9J660ZUWiJtEp7b_MTGh4mB_xscNtUL75wmGZZY7hKIHNQ/NpUocJ73So-yZfWfFG3OJbZ3_XP2aUV1/9)

No connections. Just a desk and an old computer in a dusty garage in the Chicago suburbs.But what I did have was a vision... It was 2012. The Left controlled every classroom, every campus, and nearly every corner of our culture.Their narrative was everywhere: America was evil... Faith was "oppressive"... Freedom was outdated... The Conservative movement was dead... And most of all, young people belonged to the Left.I didn 't believe that. I couldn't accept that. I couldn't just stand by and watch the Left win. Back then, it was no wonder WHY we were losing young people to the Left...The Conservative movement felt stale... Conservative organizations felt like a snooze... And it felt like no one had an idea of how to reach America's youth... I believed if we were ever going to win young people back for America, we needed excitement. Energy. Passion. And ZEAL for our ideas.My dream was to launch a conservative youth movement that would inspire young people to stand for truth -- and LOVE this country again. I didn't know what I was going to call this dream... this feeling... this movement.So, I picked up the phone, called my dad, and said, "I think I'm supposed to start something, but I don't have a name for it..." He replied..."How about Turning Point?" And just like that, a fire was lit. Turning Point USA was born. On the promise that we could TURN this country around, one young heart at a time. The early days were brutal.I remember driving across the Chicago suburbs to small Tea Party meetings talking about "generational theft"... I remember my first Turning Point USA speaking event in Peoria, Illinois during the summer of 2012, where just six people showed up...And I remember the look in their eyes -- those early patriots --when I told them the vision:" We're going to create a youth movement that LOVES America."" We're going to go on campus and win hearts and minds."" We're going to push back -- and we're going to WIN."They didn't laugh... They didn't walk out...They believed. And Peter -- so did patriots like you. You see, this isn't my story. This is YOUR story.Because without patriots like you... there is no Turning Point USA. Without you... there is no American Comeback story. Without you... there is no cultural shift happening right now in schools, churches, homes, and on every campus across our great nation. You were there when the campus quads and halls were empty... stood by us when our signs got torn down. You had our backs when the mob showed up -- when they shouted, screamed, and tried to wipe us off the map.You didn 't give up. And neither did we.But we were never supposed to be winning...The Left thought they owned this generation. They thought their indoctrination had worked. But they were wrong. I remember standing at tables on hostile campuses with nothing but flyers and hope, praying to have a conversation that would light a spark. I went where I was told a young conservative didn't belong. And I kept going back. And then... something happened... The students started listening. They started to question everything, think for themselves, and no longer be afraid to stand up. Then, they started showing up. In DROVES. And now? We're not just watching history unfold... you and I are making it. Peter, just LOOK at the movement we 've built: 🔥 A network of 820,000+ conservative student activists 🔥 1,800+ college and high school chapters 🔥 All 50 states. No territory unclaimed.🔥 16 BILLION+ total views across online platforms🔥 5 MILLION+ daily viewers online 🔥 Over 10 million young people turned away from the Left 🔥 Students rising up -- even in DEEP blue states Peter, we're not just winning arguments and "owning the libs" anymore... We're winning hearts. We're changing minds. We're turning the tide. This generation wasn't "lost." They were LIED to. But because of patriots like YOU -- they're hearing the truth. They're finding their voices. They're discovering their courage. They're falling in love with this country again! Peter, praise God! And you know what? This generation is just getting started.But let me say this clearly: The battle is far from over. The Left is on the ropes -- but still dangerous.They're doubling down with new tactics. They're more aggressive than ever in our schools, our media, our digital spaces. They're coming after our students harder than ever before -- because they know we're winning.We cannot give them back an inch. So now, as we look back on how far we've come... It's time to fight even harder.We're going to press in. We're going to drive deeper into enemy territory.We 're going to reach more students, train more leaders, and destroy more strongholds of Leftist control. Not with violence. Not with hate. But with truth. With courage. And with patriots like YOU standing shoulder-to-shoulder with us. Peter, I want you to feel proud as you read this today. Because this movement -- the energy, the fire, the growth, the headlines -- it belongs to patriots like you... The grassroots patriots who lit the match... fanned the flames... stood in the gap. And now, we 're raising up the most Conservative, most Patriotic, most fired-up youth generation in 50 years. That's not hype. That's reality. And it's only possible because of our proud supporters, people like you, who never gave up. I can 't say thank you enough to the patriots who've fought alongside us... those who loved this country enough to invest in its future... those who believed this country was worth saving. Let's keep our foot on the gas. Let's keep changing minds. Let's keep winning this culture war. Because we were never supposed to be winning... And yet here we are. For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA P.S. Peter, thank you for reading what was admittedly a long email.But I wanted you to know how far we've come and how thankful I am for patriots like you! And if this email stirred something in you... If you'd be proud to be a part of the movement that's going to save our GREAT nation...If you want to see even MORE students come alive for truth, for God, and for America... Then I have good news.Right now, through the month of May, every single donation to Turning Point USA is being MATCHED, dollar-for-dollar, up to $2.5 MILLION. Why? Because an extremely generous Turning Point USA supporter wanted to rally as many grassroots patriots as possible to DEFEAT the Left in our culture... for good.That means your impact gets DOUBLED. That means two times the students you 'll reach. Two times the truth heard. Two times the hearts and minds you'll win over for AMERICA.So, if you've been waiting for the right moment to take your stand -- this is it. This is your chance to pour fuel on the fire that patriots like you helped start.You just won't be supporting a cause anymore -- you'll be powering a cultural REVOLUTION. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 |

#### **Frozen Odds -**
**Alaska — vast, untamed, and unpredictable. Beneath its snow-covered peaks and icy rivers lies a political battlefield unlike any other. This is the story they didn’t want you to know.****Powerful names — Lisa Murkowski, Hansjörg Wyss, Arabella Advisors, and George Soros — echo through the corridors of influence, shaping the future of the Last Frontier. From the manipulation of Ranked Choice Voting to the backdoor funding of initiatives like the Minimum Wage Increase, Alaska has become a testing ground — a proving ground — for tactics designed to tilt democracy itself.****Groups like Salmon State, Outdoor Alliance, and the Alaska Venture Fund, Alaskans For Better Elections, No on 2, etc. have operated quietly, weaving a web of influence across the state's political landscape. What seemed like grassroots efforts were anything but — and the connections go far deeper than anyone imagined.****This isn't just about Alaska. It’s a warning to the rest of America.****Help bring this story to life, flying experts to Alaska, traveling the state for interviews. clean_body: Please send to your friends and family | | | | | ---|--- | Now we have 105 supporters for “Frozen Odds” | Frozen Odds - Alaska — vast, untamed, and unpredictable. Beneath its snow-covered peaks and icy rivers lies a political battlefield unlike any other. This is the story they didn’t want you to know.Powerful names — Lisa Murkowski, Hansjörg Wyss, Arabella Advisors, and George Soros — echo through the corridors of influence, shaping the future of the Last Frontier. From the manipulation of Ranked Choice Voting to the backdoor funding of initiatives like the Minimum Wage Increase, Alaska has become a testing ground — a proving ground — for tactics designed to tilt democracy itself.Groups like Salmon State, Outdoor Alliance, and the Alaska Venture Fund, Alaskans For Better Elections, No on 2, etc. have operated quietly, weaving a web of influence across the state's political landscape. What seemed like grassroots efforts were anything but — and the connections go far deeper than anyone imagined.This isn't just about Alaska. It’s a warning to the rest of America.Help bring this story to life, flying experts to Alaska, traveling the state for interviews. We have already raised nearly 40% what we expected for the entire film to cost.A huge Thank You,Phil Izon | to 25 Tickets🎟️ Golden Ticket – $500LIMITED TO 25 MEMBERS ONLY Become one of only 25 elite supporters to hold the Frozen Odds Golden Ticket. This ultra-exclusive experience is designed for those who believe in the story, the mission, and want front-row access to something special. Golden Ticket Benefits: 🧥 Exclusive “Frozen Odds” Limited-Edition Merchandise (Only available to Golden Ticket holders) 🎬 Private Screening of “Frozen Odds” Watch the premiere before anyone else , in an intimate VIP setting. 🍽️ Catered Dinner Experience Share a gourmet meal with fellow supporters and filmmakers. 🤝 Private VIP Event with Special Guests Rub shoulders with the director, crew, and hand-selected VIPs. This invite-only evening will include personal insights, behind-the-scenes reveals, and interactive conversations. ⚠️ Only 25 tickets will ever be issued. Once they're gone, they're gone. 🔒 Reserve your Golden Ticket today and become part of the story that’s rewriting Alaska’s future. Update on Filming, please share with friends and family Get your ticket today, there are $50 tickets and $100 tickets available. Every ticket sold helps us expand our filming. So far we have invested in 2 cameras, professional audio equipment, lenses, and have secured locations for our film to be filmed, and screened. First Movie - “Frozen Odds - Ranked Choice Voting & Foreign National Influence in Alaska” - Coming August 2025 Second Movie - “The Permanent Short - Alaska PFD movie covering the $25 billion reallocated since 2016” - Coming October 2025 We have multiple movies coming out in 2025. So far we have sold all our Angel Tickets ($250), we only have 18 Golden Tickets left. These come with special perks like future invites and tickets to future movies and much more. name: Lee Johnson
subject: Bring Back Decency
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107885722/546144973/2109746102?refcode=250517_MFC_Johnson_Decency&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODY0NzI0OC00NDMzLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7mU1OfwcfN80GF-1BpcO48YtllEu6MQJK-ECA9ZmGjY=) Friends, My name is Lee Johnson, and I’m running for the U. S. Senate in South Carolina against Lindsey Graham. Look, we all know Washington is broken. But I believe America is still a land of opportunity and our best days are still ahead of us. We can build a better future through innovation — but that takes new leaders I wasn’t born into politics—I was born in a construction family—operating heavy equipment before I could drive. My family taught me how to build things - like roads and bridges - and I’ve carried that with me everywhere: from construction sites and factory floors to boardrooms. We need leadership that prioritizes honesty , accountability, and unity, I don’t believe in career politicians who sew and profit off of division and vitriol. That’s why I pledge to serve no more than two terms as your Senator, to ensure that our state has fresh, accountable leadership in Congress. . Lindsey Graham has been in the United States Senate for over two decades. We can’t expect to send the same old leaders back to DC year after year, and expect anything to change. It’s time for new leadership. No more gridlock—just real solutions. If you’re tired of the noise, I’m asking for your help, and together we’ll build a better future for all of South Carolina. **Right now, in the first 72 hours of our campaign, we’re asking that you chip in to become a Founding Donor to our campaign.** **This is an opportunity to get in at the foundation of this grassroots movement to move on from Lindsey Graham and bring civility and respect back to our politics.** [**If you’re with us in this push, can I count on you to chip in $25 or more today -- split evenly with Seth Moulton?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107885723/546144974/2036686014?refcode=250517_MFC_Johnson_Decency&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODY0NzI0OC00NDMzLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7mU1OfwcfN80GF-1BpcO48YtllEu6MQJK-ECA9ZmGjY=) Thanks,
Lee Johnson
Candidate for U.S. Senate

name: Sarah McBride
subject: People will die
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
When I cared for my late husband Andy through his cancer, I learned just how fragile life becomes without reliable care.
#
On Thursday, I rose on the House floor to tell Caroline’s story — a young woman from Newark with a rare condition who told me that without Medicaid, she could die.
And she’s not alone.
The Republican majority has proposed the largest health care rollback in American history. **If they succeed, 14 million people will lose coverage, including 1 in 4 of my neighbors in Delaware. That’s cruelty, plain and simple.**
And why? To pay for a tax scam to make the rich _even richer_. Their plan adds red tape, guts coverage, and even pushes a backdoor abortion ban. All while forcing families to pay more for less.
When I cared for my late husband Andy through his cancer, I learned just how fragile life becomes without reliable care. And right now, for Caroline and millions across our country, it’s life or death.
**That’s why I rose on the House floor, and it’s why I’m fighting back like hell to protect the care millions depend on.**
[**Will you rush a contribution of whatever makes sense to you to help us continue building a powerful grassroots opposition against the GOP’s Medicaid cuts?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250517-1?refcode=em20250517-2008&refcode2=2008_21716_I9WHcv&akid=2008%2E21716%2EI9WHcv)
I didn’t come to Congress to rubber-stamp cruelty. I came to fight for every Delawarean — for people like Caroline.
That’s why I’m sounding the alarm. Because health care is a human right. And no person should have to beg or barter for the care they need.
**But I need you with me, because the truth is we’re up against powerful forces who’d rather hand tax breaks to billionaires than keep people with disabilities, kids, and seniors alive.**
[**So please, pitch in what you can today and let’s defend Medicaid, together.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250517-1?refcode=em20250517-2008&refcode2=2008_21716_I9WHcv&akid=2008%2E21716%2EI9WHcv)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250517-1?refcode=em20250517-2008&refcode2=2008_21716_I9WHcv&akid=2008%2E21716%2EI9WHcv)**
With determination,
Sarah McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250517-1&t=1&refcode2=2008_21716_I9WHcv&akid=2008%2E21716%2EI9WHcv)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=2008%2E21716%2EI9WHcv)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=2008%2E21716%2EI9WHcv)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2008%2E21716%2EI9WHcv)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)

subject: Could you please complete this National Security Survey?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: I like omelets better than sex.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Sometimes you just have to crack some eggs.

Peter, John Kennedy here, and it seems that I've got the media in a bit of a tizzy because I said I like omelets more than sex. Let me explain to you what I meant.

_Like I said, I really like omelets, I could eat them every day for every meal.**[But no matter how much I like omelets, you can't make 'em without cracking a few eggs.](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/2ASTadgKAcwVrA4JiZaNxXVZFcsp6lM3sUKwyAGEvuE4CFnkvzpaAFz037i1FF4xvlKHFNQxyKx-TGeiPXVbRcFfd0J7MZVYrUccPhMmtLcQ5MXxccEHIv6o9j0BTTPBkAk37SLsIaR7_KpsMEGRvotWxjcznxqvExL7X2KDNsEi-u7bnp_ETef1Ye8Vu9CEztGVrwhgZRlnfStcae7Q5ubUSfHToSx9g4ClanZGkl6AXhclNqD8T3gx28CHOfsze8KNQrZwxUtWs2ifhZNparcLYw1Ae8oQW-MI0Ddy-RSJ4ku7og95vIy5oexjSGTetM1jxIdZ68X82pCNLMVw6aBUXqYyFlJtxohmk732JdQ4Dx2DS-9i-0xS6HJlS_2eGUiWcR3cdIwwDpOa2CKR9Zn0z78PMlk/qeBRC2YP4CA7lgrjP_-3Kwzd03S4Fk7o/9)**_

That's what President Trump and Senate Republicans are doing. _**[We 're having the tough conversations, passing historic legislation, and working to undo the damage and destruction of Joe Biden and the Radical Left.](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/7cQBXJtsUBbpRVPEPhoP8jjQgY3unXAMeW1z93LLjcMjIl2VD0TSp3McWCTi09MnxPBxC26OY__ukQpys12-TV0FRFkuUHnVZdHQ0KtuECRwcH1knf_q-8YTYnU-RDoEJwBhg2ZLxUZrmRBWN1P7Wlxt2nMGzLjwHaXdgGZwLl4EFb5YVubaL4ddI46pMNngoSGskRw-HOxJdH8lZTVBVB3huZWHVDPteLsUQ5zWJM8SgGvbzc3kzS1vM3CwRD4T5z_lKnAXNESuGDznN2U8REuTo0gZJAdHwiLyjxOHczSXpbANHW9fXIgohGwlE_PRAXPQT9PbXD1PFopYJ-DjAodZYkwqKSsqw0P5BzgrMh0SpNZqeoLc9jpXJZ0gvjhIL8jHpoLauVAetOWkAgdYdc8WaeyE-KQ/Hd4bYoDUKFJmjGnAUD1ObxTUJ4aWUvEv/9)**_

_No one promised that it 'd be pretty, but we have to crack a few eggs to make the omelet._

That's why I'm coming to you, Peter. Democrats are fundraising off the charts to flip the Senate in 2026 and put Chuck Schumer back in power. Everything we're working for could be at stake, and **[I want to know if I can count on you to send over $5, $15, or even $35 to make sure they don't succeed.](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/5YUDdTnT0DW5bk-xXpY2g1DWSJi3tLWwdDNE9ZOwQFH1oo8_9QXr_KQtYF9dnTK_WpPcLQPx-3ACzI6g7uGdW1D-7_cKYQQQhlNNvolhG2S7PbRPHKny_-QwVL0mQhWwG3ka9HG2gfHEdQsUONAJiPTygCUGdapmJ36DsxrO7ieRzU5ysZrIfBcZOkrPoebFbibXxY9Z_s8pG_yJkqRQ-ZG-1MceoJmz8U1noXCoxF9pJxf25WKSjmhEPQRPqfK6ITAJ7lI6nGnJ7-Lozjyp0vSePSETy1_o6xb5eIWkokyrW6y8DS8PKaD_vKk1RGj2glFw6HgRvKfXPk7GKagi9E4Ff2js8UBDc9wuVo_vTJkx7xwQgX52XyM1WJSx4j-r90I9t8bhqsGB4cVDbvvXWsYOJ0KHGPeXJJbgZbrraXP1fxmFaLL6TIJnIJToa2SKcjy5POWcKJMufNIRnZCExuree2FtbYXJgWcwjtAW1xHY8v85hXqDlsMRjvMU0VyHa6aYKFh4-pBy-OChS_Fqy0iBzsCBewWoJipO4NXX3kOEEPAVSd7RELZo1G_hU33qajUEcaWlbqj-n7ETBHlf4Q/Gd8rXYosAKgFipiT-x5NJnU2si6SW1qK/9)**

I promise to you that I'll continue to fight for your rights, your money, and your freedom and I know my Republican colleagues in the Senate will be right beside me doing the same, so I hope we can count on you to help us make good on our promise to you, Peter.

clean_body: Sometimes you just have to crack some eggs. Peter, John Kennedy here, and it seems that I've got the media in a bit of a tizzy because I said I like omelets more than sex. Let me explain to you what I meant. Like I said, I really like omelets, I could eat them every day for every meal. That's what President Trump and Senate Republicans are doing. No one promised that it 'd be pretty, but we have to crack a few eggs to make the omelet. That's why I'm coming to you, Peter. Democrats are fundraising off the charts to flip the Senate in 2026 and put Chuck Schumer back in power. Everything we're working for could be at stake, and I promise to you that I'll continue to fight for your rights, your money, and your freedom and I know my Republican colleagues in the Senate will be right beside me doing the same, so I hope we can count on you to help us make good on our promise to you, Peter. Thank you, Senator John Kennedy | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Keep public lands in public hands

Folks, Donald Trump is toying with the idea of making cuts to **half a dozen national monuments** , including Organ Mountains-Desert Peaks. He is also considering this national monument as a potential site for **mining activities** — yes, you read that correctly. New Mexico’s public lands and national monuments aren’t just beautiful destinations, they have shaped our state and our way of life. **Trump’s proposed cuts are a _direct attack_ on our shared heritage. ** Republicans may see our state’s public lands as commodities, but I see them as our birthright. As a conservationist and a former outdoor educator, I firmly believe that public lands must be preserved for future generations. I’ve worked long and hard to protect New Mexico’s public lands, and I’m not letting these cuts go down without a fight. **[If you have room in your budget, please chip in to support my fight and help elect Democratic leaders who will fight to keep public lands in public hands, just like I do.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107886133/546146484/171185841?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250517_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGIxYmZkMy00NjMzLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8xtghJruD17Kov7xs_5UvzTo07iCkju4BQybhBJlQEk=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107886134/546146485/171185841?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250517_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGIxYmZkMy00NjMzLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8xtghJruD17Kov7xs_5UvzTo07iCkju4BQybhBJlQEk=)

| **MARCELL STRBICH OFFICIAL CAMPAIGN KICKOFF EVENT!
MAY 21, 2024 at 7:00 PM • MEDINA, OHIO**
We have a grassroots, patriot, combat veteran who has stepped up to selflessly run for Ohio Secretary of State in 2026, Marcell Strbich. Many of you know Marcell. You've heard him on the radio with Bob Frantz, Jack Windsor, and Brian Thomas. You've seen him on video with Emerald Robinson and Steve Stern. You've seen him testify at the State Capital on election integrity legislation. He can and will do the job to secure Ohio's elections and clean up Ohio's registered voter rolls, which contrary to what you hear from our current Secretary of State, are a MESS. Many of you know Marcell and personally endorse him. For those of you who don't, once you get to know him we're confident he'll have your endorsement too!
**Marcell is officially kicking off his campaign the evening of May 21st in Medina. It's a FREE event and all are welcome! Come meet Marcell, ask him questions, and get answers!**
**To learn more about Marcell Strbich, go[HERE](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=132580b78b&e=5c740fa3e2) or click on the image below.

name: David Hogg
subject: This is astounding
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
He doesn’t seem to fear any consequences for his actions.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250517-1&t=1&akid=2147%2E587540%2Em8sRzt)
**Peter, the Trump administration’s blatant corruption is astounding:**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250517_1_corruption?refcode=em20250517-2147&amount=5&refcode2=2147_587540_m8sRzt&akid=2147%2E587540%2Em8sRzt)
The corruption itself isn’t shocking for Trump – but it takes a certain level of hubris to do it so openly. He doesn’t seem to fear any consequences for his actions. He thinks it’s perfectly fine to accept $400 million jumbo jets from other countries and sell his own cryptocurrency for foreign governments to buy in order to bribe him.
**I’ll just say it: Donald Trump has to be the most corrupt president in US history.**
The President of the United States should not be up for sale to the highest bidder. But that’s what’s happening in Trump’s White House – and foreign governments are lining up to gain his favor and make deals backed by gifts and bribes.
It’s mind-boggling how corrupt things have become. But we don’t have to accept this as our reality forever. There is a new generation of leadership rising up to fight back – and they’re doing it without support from corporate PACs and right-wing billionaires. They’re running campaigns that are not beholden to ultra-rich donors, foreign countries, special interests, or anything other than the people they serve.
**That’s what Leaders We Deserve is all about.** We are electing the next wave of Democratic leaders – and we’re doing it the right way. When one of our endorsed candidates is elected president one day, they’ll answer to the people. They damn sure won’t be corrupt criminals like Donald Trump and the politicians of yesterday.
**[Can I count on you to help us usher in a new generation of progressive leaders? Pitch in $5 to Leaders We Deserve to support this game-changing work.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250517_1_corruption?refcode=em20250517-2147&amount=5&refcode2=2147_587540_m8sRzt&akid=2147%2E587540%2Em8sRzt)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250517_1_corruption?amount=5&refcode=em20250517-2147&refcode2=2147_587540_m8sRzt&akid=2147%2E587540%2Em8sRzt)**
Thank you,
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250517-1&t=2&refcode2=2147_587540_m8sRzt&akid=2147%2E587540%2Em8sRzt)**

"**Could a $6 billion plan solve some of Texas ' water supply problems?**” San Antonio Express-News' **Lit Teitz** \-- "As fast-growing cities, utilities and businesses clamor for more water in drought-stricken Central Texas, an ambitious $6 billion plan is emerging to meet some of their demand.

The Guadalupe-Blanco River Authority wants to build a new reservoir to hold water from the river, and construct more than 250 miles of pipeline to move that water throughout the river basin, which runs from Kerr County to the Gulf Coast.

Dubbed the “WaterSecure Project,” officials say the plan would primarily rely on existing water rights that the authority already has for surface water from Guadalupe River, but it could potentially incorporate aquifer storage and brackish water desalination.

"**Texas House advances bill requiring A/C in prisons; proposal 's fate uncertain in Senate**” Austin American-Statesman's **Bayliss Wagner** \-- "The Texas House overwhelmingly passed legislation Thursday night to require air conditioning across the state’s prison system, marking the third time in five years that the lower chamber has approved such a measure. The Senate has declined to take it up in the previous two sessions.

It also took place hours before a midnight cutoff for the House to pass bills originating in that chamber.

[House Bill 3006](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.y1qQg7vX491TJbzrGLYTuEYT0yv_aZw1IceJac_-o0Y-UGIWKkPTFm9Kz5DRdvb_-aYU7NLaOywMgY5yceksY30uEsluWb5Osx2hpcd3rQRd3se0lcZFSpnJ8XvwjMLZsRblguE-PxRl5ogVM_fGyqFd-24U4zmpVXD2J69MbTaCSIIUDhUraWSNCRTExph20SS6425mKO87hGxz0_cDsJnNuS_QY75rEpBQktBMrk55cLQtaUyeXf4iKyu15h-hnAICbOz6fQA6h_VGCAElyuOO1tvg6JEGjx5zfGmx95UwpW-hSGlrP37YMJWHkZ1OXqmlWeXI55408AK0x7PEpMW02YTXA9ozFB6NRFwQRMiqrzeAjPubYTDwAlMV4mNwzrgAggD0zrVPoz9gySOUvyLbb0YiqtfHzS2c7VQRCm0U60-cbGBXSyYzsK1eXQAfx1rvb80iVEVZGXyJ2_TH77s4_zm9mAZDQPn3lLuHtfueYcq2Ie7FUjRVgeUMaaLmschvGYFX15Vx03OD_pRvlg/4gk/tRFSdNRRQ3iTMhVM8g540Q/h15/h001.X9uCFMZBg6R64oF2mJGZDFl9_N1kkbo7pG-r1PMtcWA) is expected to face an uphill battle in the more conservative state Senate, which has repeatedly declined to hear similar proposals.

Democratic state Rep.**Terry Canale** s of Edinburg, a criminal defense attorney, said he filed the bill because the constant, sweltering heat in lockups is “inhumane” and constitutes cruel and unusual punishment.

HB 3006 outlines [a three-phased approach](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.y1qQg7vX491TJbzrGLYTuEYT0yv_aZw1IceJac_-o0ZCDszl6DLC__dct7kHqNm9CNUwE8NcuA9gNA0McpQ8D_n3ocfPif7xaFV_IotuJRFkO-jDP4Cu4dGjWSxrYm-6DMbzJYqGbLuHwo0MOn9TkpwW8JUy7F08CFn6K4xzeNq3wqiBwMKZrxIKoDEIsjfvJJOCjl0NMdAa1jKSxyfwWGCXLsg_tGiHdli6PQ5dDhQInN56omljPnUxaJyMH0jnacIaKuV_4LZGrvx7mjNsAN_PM9v19JmqySxXItOmoLBKgje2_ml2URzlBZo84LfitCmLroCzLcrMjAjXFN8HIR3vMHaA_5czpDvAQDhKnd6gumj74Ao4VrwEaPD4raReegth88H3HKrw28yKja7MimazjqG9DWK9baxJEoHPa6zlopxw_U18R6eJtCoVMCh01Lv6kD7xkMeC6_4kYS816VG7wkTW6qpPNEUHjKcCO36MjZ2o19coST_t_M3HiCHBVRBIk-5tY7uo1dO32qiqOw/4gk/tRFSdNRRQ3iTMhVM8g540Q/h20/h001.hKJwknkgJCx6X72IPiRS3Dbl6srrOENvuBOsHSzX0L8) that would require TDCJ to install climate control in one-third of its facilities by 2028, another one-third by 2030 and the final third of the facilities by 2032 — but only if it receives the funds to do so. The agency would be mandated to solicit competitive bids from private contractors to complete the project, and the cost would be capped at $100 million per phase.

Canales described visiting the minimum-security prison in his hometown on a broiling Texas summer day, where the odor of male sweat is so strong that “you can taste it” and where prisoners flood their cells with toilet water, then “take turns lying in it” overnight to cool down.

In a yearslong legal battle over the climate control in Texas prisons, plaintiffs are asking the court to require the state to maintain cell temperatures between 65 and 85 degrees, a similar range as [Texas jails](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.5lwqIBNPgUpXckHvDM7-mK7YFYjWe9nIiW1xc8zLWJ415fCEYaCnP0FHlIhnvOjOBNEVfiDJGiamy57ai6OLPTzyl_yLrE8GrZtmnCedZFW9wxYFxHJcWPExocnBmkNM-RQcXj4VGT0HReMinoQwYq1nX6x97R4Zx1YPB_WZOgQaWxQxW5_To4D_WY7vyMNoL07DSlX-K_89E92etB4rqtbMQAUREVj0KOc9XKNdvlUnMyfk7J5JdJCYrj6zBKtc-b9xTXfQ0E_I2V68Gkuxdf2hWOO2CCG7pjDbaHjU7p68hP-WZsMh9hRINhnSXp7zK1tEBkn6NY4lys9Qlb5JR-sMLRLbgqasGUXWWlvpwT7KqlAEADhRZfjTl0rfgpEXWrpxIdViPo-CAQxAunurWSfE4BQ5L9xHpVWK-bDGJ3uU1AeCNo2uctYpCgHILcX7bMXER6PtthWTrXwW0omAojSMbMz9xstkAcyxftSTBJW7w8fTZ3BbZjdnKSfQ1gtVTYpNlERJ9BvtCTiLA7itFUmGKlaqaxdGfAZhr4NoK-gCIqiUZir7BP2kZQxtwbAXdM_eNNZQdZccqJmlfJBhaVXx2k9sZuS-ynGVFIMVCuk/4gk/tRFSdNRRQ3iTMhVM8g540Q/h21/h001.pZps4c7jP2_iMlyB23nscOilTE3PaXrI74CiEt5tZfY) and federal prisons are required to maintain. Nearly 70% of cells in the state prison system lack air conditioning, [according to a court filing](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.xjnMFfva-73dHOne5Rc0eC2St6a4gGcSo_5kvUgy7EKs5DtTvF1RNpoyvIDvQu7DTQIf1XN6OXq_BMZwpcWr-M6P9f_IXqhSymskEBosDcvjJDaVAGaCoZXcPtPCMg1WCv5w9U6ab7s5SF_00UyM73chsjVHBhHN0_KCmnibyhDNGQpK5r098xoYlueH8TQatak1Tp3akiDtEmjvPoSSOLoep6opobK4bnptun1VrC_5t80CisWSnVF4PuqNVQYm0LfAaLaW9wq82tAFfZxgTYuTC4zqrkLynQU_kL96TOlsPq7bZFDmtxh7kDMIk-toPRLNxYlKCA8ndRqz8qiSo-54nR3sAAKjYWVKezOSZ0ljoPmUBJU6UGnsGKG0eHfL7MjtN4Sdm6u4Ak2SCeF_TfaU8wJTCb7r1ma_1cMlWFLW_Jaicj47Ai3eTulYlm6Cki5gMvi7qQo-IkixpHijZSHmzN2Uenna0CccPcSNccmhbTCnvQNSv-SLiCkwKbki_442VW6c_Da0uytevHq6Rg9XidKcjLdb0pkgyWZAEsw/4gk/tRFSdNRRQ3iTMhVM8g540Q/h22/h001.C55Nfjxh2RvUBIMQaWJRMIvuIhhbMU_RJ-hQzUIK0i4) in the lawsuit.

On the state's current trajectory, it would take at least 25 years to ensure all cells are climate-controlled, which is "insufficient under the Eight Amendment," U.S. District Judge **Robert Pitman** found in his March ruling on a request for a preliminary injunction. Pitman urged Collier to prepare for an adverse final ruling that would require Texas to air-condition all cells, and he recently scheduled a jury trial for March 2026.

[TDCJ has installed](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.xjnMFfva-73dHOne5Rc0eDcPpUyU5i6cgsvjELdqLIGZUHz4LXS8PULYx_HsqyRedTY7sfx5BvXEvgTezuHtXh4jVbdaDKCVUPYKju-iw1XzojZBCv2mYiak5FbBPrrzBM89XKS8VYEd7NX_zWrS8jEJ8Q5PiJ82VmQOWa3HyFli5Ll3ymHmnEPEjfnzf0K-RpfMIoXnpC6XT3lGmDu7T_FgRiCUSb1IdZAtSX4lGUSiCFxaSQJpAZBUmkkFnktF01aByqA4YChSgZt1FzVodofGEvcogdYCAiAOLFPhToT9DxMDYwn2K73Wth55FRxgQ1G_IDE9GuyoldSaujISSRdudRdCOrni-dVAt3SoEQf6Lh2qcMSv7G-_VWfQkvY5MlfDKYbhU9IJjVFW-3W5hrDnSjReoTpeuXwFJfXEMuBh9vXnSt2lV7dydW__J-PpWwBhTRT_LI0uBM1NaM_E-qPRyOen9HKR387wAIR4EE0/4gk/tRFSdNRRQ3iTMhVM8g540Q/h23/h001.3rs82M3cN4h4VkJzlEHWGSIPc9RRPZoqhZYgo17TJF8) nearly 48,000 "cool beds" in its system so far and is in the process of procuring 12,000 more. The agency received $85 million for additional air conditioning installation in 2023 and is requesting another $118 million for the next bieennium, which it says would allow for 16,000 more air-conditioned beds. That would bring the total number to 78,000 in a system that housed [nearly 133,000 inmates](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.xjnMFfva-73dHOne5Rc0eDcPpUyU5i6cgsvjELdqLIFFskFDHHw-p83h3549nzT4K1mr6zSBs6DLFZbEhOkhnJ4IhueQMj2OZ4bVBQTh50EvhIE2_4NL-bHI9oePAvVq_8dsXKLz7GCyAqTUlH3mLd4SOJN-uPKejGSy7uIUK7F9CYXnEp_9awQbh7cG6j0YYwqv02rupWTngqU9ZJOzMXSL_aKtX_zQMaQze2zWTECZYPWL-_JxMsg1vqMMn8132KkeUvMLDUQKKhQcT0SHzgTnUX1-thDPSIiCaW4xNvqn2gKvqlDHCFQw3CnM66KkEAocblWZyQ04QUy833kh9RFWK0matK0arC-u5FwJZgjOTLcGFp84dbP4nHZhH_9ImqIVFd7yMctpkulU3Dp3GMDR6UYkKHycAghJf1uptFRR2Ect6_eQPV9ao_yVh33Co8dVnumfQOJxxeHVlUVCBnlFeysxkZSCbX4YZnadFrg/4gk/tRFSdNRRQ3iTMhVM8g540Q/h24/h001.KVuEdc1yDuyyj6taHIG1kdC41w6Wsa4hjmmnvwuXySc) in 2023.

Even if a bill requiring A/C does not pass the Senate, it is likely that the prison system will receive more state funds to install air conditioning. State Sen. **Joan Huffman** , R-Houston, [told the Texas Tribune](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.xjnMFfva-73dHOne5Rc0eCyDm7YZItPaA-BvJlf4tsA5u2n1_ijTBaKJKs9JxRz-ACCUXVn93kvcgkyBReJE7c3d01JqpPQrfSE6_GO8gyoo5sEb0InOxPVXyb01JaxQ0ggfu00MJ6B9iZk1pLCGGtuhCIlrfMRx9Qs3oJpPD54ClML-B5DvYDSkmgDnjVGOYMdkfaXnf7uD5nQ8kCH2OpE9kbDfZkwfn5aPWZMCc2yY9wDvyNXQ3Zi7BJitkEYyy418bmPjoZ1MQimBfV8l5SOTJVoDmveC3dB8TBe7I1KtLlgKKLB8q4a4WaKkm6L9UcUdk2cjX08ksTtlRFwkgaskh9p9e__lE5kp2nVegNkun4CQLF-WalF7z2iQYm55Fy_N0_voS0KElryQ41EQCHVoRpBsVK353fOBQzJQdSSxaKIFAhtH9Zq4pFURjPh-Cb4Kl0SgEgAWzJB7yK6A-0I2owtkAnmiUtmn5AecWaYVyjiVfUWlw5ub2adIZFwir8-ycsotx01B4PgFlbsZMdRfSviUe5-ovDA49SPV5hU/4gk/tRFSdNRRQ3iTMhVM8g540Q/h25/h001.QRUozFWenftfNX8Ii8-lVhuP8TjokSBJF42rdgq9yNI) that the state budget will include the $118 million the TDCJ has requested to install around 11,000 additional cool beds over the next two years. The state will also allocate $3 million for new dorms, which would be air conditioned, she wrote in the statement, the Tribune reported.

Huffman did not respond to Statesman requests for comment."
