name: Former Navy SEAL Adam Schwarze
subject: I just want to make my mom proud
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
I’m just an ordinary guy from Minnesota who was asked to do extraordinary things for our country now I am asking you to open this and read the first few paragraphs | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=261f735fc51c4472a15c82eed75934a6&_e=Wcpm4k0dSdI6B_qRxfVaBZC31Z2k-y7s4OHoHFMqAEfAC6MzJbzp69ff0wlzT-p_N1ewSdycnF-nR1FVOERjBg27A34I7enMOkbp8nJUv9pDAvzW3MlvhTLg64O34xjNpkQIGjiGFL5GilBBhlutsAch_5Zt6czVM6to9xKktjmmUKVYZC6m2raCnkqu8FhEK8WraH7ioAEwgPU1qvHvyUe-lKw2nJw5Z4jCyPgBWpo77KCdJwPncGAjsWYrx2mtq7dZNu1xD5hqGb11_8QvRXGNwIsbd9iBRBjzY8RstZUt68N0WLOnWXbl1yro6uNWFZRUxSiU0_-SbD6249tKiZPsAAo_8R8txksPV40LPsfJ2PnFqyBQAKYfxLLs5xkfYdcBeVcpTOrZzdvLBBW1Op7GIAP2KKJ1Ac98XMJyOQ0%3D)

---

Fellow Conservative,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and _**I’m a former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps vet, avid hockey player, and lifelong Minnesotan.**_ I know it’s early in the 2026 election cycle and you may not be paying attention to races in their infancy, like mine, still, I’m reaching out to you today to tell you a little about myself, who I am, and to make my case to earn your support in the upcoming battle I’m currently running headfirst into.

I’m running for the U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, who, if you can believe it, **is politically more radical than the former VP nominee**.
**_
_**_People like the lieutenant governor were leading the violent unrest in Minneapolis in the summer of 2020._**_While the governor, whom the nation embarrassingly became acquainted with, eventually called for law and order in the street; his lieutenant governor was preparing a lawsuit against the Minneapolis Police Department for discrimination._**

The Minnesota I grew up in was far away from the world these two government officials call home.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=261f735fc51c4472a15c82eed75934a6&_e=Wcpm4k0dSdI6B_qRxfVaBZC31Z2k-y7s4OHoHFMqAEfAC6MzJbzp69ff0wlzT-p_N1ewSdycnF-nR1FVOERjBg27A34I7enMOkbp8nJUv9pDAvzW3MlvhTLg64O34xjNpkQIGjiGFL5GilBBhlutsAch_5Zt6czVM6to9xKktjmmUKVYZC6m2raCnkqu8FhEK8WraH7ioAEwgPU1qvHvyUe-lKw2nJw5Z4jCyPgBWpo77KCdJwPncGAjsWYrx2mtq7dZNu1xD5hqGb11_8QvRVD7bUtwhcv5Qazhh0ckPA_ycHHKI7DDX1VlJEoKFVI6GwoxORVFECSq07Dfy8aJncsj8MZKsujGxRtZZIs6b0ZG9tpT2n7aNhX12scr_Ag_2YQmgHmkVdU4-B268J39pr1jf4IUF4yTLIfSadG9YTM%3D)

As the son of two working-class parents, I have nothing in common with either my opponent or her boss, former VP candidate and Minnesota Governor Tim Walz.

I grew up playing hockey and joined the military on my 18th birthday in October 2001, less than two months after the horrific attack on New York, Pennsylvania, and Washington, D.C. Unlike Governor Walz, I was proud to deploy to over 70 countries in service to our nation;**I didn’t retire before being shipped out to serve our nation in war. I’ve willingly put myself into harm’s way more times than I can count in order to protect the American people, our shared conservative values, and our democratic way of life.**

I never imagined that I would run for high office, but _**everytime I came home from deployment things in Minnesota and the country seemed to have gotten worse because of the radical left policies.**_ I’m doing this because of the state of our current leadership. Minnesota is currently being led by two radical Democrats who have done their best to push this state as far left as anyone could tolerate.

**Something had to be done. **

With Sen. Tina Smith’s recent retirement announcement, now is a time to leap into the unknown—something I’ve done and found very fulfilling. While Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican in a presidential election since 1976, we’re not a deep blue state.

This election isn’t going to be an easy one for a Republican to win, but throughout my life and career I have always defied the odds. _**And as a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I excel in harsh environments - on and off the battlefield.**_

**[You don’t know me, and you have no real reason to make a financial contribution to my Senate campaign other than that I’m humbly asking you to do so.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=261f735fc51c4472a15c82eed75934a6&_e=Wcpm4k0dSdI6B_qRxfVaBZC31Z2k-y7s4OHoHFMqAEfAC6MzJbzp69ff0wlzT-p_N1ewSdycnF-nR1FVOERjBg27A34I7enMOkbp8nJUv9pDAvzW3MlvhTLg64O34xjNpkQIGjiGFL5GilBBhlutsAch_5Zt6czVM6to9xKktjmmUKVYZC6m2raCnkqu8FhEK8WraH7ioAEwgPU1qvHvyUe-lKw2nJw5Z4jCyPgBWpo77KCdJwPncGAjsWYrx2mtq7dZNu1xD5hqGb11_8QvRcOQQqYFSE_Y6FLMotR6sIiE7V49KtKu7Ibv-ha6Xh2ytjiw1oJ4tTUB25cxIW0GLGLmzFPB1sfBNYR6ujXtPsCk8WNis_jkyXAZ6vQD-NDGuv36G4AekO349yDh3SU0cGOmL9E8LVsJRN1SG3zwmFQ%3D)**

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND WITH A GIFT OF $5 OR MORE**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=261f735fc51c4472a15c82eed75934a6&_e=Wcpm4k0dSdI6B_qRxfVaBZC31Z2k-y7s4OHoHFMqAEfAC6MzJbzp69ff0wlzT-p_N1ewSdycnF-nR1FVOERjBg27A34I7enMOkbp8nJUv9pDAvzW3MlvhTLg64O34xjNpkQIGjiGFL5GilBBhlutsAch_5Zt6czVM6to9xKktjmmUKVYZC6m2raCnkqu8FhEK8WraH7ioAEwgPU1qvHvyUe-lKw2nJw5Z4jCyPgBWpo77KCdJwPncGAjsWYrx2mtq7dZNu1xD5hqGb11_8QvRZIF9UHCABuGnQh7icwpXMp9mS63Lo6Ln-HuiQB625EsSvROT8W1zqy7QzzZTk_F6oJ4ZVz1WWnUEb2HL17PiHxRFXS-8MbxbgdXGCOaGHe7LrzsNzrBC34gI9OLtZN3iP935y4-44NleplYsKlgXqI%3D)
_**I love our country, so on my 18th birthday in October 2001, I enlisted in the United States Marine Corps with a deep desire to serve my nation, make my parents proud, and defend freedoms.**_

Twenty-four years later, I’m still looking to serve Minnesotans in service to our nation - that's why I'm running for the United States Senate.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=261f735fc51c4472a15c82eed75934a6&_e=Wcpm4k0dSdI6B_qRxfVaBZC31Z2k-y7s4OHoHFMqAEfAC6MzJbzp69ff0wlzT-p_N1ewSdycnF-nR1FVOERjBg27A34I7enMOkbp8nJUv9pDAvzW3MlvhTLg64O34xjNpkQIGjiGFL5GilBBhlutsAch_5Zt6czVM6to9xKktjmmUKVYZC6m2raCnkqu8FhEK8WraH7ioAEwgPU1qvHvyUe-lKw2nJw5Z4jCyPgBWpo77KCdJwPncGAjsWYrx2mtq7dZNu1xD5hqGb11_8QvRfkW8v1fzI7TxqTIWE7K-_1_9I7G4LBLL_nMODvZXOZ0R20D2pdUq2ciTAQgJORG5RcafZ_cxP9Tel_7hwjGQXKCJJ5nN9HXsZ9PUPrf8PdJEjiZ2kVEiRrxgX0kY8JLzH2eGCKT0p4i2T-C9HriShY%3D)

Since 2001, I’ve been deployed nine times to 70 countries to defend our shared conservative American values.

I obtained a Master's degree from Harvard and a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins University in Security and Nuclear Deterrence. I also received my MBA degree.

[**CHIP IN TO SEND A NAVY SEAL TO THE SENATE**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=261f735fc51c4472a15c82eed75934a6&_e=Wcpm4k0dSdI6B_qRxfVaBZC31Z2k-y7s4OHoHFMqAEfAC6MzJbzp69ff0wlzT-p_N1ewSdycnF-nR1FVOERjBg27A34I7enMOkbp8nJUv9pDAvzW3MlvhTLg64O34xjNpkQIGjiGFL5GilBBhlutsAch_5Zt6czVM6to9xKktjmmUKVYZC6m2raCnkqu8FhEK8WraH7ioAEwgPU1qvHvyUe-lKw2nJw5Z4jCyPgBWpo77KCdJwPncGAjsWYrx2mtq7dZNu1xD5hqGb11_8QvRbV-ShrNiwiYa3BvdEy9KS6hAGAkxqS3-nLe0BZmR2O_LZfJw1mypf-yNoAGnzMwICwA_KeI4eZ_2WxwASoFZWXJh9F2gRGauxrY9HnEj1x0NgLGFPQUSq75Dk6dQQrQMZt8Hcqi3cZderEDxadC1o0%3D)
So when people tell me this will be one of the most challenging things I’ll ever endure, I smile and nod.

The simple truth is that I believe that my purpose in this life is to serve others, and _**[I’m hopeful that if you don’t donate today, you’ll allow me to earn your support in the coming months.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=261f735fc51c4472a15c82eed75934a6&_e=Wcpm4k0dSdI6B_qRxfVaBZC31Z2k-y7s4OHoHFMqAEfAC6MzJbzp69ff0wlzT-p_N1ewSdycnF-nR1FVOERjBg27A34I7enMOkbp8nJUv9pDAvzW3MlvhTLg64O34xjNpkQIGjiGFL5GilBBhlutsAch_5Zt6czVM6to9xKktjmmUKVYZC6m2raCnkqu8FhEK8WraH7ioAEwgPU1qvHvyUe-lKw2nJw5Z4jCyPgBWpo77KCdJwPncGAjsWYrx2mtq7dZNu1xD5hqGb11_8QvReGDnVHsA2cQLG6vTCb_NIa67YEoox2KFB8ZFgBaUpNx44kxNTclLJBOlbcD3N3PQ0nH9N99p1iAqgAZBS7KwD1pyyIVjY18MiGEQdMI5xCvHz0C0atVmvwwmDwh0F_EnUnL6SfBbqZSPAMk0ugPm28%3D) **_

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=261f735fc51c4472a15c82eed75934a6&_e=Wcpm4k0dSdI6B_qRxfVaBZC31Z2k-y7s4OHoHFMqAEfAC6MzJbzp69ff0wlzT-p_N1ewSdycnF-nR1FVOERjBg27A34I7enMOkbp8nJUv9pDAvzW3MlvhTLg64O34xjNpkQIGjiGFL5GilBBhlutsAch_5Zt6czVM6to9xKktjmmUKVYZC6m2raCnkqu8FhEK8WraH7ioAEwgPU1qvHvyUe-lKw2nJw5Z4jCyPgBWpo77KCdJwPncGAjsWYrx2mtq7dZNu1xD5hqGb11_8QvRfdwNieFRySAmSohO5Px6NoLDPGqcxkUxq44mwfmTvGqiNck2f_3rXYNVaTeRZZCp4VgvQIUZmEbKriDbJYQ1qQqr8HVgWTC3khH8DrzjcW4-0FPzNtzIhqmABZKfCTDx4GK5xoXtB9JXqmrmViqovM%3D)

_**[I'd be so grateful if you could chip in $5, $10, or even $50 right now.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=261f735fc51c4472a15c82eed75934a6&_e=Wcpm4k0dSdI6B_qRxfVaBZC31Z2k-y7s4OHoHFMqAEfAC6MzJbzp69ff0wlzT-p_N1ewSdycnF-nR1FVOERjBg27A34I7enMOkbp8nJUv9pDAvzW3MlvhTLg64O34xjNpkQIGjiGFL5GilBBhlutsAch_5Zt6czVM6to9xKktjmmUKVYZC6m2raCnkqu8FhEK8WraH7ioAEwgPU1qvHvyUe-lKw2nJw5Z4jCyPgBWpo77KCdJwPncGAjsWYrx2mtq7dZNu1xD5hqGb11_8QvRcS0-LPPX1Wb-3gug-eBb7I_6QMKZsY7G0RcRwTz_NfsxRr2c9NDiKDh0E_nviidqwauVYIKq5ogLAx7emGCo8Nf7mFAdLm1hYg3Z8_mDQ4_YSbwDmum3tDcanyXeA9xeAGoIsIvcZWECajxA-3ihUs%3D)**_

clean_body: I’m just an ordinary guy from Minnesota who was asked to do extraordinary things for our country now I am asking you to open this and read the first few paragraphs | Fellow Conservative, My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps vet, avid hockey player, and lifelong Minnesotan. I know it’s early in the 2026 election cycle and you may not be paying attention to races in their infancy, like mine, still, I’m reaching out to you today to tell you a little about myself, who I am, and to make my case to earn your support in the upcoming battle I’m currently running headfirst into. I’m running for the U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, who, if you can believe it, is politically more radical than the former VP nominee. People like the lieutenant governor were leading the violent unrest in Minneapolis in the summer of 2020.While the governor, whom the nation embarrassingly became acquainted with, eventually called for law and order in the street; his lieutenant governor was preparing a lawsuit against the Minneapolis Police Department for discrimination. The Minnesota I grew up in was far away from the world these two government officials call home. As the son of two working-class parents, I have nothing in common with either my opponent or her boss, former VP candidate and Minnesota Governor Tim Walz. I grew up playing hockey and joined the military on my 18th birthday in October 2001, less than two months after the horrific attack on New York, Pennsylvania, and Washington, D.C. Unlike Governor Walz, I was proud to deploy to over 70 countries in service to our nation;I didn’t retire before being shipped out to serve our nation in war. I’ve willingly put myself into harm’s way more times than I can count in order to protect the American people, our shared conservative values, and our democratic way of life. I never imagined that I would run for high office, but everytime I came home from deployment things in Minnesota and the country seemed to have gotten worse because of the radical left policies. I’m doing this because of the state of our current leadership. Minnesota is currently being led by two radical Democrats who have done their best to push this state as far left as anyone could tolerate. Something had to be done. With Sen. Tina Smith’s recent retirement announcement, now is a time to leap into the unknown—something I’ve done and found very fulfilling. While Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican in a presidential election since 1976, we’re not a deep blue state. This election isn’t going to be an easy one for a Republican to win, but throughout my life and career I have always defied the odds. And as a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I excel in harsh environments - on and off the battlefield. I love our country, so on my 18th birthday in October 2001, I enlisted in the United States Marine Corps with a deep desire to serve my nation, make my parents proud, and defend freedoms. Twenty-four years later, I’m still looking to serve Minnesotans in service to our nation - that's why I'm running for the United States Senate. Since 2001, I’ve been deployed nine times to 70 countries to defend our shared conservative American values. I obtained a Master's degree from Harvard and a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins University in Security and Nuclear Deterrence. I also received my MBA degree. So when people tell me this will be one of the most challenging things I’ll ever endure, I smile and nod. The simple truth is that I believe that my purpose in this life is to serve others, and I’m just a regular guy from Minnesota who was asked to do extraordinary things who wants to make my mom proud, serve my country, and do good by the people I meet. With gratitude, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

body:
Here's what we know: |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107890480/546161223/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE540_20250517_RollingThunderRS_PL&sourceid=1056178&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWUxMTQ1NS01NTMzLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fg0trMJOYd8_BxMnE_iY-nEvkWNErJ5mg-TmgkEaeYM=) Peter – Have you heard about the GOP's new anti-choice agenda?

In coordination with the country's most powerful anti-abortion groups, **_Republicans are taking steps to ban abortion pills and roll back Americans' fundamental freedoms._**

🚨 Just a few days ago, Sec. of Health and Human Services **Robert F. Kennedy Jr.** ordered the FDA to re-review mifepristone, an FDA-approved safe and effective medication used in nearly two-thirds of abortions nationwide. ****[**This is an inflection point, Peter. Can you donate today to help take back power and replace these anti-choice extremists with Democratic pro-choice women?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107890481/546161224/-1082512980?refcode=WUEFE540_20250517_RollingThunderRS_PL&sourceid=1056178&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWUxMTQ1NS01NTMzLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fg0trMJOYd8_BxMnE_iY-nEvkWNErJ5mg-TmgkEaeYM=)**** | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107890482/546161225/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE540_20250517_RollingThunderRS_PL&sourceid=1056178&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWUxMTQ1NS01NTMzLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fg0trMJOYd8_BxMnE_iY-nEvkWNErJ5mg-TmgkEaeYM=)
---

Republicans just handed over their anti-choice agenda (they're internally calling it "Rolling Thunder"). Here's what it includes:
* Banning safe, FDA-approved abortion pills like mifepristone
* Blocking online prescriptions and mail delivery of abortion medication through telemedicine
* Shortening the window for abortion access (in states with partial bans) from 10 weeks of pregnancy to just seven — before many people know they're pregnant
* Suing doctors and manufacturers in shield-law states who prescribe pills across state lines
* Stripping federal funding from organizations like Planned Parenthood

And they're already putting this plan into motion:
* Missouri Republican U.S. Sen. **Josh Hawley** just introduced a bill requiring in-person doctor visits for abortion medication, plus added surveillance.
* In a dog-whistle move, the FDA signaled it wouldn't challenge mifepristone unless "new data" emerged — so the GOP responded by immediately releasing a new junk science "report" riddled with misinformation from a right-wing think tank.
* Now, RFK Jr. is ordering the FDA to follow through on that challenge.

Anti-abortion groups are seizing on Republican control of Congress and the chaos of another Trump term to push their extreme, unpopular agenda. But Democratic pro-choice women are standing up, fighting back, and building campaigns that WILL take back power this cycle.

clean_body: Here's what we know: | = Peter – Have you heard about the GOP's new anti-choice agenda? In coordination with the country's most powerful anti-abortion groups, Republicans are taking steps to ban abortion pills and roll back Americans' fundamental freedoms. 🚨 Just a few days ago, Sec. of Health and Human Services Robert F. Kennedy Jr. ordered the FDA to re-review mifepristone, an FDA-approved safe and effective medication used in nearly two-thirds of abortions nationwide. **= | = Republicans just handed over their anti-choice agenda (they're internally calling it "Rolling Thunder"). Here's what it includes: Banning safe, FDA-approved abortion pills like mifepristone Blocking online prescriptions and mail delivery of abortion medication through telemedicine Shortening the window for abortion access (in states with partial bans) from 10 weeks of pregnancy to just seven — before many people know they're pregnant Suing doctors and manufacturers in shield-law states who prescribe pills across state lines Stripping federal funding from organizations like Planned Parenthood And they're already putting this plan into motion: Missouri Republican U.S. Sen. Josh Hawley just introduced a bill requiring in-person doctor visits for abortion medication, plus added surveillance. In a dog-whistle move, the FDA signaled it wouldn't challenge mifepristone unless "new data" emerged — so the GOP responded by immediately releasing a new junk science "report" riddled with misinformation from a right-wing think tank. Now, RFK Jr. is ordering the FDA to follow through on that challenge. Anti-abortion groups are seizing on Republican control of Congress and the chaos of another Trump term to push their extreme, unpopular agenda. But Democratic pro-choice women are standing up, fighting back, and building campaigns that WILL take back power this cycle. =** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, the EMILYs List team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. # [#]
Hey Peter, it’s George.

Before you log off for the night, I wanted to reach out with a quick update.

First, here’s the bad news. We’re off to a slower start than usual this month and as of right now, we’re still falling short of our May mid-month fundraising goal.

But it’s not all bad news: This grassroots team has always had my back and I’m confident that if everyone reading this pitches in a few bucks, we’ll be able to close the gap by midnight.

So, Peter: Will you please chip in $15 or whatever you can today using this personal link below to help us reach our goal? https://secure.actblue.com/donate/latimer-em-fr-may25?amount=15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/latimer-em-fr-may25?amount=15]

I can’t thank you enough, Peter.

George

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/latimer-em-footer-23 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/latimer-em-footer-23]

George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality.

name: MAGA Senate Support Confirmation Division
subject: Response Missing: Do You Regret Your MAGA Vote?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
President Trump and Senate Republicans need to know who still has their back—confirm your status now. | **President Trump and his group of Senate Republicans allies have been delivering on campaign promises:**

✅ Cut a HUGE trade deal with the UK--more American jobs, less globalist nonsense.

✅ SLAPPED Tariffs on cheaters--protecting American workers and making other countries pay up.

✅ CLOSED the border--illegal crossings way down, finally enforcing the law.

✅ DESTROYED job--killing regulations—bringing back energy independence and boosting our economy.

Despite these achievements, the Mainstream Media and the Radical Left continue to question the resolve of Trump supporters. **They suggest that the America First movement is losing momentum.**

name: PETITION FOLLOW-UP (protectvoting.org)
subject: You’re footing the bill for Trump’s parade...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
We won’t stand for this
| Donald Trump just CONFIRMED that taxpayers will foot the bill for his birthday military parade: _7,500 troops, 25 tanks, and more extravagance._

**But we still don’t have YOUR name in our petition files... you don’t support Trump’s parade,_do you?!_**

[**We’re giving you one last chance to correct the record by MIDNIGHT. Add your name DEMANDING Congress defund Trump’s parade »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-v2/?source=VPP_20250517_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=6&akid=19883%2E878179%2EcnMVP_) | [ADD MY NAME NOW »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-v2/?source=VPP_20250517_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=7&akid=19883%2E878179%2EcnMVP_)
---
Thank you!
_The Voter Protection Project_
**–BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE–**
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-v2/?source=VPP_20250517_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=8&akid=19883%2E878179%2EcnMVP_) [**Trump wants to fund his dictator-style parade with OUR Social Security, Medicaid, and tax dollars. If you’re as FURIOUS as we are, sign our petition to CANCEL this vile parade immediately! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-v2/?source=VPP_20250517_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=9&akid=19883%2E878179%2EcnMVP_) | [224 MORE LOCAL SIGNATURES REQUIRED: DEMAND CONGRESS CANCEL TRUMP’S MILITARY PARADE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-v2/?source=VPP_20250517_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=10&akid=19883%2E878179%2EcnMVP_)
---
❌ Donald Trump wants to slash **$880 BILLION** from Medicaid. ❌
❌ He’s taking a **HATCHET** to Social Security. ❌
❌ He’s **GUTTING** education and healthcare funding. ❌

** _Trump is making these cuts for one reason only — TO LINE HIS OWN POCKETS._**

_His first order of business with OUR tax dollars and benefits?_ Bankrolling a $92 million tank parade to celebrate his birthday.

[**With Trump’s parade just 1 MONTH from today, we need to ACT FAST. But we’re still 224 signatures short in your state — add your name by MIDNIGHT or we may be forced to pull down our petition! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-v2/?source=VPP_20250517_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=11&akid=19883%2E878179%2EcnMVP_)
[SIGN NOW: CANCEL TRUMP’S MILITARY PARADE! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-v2/?source=VPP_20250517_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=12&akid=19883%2E878179%2EcnMVP_)
---
Thank you for taking a stand with us,

_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19883%2E878179%2EcnMVP_). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19883%2E878179%2EcnMVP_).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=19883%2E878179%2EcnMVP_) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=19883%2E878179%2EcnMVP_). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=19883%2E878179%2EcnMVP_)

subject: A deliberate test run for a nationwide Republican strategy:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
While the far right keeps attempting to silence voters, we’ll keep fighting back for our democracy.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107890896/546163023/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM2NGExZDg2LTU5MzMtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=h-xufx5RPwUbRf2f1JYTyjq6s2OLov8nvYBx5S_d5E8=&emci=ceb91296-9a32-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=c64a1d86-5933-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=8431045)

Peter, Earlier this week — more than six months after Election Day — Justice Allison Riggs was sworn in for another term on the North Carolina Supreme Court. Why the delay? Because her Republican opponent refused to accept defeat and sued to overturn the election. Justice Riggs' victory proves that when we stand united and fight with unwavering determination, we can defend our democracy against these attacks. **But I need you to understand something critical: This wasn't just about one seat on one court. This was a deliberate test run for a nationwide Republican strategy:**
1. Lose a free and fair election
2. File baseless legal challenges that would change the rules of the election after voting is over
3. Use partisan courts to overturn the will of voters

Here in North Carolina, we've often been a laboratory or a showcase for Republicans’ worst anti-democratic experiments. First came the voter suppression laws. Then the extreme gerrymandering. Now they're seeing whether they can simply overturn elections when they don't like the results. **And what they perfect here, they export _everywhere_.** After all my years fighting for democracy in the Tarheel State, I've learned one unshakable truth: When Republicans lose fair fights, they don't change their policies — they change the rules. And with each passing election, their tactics grow more brazen and more dangerous. **This fight is bigger than North Carolina. It's about the future of free and fair elections across America — from ending gerrymandering to upholding the will of the people.** [**So while the far right keeps attempting to silence voters, we’ll keep fighting back for a truly representative democracy, where people are free to elect leaders who reflect their beliefs. Will you rush a donation to power this urgent work?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107890897/546163024/469381256?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_TedNC_email_20250517-NDRC-Tier1-TedNC_var1&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250517-NDRC-Tier1-TedNC_var1&utm_campaign=TedNC&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM2NGExZDg2LTU5MzMtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=h-xufx5RPwUbRf2f1JYTyjq6s2OLov8nvYBx5S_d5E8=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

**Peter,

In November, redistricting, voting rights, worker rights, women’s rights, LGBTQ+ rights, and so much more are on the ballot here in Pennsylvania.

Our State Courts are the firewall between Pennsylvanians and Trump’s extremism. # [Bending America Over for Terrorists](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=163796759&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzNzk2NzU5LCJpYXQiOjE3NDc1MTMyNDcsImV4cCI6MTc1MDEwNTI0NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.GdbesytujinMM6pcf98ZPpjmsv_rc0EjsC-s9xgfFEU)
### Making America Weak Again
| | [Lucas Kunce](https://substack.com/@lucastyree)
---
| May 17
---
| [](https://substack.com/@lucastyree)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=163796759&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzNzk2NzU5LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0NzUxMzI0NywiZXhwIjoxNzUwMTA1MjQ3LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTg2Nzc0MSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.NDVgpVYwZzBmRm-3czPsYgprFCRPePLGxFnLJwz5Mxs&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=163796759&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzNzk2NzU5LCJpYXQiOjE3NDc1MTMyNDcsImV4cCI6MTc1MDEwNTI0NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.GdbesytujinMM6pcf98ZPpjmsv_rc0EjsC-s9xgfFEU&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=163796759&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzNzk2NzU5LCJpYXQiOjE3NDc1MTMyNDcsImV4cCI6MTc1MDEwNTI0NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.GdbesytujinMM6pcf98ZPpjmsv_rc0EjsC-s9xgfFEU)

| | [](https://substack..58EhpA4-3g6dhjiexKp0_fwhT4KVCBwT5xxPEYmwbEw?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/lucaskunce/p/bending-america-over-for-terrorists?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

One of Donald Trump's big draws for his voters is that he's supposedly different-- in ways they think are good. Like being willing to shake the status quo and upend old ideas. Yet he's spent the last week proving what a sham that is by expanding on America's worst presidential tradition.
A tradition that, like the annual White House Easter Egg roll, has long transcended party. It's become as American as apple pie, fall football, and the Fourth of July. No matter what they say before getting elected, no President since Jimmy Carter has been willing to choose American morals, national security, independence, or freedom, over this one exasperating policy.
Lucas's Substack is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9sdWNhc2t1bmNlLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.Ka5AxohNkoL1ldZViMA2zeT7ipb_FAlWkv2wO3yb554?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=163796759)
In fact, I can't think of a single US foreign policy that has been more consistent year in and year out than this: the President of the US bending the knee to the House of Saud.
An autocratic regime that undeniably [funds](https://substack.com/redirect/0d986854-0a7d-4a97-9818-68f1eea4b1b6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [arms](https://substack.com/redirect/cc7cf88f-e463-4902-b6ff-45ee6802ebd2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and [exports](https://substack.com/redirect/4e6765e5-2a4b-47e7-8ef6-557484bab820?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) terrorism.
That has [ties](https://substack.com/redirect/06037b77-6d80-4bda-b56b-e13e2c4ed20d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to the 9/11 attacks and [encouraged](https://substack.com/redirect/4076d2fb-763c-4765-a0b6-b830f0056bac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the pointless wars that followed.
That oppresses [women](https://substack.com/redirect/a65773c9-f274-44a3-8ba9-8e445f5f3948?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), arrests [dissidents](https://substack.com/redirect/b6a0c9d9-55dd-4d01-a14c-c8614deb38d3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and executes [journalists](https://substack.com/redirect/242f5e73-eadd-471d-a8c9-4593ab7c1b8b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
That colludes with our [elites](https://substack.com/redirect/7ab3875d-ed41-4d0d-8864-5b40a6510268?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and our [adversaries](https://substack.com/redirect/67a4f1fa-d00c-4efe-81a8-d4472d651437?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to steal from American families.
That uses their huge oil revenues to infiltrate our [politics](https://substack.com/redirect/47c5fba6-7e2c-4a9e-a4f3-5772de1ccb0f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), our [economy](https://substack.com/redirect/b9b2450b-0085-4058-ba22-1962a19f8b1c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and our [farmland](https://substack.com/redirect/45224fa3-efb4-4145-b871-6180dbc2c76c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
That [admits](https://substack.com/redirect/62d377d0-f64f-4747-b107-5002a32ff169?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to fostering an era of conflict that has [claimed](https://substack.com/redirect/dc49917a-6b4b-49fe-8250-2d390bf5c6b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the lives of more than 7,000 American service members, [cost](https://substack.com/redirect/2ec48384-8320-4718-b839-75643fa544c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) American taxpayers trillions of dollars, and contributed to [worldwide instability](https://substack.com/redirect/d08cf2fd-0ab8-4972-8442-87bc79e30018?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
That has [nuclear ambitions](https://substack.com/redirect/1c25cea5-af63-4d36-b056-fe2ce3f9bbc8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that threaten our national security and the stability of the region and the world.
And here is Mr. Tough Guy himself, Mr. Different, bending down before the Saudis for the whole world to see. Just like, or possibly worse, than everyone who came before him.
His only innovation? Expanding the sycophancy to the whole neighborhood to get himself a new jumbo jet.
Instead of making the Saudis a much-deserved [addition](https://substack.com/redirect/bfb84e69-98ee-4cb6-a68e-2fb9b69002b0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to our state sponsors of terrorism list, Trump is luncheoning in Riyadh alongside the CEO's of America's big tech and investment banks Blackstone and BlackRock, parroting Saudi-prepared talking points, and [celebrating a so-called $600 billion Saudi investment in America as some great achievement](https://substack.com/redirect/604cf16e-7f1c-42cf-912c-de78b346136b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
News flash: the Saudis were going to invest that money here and buy our arms anyway, because it's profitable for them. The most insulting part of it all is that this $600 billion "investment" is essentially just a small fraction of our own money being lent back to us by the the people who stole it from us. It's literally money the Saudis appropriated-- using their oil cartel's monopoly power-- from hard working Americans at the pump over the years. A theft that ironically, they are only able to perpetrate because we [spend billions of dollars](https://substack.com/redirect/8ff31280-895e-48b0-85fd-7f651b002fdf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) every year protecting their shipping lanes with our military.
As I [wrote in the American Prospect](https://substack.com/redirect/55ee04a1-fce4-48c0-be79-7645ab2393d8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), I'm a Marine veteran with [multiple deployments](https://substack.com/redirect/0443130c-341b-4d0e-b60f-b3d7ba255f23?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in the disastrous war on terror and years of [experience](https://substack.com/redirect/d9e8f492-a75e-4fe2-ab62-7a0e1a0cad30?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as an international negotiations and counter-WMD officer on the Joint Staff, and deals like this Saudi deal put American families in danger, dishonor American service members, and make our country a joke on the world stage.
It isn't just because the Saudis have already proven we can't trust them--like when they [broke an agreement](https://substack.com/redirect/8c10eef7-b61f-48a1-911d-666f978ecb9d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) a couple years ago to keep oil prices low, or when they were [exposed](https://substack.com/redirect/fd140eba-149f-4dcc-8fbf-3c4852e3728f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for doling out American anti-tank missiles and armored vehicles to al Qaeda-linked fighters.
It's because while serving in Asia, Europe, and right here at home, I've seen firsthand how this supposed ally has done more harm to the American people than any other regime on the planet.
In Iraq, I [led a team](https://substack.com/redirect/468963ba-c008-40f3-b389-6c200ff50bee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of a dozen Marines training Iraqi police and running missions in the Sunni Triangle. Just a few years later, most of the Iraqi officers we trained were either killed by or fled from the Islamic State--a barbaric terrorist organization that relied on the Saudis for [funding](https://substack.com/redirect/3db3eaa8-702f-4ba9-997a-4430dd05c5d6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and theological [inspiration](https://substack.com/redirect/eb36dfe0-7fb7-4fe5-b34f-393f01d3af91?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as a part of Saudi Arabia's growing list of [proxy wars](https://substack.com/redirect/84642c74-f138-4157-8923-77081d5dae7e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
In Afghanistan, where two Marines in my battalion were lost, I [spoke](https://substack.com/redirect/f51a5e50-9423-46d0-831b-ed5a3be07040?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) with a Taliban prisoner in the Herat city penitentiary who was adamant that he'd kill me as soon as he had the chance. His organization was [bankrolled](https://substack.com/redirect/30f0e2ef-7756-4d60-812d-ecd6acf41dfc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by our supposed Saudi friends; that didn't appear to blunt his resolve.
On my first assignment with the Joint Staff, I [worked](https://substack.com/redirect/b1de9866-138e-48a3-be18-2a7a425943f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) with the National Security Council, State Department, Department of Homeland Security, FBI, and CIA to combat the proliferation of nuclear technology and weapons of mass destruction. And now we have two Presidents in row, Biden then Trump, working toward deals to put the Saudis on the path to a nuclear program. I know the danger of adding the world's most effective exporter of [extremism](https://substack.com/redirect/fa156685-ea53-4af6-8e52-e2e8f4659930?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to that marketplace of death.
As an international negotiations [officer](https://substack.com/redirect/1926e61d-cfad-425a-90d7-7397a646c7fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) at the [Pentagon](https://substack.com/redirect/83278d49-19ad-44a0-aa0b-674e05676baa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), I watched as the Saudi-led cartel, OPEC+, used its energy monopoly to [suck us](https://substack.com/redirect/7ab3875d-ed41-4d0d-8864-5b40a6510268?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and our [allies](https://substack.com/redirect/8965c47e-58b4-45b7-ba15-79607e812b48?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) dry, and [dragged us](https://substack.com/redirect/ba14706c-b78a-4c1f-aaeb-2c2e3e396ef7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) into a new era of overseas conflicts that have brought us the closest we've been to [nuclear confrontation](https://substack.com/redirect/1800969f-66fd-4ac7-ad16-df7e04798273?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) since the Cold War.
Over the decades, our politicians' Saudi-centered foreign policy has left us trillions of dollars in the red while we [protect them](https://substack.com/redirect/04717974-fd54-4418-93b0-9cef51eb1f54?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [fight wars](https://substack.com/redirect/6894d54e-8639-4d60-9f5c-49fdfb49c122?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for them, and [risk](https://substack.com/redirect/fb1d6105-e2d0-4a17-a0f9-f86929d7180b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) our [lives](https://substack.com/redirect/e314e895-d37b-4794-b70c-3ee7d5e7b84d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for them. It's left the Saudis fat and rich--so much so that they're using the profits from our one-sided relationship to move ahead in [AI development](https://substack.com/redirect/919a7830-52ef-4d13-ad68-6f5f9807209a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), launch huge [mega-construction projects](https://substack.com/redirect/06f9e34f-2e2f-4418-9350-cdb709088798?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [help Elon Musk buy Twitter](https://substack.com/redirect/d030be3c-e1f7-4209-8772-908397c5d3ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and even transition to the [next generation of energy](https://substack.com/redirect/46e3695a-2819-4a81-97c5-4089565dc866?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Throwing a couple of our own nickels back at us, as investment that's going to earn them a nice profit, is not a victory, Mr. President.
It's just another example of cowardice regarding the Saudis. Like President Obama, after calling the Saudis "[free riders](https://substack.com/redirect/7bd0a377-1a90-45c8-b266-60c466f93ad2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" for taking advantage of us, vetoing a bill passed by Congress that would allow the families of 9/11 victims to sue the Saudis for their ties to the 2001 attacks. Like Trump 1.0 campaigning on banning Saudi oil in an attempt to secure independence from "[our foes and the oil cartels](https://substack.com/redirect/6ae1c62d-2248-4baf-9f56-994cd476d54f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)," only to then proactively offer to use our military to [defend](https://substack.com/redirect/7f07249c-00a2-4294-b283-27dd974745d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Saudi oil supplies as president. Or [Biden in 2019 promising](https://substack.com/redirect/de53fdb9-3484-456e-b1d9-360547abbace?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to make Saudi Arabia a pariah state, only to become one of their [staunchest allies](https://substack.com/redirect/84641c4f-b37b-4cf2-8daa-bdb7caa3dafe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ever in the Oval Office.
So much for being different. On the plus side, even his biggest MAGA supporters, like Laura Loomer and Ben Shapiro, [are calling him out for it](https://substack.com/redirect/747f712d-32b6-4dad-855c-24a4f0d1a8b4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
There might never be a better time to remind people just how corrupt he is.
Lucas

Making America Weak Again | | | May 17 | | | | | | | | | | | | One of Donald Trump's big draws for his voters is that he's supposedly different-- in ways they think are good. Like being willing to shake the status quo and upend old ideas. Yet he's spent the last week proving what a sham that is by expanding on America's worst presidential tradition. A tradition that, like the annual White House Easter Egg roll, has long transcended party. It's become as American as apple pie, fall football, and the Fourth of July. No matter what they say before getting elected, no President since Jimmy Carter has been willing to choose American morals, national security, independence, or freedom, over this one exasperating policy. Lucas's Substack is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. In fact, I can't think of a single US foreign policy that has been more consistent year in and year out than this: the President of the US bending the knee to the House of Saud. An autocratic regime that undeniably , , and terrorism. That has to the 9/11 attacks and the pointless wars that followed. That oppresses , arrests , and executes . That colludes with our and our to steal from American families. That uses their huge oil revenues to infiltrate our , our , and our . That to fostering an era of conflict that has the lives of more than 7,000 American service members, American taxpayers trillions of dollars, and contributed to . That has that threaten our national security and the stability of the region and the world. And here is Mr. Tough Guy himself, Mr. Different, bending down before the Saudis for the whole world to see. Just like, or possibly worse, than everyone who came before him. His only innovation? Expanding the sycophancy to the whole neighborhood to get himself a new jumbo jet. Instead of making the Saudis a much-deserved to our state sponsors of terrorism list, Trump is luncheoning in Riyadh alongside the CEO's of America's big tech and investment banks Blackstone and BlackRock, parroting Saudi-prepared talking points, and . News flash: the Saudis were going to invest that money here and buy our arms anyway, because it's profitable for them. The most insulting part of it all is that this $600 billion "investment" is essentially just a small fraction of our own money being lent back to us by the the people who stole it from us. It's literally money the Saudis appropriated-- using their oil cartel's monopoly power-- from hard working Americans at the pump over the years. A theft that ironically, they are only able to perpetrate because we every year protecting their shipping lanes with our military. As I , I'm a Marine veteran with in the disastrous war on terror and years of as an international negotiations and counter-WMD officer on the Joint Staff, and deals like this Saudi deal put American families in danger, dishonor American service members, and make our country a joke on the world stage. It isn't just because the Saudis have already proven we can't trust them--like when they a couple years ago to keep oil prices low, or when they were for doling out American anti-tank missiles and armored vehicles to al Qaeda-linked fighters. It's because while serving in Asia, Europe, and right here at home, I've seen firsthand how this supposed ally has done more harm to the American people than any other regime on the planet. In Iraq, I of a dozen Marines training Iraqi police and running missions in the Sunni Triangle. Just a few years later, most of the Iraqi officers we trained were either killed by or fled from the Islamic State--a barbaric terrorist organization that relied on the Saudis for and theological as a part of Saudi Arabia's growing list of . In Afghanistan, where two Marines in my battalion were lost, I with a Taliban prisoner in the Herat city penitentiary who was adamant that he'd kill me as soon as he had the chance. His organization was by our supposed Saudi friends; that didn't appear to blunt his resolve. On my first assignment with the Joint Staff, I with the National Security Council, State Department, Department of Homeland Security, FBI, and CIA to combat the proliferation of nuclear technology and weapons of mass destruction. And now we have two Presidents in row, Biden then Trump, working toward deals to put the Saudis on the path to a nuclear program. I know the danger of adding the world's most effective exporter of to that marketplace of death. As an international negotiations at the , I watched as the Saudi-led cartel, OPEC+, used its energy monopoly to and our dry, and into a new era of overseas conflicts that have brought us the closest we've been to since the Cold War. Over the decades, our politicians' Saudi-centered foreign policy has left us trillions of dollars in the red while we , for them, and our for them. It's left the Saudis fat and rich--so much so that they're using the profits from our one-sided relationship to move ahead in , launch huge , , and even transition to the . Throwing a couple of our own nickels back at us, as investment that's going to earn them a nice profit, is not a victory, Mr. President. It's just another example of cowardice regarding the Saudis. Like President Obama, after calling the Saudis "" for taking advantage of us, vetoing a bill passed by Congress that would allow the families of 9/11 victims to sue the Saudis for their ties to the 2001 attacks. Like Trump 1.0 campaigning on banning Saudi oil in an attempt to secure independence from "," only to then proactively offer to use our military to Saudi oil supplies as president. Or to make Saudi Arabia a pariah state, only to become one of their ever in the Oval Office. So much for being different. On the plus side, even his biggest MAGA supporters, like Laura Loomer and Ben Shapiro, . There might never be a better time to remind people just how corrupt he is. This week MAGA world freaked out because former FBI director James Comey posted an Instagram photograph of a rock/shell formation that read "8647." **But the Trump team reaction to Comey 's image is the bigger threat and should be the larger story.**
Let's back up. On May 15, Comey posted a beach photograph of the "8647" and added the caption, "Cool shell formation on my beach walk." Most people, including the folks at Webster's dictionary, define 86 as a slang term that means "to eliminate" or "to get rid of." And Trump is the 47th President of the U.S.
So, Comey's post went viral and the former FBI director, fired by Trump in 2017, faced a torrent of criticism from MAGA supporters who accused him of threatening or encouraging a Trump assassination. Comey quicky apologized and took down his post, writing:
> I didn't realize some folks associate those numbers with violence. That didn't occur to me when I saw it. But I am opposed to violence, so I took the post down.
It's hard to believe that Comey didn't know what "86" means. But he certainly must have known, and it might have been his point, to show that the Trump team is 86'ing our nation's rule of law and due process. Sure enough, even before the Secret Service or DOJ began its Comey beach photo investigation, Tulsi Gabbard, Trump's Director of National Intelligence, went on Fox News and said Comey should be in jail.
Gabbard told Fox Host Jesse Waters, "James Comey should be held accountable and put behind bars for this." In other words, there should be no investigation, no evidence, no due process. Just lock him up, because Tulsi Gabbard, Attorney General Pam Bondi, and Donald Trump are mad at Comey and think he is a threat.
Sound familiar? Maryland father Kilmar Abrego Garcia was deported without due process and now sits in a jail in El Salvador because the Trump administration THOUGHT he was a member of the MS-13 criminal gang. (Emphasis on "thought.") And that thought or belief, without a court hearing or judicial ruling, sparked the Trump administration to send Garcia away. The Supreme Court ruled 9-0 that the administration must "facilitate" Garcia's return. But they've ignored that ruling.
`Get Full Access To Blue Amp Media For Under $1.14/Week!`
_**Get what monopoly media ignores from a former Biden ad man/Emmy-winning news anchor**_
_**Amplify Good. Support Indy Media!**_
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.YQ0N6bogxrSvT4AnFPfE6nOSLRdrewow4QI1eNhbWR8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=163793847)
Back to Comey. The Secret Service reviews public threats or statements like this all the time. Agents examine the source of the threats and make a determination if the person has a plan or is collecting weapons to carry out their threat. If the person does not have a plan and was just mouthing off, the case goes nowhere.
That's because the courts have long held that free speech rights extend to public criticism of the President, and even saying you wish the President was eliminated. Trump himself has exercised his free speech rights against his political opponents. In 2024, Trump spoke at a public forum and lashed out at former January 6th committee member Liz Cheney. Trump said:
> she's a radical war hawk. Let's put her with a rifle standing there with 9 barrels shooting at her. Okay? Let's see how she feels about it you know when the guns are trained on her face.
It sounded like Trump was calling for Cheney's execution. And Trump's rhetoric could have inspired violence against Cheney. But was Trump investigated or charged? Of course not, because as gross as Trump's rhetoric was, the Biden justice department knew Trump was within his free speech rights.
I don't think it was wise or responsible for James Comey to post the photograph. However, Comey has free speech rights just like Trump and the rest of us. And the Trump team's over-the-top reaction is making the point that Comey may have been trying to amplify.
The Trump administration routinely throws out the rule of law and shreds our system of justice. That tyrannical, Trump approach is an existential threat to our nation. It is far more dangerous than any beach collection or formation of rocks photographed and posted on social media.

Everybody over here is busy preparing for the California Democratic Party convention featuring special guest...🥁 TIM WALZ! California is the epicenter of our question to take back control of the U.S. House, and that’s why Tim Walz is coming all the way to our state to help us get motivated and organized. = = = = = = Gov. Walz would not come all the way to California to speak unless he agreed with the importance of the 2026 elections. He knows just what we do: that the key to taking the House majority runs straight through California. It’s as simple as this: If we don’t re-elect every single California incumbent in 2026 and flip more seats from red to blue, there is essentially no path forward to re-take the House. = = Thanks for being with us, \- Rusty Hicks Chair, CADEM | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. The Left wants to take parents out of the equation and hand over life-altering decisions to schools, judges, and radical activists.**But AMAC Action believes parents—not woke ideologues—should have the final say in what’s best for their children.** This battle has never been more important, because a poll from one of these “pro-trans” organizations claims they’ve found **_“High Support Among Parents for Transgender, Nonbinary Children”..._**
---
_“Most adults would be willing to take all actions tested to support their child if they came out as transgender or nonbinary, including: encouraging other family members or friends to respect their gender identity (71%); use their chosen name and pronouns correctly (69%); and not vote for political candidates that support anti-transgender policies (65%)”_
---
Worse, here are some of the supposed “findings” from these radical pro-trans organizations:
---
* “38,600 transgender youth live in states that have “banned access” to facilities, such as bathrooms”.
* “120,200 transgender youth live in states that restrict access to school athletics.”

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: My opponent just launched over $1 million in ads
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
I'm gearing up to make history again — with donors like you by my side. |
#
---
Hi, my name is Abigail Spanberger. I'm a three-term congresswoman from Virginia, a former CIA officer, and the only Democrat in America who can flip a Governor's seat in 2025. **My opponent just launched over $1 million in ads.** Soon the floodgates will open. The same billionaires who got Trump elected will come after me and everything we've built together. _But I'm not intimidated by far-right extremists._ In 2018, I won a seat in Congress held by Republicans for fifty years, and I'm gearing up to make history again — with donors like you by my side. **[Will you split a donation between Tina Kotek and my campaign to help us run our own ads and win tough elections all over the country? body:
America’s being held together with duct tape and vibes. |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107892579/546168729/-1590518309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmVlMmU5NS02OTMzLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SCsO8wTgfJP6Tr5vAUrhkaFhlmNYGeJTRqHvtTn3BjQ=&emci=55bae2a2-9532-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=0fee2e95-6933-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7878003)
Friend, Let’s do a quick check-in on the Trump Cabinet, shall we? **His Surgeon General nominee?** A wellness influencer who dropped out of her residency and now rails against vaccines on social media. **No active medical license.** No public health experience. _Just vibes._ **Well, what about Transportation Sec. Sean Duffy?** He told the public that Newark Airport was safe, _then quietly switched his wife’s flight to LaGuardia_ because he knew it wasn’t after radar outages, controller shortages, and chaos on the runways. **This isn’t a government. It’s a hazard.** Trump isn’t appointing public servants — **he’s putting your health and safety in the hands of conspiracy theorists, grifters, and _literal TikTokers._** If this makes your blood pressure rise, you’re not alone, friend. [**America is getting more dangerous with Trump in office — but we can fight back. name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Friend, you lit this match...
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
-------------------------

[Turning Point USA]
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/d6d917480da8466f8dc6ad4f1808f710-a1597dd5cbd64af1a3cdb8da4067fc61/63]

Friend,

We recently wrapped up one of Turning Point USA’s latest stops on
the American Comeback Tour at UC San Diego...

I wish you could have been there to see it.

Another packed quad. Students eager to listen. Flags waving. Cheers
for America. Energy you could feel in your bones.

_Not in Texas... Not in Florida..._ _CALIFORNIA._

The “Deep Blue” stronghold the Left said we’d never touch.

But we did. And we’ll keep going. BECAUSE OF PATRIOTS LIKE YOU.

[American Comeback Tour]
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/d6d917480da8466f8dc6ad4f1808f710-a1597dd5cbd64af1a3cdb8da4067fc61/63]

As I stood there looking out at the crowd — hundreds of young
patriots rising up in a place the Left said they owned — I
couldn’t help but think...

NEARLY 13 YEARS AGO, ALL OF THIS FELT... _IMPOSSIBLE._

Back then, Turning Point USA wasn’t the cultural phenomenon it is
today.

It wasn’t an office. It wasn’t a team. _It was just me._

No money. No connections. Just a desk and an old computer in a dusty
garage in the Chicago suburbs.

_But what I did have was a vision..._

It was 2012. The Left controlled every classroom, every campus, and
nearly every corner of our culture.

Their narrative was everywhere: America was evil... Faith was
“oppressive”... Freedom was outdated... The Conservative movement
was dead...

_And most of all, young people belonged to the Left._

I DIDN’T BELIEVE THAT. I COULDN’T ACCEPT THAT. I COULDN’T JUST
STAND BY AND WATCH THE LEFT WIN.

Back then, it was no wonder WHY we were losing young people to the
Left...

The Conservative movement felt stale... Conservative organizations
felt like a snooze... And it felt like no one had an idea of how to
reach America’s youth...

I believed if we were ever going to win young people back for America,
we needed excitement. Energy. Passion. And ZEAL for our ideas.

MY DREAM WAS TO LAUNCH A CONSERVATIVE YOUTH MOVEMENT THAT WOULD
INSPIRE YOUNG PEOPLE TO STAND FOR TRUTH — AND LOVE THIS COUNTRY
AGAIN.

I didn’t know what I was going to call this dream... this feeling...
this movement.

So, I picked up the phone, called my dad, and said, “I think I’m
supposed to start something, but I don’t have a name for it...”

HE REPLIED... _"HOW ABOUT TURNING POINT?"_

And just like that, a fire was lit. Turning Point USA was born. On the
promise that we could TURN this country around, one young heart at a
time.

The early days were brutal.

I remember driving across the Chicago suburbs to small Tea Party
meetings talking about “generational theft”...

I remember my first Turning Point USA speaking event in Peoria,
Illinois during the summer of 2012, where just six people showed up...

AND I REMEMBER THE LOOK IN THEIR EYES — THOSE EARLY PATRIOTS —WHEN
I TOLD THEM THE VISION:

_“We’re going to create a youth movement that LOVES America.”_

_“We’re going to go on campus and win hearts and minds.”_

_“We’re going to push back — and we’re going to WIN.”_

They didn’t laugh... They didn’t walk out...

THEY BELIEVED. AND FRIEND — SO DID PATRIOTS LIKE YOU.

You see, this isn’t my story. This is YOUR story.

Because without patriots like you... _there is no Turning Point USA._

Without you... _there is no American Comeback story._

Without you... _there is no cultural shift happening right now in
schools, churches, homes, and on every campus across our great
nation._

You were there when the campus quads and halls were empty... stood by
us when our signs got torn down.

You had our backs when the mob showed up — when they shouted,
screamed, and tried to wipe us off the map.

YOU DIDN’T GIVE UP. AND NEITHER DID WE.

But we were never supposed to be winning...

The Left thought they owned this generation. They thought their
indoctrination had worked. _But they were wrong._

I remember standing at tables on hostile campuses with nothing but
flyers and hope, praying to have a conversation that would light a
spark.

I went where I was told a young conservative didn’t belong. And I
kept going back.

[Charlie Kirk American Comeback Tour]
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/d6d917480da8466f8dc6ad4f1808f710-a1597dd5cbd64af1a3cdb8da4067fc61/63]

AND THEN... SOMETHING HAPPENED... _THE STUDENTS STARTED LISTENING._

They started to question everything, think for themselves, and no
longer be afraid to stand up.

Then, they started showing up. _In DROVES._

And now? We’re not just watching history unfold... you and I are
making it.

FRIEND, JUST LOOK AT THE MOVEMENT WE’VE BUILT:

🔥 A network of 820,000+ conservative student activists
🔥 1,800+ college and high school chapters
🔥 All 50 states. No territory unclaimed.

🔥 16 BILLION+ total views across online platforms

🔥 5 MILLION+ daily viewers online
🔥 Over 10 million young people turned away from the Left
🔥 Students rising up — even in DEEP blue states

Friend, we’re not just winning arguments and “owning the libs”
anymore...

We’re winning hearts. We’re changing minds. We’re turning the
tide.

This generation wasn’t “lost.” _They were LIED to._

BUT BECAUSE OF PATRIOTS LIKE YOU — THEY’RE HEARING THE TRUTH.
THEY’RE FINDING THEIR VOICES. THEY’RE DISCOVERING THEIR COURAGE.
THEY’RE FALLING IN LOVE WITH THIS COUNTRY AGAIN!

[Students at American Comeback Tour]
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/d6d917480da8466f8dc6ad4f1808f710-a1597dd5cbd64af1a3cdb8da4067fc61/63]

_Friend, praise God!_

And you know what? This generation is just getting started.

BUT LET ME SAY THIS CLEARLY: THE BATTLE IS FAR FROM OVER.

The Left is on the ropes — but still dangerous.

They’re doubling down with new tactics. They’re more aggressive
than ever in our schools, our media, our digital spaces.

They’re coming after our students harder than ever before —
because they know we’re winning.

_We cannot give them back an inch._

So now, as we look back on how far we’ve come... It’s time to
fight even harder.

We’re going to press in. We’re going to drive deeper into enemy
territory.

WE’RE GOING TO REACH MORE STUDENTS, TRAIN MORE LEADERS, AND DESTROY
MORE STRONGHOLDS OF LEFTIST CONTROL.

Not with violence. Not with hate. But with truth. With courage. And
with patriots like YOU standing shoulder-to-shoulder with us.

Friend, I want you to feel proud as you read this today.

Because this movement — the energy, the fire, the growth, the
headlines — it belongs to patriots like you...

The grassroots patriots who lit the match... fanned the flames...
stood in the gap.

AND NOW, WE’RE RAISING UP THE MOST CONSERVATIVE, MOST PATRIOTIC,
MOST FIRED-UP YOUTH GENERATION IN 50 YEARS.

That’s not hype. That’s reality. And it’s only possible because
of our proud supporters, people like you, who never gave up.

I CAN’T SAY THANK YOU ENOUGH TO THE PATRIOTS WHO’VE FOUGHT
ALONGSIDE US... THOSE WHO LOVED THIS COUNTRY ENOUGH TO INVEST IN ITS
FUTURE... THOSE WHO BELIEVED THIS COUNTRY WAS WORTH SAVING.

Let’s keep our foot on the gas. Let’s keep changing minds. Let’s
keep winning this culture war.

Because we were never supposed to be winning... And yet here we are.

For America,

Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA

[Charlie Kirk]
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/d6d917480da8466f8dc6ad4f1808f710-a1597dd5cbd64af1a3cdb8da4067fc61/63]

P.S. Friend, thank you for reading what was admittedly a long email.

But I wanted you to know how far we’ve come and how thankful I am
for patriots like you!

And if this email stirred something in you... If you’d be proud to
be a part of the movement that’s going to save our GREAT nation...

If you want to see even MORE students come alive for truth, for God,
and for America...

Then I have good news.

RIGHT NOW, THROUGH THE MONTH OF MAY, EVERY SINGLE DONATION TO TURNING
POINT USA IS BEING MATCHED, DOLLAR-FOR-DOLLAR, UP TO $2.5 MILLION.

Why? Because an extremely generous Turning Point USA supporter wanted
to rally as many grassroots patriots as possible to DEFEAT the Left in
our culture... for good.

That means your impact gets DOUBLED.

THAT MEANS TWO TIMES THE STUDENTS YOU’LL REACH. TWO TIMES THE TRUTH
HEARD. TWO TIMES THE HEARTS AND MINDS YOU’LL WIN OVER FOR AMERICA.

So, if you’ve been waiting for the right moment to take your stand
— this is it. This is your chance to pour fuel on the fire that
patriots like you helped start.

You just won’t be supporting a cause anymore — you’ll be
powering a cultural REVOLUTION.

LET’S CARRY THE MOMENTUM THROUGH TO EVERY CAMPUS, EVERY PLATFORM,
EVERY CULTURAL STRONGHOLD UNTIL WE WIN. DOUBLE THE IMPACT OF YOUR GIFT
TO TURNING POINT USA TODAY.
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/d6d917480da8466f8dc6ad4f1808f710-a1597dd5cbd64af1a3cdb8da4067fc61/63]

JOIN TURNING POINT USA &
DOUBLE YOUR IMPACT

4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044

DCDailyJournal.com

Click Here to Unsubscribe Or Report as Spam
[https://paramountcomm.app.optipub.com/messages/opt-outs/d6d917480da8466f8dc6ad4f1808f710?op-notrack]

This email was directed to dpwillis67@gmail.com only | Our Privacy Policy can be
found by clicking here
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/d6d917480da8466f8dc6ad4f1808f710-e2004aabbfe240d399e064ceb30c5c46/63].

525-K East Market Street # 114
City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176

name: Deb Haaland
subject: Painful news about the National Park Service »
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
My tenure as Interior Secretary may be over, but my sense of duty to protect our public lands has never left me.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=1989%2E400544%2EjVtCaE)
I won’t lie. This is painful news for me to share.
Donald Trump unveiled a budget plan that cuts $5 billion from the Department of the Interior, including over $1 billion from the National Park Service.
If enacted, this would represent the largest cut in the Park Service’s 109-year history.
It’s tough to wrap your head around the scale of these cuts. But I can tell you from my time at Interior that this would cause a ripple effect – one that endangers our beloved public lands, the dedicated public servants who steward them, and the millions of Americans who visit our national parks each year.
**My tenure as Interior Secretary may be over, but my sense of duty to protect our public lands has never left me.**
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250517_2_parkservice?amount=5&refcode=em20250517-1989&refcode2=1989_400544_jVtCaE&akid=1989%2E400544%2EjVtCaE)_Somáh and I taking in the breathtaking landscapes of Canyon de Chelly National Park._
I had so many opportunities to be on our public lands when I was growing up, and I will fight like hell to protect that same possibility for every child.
When Somáh was 10 years old, we hiked Canyon de Chelly National Monument together. Identifying the trees, flowers, and animals brought our spirits closer to that beautiful landscape. Looking out over the towering sandstone mesas and lush green blanket of desert shrubs, we imagined that we stood where our ancestors had.
Our public lands embody who we are as a country. They belong to every American. They represent freedom and openness, deliver fresh air to breathe, and help us connect with the lands and waters that give us everything. **As Donald Trump and Elon Musk prepare to exploit our lands, waters, and forests and the people who care for them, it’s up to each of us to make sure these irreplaceable wonders stay protected.**
**[Governors across the country will be the first line of defense against these brazen attacks on our public lands. Will you rush a $5 donation to our campaign so we can win this race and protect our beloved public lands for future generations?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250517_2_parkservice?amount=5&refcode=em20250517-1989&refcode2=1989_400544_jVtCaE&akid=1989%2E400544%2EjVtCaE)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250517_2_parkservice?amount=5&refcode=em20250517-1989&refcode2=1989_400544_jVtCaE&akid=1989%2E400544%2EjVtCaE)**
Trump’s announcement has come at the exact moment that families across our country prepare to take trips to visit our national parks, wildlife refuges, and public lands. We’re entering peak visitation season, which begs the question:
* Who will be around to manage our national parks?
* Who will empty the trash cans and make sure that trails are safe?
* Who will track the wildlife, test our waters, and do all the things that we know are so important to our public lands?

Our public lands belong to all of us. We must treat this moment as an urgent call to action to stand up for the landscapes and future our children will inherit.
**[Will you make your first-ever $5 contribution to our campaign so we can win this race and protect our public lands? As governor, I’ll be a fierce defender of our rivers, mesas, farmlands, and forests, but I can’t win without your support.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250517_2_parkservice?amount=5&refcode=em20250517-1989&refcode2=1989_400544_jVtCaE&akid=1989%2E400544%2EjVtCaE)**
Yours in the fight,
Deb
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250517-2&t=2&refcode2=1989_400544_jVtCaE&akid=1989%2E400544%2EjVtCaE)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=1989%2E400544%2EjVtCaE)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=1989%2E400544%2EjVtCaE)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)

name: Kathy Barnette
subject: I am the American Dream
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BE BETTER AMERICA PAC
body:
My story

|
---
Fellow American,

Throughout my life, I have overcome significant obstacles to be where I am today.

I was raised in poverty on a pig farm in rural Alabama. We lived in a home with no insulation or running water, including an outhouse in the back and a well on the side.

Despite the odds, I was the first in my family to graduate from college, served ten years in the U.S. Military Reserves, and was subsequently accepted into Officer Candidate School. I transitioned into finance, academia, and media, becoming a frequent national television and radio commentator.

In 2020, I decided to continue my service to our country and launched campaigns for Pennsylvania's 4th district and again for Pennsylvania's Senate seat in 2022. Running as a black conservative isn't easy, but I had no choice but to stand up to the failed Democratic policies that have failed the black community and the broader American community, time and time again.

**Despite limited time, resources, and an unprecedented smear campaign, I earned more than 330,000 votes, defied expectations, and surged to become a formidable candidate in a crowded field.**

_This experience taught me that this journey is not about me. It 's about you and the beautiful people of Pennsylvania. _

I traveled 1,500 miles a week for 13 months, meeting my fellow Pennsylvanians. The people appreciated the authenticity of my journey, and I appreciated theirs. I heard their stories, could see their eyes, and felt their worries. I knew I was one of them, and that we are one together.

As a wife and mother of two, I deeply care about this country's future.
**
[I'm reaching out to help build a coalition for the next generation of Americans. Can I count on your support?](http://links.bbapac.com/u/click?_t=5784e5e40dc94351a7bcbabf677d3bf7&_m=169c73cc4c4e44b6b1201f3815c4ddfc&_e=J6mNzlAB8XxjdD9CZWlSDd_f-x2d86-FC07-h28hEJmXSEvxIyUa8EeBD_N26bSuiFR3lLppGCM7AhfVQWpmpXclOyfoF26bTdYd4ZZv6RdOGl96CM0l0In0CclET2l5YUhUqkkBpiwIUb5kBx7Yx9M_Hx62lI8G537K9Q6niv3AndfCLoBfnsgtkTsexbEKIqJCnpaHNzSksAE6LK_Q-g2mqZyERADTAdJC3B9saDTtNGxIpHVh32nBgq6ldfrOYt3YHLaElB3Gteu2taekqL5Q45N7i9MqHXTM0_jUud1UHOOjgaM1iBkWXOzQJdDH)**[](http://links.bbapac.com/u/click?_t=5784e5e40dc94351a7bcbabf677d3bf7&_m=169c73cc4c4e44b6b1201f3815c4ddfc&_e=J6mNzlAB8XxjdD9CZWlSDd_f-x2d86-FC07-h28hEJmXSEvxIyUa8EeBD_N26bSuiFR3lLppGCM7AhfVQWpmpXclOyfoF26bTdYd4ZZv6RdOGl96CM0l0In0CclET2l5YUhUqkkBpiwIUb5kBx7YxxuaFpUpltuYir6IXOH89HPifDXxbuyPns0r3YcViSHvG8PdVoW1fJMUltbBfJu7Jed_HarkDox_acxJLiWZH3FXubxFSUQB32NTqlinfTTS-5NCx-ikSEEVMXXWIGqDVX6f854VmKJ37YWQcXzZwdx4oGquoc49AIlmQL9Z0t6a)

body:
Every single House Republican on the Judiciary Committee recently voted to let Trump DETAIN AND DEPORT U.S. CITIZENS.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250517-5057-footer&t=1&akid=5057%2E420207%2EiKvC7I)
This is batsh*t crazy, Peter:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250517-1?refcode=em20250517-5057&amount=3&refcode2=5057_420207_iKvC7I&akid=5057%2E420207%2EiKvC7I)
**Every single House Republican on the Judiciary Committee recently voted to let Trump DETAIN AND DEPORT U.S. CITIZENS. Every single one!**
This wasn’t just some symbolic vote. It’s a chilling reminder of the authoritarian threat we’re facing and of what’s at stake if we don’t mobilize to save our democracy.
They’re not even trying to hide it anymore. And if we don’t step up and speak out, they’re going to think they can get away with it.
Pramila’s working every day to organize both inside _and_ outside of Congress to resist Trump’s authoritarian agenda, and she needs you to stand with her.
[**Peter, if you’re with us in the fight to protect our rights and our democracy, will you pitch in $3 to support Pramila’s work for the progressive movement today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250517-1?refcode=em20250517-5057&amount=3&refcode2=5057_420207_iKvC7I&akid=5057%2E420207%2EiKvC7I)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250517-1?amount=3&refcode=em20250517-5057&refcode2=5057_420207_iKvC7I&akid=5057%2E420207%2EiKvC7I)**
In solidarity,
Team Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250517-5057-footer&t=2&refcode2=5057_420207_iKvC7I&akid=5057%2E420207%2EiKvC7I)**
