name: Squad Victory HQ
subject: RE: Medicaid
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250517-1356-foote&t=1001&akid=1356%2E342411%2E5yZ0Sy ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter, the cruelty
is the point.

Republicans are pushing cuts to Medicaid and food aid in order to pay for
tax cuts for billionaires.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/svfem20250517-save-medicaid/?source=em20250517-1356&akid=1356%2E342411%2E5yZ0Sy ]New York Times logo
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/svfem20250517-save-medicaid/?source=em20250517-1356&akid=1356%2E342411%2E5yZ0Sy ]NYT Headline reading "House Republicans Push Forward Plan to Cut Taxes,
Medicaid and Food Aid"

Republicans aren’t governing with their constituents in mind. They're
governing for the donors and corporations who line their campaign coffers.
Stripping health care and food assistance from families in need isn’t just
bad policy — it’s morally indefensible.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/svfem20250517-save-medicaid/?source=em20250517-1356&akid=1356%2E342411%2E5yZ0Sy ]Image of a tweet from Data for Progress reading "There is nto a single
congressional district in the U.S. where more than 15% of voters support
cuts to Medicaid." Below the text is an image of a map of the United
States where Districts are colored in according to support for Medicaid
cuts. No bucket is higher than 15%, and the entire map is various shades
of red, indicating that districts are not supportive of Medicaid cuts.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/svfem20250517-save-medicaid/?source=em20250517-1356&akid=1356%2E342411%2E5yZ0Sy ]Add your name to our petition demanding that Republicans keep their
hands off Medicaid.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/svfem20250517-save-medicaid/?source=em20250517-1356&akid=1356%2E342411%2E5yZ0Sy ]Sign On

At a time when families are already struggling to afford life-saving
medications, doctor visits, and basic care, the last thing we need is
cruel, unnecessary cuts to the programs that keep our communities healthy.

Thank you so much for your support.

In solidarity,

The Squad

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1356%2E342411%2E5yZ0Sy

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

| **About the Republican Party of Florida**
* * *
The Republican Party of Florida will promote the principles upon which our nation and our state were founded: freedom, liberty, personal responsibility, and accountability.

We will advocate fiscally-sound, common-sense solutions that will promote job and economic growth, provide the best education to our children, and create a path to prosperity for Florida and America.

Members of the Republican Party of Florida will be united by these principles and will work to elect Floridians with integrity who will work to enact such solutions. We will seek to be the most effective state party in the nation and serve as a model for other party organizations.

name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: An update on our town halls:
body:
---
Derek, We’ve said it over and over again: **If Republicans won’t talk to their own voters, then Democrats will.** So far, we’ve held over 100 town halls in 48 states, featuring local and national Democratic officials. From Arizona to Pennsylvania, we’ve talked to tens of thousands of voters about their concerns and what’s at stake — including in districts where Republican representatives have refused to show up to talk to their own constituents. Here are some of the leaders who have joined town halls across the country so far: _Sen. Cory Booker
Sen. Elizabeth Warren
Rep. Maxwell Frost
Rep. Melanie Stansbury
Rep. Jill Tokuda
Rep. Greg Casar
Rep. Greg Stanton
Sen. Chris Murphy
Rep. Madeleine Dean
Rep. Joyce Beatty
Gov. Tim Walz_
And so many more local and national leaders! And we’re still going. Our team is working to hold People’s Town Halls in all 50 states and continue giving working families across the country a chance to be heard, even if Republicans ignore them. [Donate now to our continuing efforts:](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?refcode=em_20250517_3479_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3479_22930333__zfEOV&akid=3479%2E22930333%2E_zfEOV) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250517_3479_fr&refcode2=3479_22930333__zfEOV&akid=3479%2E22930333%2E_zfEOV)**

name: America First War Room Sponsor
subject: This juice lowers your blood pressure
body:
---
[View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMtuwjAQRb_G2RHZ41ey8IIWuZWqAmLVLh3HNK5sEuw8yt9XUMp25szco2viEPzxopB8QgCdbzMCQHSNAM6fS0zTd3x7WX1I3KzOYhv5dQvPd3SGB3yy5ixI99O3eZvXIkyHtJczeeDjZXAP-B5aumh8uE7lpmgVPbaYFU4RySQHXmNcdMpKQxytAYR1zEpRgSEYGleTllfsyAuvAAPHnEignFBZOuCs5pWteO1sA4AYvuWUJrrkrSF5XExKfR9L28ciqG4ch3wT0wj0kvryNNngpvx3ZvuIQN-VEegZgX7Np_fxIOpGI6pvpdHNbo-bMV02uyKpdlh8CD4LiRj--n9TzAp-AwAA__8p926V)
| | | | | |
---
| |
---
| | |
When my patients come to me with blood pressure higher than 120/80... I tell them to start drinking this hydrating juice every morning:

[](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxEjs-OmzAchJ_G3ILsn7EdDj6kRVRVpSjqqT1F_kfwrh2IDWTz9ivYKHucmU-aT8Ux-O4hkfiBAHpvMwJA9IAAbv_vMc1v8c-v3T-B9e7Gj5GtK_x8ogu84KtRN076j8HmYz7wMP9NJ7GQFz49RveCn6eli8qHtRVNYSXtLK4KJ4moBANWY1z0Epi2HBtXMccp05hrjZWjwhosdM1J4SVgYJgRAZQRKkoHrKrZ3uxZ7YwGQBXefkoVXfJGkTzdVUrDEEszxCLIfprGvIm1CFo9h-Amfy1HFdzQK_OeVw5Bq7rubBBth65z6ewtog1hDAFfh6-IMTxznnWFaHM6_G6-G0Qbd1Gx82lzWFQejApxk2dFkna8-xB85gJV-LJJr4qLhM8AAAD__9H8gDQ)

You can buy bucketfuls of these ingredients for less than $3.

Yet one 74-year-old patient who started drinking it daily...

**Dropped his BP numbers from 150/80... down to 116/76**.

He didn’t start exercising, adjust his diet, or change his meds.

All he did was start drinking this juice every morning at 6am.

(And it probably saved his life.)

As a medical doctor for over 22 years, I tell all my high BP patients:

**[>> This is the #1 best juice to lower your blood pressure by up to 34 points.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxEjs-OmzAchJ_G3ILsn7EdDj6kRVRVpSjqqT1F_kfwrh2IDWTz9ivYKHucmU-aT8Ux-O4hkfiBAHpvMwJA9IAAbv_vMc1v8c-v3T-B9e7Gj5GtK_x8ogu84KtRN076j8HmYz7wMP9NJ7GQFz49RveCn6eli8qHtRVNYSXtLK4KJ4moBANWY1z0Epi2HBtXMccp05hrjZWjwhosdM1J4SVgYJgRAZQRKkoHrKrZ3uxZ7YwGQBXefkoVXfJGkTzdVUrDEEszxCLIfprGvIm1CFo9h-Amfy1HFdzQK_OeVw5Bq7rubBBth65z6ewtog1hDAFfh6-IMTxznnWFaHM6_G6-G0Qbd1Gx82lzWFQejApxk2dFkna8-xB85gJV-LJJr4qLhM8AAAD__9H8gDQ) **

_To your good health,_

Dr. Rick Cohen

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314
